            <script>
              window.storySetSidebarTab = function(tab) {
                const map = {
                  cast: { btn: 'storySidebarTabCast', panel: 'storySidebarPanelCast' },
                  world: { btn: 'storySidebarTabWorld', panel: 'storySidebarPanelWorld' },
                  scenario: { btn: 'storySidebarTabScenario', panel: 'storySidebarPanelScenario' }
                };
                Object.keys(map).forEach(function(key) {
                  const btn = document.getElementById(map[key].btn);
                  const panel = document.getElementById(map[key].panel);
                  if (btn) btn.classList.toggle('is-active', key === tab);
                  if (panel) panel.classList.toggle('is-active', key === tab);
                });
              };

              window.storyToggleRightSidebar = function(forceCollapsed) {
                const layout = document.getElementById('storyLayoutEl');
                const btn = document.getElementById('storySidebarCollapseBtn');
                const railBtn = document.getElementById('storyRightRailToggle');
                if (!layout) return;
                const collapsed = typeof forceCollapsed === 'boolean' ? forceCollapsed : !layout.classList.contains('is-right-collapsed');
                layout.classList.toggle('is-right-collapsed', collapsed);
                if (btn) {
                  btn.title = collapsed ? 'Open panel kanan' : 'Close panel kanan';
                  btn.setAttribute('aria-label', collapsed ? 'Open panel kanan' : 'Close panel kanan');
                  btn.classList.toggle('is-collapsed', collapsed);
                }
                if (railBtn) {
                  railBtn.title = collapsed ? 'Open panel kanan' : 'Close panel kanan';
                  railBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', collapsed ? 'Open panel kanan' : 'Close panel kanan');
                }
              };

              window.storyToggleSidebarAvatar = function(forceCollapsed) {
                return window.storyToggleRightSidebar(forceCollapsed);
              };

              window.storyOpenWorldPicker = function() {
                window.LoopStory?.openStoryWorldPickerModal?.();
              };

              window.storyEditActiveWorld = function() {
                window.LoopStory?.editActiveWorld?.();
              };

              window.storyToggleWorldSettings = function() {
                window.LoopStory?.toggleWorldSettings?.();
              };

            </script>
          </div>
          <!-- story comments moved to composer float -->
        </div>
      </section>

    window.CORE_REGISTRY = CORE_REGISTRY;

    // Initialize Core Grids from Registry
    // Wrapped in IIFE to prevent SyntaxError on re-run/reload
    const coreGrid = document.getElementById('coreGrid');
    const coreGridLoop = document.getElementById('coreGridLoop');
    
    // Clear existing to prevent duplication on reload
    if(coreGrid) coreGrid.innerHTML = '';
    if(coreGridLoop) coreGridLoop.innerHTML = '';
    
    Object.keys(CORE_REGISTRY).forEach(key => {
      const core = CORE_REGISTRY[key];
      const createItem = () => {
        const div = document.createElement("div");
        div.className = 'core-item';
        div.dataset.value = key;
        div.dataset.desc = core.desc;
        div.textContent = key;
        return div;
      };
      
      if(coreGrid) coreGrid.appendChild(createItem());
      if(coreGridLoop) coreGridLoop.appendChild(createItem());
    });

    // =========================================================================
    // HELPER: NORMALIZE IMAGE DATA (PRIORITY 1)
    // =========================================================================
    function normalizeImageData(data) {
      if (!data) return { url: '', id: '' };
      if (typeof data === 'string') {
        return {
          url: data.trim(),
          id: ''
        };
      }
      return {
        url: data.imageUrl || data.dataUrl || data.url || '',
        id: data.imageId || data.id || ''
      };
    }

    // =========================================================================
    // GLOBAL HELPERS (PRIORITY 1 & 5)
    // =========================================================================
    var privateGallery = createMediaGallery();
    window.__loopPrivateGallery = privateGallery;


    window.saveCurrentImageToPrivateGallery = async function(btn) {
      try {
        const norm = normalizeImageData(window._currentImageData);
        if (!norm.url) return;

        const blob = await fetch(norm.url).then(r => r.blob());
        await privateGallery.add(blob);

        const old = btn.innerHTML;
        btn.innerHTML = '<span style="font-size:18px;color:#ffbe0a;font-weight:700;">✓</span>';
        setTimeout(() => btn.innerHTML = old, 1200);
      } catch (err) {
        console.error("saveCurrentImageToPrivateGallery failed:", err);
      }
    };

    function finishLoopImageStoryAction(btn, statusText, afterApply) {
      try {
        if (typeof switchPage === 'function') switchPage('story');
        if (typeof window.storyToggleRightSidebar === 'function') window.storyToggleRightSidebar(false);
        if (typeof afterApply === 'function') {
          setTimeout(() => {
            try { afterApply(); } catch (err) { console.error(err); }
          }, 40);
        }
      } catch (err) {
        console.error(err);
      }

      const old = btn.innerHTML;
      btn.innerHTML = '<span style="font-size:18px;color:#ffbe0a;font-weight:700;">✓</span>';
      setTimeout(() => {
        btn.innerHTML = old;
        const overlay = btn.closest('.loop-image-actions-overlay') || btn.closest('div[tabindex]');
        if (overlay && typeof overlay.remove === 'function') overlay.remove();
      }, 320);

      try {
        if (typeof window.LoopStory?.renderAll === 'function') window.LoopStory.renderAll();
        if (typeof window.LoopStory?.setStatus === 'function' && statusText) window.LoopStory.setStatus(statusText);
      } catch (err) {
        console.error(err);
      }
    }

    window.addCurrentImageToStoryPrimary = async function(btn) {
      try {
        const norm = normalizeImageData(window._currentImageData);
        if (!norm.url) return;
        if (!window.LoopStory || !window.LoopStory.state || !window.LoopStory.state.primary) {
          console.warn('addCurrentImageToStoryPrimary: LoopStory not ready');
          return;
        }

        window.LoopStory.state.primary = Object.assign({}, window.LoopStory.state.primary || {}, {
          avatarUrl: norm.url
        });

        finishLoopImageStoryAction(btn, 'image added to primary character', function() {
          if (typeof window.storySetSidebarTab === 'function') window.storySetSidebarTab('cast');
          if (typeof window.storyOpenCharacterModal === 'function') window.storyOpenCharacterModal('primary');
        });
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('addCurrentImageToStoryPrimary failed:', err);
      }
    };

    window.addCurrentImageToStoryScene = async function(btn) {
      try {
        const norm = normalizeImageData(window._currentImageData);
        if (!norm.url) return;
        if (!window.LoopStory || !window.LoopStory.state) {
          console.warn('addCurrentImageToStoryScene: LoopStory not ready');
          return;
        }

        const sceneId = `scene_${Date.now()}`;
        const payload = {
          id: sceneId,
          sourceCharacterId: '',
          name: 'In Scene',
          avatarUrl: norm.url,
          short: '',
          appearance: '',
          characterDescription: '',
          description: ''
        };

        if (!Array.isArray(window.LoopStory.state.inScene)) window.LoopStory.state.inScene = [];
        window.LoopStory.state.inScene.push(payload);

        finishLoopImageStoryAction(btn, 'image added to in-scene character', function() {
          if (typeof window.storySetSidebarTab === 'function') window.storySetSidebarTab('cast');
          if (typeof window.storyOpenCharacterModal === 'function') window.storyOpenCharacterModal('scene', sceneId);
        });
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('addCurrentImageToStoryScene failed:', err);
      }
    };

    window.addCurrentImageToStoryWorld = async function(btn) {
      try {
        const norm = normalizeImageData(window._currentImageData);
        if (!norm.url) return;
        if (!window.LoopStory || !window.LoopStory.state) {
          console.warn('addCurrentImageToStoryWorld: LoopStory not ready');
          return;
        }

        const existing = window.LoopStory.state.activeWorld && typeof window.LoopStory.state.activeWorld === 'object'
          ? window.LoopStory.state.activeWorld
          : {
              id: `world_${Date.now()}`,
              title: 'Story World',
              short: '',
              premise: '',
              scenario: '',
              contextSummary: '',
              contextMemo: '',
              contextLore: '',
              contextGlossary: '',
              imageUrl: '',
              tags: []
            };

        const nextWorld = Object.assign({}, existing, {
          imageUrl: norm.url
        });

        window.LoopStory.state.activeWorld = nextWorld;
        if (window.LoopStory.worldPreviewCache) {
          const cacheKey = String(nextWorld.id || nextWorld.title || '').trim();
          if (cacheKey) window.LoopStory.worldPreviewCache[cacheKey] = norm.url;
        }

        finishLoopImageStoryAction(btn, 'image added to story world', function() {
          if (typeof window.storySetSidebarTab === 'function') window.storySetSidebarTab('world');
        });
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('addCurrentImageToStoryWorld failed:', err);
      }
    };

    window.closeStoryInlineImageModal = function(btn) {
      const overlay = btn?.closest('.story-inline-image-modal-overlay')
        || btn?.closest('div[tabindex]')
        || window._storyInlineImageModalEl
        || null;
      if (overlay) overlay.remove();
      if (window._storyInlineImageModalEl === overlay) window._storyInlineImageModalEl = null;
    };

    function resolveStoryInlineImageData(data) {
      const raw = data || {};
      const norm = normalizeImageData(raw);
      const inlineKey = String(raw.inlineKey || '').trim();
      const inlineIndex = Number.isFinite(Number(raw.inlineIndex)) ? Number(raw.inlineIndex) : 0;

      let url = String(norm.url || raw.url || '').trim();
      if (!url && inlineKey && window.LoopStory?.state?.inlineImages?.[inlineKey]?.images) {
        url = String(window.LoopStory.state.inlineImages[inlineKey].images?.[inlineIndex] || '').trim();
      }

      return {
        ...raw,
        inlineKey,
        inlineIndex,
        url,
        id: String(norm.id || raw.id || '').trim()
      };
    }

    window.openStoryInlineImageFullscreen = function(input) {
      try {
        const norm = normalizeImageData(input);
        if (!norm.url) return;

        const existing = document.querySelector('.story-inline-fullscreen-overlay');
        if (existing) existing.remove();

        const overlay = document.createElement('div');
        overlay.className = 'story-inline-fullscreen-overlay';
        overlay.tabIndex = 0;
        overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:10001;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:24px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.82);backdrop-filter:blur(4px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(4px);';
        overlay.innerHTML = `
          <button type="button" data-close style="position:absolute;top:18px;right:18px;width:36px;height:36px;border:none;background:transparent;color:var(--accent);cursor:pointer;padding:0;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true" style="width:22px;height:22px;display:block;stroke:currentColor;stroke-width:2;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round;"><path d="M6 6L18 18"></path><path d="M18 6L6 18"></path></svg>
          </button>
          <img src="${norm.url}" alt="" style="display:block;max-width:min(96vw,1400px);max-height:92vh;width:auto;height:auto;object-fit:contain;">
        `;
        const close = () => overlay.remove();
        overlay.querySelector('[data-close]')?.addEventListener('click', close);
        overlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
          if (e.target === overlay) close();
        });
        overlay.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
          if (e.key === 'Escape') close();
        });
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        overlay.focus();
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('openStoryInlineImageFullscreen failed:', err);
      }
    };

    window.zoomStoryInlineImageFromModal = function(btn) {
      try {
        const data = resolveStoryInlineImageData(window._currentStoryInlineImageData || {});
        const fallbackUrl = String(btn?.getAttribute?.('data-inline-url') || '').trim();
        const url = String(data.url || fallbackUrl || '').trim();
        if (url) window.openStoryInlineImageFullscreen(url);
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('zoomStoryInlineImageFromModal failed:', err);
      } finally {
        window.closeStoryInlineImageModal(btn);
      }
    };

    window.saveStoryInlineImageToPrivateGallery = async function(btn) {
      try {
        const data = window._currentStoryInlineImageData || {};
        if (!data.inlineKey) return;
        if (window.LoopStory && typeof window.LoopStory.keepInlineImageAt === 'function') {
          await window.LoopStory.keepInlineImageAt(data.inlineKey, Number(data.inlineIndex) || 0);
        }
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('saveStoryInlineImageToPrivateGallery failed:', err);
      } finally {
        window.closeStoryInlineImageModal(btn);
      }
    };

    window.deleteStoryInlineImageFromModal = function(btn) {
      try {
        const data = window._currentStoryInlineImageData || {};
        if (!data.inlineKey) return;
        if (window.LoopStory && typeof window.LoopStory.deleteInlineImageAt === 'function') {
          window.LoopStory.deleteInlineImageAt(data.inlineKey, Number(data.inlineIndex) || 0);
        }
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('deleteStoryInlineImageFromModal failed:', err);
      } finally {
        window.closeStoryInlineImageModal(btn);
      }
    };

    window.showStoryInlineImageActionModal = function(data) {
      const resolvedData = resolveStoryInlineImageData(data || {});
      window._currentStoryInlineImageData = resolvedData;

      if (window._storyInlineImageModalEl && window._storyInlineImageModalEl.remove) {
        window._storyInlineImageModalEl.remove();
      }

      const overlay = document.createElement('div');
      overlay.className = 'hall-world-modal-overlay story-inline-image-modal-overlay';
      overlay.tabIndex = 0;
      overlay.innerHTML = `
        <div class="hall-world-modal-shell" style="width:min(var(--loop-modal-m), calc(100vw - 32px));">
          <div class="hall-world-modal-head">
            <div class="hall-world-modal-brand">
              <div class="hall-world-modal-logo" aria-hidden="true">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 48 48" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                  <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="17" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"/>
                  <defs>
                    <mask id="storyInlineImageActionModalCut">
                      <rect width="48" height="48" fill="white"/>
                      <circle cx="20" cy="16" r="6" fill="black"/>
                    </mask>
                  </defs>
                  <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="10" fill="currentColor" mask="url(#storyInlineImageActionModalCut)"/>
                </svg>
              </div>
              <div class="hall-world-modal-main">
                <div class="hall-world-modal-kicker">Image Inspector</div>
                <div class="hall-world-modal-title">Render Actions</div>
                <div class="hall-world-modal-subtitle">Quick actions for this story image without leaving the scene.</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <button type="button" class="hall-world-modal-close" data-close aria-label="Close">×</button>
          </div>
          <div class="hall-world-modal-body">
            <div class="image-action-menu" style="padding:0; box-shadow:none; border:none; background:transparent;">
              <div class="image-action-list">
                <button type="button" class="image-action-btn" data-story-inline-act="save">
                  <span style="width:1rem;height:1rem;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;opacity:.92;">
                    <svg viewBox="0 0 512 512" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" style="width:15px;height:15px;display:block;">

                      <path d="M42.667,448c0,35.285,28.715,64,64,64h298.667c35.285,0,64-28.715,64-64v-42.667H42.667V448z"></path>
                    </svg>
                  </span>
                  <span style="flex:1;">Save to Private Gallery</span>
                </button>

                <button type="button" class="image-action-btn" data-story-inline-act="delete">
                  <span style="width:1rem;height:1rem;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;opacity:.92;">
                    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" style="width:15px;height:15px;display:block;">
                      <path d="M9 3h6l1 2h4v2H4V5h4l1-2zm-2 6h2v9H7V9zm4 0h2v9h-2V9zm4 0h2v9h-2V9zM6 21a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V7h16v12a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6z"/>
                    </svg>
                  </span>
                  <span style="flex:1;">Delete</span>
                </button>

                <button type="button" class="image-action-btn" data-story-inline-act="zoom" data-inline-url="${resolvedData.url}">
                  <span style="width:1rem;height:1rem;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;opacity:.92;">
                    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" style="width:15px;height:15px;display:block;">
                      <path d="M23,24H1c-0.6,0-1-0.4-1-1V1c0-0.6,0.4-1,1-1h22c0.6,0,1,0.4,1,1v22C24,23.6,23.6,24,23,24z M2,22h20V2H2V22z"></path>
                      <path d="M23,19H1c-0.6,0-1-0.4-1-1s0.4-1,1-1h22c0.6,0,1,0.4,1,1S23.6,19,23,19z"></path>
                      <path d="M1,17c-0.3,0-0.5-0.1-0.7-0.3c-0.4-0.4-0.4-1,0-1.4l6-6c0.4-0.4,1-0.4,1.4,0s0.4,1,0,1.4l-6,6C1.5,16.9,1.3,17,1,17z"></path>
                      <path d="M11,15c-0.3,0-0.5-0.1-0.7-0.3l-4-4c-0.4-0.4-0.4-1,0-1.4s1-0.4,1.4,0l4,4c0.4,0.4,0.4,1,0,1.4C11.5,14.9,11.3,15,11,15z"></path>
                      <path d="M9,13c-0.3,0-0.5-0.1-0.7-0.3c-0.4-0.4-0.4-1,0-1.4l5-5c0.4-0.4,1-0.4,1.4,0s0.4,1,0,1.4l-5,5C9.5,12.9,9.3,13,9,13z"></path>
                      <path d="M18,12c-1.7,0-3-1.3-3-3s1.3-3,3-3s3,1.3,3,3S19.7,12,18,12z M18,8c-0.6,0-1,0.4-1,1s0.4,1,1,1s1-0.4,1-1S18.6,8,18,8z"></path>
                    </svg>
                  </span>
                  <span style="flex:1;">Zoom Image</span>
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>`;

      const close = () => window.closeStoryInlineImageModal(overlay);
      overlay.querySelector('[data-close]')?.addEventListener('click', close);
      overlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        if (e.target === overlay) close();
      });
      overlay.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
        if (e.key === 'Escape') close();
      });
      overlay.querySelector('[data-story-inline-act="save"]')?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();
        window.saveStoryInlineImageToPrivateGallery(e.currentTarget);
      });
      overlay.querySelector('[data-story-inline-act="delete"]')?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();
        window.deleteStoryInlineImageFromModal(e.currentTarget);
      });
      overlay.querySelector('[data-story-inline-act="zoom"]')?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();
        window.zoomStoryInlineImageFromModal(e.currentTarget);
      });
      document.body.appendChild(overlay);
      window._storyInlineImageModalEl = overlay;
      overlay.focus();
    };

                      <path d="M9,13c-0.3,0-0.5-0.1-0.7-0.3c-0.4-0.4-0.4-1,0-1.4l5-5c0.4-0.4,1-0.4,1.4,0s0.4,1,0,1.4l-5,5C9.5,12.9,9.3,13,9,13z"/>

                <button type="button" onclick="addCurrentImageToStoryScene(this)" class="image-action-btn">
                  <span style="width:1rem;height:1rem;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;opacity:.92;">
                    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true" style="width:15px;height:15px;display:block;" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path fill="currentColor" d="M16 11c1.657 0 3-1.567 3-3.5S17.657 4 16 4s-3 1.567-3 3.5S14.343 11 16 11M8 11c1.657 0 3-1.567 3-3.5S9.657 4 8 4S5 5.567 5 7.5S6.343 11 8 11m0 2c-2.33 0-7 1.17-7 3.5V19h14v-2.5C15 14.17 10.33 13 8 13m8 0c-.29 0-.62.02-.97.05c1.16.84 1.97 1.95 1.97 3.45V19h6v-2.5c0-2.33-4.67-3.5-7-3.5"/></svg>

                <button type="button" onclick="addCurrentImageToStoryWorld(this)" class="image-action-btn">
                  <span style="width:1rem;height:1rem;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;opacity:.92;">
                    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true" style="width:15px;height:15px;display:block;" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path fill="currentColor" d="M12 2C6.48 2 2 6.48 2 12s4.48 10 10 10s10-4.48 10-10S17.52 2 12 2m6.93 6h-2.95a15.7 15.7 0 0 0-1.38-3.56A8.03 8.03 0 0 1 18.93 8M12 4.04c.83 1.2 1.51 2.53 2.02 3.96H9.98A13.8 13.8 0 0 1 12 4.04M4.26 14a7.9 7.9 0 0 1 0-4h3.2a16.6 16.6 0 0 0 0 4zm.81 2h2.95a15.7 15.7 0 0 0 1.38 3.56A8.03 8.03 0 0 1 5.07 16M8.02 8H5.07a8.03 8.03 0 0 1 4.33-3.56A15.7 15.7 0 0 0 8.02 8M12 19.96A13.8 13.8 0 0 1 9.98 16h4.04A13.8 13.8 0 0 1 12 19.96M14.54 14H9.46a14.5 14.5 0 0 1 0-4h5.08a14.5 14.5 0 0 1 0 4m.06 5.56A15.7 15.7 0 0 0 15.98 16h2.95a8.03 8.03 0 0 1-4.33 3.56M16.54 14a16.6 16.6 0 0 0 0-4h3.2a7.9 7.9 0 0 1 0 4z"/></svg>
                  </span>
                  <span style="flex:1;">Add to World Story</span>
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      `;

      const close = () => overlay.remove();
      overlay.querySelector('[data-close]')?.addEventListener('click', close);
      overlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        if (e.target === overlay) close();
      });
      overlay.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
        if (e.key === 'Escape') close();
      });

      document.body.appendChild(overlay);
      overlay.focus();
    };

    window.openLoopImageFullscreen = function(input) {
      const norm = normalizeImageData(input);
      if (!norm.url) return;

      const existing = document.querySelector('.loop-image-fullscreen-overlay');
      if (existing) existing.remove();

      const getAccent = () =>
        getComputedStyle(document.documentElement)
          .getPropertyValue('--accent')
          .trim() || '#ffbe0a';

      const overlay = document.createElement('div');
      overlay.className = 'loop-image-fullscreen-overlay';
      overlay.tabIndex = 0;
      overlay.style.cssText = `
        position:fixed;
        inset:0;
        z-index:1000000;
        display:flex;
        align-items:center;
        justify-content:center;
        padding:18px;
        background:rgba(0,0,0,.88);
        box-sizing:border-box;
      `;

      const frame = document.createElement('div');
      frame.style.cssText = `
        width:100%;
        height:100%;
        display:flex;
        align-items:center;
        justify-content:center;
        position:relative;
      `;

      const img = new Image();
      img.src = norm.url;
      img.alt = 'Fullscreen image';
      img.style.cssText = `
        max-width:100%;
        max-height:100%;
        width:auto;
        height:auto;
        object-fit:contain;
        display:block;
        box-shadow:0 0 24px rgba(0,0,0,.48);
      `;

      const close = document.createElement('button');
      close.type = 'button';
      close.textContent = '✕';
      close.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Close fullscreen image');
      close.style.cssText = `
        position:absolute;
        top:12px;
        right:14px;
        z-index:2;
        width:34px;
        height:34px;
        border:none;
        border-radius:10px;
        background:transparent;
        color:${getAccent()};
        cursor:pointer;
        font:24px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
        display:inline-flex;
        align-items:center;
        justify-content:center;
        opacity:.96;
        transition:transform .15s ease, opacity .15s ease, color .15s ease;
      `;

      const remove = () => overlay.remove();
      close.onclick = remove;
      overlay.onclick = (e) => { if (e.target === overlay || e.target === frame) remove(); };
      overlay.onkeydown = (e) => { if (e.key === 'Escape') remove(); };
      close.onmouseenter = () => { close.style.transform = 'scale(1.08)'; close.style.opacity = '1'; close.style.color = getAccent(); };
      close.onmouseleave = () => { close.style.transform = 'scale(1)'; close.style.opacity = '.96'; close.style.color = getAccent(); };

      frame.append(img, close);
      overlay.appendChild(frame);
      document.body.appendChild(overlay);
      overlay.focus();
    };

    window.showImageFullscreen = window.openLoopImageFullscreen;

    window.copyRenderImageLink = async function(btn, url) {
      try {
        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(url);
        const oldTip = btn.getAttribute('data-tip');
        btn.setAttribute('data-tip', 'Copied');
        setTimeout(() => btn.setAttribute('data-tip', oldTip), 1000);
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('copyRenderImageLink failed:', err);
      }
    };

    // Render image overlay action button now opens the same action modal used by gallery items.
    window.handleRenderSave = async function(btn) {
      const renderId = btn.getAttribute('data-render-id');
      if (!renderId) {
        console.error('handleRenderSave: missing render id');
        return;
      }

      const data = window._renderImageMap ? window._renderImageMap[renderId] : null;
      if (!data) {
        console.error('handleRenderSave: data not found in map for id', renderId);
        return;
      }

      window.showLoopImageActionModal(data);
    };

    async function saveToPrivateGalleryFromData(button, imageData) {
      // Normalize input data (Priority 1)
      const norm = normalizeImageData(imageData);

      if (!norm.url) {
        button.title = "Image not ready yet";
        return;
      }

      if (button.dataset.saved === "1") {
        button.title = "Already saved";
        return;
      }

      button.disabled = true;
      button.classList.add("is-saving");
      button.textContent = "…";
      button.title = "Saving...";

      try {
        const blob = await fetch(norm.url).then(res => res.blob());
        await privateGallery.add(blob);

        button.dataset.saved = "1";
        button.classList.remove("is-saving");
        button.classList.add("is-saved");
        button.textContent = "✓";
        button.title = "Saved to Private Gallery";
      } catch (err) {
        console.error("Failed to save:", err);
        button.disabled = false;
        button.classList.remove("is-saving");
        button.textContent = "☆";
        button.title = "Save failed, try again";
        return;
      }

      setTimeout(() => {
        button.disabled = false;
      }, 400);
    }

    // =========================================================================
    // STATE & ENGINE LOGIC
    // =========================================================================
    var hasGenerated = false;
    var DEFAULT_CORE_STYLE = "Cinematic Realism";
    var selectedCore = "";
    var selectedSignatures = [];
    var selectedArtStyle = "";
    var selectedModifiers = [];
    var selectedAiModifierMode = 'none';
    const ART_STYLE_OPTIONS = [
      "Contemporary Engraving Poster",
      "Neo Woodcut Print",
      "Brutalist Mural Graphic",
      "Urban Stencil Mural",
      "Gallery Silkscreen Pop",
      "Editorial Cut-Paper Contrast",
      "Experimental Ink Poster",
      "Acid Graphic Poster"
    ];
    const ART_STYLE_PAYLOADS = {
      "Contemporary Engraving Poster": "contemporary engraved poster aesthetics, carved black contour discipline, dense etched linework, incised feather detailing, relief print texture, engraved woodcut and linocut influence, bold print composition, flat posterized color blocking, limited crimson black and warm ivory palette, strong silhouette separation, radial sunburst backdrop, dramatic printmaking contrast, handcrafted engraving discipline, sharp decorative detail, modern editorial poster energy, high-contrast ink structure, etched surface density, minimal painterly blending, full-bleed composition, no decorative frame, no inset border, no vintage poster border, no ornate frame, no cinematic rendering language",
      "Neo Woodcut Print": "neo woodcut print aesthetics, coarse carved grain, heavy black ink blocks, visible relief print texture, rough woodcut edge discipline, flattened color planes, earthy crimson black and ochre palette, bold contemporary print composition, tactile carved surface contrast, graphic silhouette massing, full-bleed composition, no decorative frame, no inset border, no vintage poster border",
      "Brutalist Mural Graphic": "brutalist mural graphic aesthetics, monumental wall mural composition, oversized symbolic forms, hard-edged color blocking, concrete wall texture, stark red blue yellow and black palette, civic mural energy, simplified architectural geometry, bold public-art contrast, contemporary mural scale, wall-scale composition, no decorative frame, no poster border",
      "Urban Stencil Mural": "urban stencil mural aesthetics, spray stencil layering, cut-out silhouettes, overspray edge texture, stark wall contrast, rebellious street mural energy, black white and acid accent palette, graphic protest composition, sharp negative space control, wall-scale composition, no decorative frame, no poster border",
      "Gallery Silkscreen Pop": "gallery silkscreen pop aesthetics, layered silkscreen inks, slight registration shift, bold flat saturated palette, sharp silhouette design, halftone print accents, contemporary pop-gallery energy, graphic print contrast, full-bleed composition, no decorative frame, no poster border",
      "Editorial Cut-Paper Contrast": "editorial cut-paper contrast aesthetics, layered cut-paper collage, crisp torn edges, flat shadow separation, bold contemporary palette, strong editorial composition, abstract shape interplay, high contrast surface rhythm, magazine-cover graphic clarity, full-bleed composition, no decorative frame, no poster border",
      "Experimental Ink Poster": "experimental ink poster aesthetics, expressive black ink floods, razor contour drawing, stark negative space, posterized contrast, contemporary art-print energy, limited bold palette, sharp gesture structure, graphic ink discipline, full-bleed composition, no decorative frame, no poster border",
      "Acid Graphic Poster": "acid graphic poster aesthetics, fluorescent contrast, sharp posterized shapes, black field dominance, neon accent palette, contemporary music-poster energy, aggressive silhouette contrast, graphic design tension, modern underground print attitude, full-bleed composition, no decorative frame, no poster border"
    };
    const MODIFIER_OPTIONS = [
      "atmospheric", "graphic", "ornate", "minimal",
      "dreamlike", "weathered", "raw texture", "diagrammatic"
    ];
    var MAX_SIGNATURES = 4;

    var EngineState = {
      engine: {
        core: selectedCore || "",
        signatures: [...selectedSignatures],
        dominanceMode: "hard",
        contextMode: "",
        lastPrompt: ""
      }
    };

    var isSingleSelectMode = false;

    // LEFT CATEGORY CLICK HANDLER
    function switchSettingsCategory(categoryId, btnElement) {
      let leftBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.settings-category-btn');
      leftBtns.forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('active'));
      if (btnElement) btnElement.classList.add('active');

      let panels = document.querySelectorAll('.settings-detail');
      panels.forEach(panel => panel.classList.remove('active'));

      let targetPanel = document.getElementById('detail-' + categoryId);
      if (targetPanel) targetPanel.classList.add('active');
      updateWorkspaceSummary(categoryId);
    }

    function updateWorkspaceSummary(activeCategoryId) {
      const coreEl = document.getElementById('workspaceSummaryCore');
      const artEl = document.getElementById('workspaceSummaryArt');
      const sigEl = document.getElementById('workspaceSummarySignature');
      const focusEl = document.getElementById('workspaceSummaryFocus');
      const toplineEl = document.getElementById('workspaceToplineSection');
      if (coreEl) coreEl.textContent = selectedCore || 'No Core Style';
      if (artEl) artEl.textContent = selectedArtStyle || 'No Art Style';
      if (sigEl) sigEl.textContent = `${selectedSignatures.length} Signature${selectedSignatures.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}`;
      const activeBtn = activeCategoryId ? document.querySelector(`.settings-category-btn[onclick*="'${activeCategoryId}'"] .cat-label`) : document.querySelector('.settings-category-btn.active .cat-label');
      const activeLabel = activeBtn ? String(activeBtn.textContent || '').trim() : 'Core Style';
      if (focusEl) focusEl.textContent = activeLabel || 'Core Style';
      if (toplineEl) toplineEl.textContent = activeLabel || 'Core Style';
    }

    function getResolvedArtStylePayload(styleName) {
      const key = String(styleName || '').trim();
      return key ? (ART_STYLE_PAYLOADS[key] || key) : '';
    }

    function updateArtStyleStatus() {
      const status = document.getElementById('artStyleStatus');
      if (!status) return;
      status.textContent = selectedArtStyle ? `Art Style active: ${selectedArtStyle}` : 'No art style selected.';
      updateWorkspaceSummary();
    }

    function renderArtStyleChips() {
      const container = document.getElementById('artStyleChips');
      if (!container) return;
      container.innerHTML = '';
      ART_STYLE_OPTIONS.forEach((opt) => {
        const chip = document.createElement('div');
        chip.className = 'style-chip';
        chip.innerHTML = `<div class="chip-main">${opt}</div>`;
        chip.dataset.value = opt;
        if (selectedArtStyle === opt) chip.classList.add('active');
        chip.onclick = function() {
          const nextValue = this.dataset.value || '';
          selectedArtStyle = selectedArtStyle === nextValue ? '' : nextValue;
          EngineState.engine.core = getEffectiveCoreStyle();
          renderArtStyleChips();
        };
        container.appendChild(chip);
      });
      updateArtStyleStatus();
    }

    function buildAiModifierTargets() {
      const rawCustom = String(document.getElementById('modifierCustomInput')?.value || '').trim();
      const mode = selectedAiModifierMode || 'none';
      const modeHints = {
        cinematic: 'push drama, stronger framing, and visual intensity',
        atmospheric: 'lean into atmosphere, mood, haze, and tonal pressure',
        stylized: 'allow a stronger visual deviation while keeping the base identity readable'
      };
      if (!rawCustom && mode === 'none') return [];
      const base = 'controlled deviation from the base image logic, keep Core and Signature as the main foundation';
      const parts = [base];
      if (mode !== 'none' && modeHints[mode]) parts.push(modeHints[mode]);
      if (rawCustom) parts.push(rawCustom);
      return [parts.join(', ')];
    }

    function collectModifierTargets() {
      const legacyCustom = [];
      return [...selectedModifiers, ...legacyCustom, ...buildAiModifierTargets()];
    }

    function updateModifierStatus() {
      const status = document.getElementById('modifierStatus');
      if (!status) return;
      const total = collectModifierTargets();
      status.textContent = total.length ? `${total.length} modifier${total.length > 1 ? 's' : ''} active.` : 'No modifier selected.';
      EngineState.engine.core = getEffectiveCoreStyle();
      updateWorkspaceSummary();
    }

    function renderModifierChips() {
      const container = document.getElementById('modifierChips');
      if (!container) return;
      container.innerHTML = '';
      MODIFIER_OPTIONS.forEach((opt) => {
        const chip = document.createElement('div');
        chip.className = 'style-chip';
        chip.innerHTML = `<div class="chip-main">${opt}</div>`;
        chip.dataset.value = opt;
        if (selectedModifiers.includes(opt)) chip.classList.add('active');
        chip.onclick = function() {
          const val = this.dataset.value || '';
          if (selectedModifiers.includes(val)) {
            selectedModifiers = selectedModifiers.filter(item => item !== val);
          } else {
            selectedModifiers.push(val);
          }
          EngineState.engine.core = getEffectiveCoreStyle();
          renderModifierChips();
        };
        container.appendChild(chip);
      });
      updateModifierStatus();
    }

    window.updateAiModifierStatus = function() {
      const status = document.getElementById('aiModifierStatus');
      const rawCustom = String(document.getElementById('modifierCustomInput')?.value || '').trim();
      if (status) {
        const pieces = [];
        if (selectedAiModifierMode && selectedAiModifierMode !== 'none') pieces.push(`Mode: ${capitalize(selectedAiModifierMode)}`);
        if (rawCustom) pieces.push('Deviation note active');
        status.textContent = pieces.length ? `AI Modifier active. ${pieces.join(' · ')}.` : 'No extra modifier mode selected.';
      }
      if (typeof updateModifierStatus === 'function') updateModifierStatus();
    };

    window.selectAiModifierMode = function(mode) {
      selectedAiModifierMode = mode || 'none';
      const chips = document.querySelectorAll('#aiModifierModeChips .style-chip');
      chips.forEach((chip) => {
        const isActive = chip.dataset.aiModifier === selectedAiModifierMode;
        chip.classList.toggle('active', isActive);
        chip.setAttribute('aria-pressed', isActive ? 'true' : 'false');
      });
      window.updateAiModifierStatus();
      return false;
    };

    function openRightPanel(mode, btnElement) {
      switchSettingsCategory(mode, btnElement);
    }

    function capitalize(str) {
      return str.replace(/\b\w/g, c => c.toUpperCase());
    }

    function shouldUseDefaultCoreFallback() {
      return !selectedCore && !selectedArtStyle && collectModifierTargets().length === 0;
    }

    function getEffectiveCoreStyle() {
      if (selectedCore) return String(selectedCore).trim();
      return shouldUseDefaultCoreFallback() ? String(DEFAULT_CORE_STYLE || '').trim() : '';
    }

    function clearSignatureSectionEmptyState() {
      const container = document.getElementById('signatureChips');
      if (container) container.innerHTML = '';
      const hint = document.getElementById('signatureLimitHint');
      if (hint) hint.textContent = 'No signature available.';
    }

    
    function renderChips(options) {
      const container = document.getElementById('signatureChips');
      const hint = document.getElementById('signatureLimitHint');
      const subLabel = document.getElementById('signatureSubLabel');
      
      container.innerHTML = '';
      selectedSignatures = []; 
      EngineState.engine.signatures = [...selectedSignatures]; 

      const featuredLargeSignatures = new Map([
        ["modern disney feature animation style", {
          main: "Modern Disney Feature",
          sub: "Animation Style"
        }],
        ["pixar-inspired stylized 3d animation style", {
          main: "Pixar-inspired Stylized 3D",
          sub: "Animation Style"
        }],
        ["dreamworks character animation style", {
          main: "DreamWorks Character",
          sub: "Animation Style"
        }],
        ["arcane / fortiche painterly animation style", {
          main: "Arcane / Fortiche Painterly",
          sub: "Animation Style"
        }],
        ["laika stop-motion cinematic style", {
          main: "Laika Stop-motion Cinematic",
          sub: "Style"
        }]
      ]);

      options.forEach(opt => {
        let chip = document.createElement('div');
        chip.className = 'style-chip';

        const normalized = String(opt || '').trim().toLowerCase();

        const suffixes = [
          "Architectural Visualization (Archviz) Style", "Physically-based Stylized Realism Style", "Semi-realistic Digital Painting Style", "Stylized Cinematic Action Style", "Semi-realistic "Expressive Manga Style", "Action Visual Style", "Manga Art Style", "Character Rendering Style", "Product Visualization Style", "Hyperreal Render Style", "Stylized Realistic Rendering Style", "Hybrid Realism Style", "Concept Realism Style", "Hard-surface Style", "Character/Environment Style", "Heroic Fantasy Painting Style", "Detailed Illustrative Style", "Realistic Fantasy Illustration Style", "Detailed Semi-realistic Style", "Graphic Design Illustration Style", "Typographic Illustration Style", "Conceptual Illustration Style", "Narrative Illustration Style", "Modern Editorial Illustration Style", "Graphic Illustration Style", "Minimal Illustration Style", "Magical Girl Aesthetic", "Sakuga-driven Animation Style", "Stylized Mythic Fantasy Aesthetic", "Stylized 2D-3D Realism Style", "Soft Semi-realistic Character Style", "Soft Realism Portrait Style", "Controlled Realism Lighting Style", "High-detail Character Rendering Style", "Digital Painting Realism Style", "Game Cinematic Cutscene Style", "Contemporary Realistic Cinematic Style", "Contemporary Cinematic Anime Style", "Modern Shōnen Anime Visual Style", "Contemporary Graphic Illustration Style", "Clean Commercial Aesthetic", "Comic Art Style", "Comic Noir Style", "Comic Style", "Classic Comic Style", "Classic Manga Style", "Manga Storytelling Style", "Shōnen Anime Style", "Classic 80s Anime Style", "90s Anime Aesthetic", "Editorial Magazine Illustration Layout", "Poster Design Illustration Style", "Conceptual Editorial Illustration Tone", "Minimalist Illustration Style", "Flat Design Illustration Style", "Semi-flat Illustration Style", "Vector-based Illustration Style", "Children's Book Illustration Aesthetic", "Infographic Visual Style", "Flat Design Illustration Systems", "Dark Fantasy Art Style", "Graphic Editorial Style", "Illustration Aesthetic", "Illustration Systems", "Illustration Layout", "Illustration Tone", "Classic Golden Age Comic Style", "Silver Age Comic Style", "Graphic Novel "Aesthetic", "Look", "Tone", "Systems", "Layout", "Art Style"
        ];

        let main = opt;
        let sub = "";

        if (featuredLargeSignatures.has(normalized)) {
          chip.classList.add('is-featured-signature');
          const featured = featuredLargeSignatures.get(normalized);
          main = featured.main;
          sub = featured.sub;
        } else {
          for (let s of suffixes) {
            if (opt.toLowerCase().endsWith(s.toLowerCase())) {
              main = opt.slice(0, -s.length).trim();
              sub = s;
              break;
            }
          }
        }

        chip.innerHTML = `
          <div class="chip-main">${main}</div>
          ${sub ? `<div class="chip-sub">${sub}</div>` : ""}
        `;
        
        chip.dataset.value = opt;
        
        chip.addEventListener('click', function() {
          let val = this.getAttribute('data-value');
          
          if(isSingleSelectMode) {
            container.querySelectorAll('.style-chip').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('active'));
            this.classList.add('active');
            selectedSignatures = [val];
          } else {
            if(this.classList.contains('active')) {
              this.classList.remove('active');
              selectedSignatures = selectedSignatures.filter(v => v !== val);
            } else {
              if(selectedSignatures.length < MAX_SIGNATURES) {
                this.classList.add('active');
                selectedSignatures.push(val);
              } else {
                this.style.animation = "shake 0.3s ease";
                setTimeout(() => this.style.animation = "", 300);
              }
            }
          }
          EngineState.engine.signatures = [...selectedSignatures];
          updateHint();
        });
        
        container.appendChild(chip);
      });
      updateHint();
    }

    function updateHint() {
      const hint = document.getElementById('signatureLimitHint');
      if(isSingleSelectMode) {
        hint.textContent = selectedSignatures.length > 0 ? "1 selected" : "Select 1 Signature";
      } else {
        hint.textContent = `${selectedSignatures.length}/${MAX_SIGNATURES} selected`;
      }
      updateWorkspaceSummary();
    }

    function initCoreSelection() {
      let allCoreItems = document.querySelectorAll('#coreGrid .core-item, #coreGridLoop .core-item');

      allCoreItems.forEach(core => {
        core.addEventListener('click', function() {
          const nextValue = this.getAttribute('data-value') || '';
          const isAlreadyActive = this.classList.contains('active') && selectedCore === nextValue;

          allCoreItems.forEach(c => c.classList.remove('active'));

          if (isAlreadyActive) {
            selectedCore = '';
            EngineState.engine.core = getEffectiveCoreStyle();
          } else {
            this.classList.add('active');
            selectedCore = nextValue;
            EngineState.engine.core = getEffectiveCoreStyle();
          }

          updateSignatureSection();
          updateWorkspaceSummary();
        });
      });
    }

    function updateSignatureSection() {
      const subLabel = document.getElementById('signatureSubLabel');

      if (!selectedCore) {
        isSingleSelectMode = false;
        selectedSignatures = [];
        EngineState.engine.signatures = [];
        if (subLabel) subLabel.textContent = "(Select a core to enable)";
        clearSignatureSectionEmptyState();
        updateWorkspaceSummary();
        return;
      }

      const singleSelectCores = Object.keys(CORE_REGISTRY); // All cores use this logic now

      if (singleSelectCores.includes(selectedCore)) {
        isSingleSelectMode = true;
        if (subLabel) subLabel.textContent = "(Limited, Max 1)";

        const coreData = CORE_REGISTRY[selectedCore];
        if (coreData && coreData.signatures) {
          renderChips(coreData.signatures);
        } else {
          isSingleSelectMode = false;
          if (subLabel) subLabel.textContent = "(Limited, Max 4)";
          renderChips(["Cyberpunk", "Noir", "Steampunk", "Renaissance", "Art Nouveau", "Vaporwave", "Gothic", "Ukiyo-e"]);
        }
      } else {
        isSingleSelectMode = false;
        if (subLabel) subLabel.textContent = "(Limited, Max 4)";
        renderChips(["Cyberpunk", "Noir", "Steampunk", "Renaissance", "Art Nouveau", "Vaporwave", "Gothic", "Ukiyo-e"]);
      }
    }

    var styleSheet = document.createElement("style");
    styleSheet.innerText = `
      @keyframes shake {
        0% { transform: translateX(0); }
        25% { transform: translateX(-4px); }
        50% { transform: translateX(4px); }
        75% { transform: translateX(-4px); }
        100% { transform: translateX(0); }
      }
    `;
    document.head.appendChild(styleSheet);

    initCoreSelection();
    updateSignatureSection();
    renderArtStyleChips();
    renderModifierChips(); 
    updateAiModifierStatus();

    function getSelectVal(id) {
      let el = document.getElementById(id);
      return el ? el.value : "";
    }

    function toggleChatSettings() {
      if (window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(max-width: 760px)').matches) {
        return;
      }
      const appEl = document.querySelector('.app');
      const isOpen = !!(imageWorkspaceStage && imageWorkspaceStage.classList.contains('show'));
      if (isOpen) {
        window.loopImageWorkspacePinned = false;
        if (imageWorkspaceStage) imageWorkspaceStage.classList.remove('show');
        if (chatSettings) chatSettings.classList.remove('show');
        if (appEl) appEl.classList.remove('image-stage-workspace');
        updateComposerStageButtons();
        syncComposerReservedSpace();
        syncRenderPreviewWidthBounds(null, true);
        requestAnimationFrame(function(){ try { rebalanceLoopRenderGrid(); syncCanvasLayoutMode(true); } catch(e) {} });
        return;
      }
      showWorkspaceStage();
    }

    function updateComposerStageButtons() {
      const workspaceBtn = document.getElementById('workspaceModeBtn');
      const galleryBtn = document.getElementById('galleryToggleBtn');
      const canvasBtn = document.getElementById('canvasModeBtn');
      const gallerySection = document.getElementById('gallerySection');
      const galleryVisible = !!(gallerySection && !gallerySection.hasAttribute('hidden'));
      if (workspaceBtn) workspaceBtn.classList.toggle('is-stage-active', !!(imageWorkspaceStage && imageWorkspaceStage.classList.contains('show')) || window.loopImageWorkspacePinned === true);
      if (galleryBtn) galleryBtn.classList.toggle('is-stage-active', window.activeImageStage === 'gallery' && galleryVisible);
      if (canvasBtn) canvasBtn.classList.toggle('is-stage-active', window.activeImageStage === 'canvas');
    }
    window.updateComposerStageButtons = updateComposerStageButtons;

    function updateGalleryToggleState() {
      let gallerySection = document.getElementById("gallerySection");
      let btn = document.getElementById("galleryToggleBtn");
      if (!gallerySection || !btn) return;
      const isVisible = !gallerySection.hasAttribute("hidden");
      btn.title = isVisible ? "Hide Gallery" : "Show Gallery";
      updateComposerStageButtons();
    }
    window.updateGalleryToggleState = updateGalleryToggleState;

    function toggleGallery() {
      let gallerySection = document.getElementById("gallerySection");
      let mainContent = document.querySelector(".main-content");
      if (!gallerySection) return false;

      gallerySection.removeAttribute("hidden");
      gallerySection.classList.add("show");

      if (window.activeImageStage !== 'gallery') {
        showGalleryStage();
      } else {
        updateGalleryToggleState();
        updateComposerStageButtons();
        syncComposerReservedSpace();
      }

      if (mainContent) {
        gallerySection.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "start" });
      }
      return false;
    }

    function openPrivateGallery() {
      privateGallery.show();
    }

    // =========================================================================
    // GENERATOR ENGINE (PRIORITY 4 - REFACTORED TO USE REGISTRY)
    // =========================================================================
    
    function clamp01(n) {
      n = Number(n);
      if (Number.isNaN(n)) return 0;
      return Math.max(0, Math.min(1, n));
    }

    function getRangeVal(id, fallback) {
      const el = document.getElementById(id);
      if (!el) return fallback;
      const n = parseInt(el.value, 10);
      return Number.isNaN(n) ? fallback : n;
    }

    function uniquePromptParts(parts) {
      const out = [];
      const seen = new Set();
      for (const part of parts || []) {
        const value = String(part || "").trim();
        if (!value) continue;
        const key = value.toLowerCase();
        if (seen.has(key)) continue;
        seen.add(key);
        out.push(value);
      }
      return out;
    }

    function groupClause(label, parts) {
      const clean = uniquePromptParts(parts);
      if (!clean.length) return "";
      return `${label}: ${clean.join(", ")}`;
    }

    function strengthTier(value01) {
      if (value01 >= 0.75) return "high";
      if (value01 >= 0.35) return "medium";
      return "low";
    }

    function normalizePromptToken(value) {
      return String(value || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    }

    function cloneTechnicalGroups(technical) {
      return {
        composition: [...(technical?.composition || [])],
        optics: [...(technical?.optics || [])],
        motion: [...(technical?.motion || [])],
        lighting: [...(technical?.lighting || [])],
        color: [...(technical?.color || [])],
        quality: [...(technical?.quality || [])]
      };
    }

    function matchesKeyword(value, keywords = []) {
      const text = normalizePromptToken(value);
      return keywords.some(keyword => text.includes(normalizePromptToken(keyword)));
    }

    function replaceTechnicalValue(value, replaceMap = {}) {
      const text = normalizePromptToken(value);
      for (const [needle, replacement] of Object.entries(replaceMap)) {
        if (text.includes(normalizePromptToken(needle))) {
          return replacement;
        }
      }
      return value;
    }

    function cleanTechnicalGroup(values, replaceMap, blockedKeywords) {
      const out = [];
      for (const value of values || []) {
        if (!value) continue;
        const replaced = replaceTechnicalValue(value, replaceMap);
        if (matchesKeyword(replaced, blockedKeywords)) continue;
        out.push(replaced);
      }
      return uniquePromptParts(out);
    }

    function maybeEmphasize(parts, strength01, maxRepeat = 1) {
      const clean = uniquePromptParts(parts);
      if (!clean.length) return [];
      if (strength01 >= 0.85) return [...clean, ...clean.slice(0, maxRepeat)];
      if (strength01 >= 0.65) return clean;
      return clean.slice(0, Math.max(1, clean.length - 1));
    }

        "photorealistic", "hyperreal", "hyper realistic", "photo realistic", "real photo", "8k photo", "dslr"

      ],
      illustration: [
        "illustration", "illustrative", "drawn", "drawing", "painted", "painterly"
      ],
      comic: [
        "comic style", "comic book", "graphic novel", "inked"
      ],
      vector: [
        "vector", "flat design", "flat illustration"
      ],
      editorial: [
        "editorial illustration", "magazine illustration"
      ],
      fantasyPainting: [
        "fantasy painting", "oil painting", "heroic fantasy painting"
      ]
    };

    function escapeRegExp(value) {
      return String(value || "").replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&");
    }

    function buildSignatureRegistry(registry) {

        },
        "Hard-surface modeling style": {

          surface: ["panel-line discipline", "hard-edged material articulation"],
          composition: ["form-breakdown readability", "industrial object hero framing"],
          negatives: ["organic plush softness", "watercolor looseness"]
        },
        "Soft organic 3D rendering style": {

          negatives: ["hard industrial machinic severity", "gritty hyperreal surface abrasion"]
        },
        "Hayao Miyazaki film aesthetic": {
