          composition: ["lyrical scene staging", "emotion-forward environmental framing"],
          negatives: ["hyperreal photographic realism", "plastic 3d render"]
        },
        "Modern Disney feature animation style": {
          anchor: ["modern feature animation", "western family animation design", "clean expressive character appeal"],
          surface: ["polished stylized surface rendering", "soft controlled feature-animation shading"],
          composition: ["clear family-feature staging", "readable emotional cinematic framing"],
          negatives: ["gritty live-action realism", "harsh photoreal skin texture", "hard-edged anime cel shading"]
        },
        "Pixar-inspired stylized 3D animation style": {
          anchor: ["stylized 3d feature animation", "appealing character design", "family adventure animation look"],
          surface: ["smooth stylized material rendering", "clean volumetric softness"],
          composition: ["readable character-centric staging", "cinematic but approachable framing"],
          negatives: ["gritty live-action realism", "hyperreal skin pores", "hard graphic comic inking"]
        },
        "DreamWorks character animation style": {
          anchor: ["stylized feature animation", "expressive character animation appeal", "high-energy family adventure staging"],
          surface: ["clean stylized render finish", "expressive surface clarity"],
          composition: ["big readable silhouette design", "dynamic character-focused framing"],
          negatives: ["photographic live-action realism", "flat vector simplification", "ink-heavy comic rendering"]
        },
        "Arcane / Fortiche painterly animation style": {
          anchor: ["hybrid painterly animation rendering", "stylized cinematic character realism", "graphic-painterly fantasy animation"],
          surface: ["painted texture integration", "rich stylized shading"],
          composition: ["cinematic animation framing", "dramatic painterly storytelling"],
          negatives: ["plastic toy-like 3d finish", "flat cel-shading", "washed realism"]
        },
        "Laika stop-motion cinematic style": {
          anchor: ["crafted stop-motion cinematic style", "miniature tactile worldbuilding", "handmade character stylization"],
          surface: ["tactile handcrafted textures", "miniature-scale material richness"],
          composition: ["storybook cinematic framing", "tabletop world perspective"],
          negatives: ["slick digital cgi finish", "photoreal live-action skin", "flat vector simplification"]
        },
        "Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse hybrid 3D style": {
          anchor: ["hybrid comic-animation rendering", "graphic 2d-3d fusion", "stylized comic cinematic energy"],
          surface: ["halftone-inflected texture logic", "bold graphic shading"],
          composition: ["impact-driven comic framing", "kinetic animation perspective"],
          negatives: ["plain live-action realism", "sterile product render polish", "generic anime cel shading"]
        }
      };

      const out = {};
      Object.keys(registry || {}).forEach(coreKey => {
        const core = registry[coreKey] || {};
        (core.signatures || []).forEach(signatureName => {
          out[signatureName] = {
            anchor: uniquePromptParts([signatureName, ...(core.identity || []).slice(0, 2)]),
            surface: uniquePromptParts([...(core.rules || []).slice(0, 2)]),
            composition: uniquePromptParts([`${(core.label || coreKey).toLowerCase()} composition discipline`]),
            negatives: uniquePromptParts([...(core.exclusions || []).slice(0, 3)])
          };
        });
      });

      Object.entries(overrides).forEach(([name, profile]) => {
        const base = out[name] || { anchor: [name], surface: [], composition: [], negatives: [] };
        out[name] = {
          anchor: uniquePromptParts([...(profile.anchor || []), ...(base.anchor || [])]),
          surface: uniquePromptParts([...(profile.surface || []), ...(base.surface || [])]),
          composition: uniquePromptParts([...(profile.composition || []), ...(base.composition || [])]),
          negatives: uniquePromptParts([...(profile.negatives || []), ...(base.negatives || [])])
        };
      });

      return out;
    }

    const SIGNATURE_REGISTRY = buildSignatureRegistry(CORE_REGISTRY);
    window.SIGNATURE_REGISTRY = SIGNATURE_REGISTRY;

    const GLOBAL_QUALITY_LAYER = [
      "best quality",
      "masterpiece",
      "high quality image",
      "clean detail fidelity",
      "strong visual coherence"
    ];

    var LeftSideGeneratorBar = {
      parseUserIntent(text) {
        const raw = String(text || "").trim();
        const lowered = raw.toLowerCase();
        const foundStyleFamilies = [];

        Object.entries(STYLE_FAMILY_LEXICON).forEach(([family, lexemes]) => {
          if ((lexemes || []).some(lexeme => lowered.includes(normalizePromptToken(lexeme)))) {
            foundStyleFamilies.push(family);
          }
        });

        return {
          raw,
          length: raw.length,
          hasRealism: /realistic|photo|cinematic|photorealistic|hyperreal/i.test(raw),
          hasIllustration: /illustration|drawing|anime|comic|painted/i.test(raw),
          foundStyleFamilies: uniquePromptParts(foundStyleFamilies),
          likelyStyleHeavy: foundStyleFamilies.length > 0,
          specificity: raw.length > 120 ? 0.8 : raw.length > 40 ? 0.5 : 0.2
        };
      },

      detectContextMode(intent, core) {
        if (intent?.likelyStyleHeavy) return "strict_core";
        return "style_dominant";
      },

      // Refactored to use CORE_REGISTRY
      StyleEngine: {
        resolve(coreKey) {
          const normalizedCoreKey = String(coreKey || '').trim();
          if (!normalizedCoreKey) {
            return {
              identity: [],
              rules: [],
              exclusions: [],
              dominance: "soft"
            };
          }
          const coreData = CORE_REGISTRY[normalizedCoreKey];
          if (coreData) {
            return {
              identity: coreData.identity,
              rules: coreData.rules,
              exclusions: coreData.exclusions,
              dominance: "hard"
            };
          }
          return {
            identity: [],
            rules: [],
            exclusions: [],
            dominance: "soft"
          };
        }
      },

      StyleSanitizer: {
        buildAuthority(coreData = {}) {
          const authority = coreData.authority || {};
          return {
            replaceMap: authority.replaceMap || {},
            rewriteStyleMap: authority.rewriteStyleMap || authority.replaceMap || {},
            blockedLexemes: uniquePromptParts([
              ...(authority.blockedLexemes || []),
              ...((authority.dropWhenCoreStrong && authority.dropWhenCoreStrong.quality) || []),
              ...(coreData.exclusions || [])
            ]),
            forcedLexemes: uniquePromptParts([
              ...(authority.forcedLexemes || []),
              ...((coreData.identity || []).slice(0, 2)),
              ...((coreData.rules || []).slice(0, 2))
            ])
          };
        },

        collectStyleLexemes(authority = {}) {
          const styleLexemes = [];
          Object.values(STYLE_FAMILY_LEXICON).forEach(values => styleLexemes.push(...(values || [])));
          styleLexemes.push(...(authority.blockedLexemes || []));
          styleLexemes.push(...Object.keys(authority.rewriteStyleMap || {}));
          return uniquePromptParts(styleLexemes).sort((a, b) => b.length - a.length);
        },

        extractSubjectText(rawDescription, authority = {}) {
          let text = String(rawDescription || "");
          const lexemes = this.collectStyleLexemes(authority);
          lexemes.forEach(lexeme => {
            const safe = escapeRegExp(lexeme);
            if (!safe) return;
            text = text.replace(new RegExp(`\\b${safe}\\b`, "gi"), " ");
          });
          text = text.replace(/\s{2,}/g, " ").replace(/\s+,/g, ",").replace(/,+/g, ",").replace(/^\s*,|,\s*$/g, "").trim();
          return text;
        },

        run({ rawDescription, coreKey }) {
          const coreData = CORE_REGISTRY[coreKey] || {};
          const authority = this.buildAuthority(coreData);
          const lowered = String(rawDescription || "").toLowerCase();
          const rejectedStyleHints = [];
          const rewrittenStyleHints = [];
          const acceptedStyleHints = [];

          Object.entries(authority.rewriteStyleMap || {}).forEach(([from, to]) => {
            const needle = normalizePromptToken(from);
            if (!needle || !lowered.includes(needle)) return;
            if (to == null || String(to).trim() === "") {
              rejectedStyleHints.push(from);
            } else {
              rewrittenStyleHints.push({ from, to });
              acceptedStyleHints.push(to);
            }
          });

          (authority.blockedLexemes || []).forEach(token => {
            const needle = normalizePromptToken(token);
            if (!needle || !lowered.includes(needle)) return;
            if (!rejectedStyleHints.some(item => normalizePromptToken(item) === needle)) {
              rejectedStyleHints.push(token);
            }
          });

          const sanitizedSubject = this.extractSubjectText(rawDescription, authority);
          const fallbackSubject = sanitizedSubject || String(rawDescription || "").trim();
          const integrityPenalty = (rejectedStyleHints.length * 0.16) + (rewrittenStyleHints.length * 0.08);
          const integrityScore = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, 1 - integrityPenalty));

          return {
            sanitizedSubject: fallbackSubject,
            acceptedStyleHints: uniquePromptParts(acceptedStyleHints),
            rejectedStyleHints: uniquePromptParts(rejectedStyleHints),
            rewrittenStyleHints,
            forcedCoreHints: uniquePromptParts(authority.forcedLexemes || []),
            integrityScore
          };
        }
      },

      SignatureEngine: {
        resolve(core, selected = [], signatureStrength = 0.5) {
          if (!Array.isArray(selected)) selected = [selected];
          const coreData = CORE_REGISTRY[core] || {};
          return selected
            .filter(s => typeof s === "string" && s.trim() !== "" && s !== "None")
            .map((s, index) => {
              const profile = SIGNATURE_REGISTRY[s] || {};
              return {
                id: `signature-${index}`,
                name: s,
                strength: signatureStrength,
                anchor: uniquePromptParts([...(profile.anchor || [s]), ...((coreData.identity || []).slice(0, 1))]),
                surface: uniquePromptParts(profile.surface || []),
                composition: uniquePromptParts(profile.composition || []),
                negatives: uniquePromptParts(profile.negatives || [])
              };
            });
        }
      },

      TechnicalEngine: {
        resolve(input) {
          return {
            composition: [input.shot, input.angle].filter(Boolean),
            optics: [input.lens, input.focus, input.optical].filter(Boolean),
            motion: [input.motion].filter(Boolean),
            lighting: [input.lighting].filter(Boolean),
            color: [input.colorMode, input.colorTone, input.colorTemp, input.colorIntensity].filter(Boolean),
            quality: [input.detailLevel, input.renderQuality].filter(Boolean)
          };
        }
      },

      WeightEngine: {
        resolve({ snapshot }) {
          return {
            core: clamp01(snapshot.coreStrength / 100),
            signature: clamp01(snapshot.signatureStrength / 100),
            technical: clamp01(snapshot.technicalStrength / 100),
            user: 1
          };
        }
      },

      ConflictResolver: {
        run({ coreProfile, signatureProfiles, intent, technical, weights, snapshot }) {
          const coreKey = snapshot.coreStyle;
          const coreData = CORE_REGISTRY[coreKey];
          const rules = coreData ? coreData.authority : {
            replaceMap: {},
            dropWhenCoreStrong: { optics: [], quality: [] }
          };

          const resolvedTechnical = cloneTechnicalGroups(technical);
          const resolvedSignatures = Array.isArray(signatureProfiles) ? [...signatureProfiles] : [];
          const sanitized = LeftSideGeneratorBar.StyleSanitizer.run({
            rawDescription: snapshot.description,
            coreKey,
            intent,
            weights
          });

          const coreStrength = weights?.core ?? 0.7;
          const technicalStrength = weights?.technical ?? 0.4;

          // 1. Normalize conflicting technical values
          resolvedTechnical.optics = cleanTechnicalGroup(resolvedTechnical.optics, rules.replaceMap, []);
          resolvedTechnical.quality = cleanTechnicalGroup(resolvedTechnical.quality, rules.replaceMap, []);
          resolvedTechnical.lighting = cleanTechnicalGroup(resolvedTechnical.lighting, rules.replaceMap, []);

          // 2. Drop technical tokens if core is strong
          if (coreStrength >= 0.55) {
            resolvedTechnical.optics = cleanTechnicalGroup(
              resolvedTechnical.optics,
              rules.replaceMap,
              rules.dropWhenCoreStrong?.optics || []
            );
            resolvedTechnical.quality = cleanTechnicalGroup(
              resolvedTechnical.quality,
              rules.replaceMap,
              rules.dropWhenCoreStrong?.quality || []
            );
          }

          // 3. Legacy safeguard
          if (coreData && (coreKey === "Graphic Illustration" || coreKey === "Editorial Illustration") && intent.hasRealism) {
            resolvedTechnical.optics = resolvedTechnical.optics.filter(x => !matchesKeyword(x, ["telephoto"]));
          }

          // 4. Technical strength affects density
          if (technicalStrength < 0.35) {
            resolvedTechnical.color = resolvedTechnical.color.slice(0, 2);
            resolvedTechnical.quality = resolvedTechnical.quality.slice(0, 1);
          }

          return {
            coreProfile,
            signatureProfiles: resolvedSignatures,
            technical: resolvedTechnical,
            sanitized
          };
        }
      },

      composePrompt({ resolved, weights, dominanceMode, snapshot }) {
        const coreData = CORE_REGISTRY[snapshot.coreStyle] || {};
        const qualityLayerBase = coreData.qualityLayer || [];
        const sanitized = resolved.sanitized || {
          sanitizedSubject: snapshot.description || "",
          acceptedStyleHints: [],
          forcedCoreHints: [],
          integrityScore: 1,
          rejectedStyleHints: []
        };

        const coreIdentity = maybeEmphasize(resolved.coreProfile.identity || [], weights.core, 1);
        const coreRules = uniquePromptParts(resolved.coreProfile.rules || []);
        const forcedCoreHints = maybeEmphasize(sanitized.forcedCoreHints || [], weights.core, 1);

        const signatureAnchors = maybeEmphasize(
          Array.isArray(resolved.signatureProfiles)
            ? resolved.signatureProfiles.flatMap(s => [
                ...(s.anchor || []),
                ...(s.surface || []),
                ...(s.composition || [])
              ])
            : [],
          weights.signature,
          1
        );

        const technicalGroups = resolved.technical || {};
        const technicalFlat = uniquePromptParts([
          ...(technicalGroups.composition || []), ...(technicalGroups.optics || []),
          ...(technicalGroups.motion || []), ...(technicalGroups.lighting || []),
          ...(technicalGroups.color || []), ...(technicalGroups.quality || [])
        ]);

        const qualityLayer = maybeEmphasize(uniquePromptParts([...qualityLayerBase, ...GLOBAL_QUALITY_LAYER]), Math.max(weights.technical, 0.62), 1);
        const suppressRepairHints = maybeEmphasize(buildSuppressRepairHints(snapshot.suppressTargets || []), Math.max(weights.technical, 0.58), 1);
        const artStyleLayer = snapshot.artStyle ? maybeEmphasize([snapshot.artStyle], Math.max(weights.signature, 0.48), 1) : [];
        const modifierLayer = maybeEmphasize(uniquePromptParts(snapshot.modifiers || []), Math.max(weights.technical, 0.42), 1);

        const coreTier = strengthTier(weights.core);
        const signatureTier = strengthTier(weights.signature);
        const technicalTier = strengthTier(weights.technical);

        const normalizedCoreStyle = String(snapshot.coreStyle || '').trim();
        const coreLead = normalizedCoreStyle
          ? (coreTier === "high" ? `dominant ${normalizedCoreStyle.toLowerCase()} visual language`
             : coreTier === "medium" ? `${normalizedCoreStyle.toLowerCase()} visual language`
             : `subtle ${normalizedCoreStyle.toLowerCase()} visual language`)
          : "";

        const signatureLead = signatureAnchors.length
          ? (signatureTier === "high" ? "strong signature influence" : signatureTier === "medium" ? "signature influence" : "subtle signature influence")
          : "";
        const technicalLead = technicalFlat.length
          ? (technicalTier === "high" ? "precise composition and rendering directives" : technicalTier === "medium" ? "composition and rendering directives" : "rendering notes")
          : "";

        const technicalGrouped = uniquePromptParts([
          groupClause("shot and angle", technicalGroups.composition || []),
          groupClause("lens and focus", technicalGroups.optics || []),
          groupClause("motion", technicalGroups.motion || []),
          groupClause("lighting", technicalGroups.lighting || []),
          groupClause("color grading", technicalGroups.color || []),
          groupClause("detail and quality", technicalGroups.quality || [])
        ]);

        const finalParts = uniquePromptParts([
          coreLead,
          ...coreIdentity,
          ...coreRules,
          ...forcedCoreHints,
          ...(sanitized.acceptedStyleHints || []),
          ...artStyleLayer,
          ...modifierLayer,
          sanitized.sanitizedSubject,
          ...(signatureAnchors.length ? [signatureLead, ...signatureAnchors] : []),
          ...(technicalFlat.length ? [technicalLead, ...technicalGrouped, ...(technicalTier === "high" ? technicalFlat : [])] : []),
          ...suppressRepairHints,
          ...qualityLayer
        ]);

        return {
          finalPrompt: finalParts.join(", "),
          integrityScore: sanitized.integrityScore,
          rejectedStyleHints: sanitized.rejectedStyleHints || []
        };
      },

      generate(snapshot) {
        const intent = this.parseUserIntent(snapshot.description);
        const contextMode = this.detectContextMode(intent, snapshot.coreStyle);
        const coreProfile = this.StyleEngine.resolve(snapshot.coreStyle, contextMode);

        const signatureProfiles = this.SignatureEngine.resolve(
          snapshot.coreStyle,
          snapshot.signatureStyles || [],
          clamp01(snapshot.signatureStrength / 100)
        );

        const technicalStructured = this.TechnicalEngine.resolve({
          shot: snapshot.shotType, angle: snapshot.cameraAngle, lens: snapshot.lensType,
          focus: snapshot.focusDepth, motion: snapshot.motion, lighting: snapshot.lightingEffects,
          colorMode: snapshot.colorMode, colorTone: snapshot.colorTone, colorTemp: snapshot.colorTemp,
          colorIntensity: snapshot.colorIntensity, detailLevel: snapshot.detailLevel,
          renderQuality: snapshot.renderQuality, optical: snapshot.opticalEffects
        });

        const weights = this.WeightEngine.resolve({ snapshot });
        const resolution = this.ConflictResolver.run({
          coreProfile, signatureProfiles, intent, technical: technicalStructured, weights, snapshot
        });

        const resolved = {
          coreProfile: resolution.coreProfile,
          signatureProfiles: resolution.signatureProfiles,
          intent,
          technical: resolution.technical,
          sanitized: resolution.sanitized
        };

        const promptBundle = this.composePrompt({ resolved, weights, dominanceMode: "hard", snapshot });

        return {
          finalPrompt: promptBundle.finalPrompt,
          integrityScore: promptBundle.integrityScore,
          rejectedStyleHints: promptBundle.rejectedStyleHints,
          resolvedTechnical: resolution.technical,
          coreProfiles: resolution.coreProfile,
          signatureProfiles: resolution.signatureProfiles,
          sanitized: resolution.sanitized
        };
      }
    };

    // =========================================================================
    // UI CONTROLLERS
    // =========================================================================

    const SUPPRESS_REPAIR_MAP = {
      "bad anatomy": ["coherent anatomy", "proportional body structure", "stable anatomical construction"],
      "bad hands": ["coherent hand anatomy", "natural finger spacing", "believable hand posing"],
      "extra fingers": ["natural finger count", "clean hand silhouette", "clear hand structure"],
      "distorted face": ["stable facial structure", "clean facial proportions", "readable facial construction"],
      "malformed eyes": ["aligned eye structure", "clear eye placement", "coherent gaze anatomy"],
      "blurry": ["sharp subject definition", "clear focal detail", "clean edge clarity"],
      "artifacts": ["artifact-free finish", "clean image integrity", "polished render stability"],
      "low detail": ["refined local detail", "high detail fidelity", "clean surface articulation"]
    };

    function collectSuppressTargets() {
      const chipTargets = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#suppressChips .style-chip.active')).map(el => String(el.textContent || '').trim()).filter(Boolean);
      const custom = String(document.getElementById('suppressCustomInput')?.value || '')
        .split(/[\n,\r]+/)
        .map(v => v.trim())
        .filter(Boolean);
      return uniquePromptParts([...chipTargets, ...custom]);
    }

    function buildSuppressRepairHints(targets) {
      return uniquePromptParts((targets || []).flatMap(target => {
        const key = String(target || '').trim().toLowerCase();
        if (!key) return [];
        if (SUPPRESS_REPAIR_MAP[key]) return SUPPRESS_REPAIR_MAP[key];
        return [`careful visual handling of ${target}`, `clean resolution of ${target}`];
      }));
    }

    function updateSuppressStatus() {
      const statusEl = document.getElementById('suppressStatus');
      if (!statusEl) return;
      const targets = collectSuppressTargets();
      statusEl.textContent = targets.length
        ? `${targets.length} repair guard${targets.length > 1 ? 's' : ''} active.`
        : 'No repair guard selected.';
    }

    function buildLoopAiRefinedPrompt(raw, coreKey) {
      const source = String(raw || '').trim();
      if (!source) return '';
      const sanitized = LeftSideGeneratorBar.StyleSanitizer.run({ rawDescription: source, coreKey });
      const cleaned = uniquePromptParts(
        String(sanitized.sanitizedSubject || source)
          .split(/[\n,\r]+/)
          .map(part => part.trim())
          .filter(Boolean)
      ).join(', ');
      return cleaned || source;
    }

    function runLoopAiRefine() {
      const promptEl = document.getElementById('promptInput');
      const outEl = document.getElementById('aiRefineOutput');
      const useEl = document.getElementById('aiRefineUseOnRender');
      if (!promptEl || !outEl) return;
      const refined = buildLoopAiRefinedPrompt(promptEl.value, getEffectiveCoreStyle());
      outEl.value = refined;
      if (useEl && refined) useEl.checked = true;
    }

    function applyLoopAiRefine() {
      const promptEl = document.getElementById('promptInput');
      const outEl = document.getElementById('aiRefineOutput');
      if (!promptEl || !outEl) return;
      const refined = String(outEl.value || '').trim();
      if (!refined) return;
      promptEl.value = refined;
      try { promptEl.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); } catch (e) {}
    }

    function clearLoopAiRefine() {
      const outEl = document.getElementById('aiRefineOutput');
      const useEl = document.getElementById('aiRefineUseOnRender');
      if (outEl) outEl.value = '';
      if (useEl) useEl.checked = false;
    }

    function getEffectivePromptDescription() {
      const promptRaw = String(document.getElementById('promptInput')?.value || '').trim();
      const refined = String(document.getElementById('aiRefineOutput')?.value || '').trim();
      const useRefined = !!document.getElementById('aiRefineUseOnRender')?.checked;
      return useRefined && refined ? refined : promptRaw;
    }

    function snapshotUI() {
      return {
        description: getEffectivePromptDescription(),
        coreStyle: getEffectiveCoreStyle(),
        signatureStyles: [...selectedSignatures],
        artStyle: getResolvedArtStylePayload(selectedArtStyle),
        artStyleName: selectedArtStyle,
        modifiers: collectModifierTargets(),
        shape: document.getElementById("resolutionInput").value,
        numImages: Math.max(1, Math.min(18, parseInt(document.getElementById("imageCountInput").value, 10) || 1)),
        shotType: getSelectVal("shotTypeInput"),
        cameraAngle: getSelectVal("cameraAngleInput"),
        lensType: getSelectVal("lensInput"),
        motion: getSelectVal("cameraFeelInput"),
        colorMode: getSelectVal("colorModeInput"),
        colorTone: getSelectVal("colorToneInput"),
        colorTemp: getSelectVal("colorTempInput"),
        colorIntensity: getSelectVal("colorIntensityInput"),
        focusDepth: getSelectVal("focusDepthInput"),
        opticalEffects: getSelectVal("opticalEffectsInput"),
        lightingEffects: getSelectVal("lightingEffectsInput"),
        detailLevel: getSelectVal("detailLevelInput"),
        renderQuality: getSelectVal("renderQualityInput"),
        signatureStrength: getRangeVal("signatureStrengthInput", 50),
        coreStrength: getRangeVal("coreStrengthInput", 70),
        technicalStrength: getRangeVal("technicalStrengthInput", 40),
        suppressTargets: collectSuppressTargets()
      };
    }

    async function renderBatch(promptBundle, snapshot) {
      const finalPrompt = typeof promptBundle === "string" ? promptBundle : String(promptBundle?.finalPrompt || "");
      let container = document.getElementById("outputCtn");
      let sendBtn = document.getElementById("sendBtn");

      if (container.hasAttribute("hidden")) container.removeAttribute("hidden");
      try { container.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "start" }); } catch (e) {}
      
      container.innerHTML = `<div class="loading-spinner"></div>`;
      sendBtn.innerHTML = `<div class="loading-spinner" style="width:18px; height:18px; border-width:2px;"></div>`;
      sendBtn.disabled = true;

      container.innerHTML = "";
      let gridContainer = document.createElement("div");
      gridContainer.className = "image-grid-container";

      const batchAspectRatio = parseResolutionAspectRatio(snapshot.shape);
      syncRenderPreviewWidthBounds(null, false);
      let width = getSmartRenderPreviewWidth(snapshot.numImages || 1);
      if (widthInput) widthInput.value = String(width);
      if (inlineWidthInput) inlineWidthInput.value = String(width);
      gridContainer.style.setProperty("--render-preview-width", width + "px");

      window._renderImageMap = window._renderImageMap || {};

      let promptData = {
        prompt: finalPrompt,
        resolution: snapshot.shape,
        width: width,
        count: snapshot.numImages,
        customButton: {
          emoji: "➕︎",
          onClick: (data) => {
            try {
              window.showLoopImageActionModal(data);
            } catch (e) {
              console.error(e);
            }
          }
        }
      };

      try {
        for (let i = 0; i < snapshot.numImages; i++) {
          let img = image(promptData);
          let tempDiv = document.createElement("div");
          tempDiv.innerHTML = img.evaluateItem;
          let imgElement = tempDiv.firstElementChild;

          if (imgElement) {
            imgElement.style.opacity = 0;
            imgElement.style.animation = `fadeIn 0.5s ease forwards ${i * 0.05}s`;
          }

          const wrapper = document.createElement("div");
          wrapper.className = "render-item";
          wrapper.dataset.aspectRatio = String(batchAspectRatio || 1);
          wrapper.style.setProperty('--render-item-aspect-ratio', String(batchAspectRatio || 1));

          if (imgElement) wrapper.appendChild(imgElement);

          const renderedImg = wrapper.querySelector('img');
          if (renderedImg) {
            const syncRenderedAspectRatio = () => {
              const naturalWidth = renderedImg.naturalWidth || parseInt(renderedImg.getAttribute('width'), 10) || 0;
              const naturalHeight = renderedImg.naturalHeight || parseInt(renderedImg.getAttribute('height'), 10) || 0;
              if (naturalWidth > 0 && naturalHeight > 0) {
                const actualRatio = naturalWidth / naturalHeight;
                wrapper.dataset.aspectRatio = String(actualRatio);
                wrapper.style.setProperty('--render-item-aspect-ratio', String(actualRatio));
                const currentValue = parseInt(widthInput.value, 10) || 0;
                syncRenderPreviewWidthBounds(currentValue, false);
                requestAnimationFrame(() => syncCanvasLayoutMode(false));
              }
            };

            if (renderedImg.complete) {
              syncRenderedAspectRatio();
            } else {
              renderedImg.addEventListener('load', syncRenderedAspectRatio, { once: true });
            }
          }

          const renderId = 'render-' + Date.now() + '-' + i;

          const saveButton = document.createElement("button");
          saveButton.className = "render-save-overlay";
          saveButton.innerHTML = '<span class="render-save-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 7V17M12 12H17M7 12H9.5M21 12C21 16.9706 16.9706 21 12 21C7.02944 21 3 16.9706 3 12C3 7.02944 7.02944 3 12 3C16.9706 3 21 7.02944 21 12Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>';
          saveButton.setAttribute('data-render-id', renderId);
          saveButton.disabled = true; // Start disabled
          saveButton.title = "Generating...";
          saveButton.onclick = function() { handleRenderSave(this); };

          wrapper.appendChild(saveButton);
          gridContainer.appendChild(wrapper);

          if (img.onFinishPromise) {
            img.onFinishPromise.then(data => {
              // Store full payload in map
              window._renderImageMap[renderId] = data;
              // Enable button when ready
              saveButton.disabled = false;
              saveButton.title = "Image Actions";
            });
          }
        }
        container.appendChild(gridContainer);
        ensureCanvasStripListeners();
        hasRenderedOutput = true;
        window.hasRenderedOutput = true;
        syncRenderPreviewWidthBounds(width, false);
        showCanvasStage();
        syncRenderPreviewWidthBounds(null, true);
        syncInlineWidthVisibility();
        updateGalleryToggleState();
        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
          syncCanvasLayoutMode(false);
          try { rebalanceLoopRenderGrid(); } catch (e) {}
        });

      } catch (error) {
        console.error(error);
        container.innerHTML = `<div style="color:var(--text-secondary)">Error generating image.</div>`;
      } finally {
        sendBtn.innerHTML = `<svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="22" y1="2" x2="11" y2="13"></line><polygon points="22 2 15 22 11 13 2 9 22 2"></polygon></svg>`;
        sendBtn.disabled = false;
      }
    }

    async function generateImagesV2() {
      const snapshot = snapshotUI();
      EngineState.engine.core = snapshot.coreStyle;
      EngineState.engine.signatures = [...snapshot.signatureStyles];
      EngineState.engine.dominanceMode = "hard"; 
      EngineState.engine.contextMode = "style_dominant"; 

      const leftSideResult = LeftSideGeneratorBar.generate(snapshot);
      console.log("FINAL PROMPT:", leftSideResult.finalPrompt);
      console.log("PROMPT INTEGRITY:", leftSideResult.integrityScore, leftSideResult.rejectedStyleHints || []);
      EngineState.engine.lastPrompt = leftSideResult.finalPrompt;

      await renderBatch(leftSideResult, snapshot);
    }

    window.showModal = function(html) {
      if (!html) html = "<p>?</p>";
      return new Promise(resolve => {
        const overlay = document.createElement("div");
        overlay.tabIndex = 0;
        overlay.style.cssText = "position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:9999; display:grid; place-items:center; background-color:rgba(0,0,0,.55); font:16px/1.4 system-ui;";
        overlay.innerHTML = `
          <div style="position:relative; max-width:90vw; max-height:90vh;">
            <button style="position:absolute; z-index:10; top:-12px; right:-12px; width:30px; height:30px; border:1px solid var(--border-subtle); border-radius:10px; background:var(--bg-main); color:var(--text-secondary); cursor:pointer; font-size:18px; line-height:1; padding:0; box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.16);">✕</button>
            <div style="text-align:left; border-radius:var(--radius-ui); background:var(--bg-main); color:var(--text-primary); border:1px solid var(--border-subtle); box-shadow:0 18px 44px rgba(0,0,0,.22); overflow:hidden;">
              ${html}
            </div>
          </div>
        `;
        const closeBtn = overlay.querySelector("button");
        const finish = () => { overlay.remove(); resolve(); };
        closeBtn.onclick = finish;
        overlay.onmousedown = e => { if (e.target === overlay) finish(); };
        overlay.onkeydown = e => { if (e.key === "Escape") finish(); };
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        overlay.focus();
      });
    };

    function setPerchanceInput(name, value) {
      const el = document.querySelector(`[data-name="${name}"] input, [data-name="${name}"] select, [data-name="${name}"] textarea`);
      if (el) {
        el.value = value;
        el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
        el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
      }
    }

    // Expose functions to window for HTML event handlers
    window.generateImagesV2 = generateImagesV2;
    window.toggleChatSettings = toggleChatSettings;
    window.toggleGallery = toggleGallery;
    window.openPrivateGallery = openPrivateGallery;
    window.switchSettingsCategory = switchSettingsCategory;
    window.openRightPanel = openRightPanel;
    window.toggleSuppressChip = function(el) { el.classList.toggle('active'); };
    
  })();
</script>

<script>
  /* STATE MANAGEMENT & THEME (PRIORITY 2 & 5) */

  window.Theme = {
    get() {
      const mode = document.documentElement.getAttribute("data-theme");
      return (mode === "light" || mode === "dark") ? mode : "system";
    },
    getEffective() {
      const mode = this.get();
      if (mode === "light" || mode === "dark") return mode;
      return window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches ? "dark" : "light";
    },
    set(mode, shouldPersist = true) {
      const root = document.documentElement;
      const next = (mode === "light" || mode === "dark") ? mode : "system";

      root.classList.remove('apple-force-dark');
      if (next === "system") {
        root.removeAttribute("data-theme");
      } else {
        root.setAttribute("data-theme", next);
      }

      if (shouldPersist) localStorage.setItem("theme", next);
      try { localStorage.removeItem('loop_theme'); } catch (e) {}

      const effective = this.getEffective();
      window.isDark = (effective === 'dark');
      window._isDarkMode = window.isDark;
      this.sync();
    },
    sync() {
      const effective = this.getEffective();
      let btn = document.getElementById('themeBtn');
      if (!btn) return;

      if(effective === 'dark') {
        btn.innerHTML = `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="5"></circle><line x1="12" y1="1" x2="12" y2="3"></line><line x1="12" y1="21" x2="12" y2="23"></line><line x1="4.22" y1="4.22" x2="5.64" y2="5.64"></line><line x1="18.36" y1="18.36" x2="19.78" y2="19.78"></line><line x1="1" y1="12" x2="3" y2="12"></line><line x1="21" y1="12" x2="23" y2="12"></line><line x1="4.22" y1="19.78" x2="5.64" y2="18.36"></line><line x1="18.36" y1="5.64" x2="19.78" y2="4.22"></line></svg>`;
      } else {
        btn.innerHTML = `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M21 12.79A9 9 0 1 1 11.21 3 7 7 0 0 0 21 12.79z"></path></svg>`;
      }
    },
    init() {
      try {
        if (localStorage.getItem('loop_theme') === 'dark' && localStorage.getItem('theme') === 'dark') {
          localStorage.removeItem('theme');
          localStorage.removeItem('loop_theme');
        }
      } catch (e) {}

      const saved = localStorage.getItem("theme");
      if (saved === "light" || saved === "dark") this.set(saved, false);
      else this.set("system", false);

      try {
        const media = window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)');
        const onChange = () => { if (this.get() === 'system') this.set('system', false); };
        if (media.addEventListener) media.addEventListener('change', onChange);
        else if (media.addListener) media.addListener(onChange);
      } catch (e) {}
    }
  };
  
  Theme.init();

  // Priority 2: Remove old observer patch, rely on CSS variables and DOMElement attribute
  // The observer was trying to force re-renders. With CSS variables tied to :root[data-theme],
  // all components using vars should update automatically.

  function isMobileSidebarMode() {
    return window.matchMedia('(max-width: 768px)').matches;
  }

  function applySidebarState(nextState, shouldPersist = true) {
    const app = document.querySelector('.app');
    if (!app) return;
    const resolvedState = (nextState === 'expanded' || nextState === 'collapsed') ? nextState : 'collapsed';
    app.dataset.sidebar = resolvedState;
    if (resolvedState === 'expanded' && typeof syncAutoHideHeaderState === 'function') {
      syncAutoHideHeaderState(false);
    }
    if (shouldPersist && !isMobileSidebarMode()) {
      localStorage.setItem('loop_sidebar_state', resolvedState);
    }
  }

  function forceCloseMobileSidebar() {
    if (!isMobileSidebarMode()) return;
    applySidebarState('collapsed', false);
  }
  window.forceCloseMobileSidebar = forceCloseMobileSidebar;

  function toggleSidebarState(state) {
    const app = document.querySelector('.app');
    if (!app) return;

    const nextState = state || (app.dataset.sidebar === 'expanded' ? 'collapsed' : 'expanded');
    applySidebarState(nextState, true);
  }

  (function initSidebarState() {
    const app = document.querySelector('.app');
    if (!app) return;

    const saved = localStorage.getItem('loop_sidebar_state');
    const desktopState = (saved === 'collapsed' || saved === 'expanded') ? saved : 'expanded';
    if (isMobileSidebarMode()) {
      applySidebarState('collapsed', false);
    } else {
      applySidebarState(desktopState, false);
    }
  })();

  window.addEventListener('resize', function() {
    const app = document.querySelector('.app');
    if (!app) return;

    if (isMobileSidebarMode()) {
      applySidebarState('collapsed', false);
      return;
    }

    const saved = localStorage.getItem('loop_sidebar_state');
    const desktopState = (saved === 'collapsed' || saved === 'expanded') ? saved : 'expanded';
    if (app.dataset.sidebar !== desktopState) {
      applySidebarState(desktopState, false);
    }
  });

  document.addEventListener('click', function(event) {
    if (!isMobileSidebarMode()) return;
    const app = document.querySelector('.app');
    const sidebar = document.querySelector('.sidebar');
    if (!app || app.dataset.sidebar !== 'expanded' || !sidebar) return;

    const insideSidebar = sidebar.contains(event.target);
    const onToggle = !!event.target.closest('.header-logo, .collapse-btn, #mobileSidebarBackdrop');
    if (!insideSidebar && !onToggle) {
      applySidebarState('collapsed', false);
    }
  });

  document.addEventListener('keydown', function(event) {
    if (event.key === 'Escape' && isMobileSidebarMode()) {
      applySidebarState('collapsed', false);
    }
  });
  
  document.addEventListener('click', function(event) {
    if (!isMobileSidebarMode()) return;
    const trigger = event.target.closest('.sidebar .item, .sidebar .create, .sidebar .user');
    if (trigger) {
      requestAnimationFrame(() => forceCloseMobileSidebar());
    }
    if (!trigger) return;
    applySidebarState('collapsed', false);
  });

  var pageActions = document.querySelector('.page-actions');

  // --- ACCENT CONTROL SYSTEM ---
  var accentPresets = [
    { name: 'Deep Yellow', val: '#FFBE0A' },
    { name: 'Comic Red', val: '#E23D3D' },
    { name: 'Lime Neon', val: '#B6FF00' },
    { name: 'Pink Pastel', val: '#F8BBD0' },
    { name: 'Cyan', val: '#18B7C9' },
    { name: 'Indigo', val: '#4C57D6' }
  ];

  function normalizeLoopAccent(color) {
    const raw = String(color || '').trim();
    if (!raw) return '';
    if (raw.toLowerCase() === '#2f6b4f') return '#F8BBD0';
    return raw;
  }

  function setAccent(color) {
    const safeColor = normalizeLoopAccent(color);
    if (!safeColor) return;
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--accent', safeColor);
    localStorage.setItem('accent', safeColor);
  }

  function initAccentSystem() {
    const savedAccent = normalizeLoopAccent(localStorage.getItem('accent'));
    if (savedAccent) {
      setAccent(savedAccent);
    } else {
      document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--accent', '#ffbe0a');
    }
  }

  initAccentSystem();

  // --- HEADER ACTIONS LOGIC ---

  function handleLoopUserHubAction(action, value) {
    const shouldClose = action === 'create-user' || action === 'private' || action === 'library';
    if (shouldClose) {
      if (typeof window.closeTopLoopModal === 'function') {
        window.closeTopLoopModal();
      } else {
        const overlays = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('div[tabindex]'));
        const overlay = overlays[overlays.length - 1];
        if (overlay) overlay.remove();
      }
    }

    if (action === 'create-user') {
      setTimeout(() => {
        if (typeof window.storyOpenCharacterModal === 'function') window.storyOpenCharacterModal('user');
      }, 40);
      return;
    }

    if (action === 'private') {
      if (typeof window.openPrivateGallery === 'function') window.openPrivateGallery();
      return;
    }

    if (action === 'library') {
      switchPage('library');
      return;
    }

    if (action === 'theme') {
      if (typeof toggleTheme === 'function') toggleTheme();
      return;
    }

    if (action === 'fullscreen') {
      if (typeof toggleFullscreen === 'function') toggleFullscreen();
      return;
    }

    if (action === 'share') {
      if (typeof sharePage === 'function') sharePage();
      return;
    }

    if (action === 'accent' && value) {
      if (typeof setAccent === 'function') setAccent(value);
      return;
    }
  }

  
function buildLoopUserHubSwatches() {
    const presets = Array.isArray(accentPresets) ? accentPresets : [];
    return presets.map(preset => {
      const val = String(preset.val || '').replace(/'/g, "\'");
      const title = String(preset.name || '').replace(/'/g, "\'");
      return `<button class="loop-userhub-swatch" type="button" title="${title}" onclick="handleLoopUserHubAction('accent','${val}')" style="background:${val};"></button>`;
    }).join('');
  }

  function getLoopUserCharacterSnapshot() {
    let payload = null;
    try {
      if (window.LoopStory && window.LoopStory.state && window.LoopStory.state.user) {
        payload = window.LoopStory.state.user;
      }
    } catch (err) {}

    if (!payload) {
      try {
        const raw = localStorage.getItem('loop_story_precise_v1');
        if (raw) {
          const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
          payload = parsed && parsed.user ? parsed.user : null;
        }
      } catch (err) {}
    }

    const name = String(payload && payload.name ? payload.name : 'User Character').trim() || 'User Character';
    const avatarUrl = String(payload && payload.avatarUrl ? payload.avatarUrl : '').trim();
    return { name, avatarUrl };
  }

  window.syncLoopUserCharacterSidebar = function syncLoopUserCharacterSidebar() {
    const row = document.getElementById('loopUserSidebarRow');
    const avatarEl = document.getElementById('loopUserSidebarAvatar');
    const nameEl = document.getElementById('loopUserSidebarName');
    if (!row || !avatarEl || !nameEl) return;

    const snapshot = getLoopUserCharacterSnapshot();
    const safeName = snapshot.name || 'User Character';
    const initial = safeName.trim().slice(0, 1).toUpperCase() || 'U';

    nameEl.textContent = safeName;
    row.setAttribute('data-label', safeName);
    row.title = safeName;

    if (snapshot.avatarUrl) {
      avatarEl.style.backgroundImage = `url('${snapshot.avatarUrl.replace(/'/g, "%27")}')`;
      avatarEl.style.backgroundSize = 'cover';
      avatarEl.style.backgroundPosition = 'center';
      avatarEl.style.backgroundRepeat = 'no-repeat';
      avatarEl.textContent = '';
    } else {
      avatarEl.style.backgroundImage = 'none';
      avatarEl.style.backgroundSize = '';
      avatarEl.style.backgroundPosition = '';
      avatarEl.style.backgroundRepeat = '';
      avatarEl.textContent = initial;
    }
  }

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', syncLoopUserCharacterSidebar);
  window.addEventListener('load', syncLoopUserCharacterSidebar);

    const close = () => overlay.remove();
    overlay.querySelector('.hall-world-modal-close')?.addEventListener('click', close);
    overlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === overlay) close(); });
    document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  };

          { title: 'Radius is now more controlled', copy: 'LOOP now leans on a smaller and more even corner radius across major panels, buttons, and work surfaces, so the UI feels less decorative and more structurally calm.' }
        ]
      },
      {
        version: '2026.04.18-loop-build-12',
        label: 'April 2026 · Build 12',
        subtitle: 'The User Character hub is now more visually coherent, and the lower sidebar row syncs with the actual user character state.',
        intro: 'This pass refines the user-side shell rather than expanding the surface area. The modal now uses a more coherent icon language, its header has a proper visual anchor, and the lower sidebar row now reflects the user character after creation instead of staying stuck as a placeholder.',
        items: [
          { title: 'User Character modal now uses a consistent icon family', copy: 'Primary actions and lightweight settings inside the user hub now use aligned SVG icons rather than mixed text glyphs, so the modal feels more native to LOOP.' },
          { title: 'The modal header now has a real visual anchor', copy: 'The User Character hub now opens with a proper header icon block, bringing it closer to the same modal grammar already used elsewhere in LOOP.' },

      },
      {

          { title: 'Sidebar user row is now User Character', copy: 'The lower user area is no longer a dummy label. It now opens a dedicated modal hub for user-side actions.' },

          { title: 'Library moved into the User Character hub', copy: 'Library remains fully accessible, but it now sits under the user-side modal instead of taking equal weight in the main sidebar.' },
          { title: 'Create User Character now has a direct entry point', copy: 'The user row can now route directly into user-character creation, making the lower sidebar area feel purposeful instead of placeholder.' },

      },
      {
        version: '2026.04.18-loop-build-10',

        subtitle: 'The image prompt settings panel has been tightened into a smaller, sturdier work surface.',
        intro: 'This pass focuses on the image prompt settings itself. The panel is now simpler, more solid, and more honest about what is active, while AI Refine and Suppress start behaving as real tools instead of placeholders.',
        items: [
          { title: 'Image settings panel is now two-rail instead of three', copy: 'The old right utility rail has been folded into the left navigation so the panel reads more clearly as one compact control surface instead of a fragile floating sheet.' },

          { title: 'Loop Core is now parked honestly', copy: 'The Loop Core area remains visible but is intentionally marked as coming soon instead of pretending to be an active layer before it is ready.' },
          { title: 'AI Refine is now active', copy: 'AI Refine now cleans the current prompt through the LOOP image engine itself, stripping style drift and duplicate filler into a cleaner subject prompt that can be applied or used on render.' },
          { title: 'Suppress now works as positive repair guard', copy: 'Negative-prompt logic stays removed. Suppress now adds repair-focused positive cues for issues like hands, blur, artifacts, and anatomy instead of leaking unwanted negatives into the model.' }
        ]
      },
      {
        version: '2026.04.18-loop-build-09',
        label: 'April 2026 · Build 09',
        subtitle: 'The image engine is now deepening signature curation core by core, with Comic joining the focused audit pass.',
        intro: 'This pass continues the image-engine hardening and signature curation. Cinema, 3D, editorial, graphic illustration, and now comic are being separated more clearly so each core gains stronger internal visual range without losing its law.',
        items: [
          { title: 'Image engine now favors positive authority', copy: 'Negative prompt injection has been removed so the machine now leans on stronger positive style language instead of fragile “avoid this” phrasing.' },
          { title: 'Core discipline has been strengthened', copy: 'All main image cores have been reinforced so user prompts that move against the selected core are harder to slip through and public-facing results stay more consistent.' },

  };

  window.getLoopWhatsNewCurrentEntry = function() {
    const data = window.LOOP_CHANGELOG_DATA;
    return data && Array.isArray(data.entries) && data.entries.length ? data.entries[0] : null;
  };

  window.renderLoopWhatsNewModal = function() {
    const data = window.LOOP_CHANGELOG_DATA || {};
    const entry = window.getLoopWhatsNewCurrentEntry();
    if (!entry) return;

    const kickerEl = document.getElementById('loopWhatsNewKicker');
    const versionEl = document.getElementById('loopWhatsNewVersion');
    const titleEl = document.getElementById('loopWhatsNewTitle');
    const subtitleEl = document.getElementById('loopWhatsNewSubtitle');
    const bodyEl = document.getElementById('loopWhatsNewBody');
    if (!kickerEl || !versionEl || !titleEl || !subtitleEl || !bodyEl) return;

    const safe = (value) => String(value || '')
      .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
      .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
      .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
      .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
      .replace(/'/g, '&#39;');

    kickerEl.textContent = data.kicker || 'Loop Update';
    versionEl.textContent = entry.label || entry.version || '';
    titleEl.textContent = data.title || 'What’s New in LOOP';
    subtitleEl.textContent = entry.subtitle || '';

    const introHtml = entry.intro ? `<div class="loop-whatsnew-intro">${safe(entry.intro)}</div>` : '';
    const itemsHtml = (entry.items || []).map((item, index) => `
      <div class="loop-whatsnew-item">
        <div class="loop-whatsnew-item-index">${String(index + 1).padStart(2, '0')}</div>
        <div class="loop-whatsnew-item-main">
          <div class="loop-whatsnew-item-title">${safe(item.title)}</div>
          <div class="loop-whatsnew-item-copy">${safe(item.copy)}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `).join('');

    bodyEl.innerHTML = `${introHtml}<div class="loop-whatsnew-list">${itemsHtml}</div>`;
  };

  window.getLoopWhatsNewStorageKey = function() {
    const entry = window.getLoopWhatsNewCurrentEntry();
    return `loop_whats_new_seen_${entry?.version || 'loop-default-build'}`;
  };

  window.openLoopWhatsNewModal = function() {
    const overlay = document.getElementById('loopWhatsNewOverlay');
    if (!overlay) return;
    window.renderLoopWhatsNewModal();
    overlay.hidden = false;
    localStorage.setItem(window.getLoopWhatsNewStorageKey(), '1');
  };

  window.closeLoopWhatsNewModal = function() {
    const overlay = document.getElementById('loopWhatsNewOverlay');
    if (!overlay) return;
    overlay.hidden = true;
  };

  window.renderLoopWhatsNewModal();

  if (!window.__loopWhatsNewAutoOpenBound) {
    window.__loopWhatsNewAutoOpenBound = true;
    if (!localStorage.getItem(window.getLoopWhatsNewStorageKey())) {
      window.addEventListener('load', () => {
        setTimeout(window.openLoopWhatsNewModal, 260);
      }, { once: true });
    }
  }

  // --- HEADER AMBIENCE PLAYER ---
  (function () {
    const TRACKS = [
      { title: 'Epic Cinematic', url: 'https://user.uploads.dev/file/b1e0072c408aed5842ccdd931fc3725f.mp3' },
      { title: 'Cloud of Sorrow', url: 'https://user.uploads.dev/file/e7273f3864a09e3150c2cd5967d55a93.mp3' },
      { title: 'Cyberpunk Techno', url: 'https://user.uploads.dev/file/af7a724779408da7d31d7f09acf9fd82.mp3' },
      { title: 'Magic Fantasy', url: 'https://user.uploads.dev/file/862cb048d694eaa59f7e34b1d58b74a8.mp3' },
      { title: 'Romantic Beats', url: 'https://user.uploads.dev/file/e88f3380b431d0e24b601030e9b04494.mp3' },
      { title: 'Emotional Guitar Beats', url: 'https://user.uploads.dev/file/e07d6dec3abe39ca7e7e907f76bdaf57.mp3' }
    ];

    const VISUALIZER_BARS = 20;
    const IDLE_BAR_HEIGHT = 2;

    const trigger = document.getElementById('loopAmbienceTrigger');
    const panel = document.getElementById('loopAmbiencePanel');
    const titleEl = document.getElementById('loopAmbienceTitle');
    const shuffleBtn = document.getElementById('loopAmbienceShuffle');
    const loopBtn = document.getElementById('loopAmbienceLoop');
    const loopLabel = document.getElementById('loopAmbienceLoopLabel');
    const seekEl = document.getElementById('loopAmbienceSeek');
    const currentTimeEl = document.getElementById('loopAmbienceCurrent');
    const durationEl = document.getElementById('loopAmbienceDuration');
    const prevBtn = document.getElementById('loopAmbiencePrev');
    const playBtn = document.getElementById('loopAmbiencePlay');
    const playIcon = document.getElementById('loopAmbiencePlayIcon');
    const nextBtn = document.getElementById('loopAmbienceNext');
    const volumeEl = document.getElementById('loopAmbienceVolume');
    const playlistEl = document.getElementById('loopAmbiencePlaylist');
    const visualizerEl = document.getElementById('loopAmbienceVisualizer');
    const audio = document.getElementById('loopAmbienceAudio');

    if (!trigger || !panel || !audio) return;

    let currentIndex = 0;
    let shuffleMode = false;
    let loopMode = 'single';
    let isPlaying = false;
    let audioContext = null;
    let analyser = null;
    let sourceNode = null;
    let animationFrame = null;

    function formatTime(value) {
      if (!isFinite(value) || value < 0) return '0:00';
      const minutes = Math.floor(value / 60);
      const seconds = String(Math.floor(value % 60)).padStart(2, '0');
      return `${minutes}:${seconds}`;
    }

    function getRandomTrackIndex(current) {
      if (TRACKS.length <= 1) return current;
      let next = current;
      while (next === current) next = Math.floor(Math.random() * TRACKS.length);
      return next;
    }

    function buildVisualizer() {
      visualizerEl.innerHTML = '';
      for (let i = 0; i < VISUALIZER_BARS; i++) {
        const bar = document.createElement('div');
        bar.className = 'loop-ambience-bar';
        bar.style.height = `${IDLE_BAR_HEIGHT}px`;
        visualizerEl.appendChild(bar);
      }
    }

    function resetVisualizer() {
      visualizerEl.querySelectorAll('.loop-ambience-bar').forEach((bar) => {
        bar.style.height = `${IDLE_BAR_HEIGHT}px`;
        bar.classList.remove('is-active');
      });
    }

    function stopVisualizer() {
      if (animationFrame !== null) {
        cancelAnimationFrame(animationFrame);
        animationFrame = null;
      }
      resetVisualizer();
    }

    async function setupVisualizer() {
      try {
        const AudioContextClass = window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext;
        if (!AudioContextClass) return false;
        if (!audioContext) audioContext = new AudioContextClass();
        if (!analyser) {
          analyser = audioContext.createAnalyser();
          analyser.fftSize = 128;
          analyser.smoothingTimeConstant = 0.82;
        }
        if (!sourceNode) {
          sourceNode = audioContext.createMediaElementSource(audio);
          sourceNode.connect(analyser);
          analyser.connect(audioContext.destination);
        }
        if (audioContext.state === 'suspended') await audioContext.resume();
        return true;
      } catch (_) {
        return false;
      }
    }

    async function startVisualizer() {
      const ready = await setupVisualizer();
      if (!ready || !analyser) return;
      const dataArray = new Uint8Array(analyser.frequencyBinCount);
      const bars = [...visualizerEl.querySelectorAll('.loop-ambience-bar')];

      const tick = () => {
        analyser.getByteFrequencyData(dataArray);
        const step = Math.max(1, Math.floor(dataArray.length / VISUALIZER_BARS));
        bars.forEach((bar, index) => {
          const start = index * step;
          const end = Math.min(start + step, dataArray.length);
          let sum = 0;
          let count = 0;
          for (let i = start; i < end; i++) {
            sum += dataArray[i];
            count += 1;
          }
          const average = count ? sum / count : 0;
          const scaled = 2 + (average / 255) * 9;
          const height = Math.max(IDLE_BAR_HEIGHT, Math.min(11, scaled));
          bar.style.height = `${height}px`;
          bar.classList.toggle('is-active', isPlaying);
        });
        animationFrame = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
      };

      if (animationFrame !== null) cancelAnimationFrame(animationFrame);
      tick();
    }

    function renderPlayIcon() {
      playIcon.innerHTML = isPlaying
        ? '<path d="M8 5h3v14H8zm5 0h3v14h-3z"/>'
        : '<path d="M8 5v14l11-7z"/>';
      playBtn.classList.toggle('is-playing', isPlaying);
    }

    function renderModes() {
      shuffleBtn.classList.toggle('is-active', shuffleMode);
      loopBtn.classList.toggle('is-active', loopMode !== 'off');
      loopLabel.textContent = loopMode === 'single' ? '1' : loopMode === 'all' ? 'all' : 'off';
    }

    function renderPlaylist() {
      playlistEl.innerHTML = '';
      TRACKS.forEach((track, index) => {
        const item = document.createElement('button');
        item.type = 'button';
        item.className = 'loop-ambience-track';
        if (index === currentIndex) item.classList.add('is-active');
        item.innerHTML = '<span class="loop-ambience-track-dot"></span><span class="loop-ambience-track-label">' + track.title + '</span>';
        item.addEventListener('click', () => playTrack(index));
        playlistEl.appendChild(item);
      });
    }

    function renderTrack() {
      const track = TRACKS[currentIndex];
      titleEl.textContent = track.title;
      audio.src = track.url;
      audio.load();
      seekEl.value = 0;
      currentTimeEl.textContent = '0:00';
      durationEl.textContent = '0:00';
      renderPlaylist();
    }

    async function playTrack(index) {
      currentIndex = index;
      renderTrack();
      try {
        await audio.play();
      } catch (_) {
        isPlaying = false;
        renderPlayIcon();
        stopVisualizer();
      }
    }

    function closeAmbiencePanel() {
      panel.hidden = true;
      trigger.classList.remove('active');
      trigger.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
    }

    trigger.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      e.stopPropagation();
      pageActions.classList.add('active');
      panel.hidden = !panel.hidden;
      trigger.classList.toggle('active', !panel.hidden);
      trigger.setAttribute('aria-expanded', panel.hidden ? 'false' : 'true');
    });

    panel.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      e.stopPropagation();
    });

    shuffleBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      shuffleMode = !shuffleMode;
      renderModes();
    });

    loopBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      loopMode = loopMode === 'off' ? 'single' : loopMode === 'single' ? 'all' : 'off';
      renderModes();
    });

    playBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
      if (audio.paused) {
        try {
          await audio.play();
        } catch (_) {
          isPlaying = false;
          renderPlayIcon();
          stopVisualizer();
        }
      } else {
        audio.pause();
      }
    });

    prevBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const nextIndex = (currentIndex - 1 + TRACKS.length) % TRACKS.length;
      playTrack(nextIndex);
    });

    nextBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const nextIndex = shuffleMode ? getRandomTrackIndex(currentIndex) : (currentIndex + 1) % TRACKS.length;
      playTrack(nextIndex);
    });

    seekEl.addEventListener('input', () => {
      audio.currentTime = Number(seekEl.value);
    });

    volumeEl.addEventListener('input', () => {
      audio.volume = Number(volumeEl.value);
    });

    audio.addEventListener('loadedmetadata', () => {
      seekEl.max = Math.max(audio.duration || 1, 1);
      durationEl.textContent = formatTime(audio.duration || 0);
    });

    audio.addEventListener('timeupdate', () => {
      seekEl.value = audio.currentTime;
      currentTimeEl.textContent = formatTime(audio.currentTime || 0);
    });

    audio.addEventListener('play', () => {
      isPlaying = true;
      renderPlayIcon();
      startVisualizer();
    });

    audio.addEventListener('pause', () => {
      isPlaying = false;
      renderPlayIcon();
      stopVisualizer();
    });

    audio.addEventListener('ended', () => {
      if (loopMode === 'single') {
        audio.currentTime = 0;
        audio.play().catch(() => undefined);
        return;
      }
      if (shuffleMode) {
        playTrack(getRandomTrackIndex(currentIndex));
        return;
      }
      if (loopMode === 'all') {
        playTrack((currentIndex + 1) % TRACKS.length);
        return;
      }
      isPlaying = false;
      renderPlayIcon();
      stopVisualizer();
    });

    buildVisualizer();
    renderModes();
    renderPlayIcon();
    renderTrack();
    audio.volume = Number(volumeEl.value);

    window.closeLoopAmbiencePanel = closeAmbiencePanel;
  })();

  document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    if (pageActions && !pageActions.contains(e.target)) { pageActions.classList.remove('active'); if (window.closeLoopAmbiencePanel) window.closeLoopAmbiencePanel(); }
    const loopWhatsNewOverlay = document.getElementById('loopWhatsNewOverlay');
    if (loopWhatsNewOverlay && !loopWhatsNewOverlay.hidden && e.target === loopWhatsNewOverlay) {
      closeLoopWhatsNewModal();
    }
    let chatSettings = document.getElementById("chatSettings");
    if (chatSettings && window.activeImageStage === 'workspace') {
      // Keep workspace open until the user explicitly toggles settings, renders, or returns to gallery.
    }
  });

  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape') closeLoopWhatsNewModal();
  });

  function toggleTheme() {
    const current = Theme.getEffective ? Theme.getEffective() : Theme.get();
    const next = current === "dark" ? "light" : "dark";
    Theme.set(next);
    updateBtnActive('themeBtn', next === "dark");
  }

  function toggleFullscreen() {
    if (!document.fullscreenElement) {
      document.documentElement.requestFullscreen();
    } else {
      if (document.exitFullscreen) document.exitFullscreen();
    }
    if (pageActions) pageActions.classList.remove('active');
  }

  function sharePage() {
    alert("Share action triggered!");
    if (pageActions) pageActions.classList.remove('active');
  }

  function updateBtnActive(id, isActive) {
    let btn = document.getElementById(id);
    if (!btn) return;
    if (isActive) btn.classList.add('active');
    else btn.classList.remove('active');
  }

  var activeDragEl = null;
  var startX = 0, startY = 0;
  var initialLeft = 0, initialTop = 0;

  document.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
    let el = e.target.closest('.floating-control');
    if (el) {
      if (['INPUT', 'SELECT', 'BUTTON'].includes(e.target.tagName)) return;
      activeDragEl = el;
      startX = e.clientX;
      startY = e.clientY;
      initialLeft = activeDragEl.offsetLeft;
      initialTop = activeDragEl.offsetTop;
      document.addEventListener('mousemove', dragMove);
      document.addEventListener('mouseup', dragEnd);
      activeDragEl.style.cursor = 'grabbing';
    }
  });

  function dragMove(e) {
    if (!activeDragEl) return;
    e.preventDefault();
    const dx = e.clientX - startX;
    const dy = e.clientY - startY;
    activeDragEl.style.left = `${initialLeft + dx}px`;
    activeDragEl.style.top = `${initialTop + dy}px`;
  }

  function dragEnd() {
    if (activeDragEl) activeDragEl.style.cursor = 'grab';
    activeDragEl = null;
    document.removeEventListener('mousemove', dragMove);
    document.removeEventListener('mouseup', dragEnd);
  }

  var textarea = document.getElementById("promptInput");
  var suppressCustomInputEl = document.getElementById('suppressCustomInput');
  if (typeof updateSuppressStatus !== 'function') {
    window.updateSuppressStatus = function() {
      var statusEl = document.getElementById('suppressStatus');
      if (!statusEl) return;
      var chipTargets = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#suppressChips .style-chip.active')).map(function(el) {
        return String(el.textContent || '').trim();
      }).filter(Boolean);
      var rawCustom = String((document.getElementById('suppressCustomInput') || {}).value || '');
      var customTargets = rawCustom
        .split('\r').join('')
        .split('\n').join(',')
        .split(',')
        .map(function(v) { return v.trim(); })
        .filter(Boolean);
      var total = [...new Set([...chipTargets, ...customTargets])].length;
      statusEl.textContent = total
        ? `${total} repair guard${total > 1 ? 's' : ''} active.`
        : 'No repair guard selected.';
    };
  }
  if (suppressCustomInputEl) suppressCustomInputEl.addEventListener('input', updateSuppressStatus);
  updateSuppressStatus();
  if (typeof updateModifierStatus !== 'function') {
    window.updateModifierStatus = function() {
      var statusEl = document.getElementById('modifierStatus');
      if (!statusEl) return;
      var chipTargets = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#modifierChips .style-chip.active')).map(function(el) {
        return String(el.textContent || '').trim();
      }).filter(Boolean);
      var rawCustom = String((document.getElementById('modifierCustomInput') || {}).value || '');
      var customTargets = rawCustom
        .split('\r').join('')
        .split('\n').join(',')
        .split(',')
        .map(function(v) { return v.trim(); })
        .filter(Boolean);
      var total = [...new Set([...chipTargets, ...customTargets])].length;
      statusEl.textContent = total
        ? `${total} modifier${total > 1 ? 's' : ''} active.`
        : 'No modifier selected.';
    };
  }
  if (typeof updateWorkspaceSummary !== 'function') {
    window.updateWorkspaceSummary = function(activeCategoryId) {
      var coreEl = document.getElementById('workspaceSummaryCore');
      var artEl = document.getElementById('workspaceSummaryArt');
      var sigEl = document.getElementById('workspaceSummarySignature');
      var focusEl = document.getElementById('workspaceSummaryFocus');
      if (!coreEl || !artEl || !sigEl || !focusEl) return;
      var activeCore = document.querySelector('#coreGrid .core-item.active');
      var activeArt = document.querySelector('#artStyleChips .style-chip.active .chip-main') || document.querySelector('#artStyleChips .style-chip.active');
      var activeSignatures = document.querySelectorAll('#signatureChips .style-chip.active').length;
      var activeCategoryBtn = activeCategoryId ? document.querySelector('.settings-category-btn[data-target= + activeCategoryId + ] .cat-label') : document.querySelector('.settings-category-btn.active .cat-label');
      coreEl.textContent = activeCore ? String(activeCore.textContent || '').trim() : 'No Core';
      artEl.textContent = activeArt ? String(activeArt.textContent || '').trim() : 'No Art Style';
      sigEl.textContent = activeSignatures + ' Signature' + (activeSignatures === 1 ? '' : 's');
      focusEl.textContent = activeCategoryBtn ? String(activeCategoryBtn.textContent || '').trim() : 'Workspace';
    };
  }
  var loopModifierInputBindingEl = document.getElementById('modifierCustomInput');
  if (loopModifierInputBindingEl) loopModifierInputBindingEl.addEventListener('input', function(){ updateModifierStatus(); window.updateAiModifierStatus(); });
  updateModifierStatus();
  updateWorkspaceSummary();
  var sendBtn = document.getElementById("sendBtn");
  var inputWrapper = textarea ? textarea.closest(".input-wrapper") : document.querySelector("#page-image .input-wrapper");
  var inputContainer = textarea ? textarea.closest(".input-container") : document.querySelector("#page-image .input-container");
  var COLLAPSED_HEIGHT = 42;
  var ACTIVE_MIN_HEIGHT = 68;
  var MAX_HEIGHT = 180; 

  function resetCollapsedPromptView() {
    if (!textarea) return;
    textarea.scrollTop = 0;
    try {
      if (document.activeElement !== textarea) textarea.setSelectionRange(0, 0);
    } catch (e) {}
  }

  function updateInputShape(forceCollapsed) {
    if (!textarea || !sendBtn) return;
    const hasWrapper = !!inputWrapper;
    const hasContainer = !!inputContainer;
    const isCollapsed = forceCollapsed === true || !(hasWrapper && inputWrapper.classList.contains("active"));
    textarea.style.height = "auto";
    if (isCollapsed) {
      textarea.style.height = COLLAPSED_HEIGHT + "px";
      textarea.style.overflowY = "hidden";
      resetCollapsedPromptView();
      if (hasContainer) inputContainer.style.borderRadius = "14px";
      sendBtn.disabled = textarea.value.trim() === "";
      syncComposerReservedSpace();
      return;
    }
    let newHeight = Math.max(ACTIVE_MIN_HEIGHT, Math.min(textarea.scrollHeight, MAX_HEIGHT));
    textarea.style.height = newHeight + "px";
    textarea.style.overflowY = textarea.scrollHeight > MAX_HEIGHT ? "auto" : "hidden";
    
    let borderRadius = newHeight > ACTIVE_MIN_HEIGHT ? 10 : 14;
    if (hasContainer) inputContainer.style.borderRadius = borderRadius + "px";
    sendBtn.disabled = textarea.value.trim() === "";
    syncComposerReservedSpace();
  }

  function syncComposerReservedSpace() {
    const root = document.documentElement;
    const chatUiEl = document.querySelector('.chat-ui');
    const appEl = document.querySelector('.app');
    if (!root || !chatUiEl) return;

    if (appEl && appEl.classList.contains('page-image-simple') && appEl.classList.contains('image-prompt-hidden')) {
      root.style.setProperty('--composer-reserved-height', '28px');
      return;
    }

    const measured = Math.max(44, Math.ceil(chatUiEl.getBoundingClientRect().height || 0));
    root.style.setProperty('--composer-reserved-height', measured + 'px');
  }
  window.syncComposerReservedSpace = syncComposerReservedSpace;

  window.__loopPromptDockHintTimer = window.__loopPromptDockHintTimer || null;

  function syncImagePromptDockVisibility() {
    const appEl = document.querySelector('.app');
    const pageImageEl = document.getElementById('page-image');
    const dockBtn = document.getElementById('promptDockToggleBtn');
    const hintEl = document.getElementById('promptDockHint');
    const isImagePage = !!(pageImageEl && pageImageEl.classList.contains('active'));
    const isCollapsed = !!(appEl && appEl.classList.contains('image-prompt-hidden'));

    if (dockBtn) {
      dockBtn.hidden = !(isImagePage && isCollapsed);
      dockBtn.classList.toggle('active', isImagePage && isCollapsed);
    }

    if (hintEl) {
      hintEl.hidden = !(isImagePage && isCollapsed);
      hintEl.classList.toggle('is-visible', isImagePage && isCollapsed);
    }

    syncComposerReservedSpace();
  }
  window.syncImagePromptDockVisibility = syncImagePromptDockVisibility;

  function showPromptDockHint() {
    const hintEl = document.getElementById('promptDockHint');
    if (!hintEl) return;
    hintEl.hidden = false;
    hintEl.classList.add('is-visible');
    if (window.__loopPromptDockHintTimer) clearTimeout(window.__loopPromptDockHintTimer);
    window.__loopPromptDockHintTimer = setTimeout(function() {
      hintEl.classList.remove('is-visible');
    }, 3600);
  }

  function toggleImagePromptDock(forceHidden) {
    const appEl = document.querySelector('.app');
    if (!appEl) return;
    const pageImageEl = document.getElementById('page-image');
    if (!pageImageEl || !pageImageEl.classList.contains('active')) return;

    const nextHidden = typeof forceHidden === 'boolean'
      ? forceHidden
      : !appEl.classList.contains('image-prompt-hidden');

    appEl.classList.toggle('image-prompt-hidden', nextHidden);

    if (nextHidden) {
      inputWrapper.classList.remove('active');
      updateInputShape(true);
      syncImagePromptDockVisibility();
      showPromptDockHint();
      return;
    }

    syncImagePromptDockVisibility();
    requestAnimationFrame(function() {
      inputWrapper.classList.add('active');
      updateInputShape();
      try { textarea.focus({ preventScroll: true }); } catch (e) { try { textarea.focus(); } catch (err) {} }
    });
  }
  window.toggleImagePromptDock = toggleImagePromptDock;

  textarea.addEventListener("input", function() {
    updateInputShape();
  });
  textarea.addEventListener("focus", function () {
    inputWrapper.classList.add("active");
    updateInputShape();
  });
  textarea.addEventListener("blur", function () {
    if (window.activeImageStage === 'canvas') {
      setTimeout(function () {
        const menu = document.getElementById('composerMenu');
        const activeEl = document.activeElement;
        const keepExpanded = (inputWrapper && activeEl && inputWrapper.contains(activeEl)) || (menu && activeEl && menu.contains(activeEl));
        if (!keepExpanded) {
          inputWrapper.classList.remove("active");
          updateInputShape(true);
        } else {
          syncComposerReservedSpace();
        }
      }, 0);
      return;
    }
    inputWrapper.classList.remove("active");
    updateInputShape(true);
  });
  textarea.addEventListener("keydown", function (e) {
    if (e.key === "Enter" && !e.shiftKey) {
      e.preventDefault();
      if (!sendBtn.disabled) generateImagesV2(); 
    }
  });

  if (inputContainer) {
    inputContainer.addEventListener('pointerdown', function() {
      if (inputWrapper) inputWrapper.classList.add('active');
      requestAnimationFrame(function() { updateInputShape(); });
    });
  }

  ['outputCtn', 'gallerySection'].forEach(function(id) {
    const zoneEl = document.getElementById(id);
    if (!zoneEl) return;
    zoneEl.addEventListener('pointerdown', function(e) {
      if (!inputWrapper || inputWrapper.contains(e.target)) return;
      inputWrapper.classList.remove('active');
      updateInputShape(true);
    }, true);
  });

  document.addEventListener('pointerdown', function(e) {
    if (window.activeImageStage !== 'canvas') return;
    const menu = document.getElementById('composerMenu');
    const clickedInsideComposer = inputWrapper && inputWrapper.contains(e.target);
    const clickedInsideMenu = menu && menu.contains(e.target);
    if (clickedInsideComposer || clickedInsideMenu) return;
    inputWrapper.classList.remove('active');
    updateInputShape(true);
  }, true);

  var widthInput = document.getElementById("widthInput");
  var widthValueDisplay = document.getElementById("widthValueDisplay");
  var inlineWidthControl = document.getElementById("inlineWidthControl");
  var inlineWidthInput = document.getElementById("inlineWidthInput");
  var inlineWidthValue = document.getElementById("inlineWidthValue");
  var inlineWidthMinLabel = document.getElementById("inlineWidthMinLabel");
  var inlineWidthMaxLabel = document.getElementById("inlineWidthMaxLabel");
  var resolutionInput = document.getElementById("resolutionInput");
  var chatSettings = document.getElementById("chatSettings");
  var imageWorkspaceStage = document.getElementById("imageWorkspaceStage");
  var chatSettingsHomeParent = chatSettings ? chatSettings.parentNode : null;
  var hasRenderedOutput = false;
  window.activeImageStage = 'gallery';
  window.loopImageWorkspacePinned = window.loopImageWorkspacePinned || false;

  function isMobileImageViewport() {
    return window.innerWidth <= 760;
  }

  function syncImageMobileStructure() {
    const appEl = document.querySelector('.app');
    const pageImageEl = document.getElementById('page-image');
    const workspaceEl = document.getElementById('imageWorkspaceStage');
    const commentsEl = document.getElementById('commentsSectionCtn');
    const hostEl = document.getElementById('imageMobileOverlayHost');
    const workspaceAnchorEl = document.getElementById('imageWorkspaceStageAnchor');
    const commentsAnchorEl = document.getElementById('commentsSectionAnchor');
    const isImageActive = !!pageImageEl && pageImageEl.classList.contains('active');
    const shouldUseMobileStructure = !!(isImageActive && isMobileImageViewport());

    if (appEl) appEl.classList.toggle('image-mobile-ready', shouldUseMobileStructure);
    if (!workspaceEl || !commentsEl || !hostEl || !workspaceAnchorEl || !commentsAnchorEl) return;

    if (shouldUseMobileStructure) {
      if (workspaceEl.parentNode !== hostEl) hostEl.appendChild(workspaceEl);
      if (commentsEl.parentNode !== hostEl) hostEl.appendChild(commentsEl);
      if (typeof updateImageMobileStageFlags === 'function') updateImageMobileStageFlags();
      return;
    }

    if (workspaceEl.previousElementSibling !== workspaceAnchorEl || workspaceEl.parentNode !== workspaceAnchorEl.parentNode) {
      workspaceAnchorEl.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', workspaceEl);
    }
    if (commentsEl.previousElementSibling !== commentsAnchorEl || commentsEl.parentNode !== commentsAnchorEl.parentNode) {
      commentsAnchorEl.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', commentsEl);
    }
    if (typeof updateImageMobileStageFlags === 'function') updateImageMobileStageFlags();
  }
  window.syncImageMobileStructure = syncImageMobileStructure;

  function updateImageMobileStageFlags() {
    const appEl = document.querySelector('.app');
    const commentsEl = document.getElementById('commentsSectionCtn');
