    const workspaceEl = document.getElementById('imageWorkspaceStage');
    const isReady = !!(appEl && appEl.classList.contains('image-mobile-ready'));
    const commentsOpen = !!(isReady && commentsEl && !commentsEl.hidden);
    const workspaceOpen = !!(isReady && workspaceEl && workspaceEl.classList.contains('show') && window.activeImageStage === 'workspace');

    if (!appEl) return;
    appEl.classList.toggle('image-mobile-comments-open', commentsOpen);
    appEl.classList.toggle('image-mobile-workspace-open', workspaceOpen);
  }
  window.updateImageMobileStageFlags = updateImageMobileStageFlags;

  function closeImageCommentsForMobile() {
    if (!(typeof isMobileImageViewport === 'function' && isMobileImageViewport())) return false;
    const section = document.getElementById('commentsSectionCtn');
    if (!section || section.hidden) return false;
    section.hidden = true;
    syncImageCommentsVisibility();
    return true;
  }
  window.closeImageCommentsForMobile = closeImageCommentsForMobile;

  function closeImageWorkspaceForMobile() {
    if (!(typeof isMobileImageViewport === 'function' && isMobileImageViewport())) return false;
    const workspaceEl = document.getElementById('imageWorkspaceStage');
    const visible = !!(workspaceEl && workspaceEl.classList.contains('show'));
    const active = window.activeImageStage === 'workspace';
    if (!visible && !active) return false;

    if (window.hasRenderedOutput && typeof showCanvasStage === 'function') {
      showCanvasStage();
    } else if (typeof showGalleryStage === 'function') {
      showGalleryStage();
    } else {
      workspaceEl?.classList.remove('show');
      document.getElementById('chatSettings')?.classList.remove('show');
      const appEl = document.querySelector('.app');
      appEl?.classList.remove('image-stage-workspace');
      window.activeImageStage = window.hasRenderedOutput ? 'canvas' : 'gallery';
      if (typeof syncImageMobileStructure === 'function') syncImageMobileStructure();
      if (typeof updateComposerStageButtons === 'function') updateComposerStageButtons();
      updateImageMobileStageFlags();
    }
    return true;
  }
  window.closeImageWorkspaceForMobile = closeImageWorkspaceForMobile;

  function closeImageMobileSheet() {
    const commentsEl = document.getElementById('commentsSectionCtn');
    const workspaceEl = document.getElementById('imageWorkspaceStage');
    if (commentsEl && !commentsEl.hidden) {
      toggleComments(false);
      return;
    }
    if (workspaceEl && workspaceEl.classList.contains('show') && window.activeImageStage === 'workspace') {
      closeImageWorkspaceForMobile();
    }
  }
  window.closeImageMobileSheet = closeImageMobileSheet;

  function syncImageCommentsVisibility() {
    const section = document.getElementById('commentsSectionCtn');
    const btn = document.getElementById('commentsToggleBtn');
    if (!section) return;
    const isOpen = !section.hidden;
    section.classList.toggle('is-open', isOpen);
    if (btn) btn.classList.toggle('active', isOpen);
    if (typeof syncImagePromptDockVisibility === 'function') {
      syncImagePromptDockVisibility();
    }
    if (typeof updateImageMobileStageFlags === 'function') {
      updateImageMobileStageFlags();
    }
  }
  
  function rebalanceLoopRenderGrid() {
    const output = document.getElementById('outputCtn');
    if (!output) return;

    const candidates = output.querySelectorAll('.image-grid-container, .imageGrid, .generated-image-grid, .output-grid, .render-grid');
    const host = candidates.length ? candidates[0] : output;
    if (!host) return;

    host.style.display = 'flex';
    host.style.flexWrap = 'wrap';
    host.style.justifyContent = 'center';
    host.style.alignItems = 'flex-start';
    host.style.alignContent = 'flex-start';
    host.style.gap = '6px';
    host.style.width = '100%';
    host.style.margin = '0 auto';
    host.style.overflow = 'visible';

    const items = Array.from(host.children || []).filter(el => el && el.nodeType === 1);
    items.forEach((item) => {
      item.style.margin = '0';
      item.style.flex = '0 1 auto';
    });
  }
  window.rebalanceLoopRenderGrid = rebalanceLoopRenderGrid;

  requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    try { rebalanceLoopRenderGrid(); } catch (e) {}
  });

  window.__loopRenderGridObserverTarget = document.getElementById('outputCtn');
  if (window.__loopRenderGridObserverTarget && !window.__loopRenderGridObserver) {
    window.__loopRenderGridObserver = new MutationObserver(() => {
      try { rebalanceLoopRenderGrid(); } catch (e) {}
    });
    window.__loopRenderGridObserver.observe(window.__loopRenderGridObserverTarget, { childList: true, subtree: true });

    if (!window.__loopRenderGridResizeBound) {
      window.__loopRenderGridResizeBound = true;
      window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
        try { rebalanceLoopRenderGrid(); } catch (e) {}
      });
    }
  }

window.syncImageCommentsVisibility = syncImageCommentsVisibility;

  function hasRealCanvasOutput() {
    const outputEl = document.getElementById('outputCtn');
    if (!outputEl) return false;
    return !!outputEl.querySelector('.render-item, img, iframe, canvas');
  }
  window.hasRealCanvasOutput = hasRealCanvasOutput;

  function reconcileImageStageState(reason = '') {
    const appEl = document.querySelector('.app');
    const pageImageEl = document.getElementById('page-image');
    const outputEl = document.getElementById('outputCtn');
    const gallerySection = document.getElementById('gallerySection');

    if (!appEl || !pageImageEl || !pageImageEl.classList.contains('active')) return;

    const actualHasOutput = hasRealCanvasOutput();
    if (!actualHasOutput) {
      hasRenderedOutput = false;
      window.hasRenderedOutput = false;
    } else {
      window.hasRenderedOutput = true;
    }

    if (!actualHasOutput) {
      const keepWorkspaceOpen = window.loopImageWorkspacePinned === true || window.activeImageStage === 'workspace';
      if (!keepWorkspaceOpen) {
        window.activeImageStage = 'gallery';
        appEl.classList.remove('image-stage-canvas', 'image-stage-workspace');
        if (imageWorkspaceStage) imageWorkspaceStage.classList.remove('show');
        if (chatSettings) chatSettings.classList.remove('show');
        restoreChatSettingsToDock();
      } else {
        appEl.classList.add('image-stage-workspace');
        appEl.classList.remove('image-stage-canvas');
        if (imageWorkspaceStage) imageWorkspaceStage.classList.add('show');
        if (chatSettings) chatSettings.classList.add('show');
      }
      if (outputEl) outputEl.setAttribute('hidden', 'true');
      if (gallerySection) {
        gallerySection.removeAttribute('hidden');
        gallerySection.classList.add('show');
      }
      updateCanvasButtonVisibility();
      updateCanvasNavVisibility();
      updateComposerStageButtons();
      syncInlineWidthVisibility();
      syncComposerReservedSpace();
      syncImageMobileStructure();
      if (typeof syncImageCommentsVisibility === 'function') syncImageCommentsVisibility();
      if (typeof updateImageMobileStageFlags === 'function') updateImageMobileStageFlags();
      return;
    }

    if (gallerySection) {
      gallerySection.removeAttribute('hidden');
      gallerySection.classList.add('show');
    }

    if (window.activeImageStage === 'gallery') {
      appEl.classList.remove('image-stage-canvas');
      if (!window.loopImageWorkspacePinned) appEl.classList.remove('image-stage-workspace');
      if (window.loopImageWorkspacePinned) {
        appEl.classList.add('image-stage-workspace');
        if (imageWorkspaceStage) imageWorkspaceStage.classList.add('show');
        if (chatSettings) chatSettings.classList.add('show');
      }
      if (outputEl) outputEl.setAttribute('hidden', 'true');
    }

    if (window.activeImageStage === 'canvas') {
      appEl.classList.remove('image-stage-canvas');
      if (!window.loopImageWorkspacePinned) appEl.classList.remove('image-stage-workspace');
      if (window.loopImageWorkspacePinned) {
        appEl.classList.add('image-stage-workspace');
        if (imageWorkspaceStage) imageWorkspaceStage.classList.add('show');
        if (chatSettings) chatSettings.classList.add('show');
      }
      if (outputEl) outputEl.removeAttribute('hidden');
    }

    if (window.activeImageStage === 'workspace') {
      appEl.classList.add('image-stage-workspace');
      appEl.classList.remove('image-stage-canvas');
      if (outputEl) outputEl.removeAttribute('hidden');
    }

    updateCanvasButtonVisibility();
    updateCanvasNavVisibility();
    updateComposerStageButtons();
    syncInlineWidthVisibility();
    syncComposerReservedSpace();
    syncImageMobileStructure();
    if (typeof syncImageCommentsVisibility === 'function') syncImageCommentsVisibility();
    if (typeof updateImageMobileStageFlags === 'function') updateImageMobileStageFlags();
  }
  window.reconcileImageStageState = reconcileImageStageState;


  var composerMenu = document.getElementById('composerMenu');
  var ratioTriggerValue = document.getElementById('ratioTriggerValue');
  var howManyTriggerValue = document.getElementById('howManyTriggerValue');
  var promptStrengthTriggerValue = document.getElementById('promptStrengthTriggerValue');
  var promptStrengthPresetMap = {
    low: { label: 'Low', signature: 35, core: 55, technical: 25 },
    medium: { label: 'Medium', signature: 50, core: 70, technical: 40 },
    high: { label: 'High', signature: 65, core: 82, technical: 55 },
    extreme: { label: 'Extreme', signature: 80, core: 95, technical: 70 }
  };
  window.loopPromptStrengthPreset = 'medium';

  function getResolutionShortLabel(value) {
    const labels = {
      '768x768': '1:1',
      '768x512': '3:2',
      '512x768': '2:3'
    };
    return labels[String(value || '')] || '1:1';
  }

  function updateRatioTriggerLabel() {
    if (ratioTriggerValue && resolutionInput) {
      ratioTriggerValue.textContent = getResolutionShortLabel(resolutionInput.value);
    }
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-ratio]').forEach(function(btn) {
      btn.classList.toggle('is-active', !!resolutionInput && btn.getAttribute('data-ratio') === resolutionInput.value);
    });
  }

  function updateHowManyTriggerLabel() {
    var imageCountInput = document.getElementById('imageCountInput');
    if (howManyTriggerValue && imageCountInput) {
      howManyTriggerValue.textContent = String(imageCountInput.value || '1');
    }
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-count]').forEach(function(btn) {
      btn.classList.toggle('is-active', !!imageCountInput && btn.getAttribute('data-count') === String(imageCountInput.value || '1'));
    });
  }

  function updatePromptStrengthButtons() {
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-strength]').forEach(function(btn) {
      btn.classList.toggle('is-active', btn.getAttribute('data-strength') === String(window.loopPromptStrengthPreset || 'medium'));
    });
    var preset = promptStrengthPresetMap[window.loopPromptStrengthPreset] || promptStrengthPresetMap.medium;
    if (promptStrengthTriggerValue) promptStrengthTriggerValue.textContent = preset.label;
  }

  function setPromptStrengthPreset(presetKey, keepMenuOpen) {
    var preset = promptStrengthPresetMap[presetKey] || promptStrengthPresetMap.medium;
    window.loopPromptStrengthPreset = (presetKey in promptStrengthPresetMap) ? presetKey : 'medium';
    if (document.getElementById('signatureStrengthInput')) document.getElementById('signatureStrengthInput').value = String(preset.signature);
    if (document.getElementById('coreStrengthInput')) document.getElementById('coreStrengthInput').value = String(preset.core);
    if (document.getElementById('technicalStrengthInput')) document.getElementById('technicalStrengthInput').value = String(preset.technical);
    updatePromptStrengthButtons();
    if (!keepMenuOpen) closeComposerMenu();
  }

  function setRatioValue(value) {
    if (resolutionInput) resolutionInput.value = value;
    updateRatioTriggerLabel();
    syncRenderPreviewWidthBounds(null, true);
    closeComposerMenu();
  }

  function setHowManyValue(value) {
    var imageCountInput = document.getElementById('imageCountInput');
    if (imageCountInput) imageCountInput.value = String(value);
    updateHowManyTriggerLabel();
    closeComposerMenu();
  }

  function closeComposerMenu() {
    if (!composerMenu) return;
    composerMenu.hidden = true;
    composerMenu.dataset.menu = '';
    composerMenu.querySelectorAll('.composer-menu-panel').forEach(function(panel) { panel.hidden = true; });
    document.querySelectorAll('.composer-trigger').forEach(function(btn) { btn.classList.remove('is-active'); });
  }

  function positionComposerMenu(triggerEl) {
    if (!composerMenu || !triggerEl || !inputWrapper) return;
    const wrapperRect = inputWrapper.getBoundingClientRect();
    const triggerRect = triggerEl.getBoundingClientRect();
    const targetLeft = Math.max(12, Math.min(wrapperRect.width - composerMenu.offsetWidth - 12, (triggerRect.left - wrapperRect.left) + (triggerRect.width / 2) - (composerMenu.offsetWidth / 2)));
    composerMenu.style.left = targetLeft + 'px';
  }

  function toggleComposerMenu(kind, triggerEl) {
    if (!composerMenu || !triggerEl) return;
    const isSame = !composerMenu.hidden && composerMenu.dataset.menu === kind;
    if (isSame) {
      closeComposerMenu();
      return;
    }
    composerMenu.hidden = false;
    composerMenu.dataset.menu = kind;
    composerMenu.querySelectorAll('.composer-menu-panel').forEach(function(panel) {
      panel.hidden = panel.getAttribute('data-menu-panel') !== kind;
    });
    document.querySelectorAll('.composer-trigger').forEach(function(btn) { btn.classList.remove('is-active'); });
    triggerEl.classList.add('is-active');
    requestAnimationFrame(function() { positionComposerMenu(triggerEl); });
    updateRatioTriggerLabel();
    updateHowManyTriggerLabel();
    updatePromptStrengthButtons();
  }

  if (composerMenu) {
    composerMenu.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.stopPropagation(); });
  }

  document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
    if (!composerMenu || composerMenu.hidden) return;
    if (e.target.closest('#composerMenu')) return;
    if (e.target.closest('.composer-trigger')) return;
    closeComposerMenu();
  });

  window.toggleComposerMenu = toggleComposerMenu;
  window.closeComposerMenu = closeComposerMenu;
  window.setRatioValue = setRatioValue;
  window.setHowManyValue = setHowManyValue;
  window.setPromptStrengthPreset = setPromptStrengthPreset;
  updateRatioTriggerLabel();
  updateHowManyTriggerLabel();
  setPromptStrengthPreset('medium', true);
  updateInputShape(true);
  updateComposerStageButtons();
  syncComposerReservedSpace();
  syncImageMobileStructure();
  window.addEventListener('resize', syncComposerReservedSpace);
  window.addEventListener('resize', syncImageMobileStructure);

  function moveChatSettingsToWorkspace() {
    return;
  }

  function restoreChatSettingsToDock() {
    return;
  }

  function getCanvasStrip() {
    return document.querySelector('#outputCtn .image-grid-container');
  }

  function getCanvasStripItems(strip) {
    const targetStrip = strip || getCanvasStrip();
    return targetStrip ? Array.from(targetStrip.querySelectorAll('.render-item')) : [];
  }

  function getCanvasSnapTargets(strip) {
    const targetStrip = strip || getCanvasStrip();
    if (!targetStrip) return [];
    const items = Array.from(targetStrip.querySelectorAll('.render-item'));
    const maxScroll = Math.max(0, targetStrip.scrollWidth - targetStrip.clientWidth);
    return items.map((item) => {
      const centeredLeft = item.offsetLeft - ((targetStrip.clientWidth - item.offsetWidth) / 2);
      return Math.max(0, Math.min(maxScroll, centeredLeft));
    });
  }

  function getNearestCanvasSnapIndex(strip, snapTargets) {
    const targetStrip = strip || getCanvasStrip();
    const targets = Array.isArray(snapTargets) ? snapTargets : getCanvasSnapTargets(targetStrip);
    if (!targetStrip || !targets.length) return 0;
    const current = targetStrip.scrollLeft;
    let bestIndex = 0;
    let bestDistance = Infinity;
    targets.forEach((target, index) => {
      const distance = Math.abs(target - current);
      if (distance < bestDistance) {
        bestDistance = distance;
        bestIndex = index;
      }
    });
    return bestIndex;
  }

  function getCanvasLayoutMetrics(strip) {
    const targetStrip = strip || getCanvasStrip();
    const items = getCanvasStripItems(targetStrip);
    const computed = targetStrip ? getComputedStyle(targetStrip) : null;
    const gapX = computed ? (parseFloat(computed.columnGap || computed.gap || '0') || 0) : 0;
    const gapY = computed ? (parseFloat(computed.rowGap || computed.gap || '0') || 0) : 0;
    const availableWidth = targetStrip ? Math.max(0, targetStrip.clientWidth) : 0;
    const availableHeight = getCanvasStageHeight();
    const previewWidth = parseInt(widthInput?.value, 10) || parseInt(targetStrip?.style?.getPropertyValue('--render-preview-width') || '', 10) || 400;
    const tightestAspectRatio = items.reduce((minRatio, item) => {
      const ratio = parseFloat(item.dataset.aspectRatio || '');
      return (Number.isFinite(ratio) && ratio > 0) ? Math.min(minRatio, ratio) : minRatio;
    }, Infinity);
    const normalizedAspectRatio = Number.isFinite(tightestAspectRatio) && tightestAspectRatio > 0 ? tightestAspectRatio : Math.max(0.01, getCurrentRenderAspectRatio());
    const itemHeight = Math.min(availableHeight, Math.round(previewWidth / normalizedAspectRatio));
    const columnsFit = Math.max(1, Math.floor((availableWidth + gapX) / Math.max(1, previewWidth + gapX)));
    const rowsFit = Math.max(1, Math.floor((availableHeight + gapY) / Math.max(1, itemHeight + gapY)));
    const rowsNeeded = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(items.length / columnsFit));
    const totalHeightNeeded = (rowsNeeded * itemHeight) + (Math.max(0, rowsNeeded - 1) * gapY);
    const totalRowWidth = (items.length * previewWidth) + (Math.max(0, items.length - 1) * gapX);
    const wrapSlack = targetStrip && targetStrip.classList.contains('is-wrap') ? 8 : 24;
    const canWrapWithoutOverflow = items.length > 1 && rowsFit >= 2 && totalHeightNeeded <= Math.max(0, availableHeight - wrapSlack);
    const shouldFocusCenter = items.length > 0 && items.length <= 2 && totalRowWidth <= Math.max(0, availableWidth - 32) && !canWrapWithoutOverflow;
    return {
      items,
      gapX,
      gapY,
      availableWidth,
      availableHeight,
      previewWidth,
      itemHeight,
      columnsFit,
      rowsFit,
      rowsNeeded,
      totalHeightNeeded,
      totalRowWidth,
      canWrapWithoutOverflow,
      shouldFocusCenter
    };
  }

  function updateCanvasNavVisibility() {
    const prevBtn = document.getElementById('canvasNavPrevBtn');
    const nextBtn = document.getElementById('canvasNavNextBtn');
    if (prevBtn) prevBtn.style.display = 'none';
    if (nextBtn) nextBtn.style.display = 'none';
  }

  function syncCanvasStripIndex(strip) {
    window._canvasStripIndex = 0;
    return 0;
  }

  function syncCanvasLayoutMode(preserveAnchor) {
    const strip = getCanvasStrip();
    if (!strip) {
      updateCanvasNavVisibility();
      return;
    }

    const metrics = getCanvasLayoutMetrics(strip);
    if (!metrics.items.length) {
      strip.classList.remove('is-wrap');
      strip.classList.remove('is-focus-center');
      window._canvasStripIndex = 0;
      updateCanvasNavVisibility();
      return;
    }

    strip.classList.add('is-wrap');
    strip.classList.toggle('is-focus-center', metrics.items.length === 1);

    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      window._canvasStripIndex = 0;
      try {
        strip.scrollTo({ left: 0, top: 0, behavior: 'instant' });
      } catch (e) {
        strip.scrollLeft = 0;
        strip.scrollTop = 0;
      }
      updateCanvasNavVisibility();
    });
  }

  function scrollCanvasStrip(direction) {
    return;
  }

  function updateCanvasButtonVisibility() {
    var canvasBtn = document.getElementById('canvasModeBtn');
    if (!canvasBtn) return;
    const appRoot = document.querySelector('.app');
    if (appRoot && appRoot.classList.contains('page-image-simple')) {
      canvasBtn.hidden = true;
    } else {
      canvasBtn.hidden = !hasRenderedOutput;
    }
    updateComposerStageButtons();
  }

  function showGalleryStage() {
    const appEl = document.querySelector('.app');
    if (typeof closeImageCommentsForMobile === 'function') closeImageCommentsForMobile();
    window.activeImageStage = 'gallery';
    if (appEl) {
      appEl.classList.remove('image-stage-canvas');
      if (window.loopImageWorkspacePinned) appEl.classList.add('image-stage-workspace');
      else appEl.classList.remove('image-stage-workspace');
    }
    if (window.loopImageWorkspacePinned) {
      if (imageWorkspaceStage) imageWorkspaceStage.classList.add('show');
      if (chatSettings) chatSettings.classList.add('show');
    } else {
      if (imageWorkspaceStage) imageWorkspaceStage.classList.remove('show');
      if (chatSettings) chatSettings.classList.remove('show');
      restoreChatSettingsToDock();
    }
    const outputEl = document.getElementById('outputCtn');
    const gallerySection = document.getElementById('gallerySection');
    if (outputEl) outputEl.setAttribute('hidden', 'true');
    if (gallerySection) {
      gallerySection.removeAttribute('hidden');
      gallerySection.classList.add('show');
    }
    syncInlineWidthVisibility();
    updateCanvasButtonVisibility();
    updateCanvasNavVisibility();
    updateComposerStageButtons();
    syncComposerReservedSpace();
    syncImageMobileStructure();
    reconcileImageStageState('showGalleryStage');
  }

  function showWorkspaceStage() {
    if (window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(max-width: 760px)').matches) {
      return;
    }
    const appEl = document.querySelector('.app');
    if (typeof closeImageCommentsForMobile === 'function') closeImageCommentsForMobile();
    window.loopImageWorkspacePinned = true;
    if (appEl) {
      appEl.classList.add('image-stage-workspace');
      appEl.classList.remove('image-stage-canvas');
    }
    moveChatSettingsToWorkspace();
    if (imageWorkspaceStage) imageWorkspaceStage.classList.add('show');
    if (chatSettings) chatSettings.classList.add('show');
    const outputEl = document.getElementById('outputCtn');
    const gallerySection = document.getElementById('gallerySection');
    if (gallerySection) {
      gallerySection.removeAttribute('hidden');
      gallerySection.classList.add('show');
    }
    if (outputEl) {
      if (hasRenderedOutput || hasRealCanvasOutput()) outputEl.removeAttribute('hidden');
      else outputEl.setAttribute('hidden', 'true');
    }
    syncInlineWidthVisibility();
    updateCanvasButtonVisibility();
    updateCanvasNavVisibility();
    updateComposerStageButtons();
    syncComposerReservedSpace();
    syncRenderPreviewWidthBounds(null, true);
    syncImageMobileStructure();
    requestAnimationFrame(function(){ try { rebalanceLoopRenderGrid(); syncCanvasLayoutMode(true); } catch(e) {} });
  }

  function showCanvasStage() {
    if (!(hasRenderedOutput || hasRealCanvasOutput())) {
      showGalleryStage();
      return;
    }
    hasRenderedOutput = true;
    window.hasRenderedOutput = true;
    const appEl = document.querySelector('.app');
    if (typeof closeImageCommentsForMobile === 'function') closeImageCommentsForMobile();
    window.activeImageStage = 'canvas';
    if (appEl) {
      appEl.classList.remove('image-stage-canvas');
      if (window.loopImageWorkspacePinned) appEl.classList.add('image-stage-workspace');
      else appEl.classList.remove('image-stage-workspace');
    }
    if (window.loopImageWorkspacePinned) {
      if (imageWorkspaceStage) imageWorkspaceStage.classList.add('show');
      if (chatSettings) chatSettings.classList.add('show');
    } else {
      if (imageWorkspaceStage) imageWorkspaceStage.classList.remove('show');
      if (chatSettings) chatSettings.classList.remove('show');
      restoreChatSettingsToDock();
    }
    const outputEl = document.getElementById('outputCtn');
    const gallerySection = document.getElementById('gallerySection');
    if (gallerySection) {
      gallerySection.removeAttribute('hidden');
      gallerySection.classList.add('show');
    }
    if (outputEl) {
      outputEl.removeAttribute('hidden');
      try { outputEl.scrollTo({ left: 0, top: 0, behavior: 'instant' }); } catch (e) {}
      try { outputEl.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }); } catch (e) {}
    }
    syncInlineWidthVisibility();
    updateCanvasButtonVisibility();
    ensureCanvasStripListeners();
    updateComposerStageButtons();
    syncComposerReservedSpace();
    syncRenderPreviewWidthBounds(null, true);
    syncImageMobileStructure();
    reconcileImageStageState('showCanvasStage');
    requestAnimationFrame(() => syncCanvasLayoutMode(true));
  }

  function ensureCanvasStripListeners() {
    const strip = getCanvasStrip();
    if (!strip || strip.dataset.loopCanvasBound === 'true') return;
    let ticking = false;
    strip.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
      if (strip.classList.contains('is-wrap') || strip.classList.contains('is-focus-center')) return;
      if (ticking) return;
      ticking = true;
      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        syncCanvasStripIndex(strip);
        updateCanvasNavVisibility();
        ticking = false;
      });
    }, { passive: true });
    strip.dataset.loopCanvasBound = 'true';
  }

  function syncInlineWidthVisibility() {
    if (!inlineWidthControl) return;
    const shouldShow = hasRenderedOutput || hasRealCanvasOutput();
    inlineWidthControl.hidden = !shouldShow;
  }

  function getWidthControlFallbackMin() {
    return 200;
  }

  function getCanvasStageHeight() {
    const headerHeight = parseInt(getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--header-height'), 10) || document.querySelector('.header')?.offsetHeight || 50;
    return Math.max(240, window.innerHeight - headerHeight);
  }

  function parseResolutionAspectRatio(resolutionValue) {
    const match = String(resolutionValue || '').match(/(\d+)\s*x\s*(\d+)/i);
    if (!match) return 1;
    const width = parseInt(match[1], 10) || 1;
    const height = parseInt(match[2], 10) || 1;
    return height > 0 ? width / height : 1;
  }

  function getCurrentRenderAspectRatio() {
    const firstRenderItem = document.querySelector('#outputCtn .render-item');
    if (firstRenderItem) {
      const storedRatio = parseFloat(firstRenderItem.dataset.aspectRatio || '');
      if (Number.isFinite(storedRatio) && storedRatio > 0) return storedRatio;
      const firstImg = firstRenderItem.querySelector('img');
      if (firstImg) {
        const naturalWidth = firstImg.naturalWidth || parseInt(firstImg.getAttribute('width'), 10) || 0;
        const naturalHeight = firstImg.naturalHeight || parseInt(firstImg.getAttribute('height'), 10) || 0;
        if (naturalWidth > 0 && naturalHeight > 0) return naturalWidth / naturalHeight;
      }
    }
    return parseResolutionAspectRatio(resolutionInput ? resolutionInput.value : '512x768');
  }

  function getMaxRenderPreviewWidth() {
    const fallbackMin = getWidthControlFallbackMin();
    const aspectWidth = Math.round(getCanvasStageHeight() * getCurrentRenderAspectRatio());
    const appEl = document.querySelector('.app');
    const outputEl = document.getElementById('outputCtn');
    const pageImageEl = document.getElementById('page-image');
    const sidebarWidth = parseInt(getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--sidebar-width'), 10) || 0;
    const workspaceOpen = !!(appEl && appEl.classList.contains('image-stage-workspace'));
    const workspaceWidth = workspaceOpen ? (document.getElementById('imageWorkspaceStage')?.getBoundingClientRect().width || 360) : 0;
    const availableWidth = Math.max(
      fallbackMin,
      Math.floor((outputEl?.clientWidth || pageImageEl?.clientWidth || (window.innerWidth - sidebarWidth - workspaceWidth) || 900) - 28)
    );
    const areaAwareWidth = Math.round(availableWidth * (workspaceOpen ? 0.82 : 0.72));
    return Math.max(fallbackMin, Math.min(availableWidth, Math.max(aspectWidth, areaAwareWidth)));
  }

  function getMinRenderPreviewWidth(maxWidth) {
    return Math.max(120, Math.min(getWidthControlFallbackMin(), Math.round(maxWidth * 0.35)));
  }

  function paintInlineWidthTrack() {
    if (!inlineWidthInput) return;
    const min = parseInt(inlineWidthInput.min, 10) || 0;
    const max = parseInt(inlineWidthInput.max, 10) || 1;
    const val = parseInt(inlineWidthInput.value, 10) || min;
    const percent = max > min ? ((val - min) / (max - min)) * 100 : 0;
    inlineWidthInput.style.background = `linear-gradient(to right, var(--accent) 0%, var(--accent) ${percent}%, var(--border-subtle) ${percent}%, var(--border-subtle) 100%)`;
  }

  function getSmartRenderPreviewWidth(imageCount) {
    const outputEl = document.getElementById('outputCtn');
    const strip = document.querySelector('#outputCtn .image-grid-container');
    const host = strip || outputEl;
    const gap = 6;

    const maxWidth = getMaxRenderPreviewWidth();
    const minWidth = getMinRenderPreviewWidth(maxWidth);

    const availableWidth = Math.max(
      minWidth,
      Math.floor((host?.clientWidth || outputEl?.clientWidth || window.innerWidth || 900) - 12)
    );

    let desiredColumns = 1;
    if (imageCount >= 2) desiredColumns = 2;
    if (imageCount >= 4) desiredColumns = 3;
    if (imageCount >= 9) desiredColumns = 4;

    const computed = Math.floor((availableWidth - (gap * Math.max(0, desiredColumns - 1))) / desiredColumns);
    return Math.max(minWidth, Math.min(maxWidth, computed));
  }

  function syncRenderPreviewWidthBounds(preferredPx, forceToMax) {
    const maxWidth = getMaxRenderPreviewWidth();
    const minWidth = getMinRenderPreviewWidth(maxWidth);

    if (widthInput) {
      widthInput.min = String(minWidth);
      widthInput.max = String(maxWidth);
    }
    if (inlineWidthInput) {
      inlineWidthInput.min = String(minWidth);
      inlineWidthInput.max = String(maxWidth);
    }

    if (inlineWidthMinLabel) inlineWidthMinLabel.textContent = String(minWidth);
    if (inlineWidthMaxLabel) inlineWidthMaxLabel.textContent = String(maxWidth);

    const preferred = parseInt(preferredPx, 10);
    const nextValue = forceToMax
      ? maxWidth
      : (Number.isFinite(preferred) ? preferred : (parseInt(widthInput.value, 10) || maxWidth));

    updateRenderPreviewWidth(nextValue);
    return { minWidth, maxWidth, value: parseInt(widthInput.value, 10) || maxWidth };
  }

  function updateRenderPreviewWidth(pxValue) {
    const fallback = parseInt(widthInput.value, 10) || 400;
    let numericValue = parseInt(pxValue, 10);
    if (!Number.isFinite(numericValue)) numericValue = fallback;

    const minWidth = parseInt(widthInput.min, 10) || getWidthControlFallbackMin();
    const maxWidth = parseInt(widthInput.max, 10) || getMaxRenderPreviewWidth();
    numericValue = Math.max(minWidth, Math.min(maxWidth, numericValue));

    let val = numericValue + "px";
    if (widthInput) widthInput.value = numericValue;
    if (widthValueDisplay) widthValueDisplay.textContent = val;
    if (inlineWidthInput) inlineWidthInput.value = numericValue;
    if (inlineWidthValue) inlineWidthValue.textContent = val;
    paintInlineWidthTrack();
    const gridContainers = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("#outputCtn .image-grid-container"));
    if (gridContainers.length) {
      gridContainers.forEach((gridContainer) => {
        gridContainer.style.setProperty("--render-preview-width", val);
      });
      if (window._canvasLayoutRafId) cancelAnimationFrame(window._canvasLayoutRafId);
      window._canvasLayoutRafId = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        window._canvasLayoutRafId = 0;
        syncCanvasLayoutMode(true);
        try { rebalanceLoopRenderGrid(); } catch (e) {}
      });
    } else {
      updateCanvasNavVisibility();
    }
  }

  if (widthInput) {
    widthInput.addEventListener("input", function() { updateRenderPreviewWidth(this.value); });
  }

  if (inlineWidthInput) {
    inlineWidthInput.addEventListener("input", function () {
      updateRenderPreviewWidth(this.value);
    });
  }

  if (resolutionInput) {
    resolutionInput.addEventListener('change', function() {
      syncRenderPreviewWidthBounds(null, true);
    });
  }

  window.addEventListener('resize', function() {
    if (!widthInput) return;
    syncRenderPreviewWidthBounds(widthInput.value, false);
    if (window._canvasLayoutRafId) cancelAnimationFrame(window._canvasLayoutRafId);
    window._canvasLayoutRafId = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      window._canvasLayoutRafId = 0;
      syncCanvasLayoutMode(true);
    });
  });

  syncRenderPreviewWidthBounds(null, true);
  updateCanvasButtonVisibility();
  syncInlineWidthVisibility();
  updateGalleryToggleState();

    try {
      if (window.LoopStory?.feedWatcher) clearInterval(window.LoopStory.feedWatcher);
      if (window.LoopStory?.currentModalEl) window.LoopStory.currentModalEl.remove();
    } catch (e) { console.error(e); }

    function loopStoryHasText(value) {
      return String(value || '').trim().length > 0;
    }

    function buildWorldStoryPackage(item) {
      const safe = item || {};
      const blocks = [];
      const scenarioText = [String(safe.scenario || '').trim(), String(safe.premise || '').trim()]
        .filter(Boolean)
        .filter((value, index, arr) => arr.indexOf(value) === index)
        .join('\n\n')
        .trim();
      if (scenarioText) blocks.push(scenarioText);
      if (loopStoryHasText(safe.contextSummary)) blocks.push(`Context Summary:
${String(safe.contextSummary).trim()}`);
      if (loopStoryHasText(safe.contextMemo)) blocks.push(`Context Notes:
${String(safe.contextMemo).trim()}`);
      if (loopStoryHasText(safe.contextLore)) blocks.push(`World Lore / Rules:
${String(safe.contextLore).trim()}`);
      if (loopStoryHasText(safe.contextGlossary)) blocks.push(`Glossary / Terms:
${String(safe.contextGlossary).trim()}`);
      return blocks.filter(Boolean).join('\n\n').trim();
    }

    window.LoopStory = {
      storageKey: 'loop_story_precise_v1',
      transcriptEl: null,
      isInit: false,
      feedWatcher: null,
      deletedLastBlock: null,
      currentStreamingOp: null,
      currentModalEl: null,
      worldPreviewCache: {},
      worldPreviewPending: {},
      _messageFeedBound: false,
      _autoFollowFeed: true,
      _feedUserIsReviewingHistory: false,

      get els() {
        return {
          inspiration: document.getElementById('storyInspirationEl'),
          whatNext: document.getElementById('storyWhatNextEl'),
          writingInstructions: document.getElementById('storyWritingInstructionsEl'),
          scenario: document.getElementById('storyScenarioEl'),
          scenarioBody: document.getElementById('storyScenarioBody'),
          scenarioToggleBtn: document.getElementById('storyScenarioToggleBtn'),
          status: document.getElementById('storyStatusEl'),
          statusSpinner: document.getElementById('storyStatusSpinner'),
          sendAs: document.getElementById('storySendAsEl') || document.getElementById('storySendAsQuickEl'),
          sendAsQuick: document.getElementById('storySendAsQuickEl'),
          nextSpeakerQuick: document.getElementById('storyNextSpeakerQuickEl'),
          autoRespond: document.getElementById('storyAutoRespondEl'),
          directionPanel: document.getElementById('storyDirectionPanel'),
          imageCore: document.getElementById('storyImageCoreEl'),
          imageScale: document.getElementById('storyImageScaleEl'),
          imagePositive: document.getElementById('storyImagePositiveEl'),
          imageNegative: document.getElementById('storyImageNegativeEl'),
          contextMemo: document.getElementById('storyContextMemoEl'),
          contextSummary: document.getElementById('storyContextSummaryEl'),
          contextLore: document.getElementById('storyContextLoreEl'),
          contextGlossary: document.getElementById('storyContextGlossaryEl'),
          input: document.getElementById('storyInputEl'),
          shareBtn: document.getElementById('storyShareBtn'),
          shareCtn: document.getElementById('storyShareCtn'),
          shareInput: document.getElementById('storyShareLinkInputEl'),
          generatePairBtn: document.getElementById('storyGeneratePairBtn'),
          generateScenarioBtn: document.getElementById('storyGenerateScenarioBtn'),
          primaryPreview: document.getElementById('storyPrimaryPreview'),
          primaryAvatar: document.getElementById('storyPrimaryAvatar'),
          primaryName: document.getElementById('storyPrimaryName'),
          primaryDesc: document.getElementById('storyPrimaryDesc'),
          userPreview: document.getElementById('storyUserPreview'),
          userAvatar: document.getElementById('storyUserAvatar'),
          userName: document.getElementById('storyUserName'),
          inSceneList: document.getElementById('storyInSceneList'),
          transcriptPlaceholder: document.getElementById('storyTranscriptPlaceholder'),
          messageFeed: document.getElementById('storyMessageFeed'),
          rawTranscriptWrap: document.getElementById('storyRawTranscriptWrap'),
          rawToggleBtn: document.getElementById('storyRawToggleBtn'),
          recentStoryList: document.getElementById('storyRecentStoryList'),
          messageActionsGrid: document.getElementById('storyMessageActionsGrid'),
          composerHint: document.getElementById('storyComposerHintEl'),
          speakerRuntimeBar: document.getElementById('storySpeakerRuntimeBar'),
          speakerRuntimeHint: document.getElementById('storySpeakerRuntimeHint'),
          worldBackdrop: document.getElementById('storyWorldBackdrop'),
          worldImage: document.getElementById('storyWorldImage'),
          worldAtmosphere: document.getElementById('storyWorldAtmosphere'),
          worldPanelCard: document.getElementById('storyWorldPanelCard'),
          worldOpacity: document.getElementById('storyWorldOpacityEl'),
          worldAtmosphereSelect: document.getElementById('storyWorldAtmosphereEl'),
          worldSettings: document.getElementById('storyWorldSettings')
        };
      },

      getStoryStarterWorld() {
        return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(
          this.hallWorldBuildingSamples().find(item => String(item?.id || '') === 'hall_world_aelthirion_lunareth')
          || this.hallWorldBuildingSamples()[0]
          || null
        ));
      },

      getStoryStarterPrimary() {
        return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(
          this.hallQuickCharacters().find(item => String(item?.id || '') === 'hall_lyra')
          || this.hallQuickCharacters()[0]
          || {
            id: 'starter_primary',
            name: 'Primary',
            avatarUrl: '',
            short: '',
            appearance: '',
            characterDescription: '',
            description: ''
          }
        ));
      },

      getStoryStarterMessages(world=null, primary=null) {
        const now = Date.now();
        const safeWorld = world || this.getStoryStarterWorld() || {};
        const safePrimary = primary || this.getStoryStarterPrimary() || {};
        const worldTitle = String(safeWorld?.title || 'the story world').trim() || 'the story world';
        const placeLabel = /Lunareth/i.test(worldTitle) ? 'the silver roads beneath Lunareth' : 'the threshold of a dangerous new scene';
        const primaryName = String(safePrimary?.name || 'Primary').trim() || 'Primary';
        const primaryPronoun = /Lyra|Iora|Sable/i.test(primaryName) ? 'her' : 'his';

        return [
          {
            id: `seed_${now}_narrator`,
            role: 'narrator',
            speakerId: 'narrator',
            speakerName: 'Narrator',
            content: `Moonlight filters through crystal leaves along ${placeLabel}. The air is beautiful, ceremonial, and just tense enough to suggest that something important is about to shift.`,
            status: 'done',
            createdAt: now,
            updatedAt: now,
            meta: { source: 'default_story_seed' }
          },
          {
            id: `seed_${now}_primary`,
            role: 'character',
            speakerId: 'primary',
            speakerName: primaryName,
            content: `${primaryName} slows beside you and lowers ${primaryPronoun} voice. "Good. You're here before the court settles into its masks. Stay close to me for the first audience, and if anything in this place feels too polished, trust that instinct."`,
            status: 'done',
            createdAt: now + 1,
            updatedAt: now + 1,
            meta: { source: 'default_story_seed' }
          }
        ];
      },

      defaultData() {
        const starterWorld = this.getStoryStarterWorld();
        const starterPrimary = this.getStoryStarterPrimary();
        const starterScenario = starterWorld ? buildWorldStoryPackage(starterWorld) : '';
        return {
          format: 'loop-story-message-v2',
          inspiration: starterWorld?.title || '',
          imageCore: 'Fantasy',
          imageScale: '1:1',
          scenarioCollapsed: false,
          rawTranscriptOpen: false,
          whatNext: `Reply to ${starterPrimary?.name || 'the guide'} before the first audience begins, or steer the scene toward rumor, ritual, diplomacy, or private suspicion.`,
          writingInstructions: '',
          imagePositive: '',
          imageNegative: '',
          contextMemo: starterWorld?.contextMemo || '',
          contextSummary: starterWorld?.contextSummary || '',
          contextLore: starterWorld?.contextLore || '',
          contextGlossary: starterWorld?.contextGlossary || '',
          scenario: starterScenario,
          autoRespond: true,
          selectedSpeaker: 'user',
          nextSpeaker: '',
          primary: starterPrimary,
          user: {
            name: 'You',
            avatarUrl: '',
            description: 'Name: You\n\nSpecies & Gender: (state species and gender, or the most fitting equivalent)\n\nVisual Appearance:\nWrite one dense, concrete paragraph describing how this character is visually perceived in-scene, including silhouette, body language, clothing, textures, notable physical traits, and memorable details.\n\nPersonality:\nWrite one dense paragraph covering temperament, instincts, habits, emotional logic, contradictions, preferences, and interpersonal energy.\n\nBackground Lore:\nWrite one dense paragraph covering history, motives, tensions, current position, important relationships, secrets, fears, and driving conflicts.\n\nRoleplay Behavior Examples:\n1. "..." *Action.*\n2. "..." *Action.*\n3. "..." *Action.*\n4. "..." *Action.*\n5. "..." *Action.*'
          },
          inScene: [],
          inlineImages: {},
          messages: this.getStoryStarterMessages(starterWorld, starterPrimary),
          deletedMessageStack: [],
          savedStoryId: '',
          activeWorld: starterWorld,
          worldBackgroundOpacity: 26,
          worldBackgroundBlur: 6,
          worldAtmosphere: 'leaves'
        };
      },

      makeMessageId() {
        return 'msg_' + Date.now().toString(36) + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8);
      },

      inferSpeakerIdFromName(name='') {
        const clean = String(name || '').trim();
        if (!clean) return 'narrator';
        if (clean === (this.state?.primary?.name || '').trim()) return 'primary';
        if (clean === (this.state?.user?.name || '').trim()) return 'user';
        const found = (this.state?.inScene || []).find(v => (v.name || '').trim() === clean);
        return found ? found.id : 'narrator';
      },

      messageToTranscriptBlock(msg) {
        if (!msg) return '';
        const content = String(msg.content || '').trim();
        if (!content) return '';
        if (msg.role === 'narrator' || msg.speakerId === 'narrator') return content;
        const name = String(msg.speakerName || 'Narrator').trim() || 'Narrator';
        return `${name}: ${content}`;
      },

      renderTypingDotsHtml() {
        return `<span class="story-msg-streaming-tail" aria-label="generating"><span class="story-typing-dots" aria-hidden="true"><span></span><span></span><span></span></span></span>`;
      },

      renderLoopLoaderHtml(label='working') {
        const safeLabel = this.escapeHtml(label || 'working');
        return `<div class="story-loop-loader" aria-label="${safeLabel}">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 48 48" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true">
            <defs>
              <mask id="storyLoopCut">
                <rect width="48" height="48" fill="white"></rect>
                <circle cx="20" cy="16" r="6" fill="black"></circle>
              </mask>
            </defs>
            <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="17" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"></circle>
            <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="10" fill="currentColor" mask="url(#storyLoopCut)"></circle>
          </svg>
          <div class="story-loop-loader-label">${safeLabel}</div>
        </div>`;
      },

      getStoryImageScale() {
        const raw = String(this.els.imageScale?.value || this.state?.imageScale || '1:1').trim();
        return raw === '3:2' ? '3:2' : '1:1';
      },

      getStoryImageResolution(scale='1:1') {
        return String(scale || '') === '3:2' ? '768x512' : '768x768';
      },

      getInlineImageScaleForKey(key='') {
        const payload = this.state.inlineImages?.[key];
        const raw = String(payload?.imageScale || this.state?.imageScale || '1:1').trim();
        return raw === '3:2' ? '3:2' : '1:1';
      },

      normalizePositivePromptText(value='') {
        return String(value || '')
          .replace(/\r/g, '\n')
          .split('\n')
          .map(part => part.trim())
          .filter(Boolean)
          .join(', ')
          .replace(/\s*,\s*/g, ', ')
          .trim();
      },

      normalizeNegativePromptText(value='') {
        return String(value || '')
          .replace(/\r/g, '\n')
          .split('\n')
          .map(part => part.trim())
          .filter(Boolean)
          .join(', ')
          .replace(/\s*,\s*/g, ', ')
          .trim();
      },

      getSupportiveImagePositive() {
        const core = String(this.els.imageCore?.value || this.state?.imageCore || '').trim();
        const support = [
          'clear focal subject',
          'coherent composition',
          'clean visual readability',
          'consistent character details',
          'natural pose and body structure',
          'expressive face and eyes',
          'clean lighting separation',
          'good detail clarity'
        ];

        if (core === 'Anime Realism') {
          support.push('anime-inspired character design with realistic rendering');
        } else if (core === 'Cinematic Realism') {
          support.push('cinematic realism', 'grounded visual detail', 'filmic lighting', 'believable atmosphere');
        } else if (core === 'Comic Style') {
          support.push('clear illustrative shapes', 'clean line emphasis', 'strong readable stylization');
        } else if (core === 'Fantasy') {
          support.push('atmospheric fantasy mood', 'magical or painterly richness');
        } else if (core === '3D') {
          support.push('clean 3D render feel', 'solid material definition');
        }

        return this.normalizePositivePromptText(support.join(', '));
      },

      getSupportiveImageNegative() {
        return this.normalizeNegativePromptText([
          'bad anatomy',
          'deformed hands',
          'extra fingers',
          'broken fingers',
          'malformed face',
          'asymmetrical eyes',
          'crossed eyes',
          'blurry image',
          'low detail',
          'messy composition',
          'duplicate limbs',
          'extra limbs',
          'distorted body',
          'warped proportions',
          'visual artifacts',
          'watermark',
          'text overlay'
        ].join(', '));
      },

      getCustomImagePositive() {
        return this.normalizePositivePromptText(this.els.imagePositive?.value || this.state?.imagePositive || '');
      },

      getCustomImageNegative() {
        return this.normalizeNegativePromptText(this.els.imageNegative?.value || this.state?.imageNegative || '');
      },

      mergeImagePromptGuidance(...parts) {
        const seen = new Set();
        const out = [];
        parts.forEach(part => {
          String(part || '')
            .split(',')
            .map(v => v.trim())
            .filter(Boolean)
            .forEach(item => {
              const key = item.toLowerCase();
              if (seen.has(key)) return;
              seen.add(key);
              out.push(item);
            });
        });
        return out.join(', ');
      },

      getCombinedImagePositive() {
        return this.mergeImagePromptGuidance(
          this.getCustomImagePositive(),
          this.getSupportiveImagePositive()
        );
      },

      getCombinedImageNegative() {
        return this.mergeImagePromptGuidance(
          this.getCustomImageNegative(),
          this.getSupportiveImageNegative()
        );
      },

      setActionButtonBusy(el, busy=false, busyLabel='…') {
        if (!el) return;
        if (busy) {
          if (!el.dataset.originalLabel) el.dataset.originalLabel = el.innerHTML;
          el.innerHTML = busyLabel;
          el.disabled = true;
          el.setAttribute('aria-busy', 'true');
          return;
        }
        if (el.dataset.originalLabel) {
          el.innerHTML = el.dataset.originalLabel;
          delete el.dataset.originalLabel;
        }
        el.disabled = false;
        el.removeAttribute('aria-busy');
      },

      ensureInlineImageRuntimeStore() {
        if (!this.inlineImageRuntime || typeof this.inlineImageRuntime !== 'object') {
          this.inlineImageRuntime = {};
        }
        return this.inlineImageRuntime;
      },

      buildInlineImageCustomButton() {
        return {
          emoji: '➕︎',
          onClick: (data) => {
            try {
              window.showLoopImageActionModal(data);
            } catch (e) {
              console.error(e);
            }
          }
        };
      },

      createInlinePerchanceImageRuntime(prompt='', opts={}) {
        const width = Number(opts.width) || 240;
        const resolution = opts.resolution || '512x512';
        const img = image({
          prompt,
          resolution,
          width,
          count: 1,
          customButton: this.buildInlineImageCustomButton()
        });
        const temp = document.createElement('div');
        temp.innerHTML = img?.evaluateItem || '';
        const node = temp.firstElementChild || document.createElement('div');
        return {
          node,
          onFinishPromise: img?.onFinishPromise || Promise.resolve(null)
        };
      },

      mountInlineImageRuntimeForRow(row, key='') {
        if (!row || !key) return;
        const runtime = this.ensureInlineImageRuntimeStore()[key];
        if (!runtime || !Array.isArray(runtime.slots)) return;
        runtime.slots.forEach((slot, idx) => {
          if (!slot?.node) return;
          const host = row.querySelector(`[data-inline-runtime-key="${String(key).replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}"][data-inline-slot="${idx}"]`);
          if (!host) return;
          if (host.firstChild !== slot.node) {
            host.innerHTML = '';
            host.appendChild(slot.node);
          }
          const persistedUrl = String(this.state.inlineImages?.[key]?.images?.[idx] || host.getAttribute('data-url') || '').trim();
          if (persistedUrl) host.setAttribute('data-url', persistedUrl);
          this.syncInlineRuntimeActionOverlay(host, key, idx);
        });
      },

      syncInlineRuntimeActionOverlay(host=null, key='', idx=0) {
        if (!host || !key) return;
        const safeIndex = Number.isFinite(Number(idx)) ? Number(idx) : 0;
        const payload = this.state.inlineImages?.[key] || null;
        const runtimeImg = host.querySelector('img[src]');
        const url = String(payload?.images?.[safeIndex] || host.getAttribute('data-url') || runtimeImg?.getAttribute('src') || '').trim();
        const existing = host.querySelector('.story-inline-image-overlay');
        if (!url) {
          if (existing) existing.remove();
          return;
        }
        host.setAttribute('data-url', url);
        const nextHtml = this.renderInlineImageActionOverlay(key, safeIndex, url);
        if (!existing) {
          host.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', nextHtml);
          return;
        }
        if (existing.outerHTML !== nextHtml) {
          existing.outerHTML = nextHtml;
        }
      },

      dropInlineImageRuntime(key='') {
        const store = this.ensureInlineImageRuntimeStore();
        if (!key) return;
        delete store[String(key)];
      },

      freezeInlineImageRow(key='', urls=[]) {
        const safeKey = String(key || '');
        if (!safeKey) return;
        const row = this.findMessageRow(safeKey);
        if (!row) return;
        const safeSelectorKey = safeKey.replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
        row.dataset.inlineKey = safeKey;
        row.dataset.inlineMode = 'runtime';
        delete row.dataset.inlineFrozen;
        row.querySelectorAll(`[data-inline-runtime-key="${safeSelectorKey}"]`).forEach((host, idx) => {
          host.classList.add('story-inline-image-item--done');
          const url = Array.isArray(urls) ? (urls[idx] || '') : '';
          if (url) host.setAttribute('data-url', url);
          this.syncInlineRuntimeActionOverlay(host, safeKey, idx);
        });
        row.querySelectorAll(`[data-act="img-save"][data-inline-key="${safeSelectorKey}"]`).forEach(btn => {
          btn.disabled = false;
        });
      },

      serializeInlineImageSlotForDone(slot=null) {
        const node = slot?.node || null;
        if (!node) return '';
        try {
          return String(node.outerHTML || '');
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(e);
          return '';
        }
      },

      serializeInlineImagesForPersist(source={}) {
        const out = {};
        Object.entries(source || {}).forEach(([key, payload]) => {
          if (!payload || typeof payload !== 'object') return;
          if (payload.status === 'done' && Array.isArray(payload.images) && payload.images.length) {
            out[key] = {
              status: 'done',
              prompt: payload.prompt || '',
              images: payload.images.filter(Boolean).slice(0, 2)
            };
          } else if (payload.status === 'error') {
            out[key] = {
              status: 'error',
              prompt: payload.prompt || '',
              images: []
            };
          }
        });
        return out;
      },

      exportTranscriptFromMessages(messages=this.state?.messages || []) {
        return (messages || [])
          .map(msg => this.messageToTranscriptBlock(msg))
          .filter(Boolean)
          .join('\n\n')
          .trim();
      },

      buildMessagesFromTranscript(text='') {
        const blocks = String(text || '')
          .split(/\n{2,}/)
          .map(v => v.trim())
          .filter(Boolean);

        return blocks.map((block, index) => {
          const parsed = this.getBlockSpeakerAndContent(block);
          const speakerId = this.inferSpeakerIdFromName(parsed.speaker);
          const meta = this.getSpeakerMetaByName(parsed.speaker);
          const isNarrator = speakerId === 'narrator' || parsed.speaker === 'Narrator';

          return {
            id: this.makeMessageId() + '_' + index,
            role: isNarrator ? 'narrator' : (speakerId === 'user' ? 'user' : 'character'),
            speakerId,
            speakerName: meta?.name || parsed.speaker || 'Narrator',
            content: (parsed.content || block || '').trim(),
            status: 'done',
            createdAt: Date.now() + index,
            updatedAt: Date.now() + index,
            meta: {
              source: 'transcript_import'
            }
          };
        });
      },

      syncTranscriptEditorFromMessages() {
        if (!this.transcriptEl) return;
        const nextText = this.exportTranscriptFromMessages(this.state.messages || []);
        if ((this.transcriptEl.value || '').trim() !== nextText.trim()) {
          this.transcriptEl.value = nextText;
        }
      },

      setTranscriptText(nextText='', opts={source:'raw'}) {
        const text = String(nextText || '').trim();
        this.state.messages = this.buildMessagesFromTranscript(text);
        this.syncTranscriptEditorFromMessages();
        this.persistSnapshot();
        if (typeof window.syncLoopUserCharacterSidebar === 'function') window.syncLoopUserCharacterSidebar();
        this.scheduleFeedRender();
        this.renderStoryMessageActions?.();
      },

      appendMessage(message) {
        if (!this.state.messages) this.state.messages = [];
        this.state.messages.push(message);
        this.syncTranscriptEditorFromMessages();
        this.persistSnapshot();
        this.scheduleFeedRender();
        return message;
      },

      updateMessageContent(messageId, nextContent, nextStatus='streaming') {
        const msg = (this.state.messages || []).find(m => m.id === messageId);
        if (!msg) return;
        msg.content = String(nextContent || '');
        msg.status = nextStatus;
        msg.updatedAt = Date.now();
        this.syncTranscriptEditorFromMessages();
        this.scheduleFeedRender();
      },

      replaceLastAssistantMessageAsPending(targetSpeakerId) {
        const messages = this.state.messages || [];
        for (let i = messages.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
          const m = messages[i];
          if (m.role === 'character' || m.role === 'narrator') {
            this.state.deletedMessageStack = this.state.deletedMessageStack || [];
            this.state.deletedMessageStack.push({...m});
            messages.splice(i, 1);
            break;
          }
        }

        const speakerName = this.resolveSpeakerName(targetSpeakerId) || 'Narrator';
        const role = targetSpeakerId === 'narrator' ? 'narrator' : (targetSpeakerId === 'user' ? 'user' : 'character');

        const pending = {
          id: this.makeMessageId(),
          role,
          speakerId: targetSpeakerId,
          speakerName,
          content: '',
          status: 'streaming',
          createdAt: Date.now(),
          updatedAt: Date.now(),
          meta: { source: 'regen' }
        };

        this.appendMessage(pending);
        return pending;
      },

      pickNextSpeakerId() {
        if (this.state.nextSpeaker) return this.state.nextSpeaker;
        const nextName = this.getNextTurnName();
        const inferred = this.inferSpeakerIdFromName(nextName);
        if (inferred === 'narrator' && String(nextName || '').trim().toLowerCase() === 'narrator') return 'narrator';
        if (inferred && inferred !== 'narrator') return inferred;
        return 'primary';
      },

      buildParticipantRoster() {
        return [
          { id: 'primary', name: this.state.primary?.name || 'Primary', description: this.state.primary?.description || '' },
          { id: 'user', name: this.state.user?.name || 'User', description: this.state.user?.description || '' },
          ...((this.state.inScene || []).map(v => ({
            id: v.id,
            name: v.name || 'In Scene',
            description: v.description || ''
          })))
        ];
      },

      buildInstructionStackText(targetSpeakerId, opts={mode:'normal'}) {
        const targetName = this.resolveSpeakerName(targetSpeakerId) || this.getNextTurnName() || 'Narrator';
        const botName = this.state.primary?.name || 'Primary';
        const userName = this.state.user?.name || 'User';
        const scenario = String(this.els.scenario?.value || '(None specified. Freeform.)')
          .replace(/\{\{user\}\}/ig, userName)
          .replace(/\{\{char\}\}/ig, botName)
          .trim();
        const whatNext = String(this.els.whatNext?.value || '').trim();
        const writingInstructions = String(this.els.writingInstructions?.value || '').trim();
        const inspiration = String(this.els.inspiration?.value || '').trim();
        const imageCore = String(this.els.imageCore?.value || '').trim();

        const allMessages = (this.state.messages || []).filter(m => String(m?.content || '').trim());
        const clippedMessages = allMessages.slice(-48);
        const omittedCount = Math.max(0, allMessages.length - clippedMessages.length);
        const messagesText = this.exportTranscriptFromMessages(clippedMessages) || '(No chat messages yet. This is the beginning of the chat.)';

        const participants = [
          {label: 'Primary Character', name: botName, description: this.state.primary?.description || '(Not specified.)'},
          {label: 'User Character', name: userName, description: this.state.user?.description || '(Not specified.)'}
        ].concat((this.state.inScene || []).map((item, idx) => ({
          label: `In-Scene Character ${idx + 1}`,
          name: item.name || `In Scene ${idx + 1}`,
          description: item.description || '(Not specified.)'
        })));

        const participantNames = participants.map(p => p.name).filter(Boolean);
        const castSections = participants.map(p => [
          `${p.label} (${p.name})`,
          '---',
          String(p.description || '(Not specified.)')
            .replace(/\{\{user\}\}/ig, userName)
            .replace(/\{\{char\}\}/ig, botName),
          '---'
        ].join('\n')).join('\n\n');

        const foundationBlock = [
          'Please write the next 10 messages for the following chat/RP. Most messages should be a medium-length paragraph, including thoughts, actions, and dialogue. Create an engaging, captivating, and genuinely fascinating story. So good that you can\'t stop reading. Use a natural, unpretentious writing style.',
          '',
          '# Reminders:',
          `- Some of ${userName}'s messages are written by the user. Consider where the user is trying to lead the roleplay, and deeply intuit the story arc that the user is hinting toward with their actions. You should aim to write exactly the sort of story that they want to read.`,
          '- You can use *asterisks* to start and end actions and/or thoughts in typical roleplay style. Most messages should be detailed and descriptive, including dialogue, actions, and thoughts. Utilize all five senses for character experiences.',
          '- This story never ends. You must keep the story going forever. Drive the story forward, introducing new arcs and events when narratively appropriate.',
          '- Default to a positive, warm, good-natured tone between characters that are friends. AVOID excessive and unnecessary aggression/snark/irritability.',
          '- Aim for superb narrative pacing, and deep worldbuilding. Reveal the world/characters/plot gradually through character interactions and experiences. Allow the reader to discover its intricacies organically (instead of using exposition dumps).',
          '- Each message should be contained within a single paragraph. Add a blank line between each message. Balance moments of tension and relaxation to maintain reader engagement. Vary sentence and paragraph length to control the rhythm of the roleplay, switching from shorter, punchier sentences to longer, more descriptive ones as appropriate to create interesting variation in pace and structure.',
          '- Avoid unnecessary and unoriginal repetition of previous messages.',
          '- Bring characters to life by portraying their unique traits, thoughts, emotions, appearances, and speech patterns realistically. Consider the situation, motivations, and potential consequences. Ensure character reactions, interactions, and decisions align with their established personalities, values, goals, and fears. Use subtle gestures, distinctive quirks, and colloquialisms to create enriched, lifelike scenes. Allow characters\' motivations and personalities to evolve authentically throughout the story, creating genuine character arcs.',
          '- The overall goal is to create a genuinely fascinating and engaging roleplay/story. So good that you can\'t stop reading. Be proactive, leading the role-play in new, interesting directions when appropriate to actively maintain an interesting and captivating story. Don\'t try to pull the user back to things that they don\'t want.',
          '- Develop the story in a manner that a skilled author and engaging storyteller would. Craft conversations that reveal character, advance the plot, and feel natural. Use subtext and unique speech patterns to differentiate characters and convey information indirectly.',
          '- Narrator messages should be longer than normal messages.'
        ].join('\n');

        const extra = [];
        if (this.state.nextSpeaker) extra.push(`IMPORTANT: The very next visible message should come from ${targetName}.`);
        if (whatNext) extra.push(`IMPORTANT: Roughly speaking, the reader wants this to happen next: "${whatNext.replace(/\n+/g, '. ')}". You must creatively interpret this direction, not repeat it verbatim.`);
        if (writingInstructions) extra.push(`# General Writing Instructions\n${writingInstructions}`);
        if (inspiration) extra.push(`# Inspiration / thematic seed\n${inspiration}`);
        if (imageCore) extra.push(`# Visual tone / image core\n${imageCore}`);
        if (opts.mode === 'continue') extra.push('Mode: continue the scene naturally from the current stopping point.');
        if (opts.mode === 'regen') extra.push('Mode: rewrite only the most recent assistant-side response with a fresh variation while staying consistent with the ongoing scene.');

        return [
          foundationBlock,
          '',
          '# LOOP Runtime Constraint:',
          `- Even though the foundation block above was written for multi-message generation, in this runtime you must output exactly one visible next message only, and it must belong to ${targetName}.`,
          '- Do not write multiple turns. Do not write as multiple speakers in a single output.',
          '- Do not add commentary, notes, labels, or explanation outside the scene itself.',
          '',
          '# Cast / participant descriptions:',
          castSections,
          '',
          '# Initial scenario and world info:',
          '---',
          scenario,
          '---',
          '',
          '# What has happened so far:',
          '<MESSAGES>',
          omittedCount > 0 ? `[Earlier scene omitted: ${omittedCount} older messages not shown here.]` : '',
          messagesText,
          '</MESSAGES>',
          '',
          '# Visible participant names:',
          participantNames.join(', ') || '(None)',
          '',
          extra.length ? extra.join('\n\n') : '# Additional direction\n(None)',
          '',
          `Write the next visible message now, and make sure it belongs to ${targetName}.`
        ].filter(Boolean).join('\n');
      },

      normalizeData(data) {
        const base = this.defaultData();
        const merged = Object.assign({}, base, data || {});
        merged.imagePositive = String(merged.imagePositive || '');
        merged.imageNegative = String(merged.imageNegative || '');
        merged.imageScale = String(merged.imageScale || '1:1').trim() === '3:2' ? '3:2' : '1:1';
        merged.contextMemo = String(merged.contextMemo || '');
        merged.contextSummary = String(merged.contextSummary || '');
        merged.contextLore = String(merged.contextLore || '');
        merged.contextGlossary = String(merged.contextGlossary || '');
        merged.savedStoryId = String(merged.savedStoryId || '');
        merged.activeWorld = merged.activeWorld && typeof merged.activeWorld === 'object' ? Object.assign({
          id: '', title: '', short: '', premise: '', scenario: '', contextSummary: '', contextMemo: '', contextLore: '', contextGlossary: '', imageUrl: '', tags: []
        }, merged.activeWorld) : null;
        merged.worldBackgroundOpacity = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Number(merged.worldBackgroundOpacity ?? 26) || 26));
        merged.worldBackgroundBlur = Math.max(0, Math.min(16, Number(merged.worldBackgroundBlur ?? 6) || 6));
        merged.worldAtmosphere = ['none','drizzle','snow','leaves','ash'].includes(String(merged.worldAtmosphere || 'none')) ? String(merged.worldAtmosphere || 'none') : 'none';
        merged.primary = Object.assign({}, base.primary, merged.primary || {});
        merged.user = Object.assign({}, base.user, merged.user || {});
        merged.inScene = Array.isArray(merged.inScene)
          ? merged.inScene.map((item, idx) => Object.assign({
              id: item?.id || ('scene_' + idx),
              name: 'In Scene',
              avatarUrl: '',
              description: ''
            }, item || {}))
          : [];

        merged.inlineImages = (merged.inlineImages && typeof merged.inlineImages === 'object')
          ? merged.inlineImages
          : {};

        if (!Array.isArray(merged.messages)) {
          const transcript = String(merged.transcript || '').trim();
          merged.messages = transcript ? this.buildMessagesFromTranscript(transcript) : [];
        } else {
          merged.messages = merged.messages.map((m, idx) => ({
            id: m.id || (this.makeMessageId() + '_' + idx),
            role: m.role || 'character',
            speakerId: m.speakerId || this.inferSpeakerIdFromName(m.speakerName || ''),
            speakerName: m.speakerName || 'Narrator',
            content: String(m.content || ''),
            status: m.status || 'done',
            createdAt: m.createdAt || Date.now() + idx,
            updatedAt: m.updatedAt || Date.now() + idx,
            meta: m.meta || {}
          }));
        }

        if (!Array.isArray(merged.deletedMessageStack)) merged.deletedMessageStack = [];
        return merged;
      },

      init() {
        if (this.isInit) return;
        this.isInit = true;
        this.uiRecentStoryPanelOpen = true;
        this.migrateLegacyRecentStoriesIfNeeded();
        this.mountTranscriptEditor();
        this.populateDirectionCoreOptions();
        this.loadPersistedData();
        this.worldPreviewCache = Object.assign({}, this.loadStoredWorldPreviews(), this.worldPreviewCache || {});
        this.bindUi();
        this.renderAll();
        window.storySwitchDirectionTab && window.storySwitchDirectionTab('next');
        this.setDirectionTab(this.directionTab || 'flow');
        this.renderHallQuickCharacters();
        this.renderHallWorlds();
        this.renderLibraryPage();
        this.loadStoryFromUrlIfPresent();
        this.setStatus('story ready');
      },

      mountTranscriptEditor() {
        if (this.transcriptEl) return;
        const placeholder = this.els.transcriptPlaceholder;
        if (typeof createTextEditor === 'function') {
          this.transcriptEl = createTextEditor({
            textStyleRules: [
              {match: /(\s|^)\*\*[^*"“”]+?\*\*/g, style: 'font-weight:bold;'},
              {match: /(\s|^)\*[^*"“”]+?\*/g, style: 'color:light-dark(#606060,#989898); font-style:italic;'},
              {match: /(^|\n)>[^\n]*/g, style: 'color:light-dark(#7c3e00,#ffc86e); font-style:italic;'},
              {match: /(\s|^)["“][^"”]+?["”]/g, style: 'color:light-dark(#00539b,#4eb5f7);'},
              {match: /(^|\n)SUMMARY\^[0-9]+: /g, style: 'font-weight:bold; opacity:0.75;'},
              {match: /^[^:]{1,40}?:/g, style: 'font-weight:bold;'}
            ]
          });
          this.transcriptEl.id = 'storyTranscriptEl';
          placeholder.replaceWith(this.transcriptEl);
          this.transcriptEl.style.cssText = 'display:block; width:100%; height:100%; min-height:440px; color: light-dark(black, rgb(210,210,210)); padding-bottom:1rem; scrollbar-gutter:stable;';
        } else {
          const ta = document.createElement('textarea');
          ta.id = 'storyTranscriptEl';
          ta.spellcheck = false;
          ta.style.cssText = 'display:block;width:100%;height:100%;min-height:440px;border:none;background:transparent;color:inherit;resize:none;outline:none;';
          placeholder.replaceWith(ta);
          this.transcriptEl = ta;
        }
      },

      refreshStoryInputShape(forceReset=false) {
        const input = this.els?.input;
        const container = input?.closest('.input-container');
        if (!input || !container) return;
        const MIN_HEIGHT = 28;
        const MAX_HEIGHT = 160;
        if (forceReset) {
          input.style.height = MIN_HEIGHT + 'px';
          input.style.overflowY = 'hidden';
          container.style.borderRadius = '12px';
          return;
        }
        input.style.height = 'auto';
        const nextHeight = Math.min(input.scrollHeight, MAX_HEIGHT);
        input.style.height = nextHeight + 'px';
        input.style.overflowY = input.scrollHeight > MAX_HEIGHT ? 'auto' : 'hidden';
        container.style.borderRadius = (nextHeight > MIN_HEIGHT ? 10 : 12) + 'px';
      },

      syncStoryInputShell(isActive=false) {
        const container = this.els?.input?.closest('.input-container');
        if (!container) return;
        container.classList.toggle('is-active', !!isActive);
      },

      bindUi() {
        const persistSnapshot = () => {
          this.persistSnapshot();
          this.updateComposerHint();
        };

        [this.els.inspiration, this.els.whatNext, this.els.writingInstructions, this.els.scenario, this.els.imageCore, this.els.imageScale, this.els.imagePositive, this.els.imageNegative, this.els.contextMemo, this.els.contextSummary, this.els.contextLore, this.els.contextGlossary].forEach(el => {
          if (!el) return;
          el.addEventListener('input', persistSnapshot);
        });

        this.els.sendAs.addEventListener('change', () => {
          this.setSendAs(this.els.sendAs.value || 'user');
        });

        if (this.els.sendAsQuick && this.els.sendAsQuick !== this.els.sendAs) {
          this.els.sendAsQuick.addEventListener('change', () => {
            this.setSendAs(this.els.sendAsQuick.value || 'user');
          });
        }

        this.els.nextSpeakerQuick?.addEventListener('change', () => {
          const value = String(this.els.nextSpeakerQuick.value || '');
          if (!value || value === 'auto') this.clearNextSpeaker();
          else this.setNextSpeaker(value);
        });

        this.els.worldOpacity?.addEventListener('input', () => {
          this.state.worldBackgroundOpacity = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Number(this.els.worldOpacity.value) || 0));
          this.applyStoryWorldBackground();
          this.persistSnapshot();
        });

        this.els.worldAtmosphereSelect?.addEventListener('change', () => {
          this.state.worldAtmosphere = String(this.els.worldAtmosphereSelect.value || 'none');
          this.applyStoryWorldBackground();
          this.persistSnapshot();
        });

        this.els.imageCore?.addEventListener('change', () => {
          this.syncStoryVisionChipState();
          this.persistSnapshot();
        });
        this.els.imageScale?.addEventListener('change', () => {
          this.syncStoryVisionChipState();
          this.persistSnapshot();
        });

        document.querySelectorAll('[data-chip-group="image-core"] .story-choice-chip').forEach(btn => {
          btn.addEventListener('click', () => this.setStoryImageCore(btn.dataset.coreValue || ''));
        });
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-chip-group="image-scale"] .story-choice-chip').forEach(btn => {
          btn.addEventListener('click', () => this.setStoryImageScale(btn.dataset.scaleValue || '1:1'));
        });

        if (this.els.autoRespond) this.els.autoRespond.addEventListener('change', () => this.persistSnapshot());

        this.els.input.addEventListener('keydown', async (e) => {
          if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
            e.preventDefault();
            await this.handleSendButtonClick({ mode: 'normal' });
          }
        });

        this.els.input.addEventListener('input', () => this.refreshStoryInputShape());
        this.els.input.addEventListener('focus', () => {
          this.syncStoryInputShell(true);
          this.refreshStoryInputShape();
        });
        this.els.input.addEventListener('blur', () => {
          this.syncStoryInputShell(false);
          this.refreshStoryInputShape(this.els.input.value.trim() === '');
        });

        document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
          const panel = this.els.directionPanel;
          if (!panel || !panel.classList.contains('show')) return;
          if (panel.contains(e.target)) return;
          if (e.target.closest('[title="Story Guide"]')) return;
          panel.classList.remove('show');
        });

        if (this.els.messageFeed && !this._messageFeedBound) {
          this._messageFeedBound = true;
          this.els.messageFeed.addEventListener('click', (e) => this.handleMessageMenuToggleClick(e));
          this.els.messageFeed.addEventListener('click', (e) => this.handleMessageFeedClick(e));
          this.els.messageFeed.addEventListener('scroll', () => this.handleMessageFeedScroll(), { passive: true });
        }

        document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
          const openMenus = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.story-msg-menu[open]'));
          if (!openMenus.length) return;
          const activeMenu = e.target.closest('.story-msg-menu');
          if (activeMenu) {
            openMenus.forEach(menu => {
              if (menu !== activeMenu) menu.removeAttribute('open');
            });
            return;
          }
          openMenus.forEach(menu => menu.removeAttribute('open'));
        });

        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
          if (e.key !== 'Escape') return;
          this.closeAllMessageMenus();
        });

        if (this.transcriptEl?.addEventListener) {
          this.transcriptEl.addEventListener('input', () => {
            this.setTranscriptText(this.transcriptEl.value, { source: 'raw' });
          });
          this.transcriptEl.addEventListener('blur', () => {
            this.setTranscriptText(this.transcriptEl.value, { source: 'raw' });
          });
        }
      },

      handleMessageFeedScroll() {
        const feed = this.els.messageFeed;
        if (!feed) return;
        const distanceFromBottom = feed.scrollHeight - (feed.scrollTop + feed.clientHeight);
        const nearBottom = distanceFromBottom <= 72;
        this._autoFollowFeed = nearBottom;
        this._feedUserIsReviewingHistory = !nearBottom;
      },

      scrollFeedToBottom(force=false) {
        const feed = this.els.messageFeed;
        if (!feed) return;
        if (!force && !this._autoFollowFeed) return;
        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
          feed.scrollTop = feed.scrollHeight;
        });
      },

      persistSnapshot() {
        try {
          localStorage.setItem(this.storageKey, JSON.stringify(this.currentData()));
          this.persistRecentStoryMeta();
          this.renderRecentStoryPanel();
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(e);
        }
      },

      loadPersistedData() {
        try {
          const raw = localStorage.getItem(this.storageKey);
          if (!raw) {
            this.state = this.state && typeof this.state === 'object' ? this.state : {};
            this.state.savedStoryId = '';
            this.loadData(this.defaultData());
            return;
