          }
          const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
          this.loadData(parsed);
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(e);
          this.state = this.state && typeof this.state === 'object' ? this.state : {};
          this.state.savedStoryId = '';
          this.loadData(this.defaultData());
        }
      },

      currentData() {
        const safeMessages = Array.isArray(this.state?.messages) ? this.state.messages : [];
        return this.normalizeData({
          inspiration: this.els.inspiration?.value || '',
          scenarioCollapsed: !!this.els.scenarioBody.hidden,
          rawTranscriptOpen: !this.els.rawTranscriptWrap.hidden,
          imageCore: this.els.imageCore?.value || '',
          imageScale: this.getStoryImageScale(),
          whatNext: this.els.whatNext.value,
          writingInstructions: this.els.writingInstructions.value,
          imagePositive: this.els.imagePositive?.value || '',
          imageNegative: this.els.imageNegative?.value || '',
          contextMemo: this.els.contextMemo?.value || '',
          contextSummary: this.els.contextSummary?.value || '',
          contextLore: this.els.contextLore?.value || '',
          contextGlossary: this.els.contextGlossary?.value || '',
          scenario: this.els.scenario.value,
          autoRespond: !!this.els.autoRespond?.checked,
          selectedSpeaker: (this.els.sendAs?.value || this.els.sendAsQuick?.value || 'user'),
          nextSpeaker: this.state?.nextSpeaker || '',
          primary: this.state?.primary || this.defaultData().primary,
          user: this.state?.user || this.defaultData().user,
          inScene: this.state?.inScene || [],
          inlineImages: this.serializeInlineImagesForPersist(this.state?.inlineImages || {}),
          messages: safeMessages,
          transcript: this.exportTranscriptFromMessages(safeMessages),
          deletedMessageStack: this.state?.deletedMessageStack || [],
          savedStoryId: this.state?.savedStoryId || '',
          activeWorld: this.state?.activeWorld || null,
          worldBackgroundOpacity: this.state?.worldBackgroundOpacity ?? 26,
          worldBackgroundBlur: this.state?.worldBackgroundBlur ?? 6,
          worldAtmosphere: this.state?.worldAtmosphere || 'none'
        });
      },

      loadData(data) {
        const merged = this.normalizeData(data);
        this.state = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(merged));
        this.inlineImageRuntime = {};

        if (this.els.inspiration) this.els.inspiration.value = merged.inspiration || '';
        this.els.whatNext.value = merged.whatNext || '';
        this.els.writingInstructions.value = merged.writingInstructions || '';
        if (this.els.imagePositive) this.els.imagePositive.value = merged.imagePositive || '';
        if (this.els.imageNegative) this.els.imageNegative.value = merged.imageNegative || '';
        this.els.scenario.value = merged.scenario || '';
        if (this.els.imageCore) this.els.imageCore.value = merged.imageCore || '';
        if (this.els.imageScale) this.els.imageScale.value = merged.imageScale || '1:1';
        this.syncStoryVisionChipState();
        if (this.els.autoRespond) this.els.autoRespond.checked = !!merged.autoRespond;

        this.syncTranscriptEditorFromMessages();

        this.els.scenarioBody.hidden = !!merged.scenarioCollapsed;
        this.els.scenarioToggleBtn.textContent = merged.scenarioCollapsed ? '▸' : '▾';
        this.els.scenarioToggleBtn.title = merged.scenarioCollapsed ? 'Show scenario' : 'Hide scenario';

        if (this.els.rawTranscriptWrap) this.els.rawTranscriptWrap.hidden = !merged.rawTranscriptOpen;
        if (this.els.rawToggleBtn) {
          this.els.rawToggleBtn.textContent = merged.rawTranscriptOpen ? '▾' : '≡';
          this.els.rawToggleBtn.title = merged.rawTranscriptOpen ? 'Hide raw transcript' : 'Raw transcript';
        }

        this.refreshSendAsOptions();
        if (this.els.sendAs) this.els.sendAs.value = merged.selectedSpeaker || 'user';
        this.state.nextSpeaker = merged.nextSpeaker || '';
        this.state.activeWorld = merged.activeWorld || null;
        this.state.worldBackgroundOpacity = merged.worldBackgroundOpacity ?? 26;
        this.state.worldBackgroundBlur = merged.worldBackgroundBlur ?? 6;
        this.state.worldAtmosphere = merged.worldAtmosphere || 'none';
        if (this.els.sendAsQuick) this.els.sendAsQuick.value = this.els.sendAs?.value || this.els.sendAsQuick.value || 'user';
        if (this.els.worldOpacity) this.els.worldOpacity.value = String(this.state.worldBackgroundOpacity ?? 26);
        if (this.els.worldAtmosphereSelect) this.els.worldAtmosphereSelect.value = this.state.worldAtmosphere || 'none';
        this.persistSnapshot();
        this.scrollFeedToBottom(true);
      },

      populateDirectionCoreOptions() {
        const input = this.els.imageCore;
        if (!input) return;
        const allowed = ['Anime Realism', 'Cinematic Realism', 'Comic Style', 'Fantasy', '3D'];
        const current = String(input.value || '').trim();
        input.value = allowed.includes(current) ? current : '';
        this.syncStoryVisionChipState();
      },

      syncStoryVisionChipState() {
        const currentCore = String(this.els.imageCore?.value || '').trim();
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-chip-group="image-core"] .story-choice-chip').forEach(btn => {
          btn.classList.toggle('is-active', String(btn.dataset.coreValue || '') === currentCore);
        });

        const currentScale = String(this.els.imageScale?.value || '1:1').trim() === '3:2' ? '3:2' : '1:1';
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-chip-group="image-scale"] .story-choice-chip').forEach(btn => {
          btn.classList.toggle('is-active', String(btn.dataset.scaleValue || '') === currentScale);
        });
      },

      setStoryImageCore(value='') {
        const allowed = ['Anime Realism', 'Cinematic Realism', 'Comic Style', 'Fantasy', '3D'];
        const next = allowed.includes(String(value || '').trim()) ? String(value || '').trim() : '';
        if (this.els.imageCore) this.els.imageCore.value = next;
        this.syncStoryVisionChipState();
        this.persistSnapshot();
      },

      setStoryImageScale(value='1:1') {
        const next = String(value || '').trim() === '3:2' ? '3:2' : '1:1';
        if (this.els.imageScale) this.els.imageScale.value = next;
        this.syncStoryVisionChipState();
        this.persistSnapshot();
      },

      positionDirectionPanel() {
        const panel = this.els.directionPanel;
        const dock = panel?.parentElement;
        const shell = this.els.input?.closest('.story-input-shell');
        if (!panel || !dock || !shell) return;

        if (window.matchMedia('(max-width: 860px)').matches) {
          panel.style.left = '50%';
          panel.style.right = 'auto';
          panel.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%)';
          panel.style.width = 'min(720px, calc(100vw - 24px))';
          return;
        }

        const dockRect = dock.getBoundingClientRect();
        const shellRect = shell.getBoundingClientRect();
        const left = Math.max(0, shellRect.left - dockRect.left);
        const maxWidth = Math.max(320, shellRect.width);
        const width = Math.min(720, maxWidth);

        panel.style.left = `${left}px`;
        panel.style.right = 'auto';
        panel.style.transform = 'none';
        panel.style.width = `${width}px`;
      },

      toggleDirectionPanel() {
        const panel = this.els.directionPanel;
        if(!panel) return;
        const willShow = !panel.classList.contains('show');
        panel.classList.toggle('show');
        if (willShow) {
          this.positionDirectionPanel();
          this.setDirectionTab(this.directionTab || 'next');
        }
      },

      setDirectionTab(tab='next') {
        this.directionTab = tab || 'next';
        const panel = this.els.directionPanel;
        if (!panel) return;
        panel.querySelectorAll('[data-direction-tab]').forEach(btn => {
          btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.getAttribute('data-direction-tab') === this.directionTab);
        });
        panel.querySelectorAll('[data-direction-panel]').forEach(el => {
          el.classList.toggle('active', el.getAttribute('data-direction-panel') === this.directionTab);
        });
      },

      refreshSendAsOptions() {
        const selects = [this.els.sendAs, this.els.sendAsQuick].filter(Boolean);
        const current = this.els.sendAs?.value || this.state?.selectedSpeaker || 'user';
        const items = [
          {value:'user', label:this.state.user.name || 'User'},
          {value:'primary', label:this.state.primary.name || 'Primary'},
          {value:'narrator', label:'Narrator'}
        ].concat((this.state.inScene || []).map(item => ({value:item.id, label:item.name || 'In Scene'})));
        selects.forEach(select => {
          select.innerHTML = '';
          items.forEach(item => {
            const opt = document.createElement('option');
            opt.value = item.value;
            opt.textContent = item.label;
            select.appendChild(opt);
          });
          select.value = items.some(item => item.value === current) ? current : 'user';
        });
        this.refreshNextSpeakerOptions();
        this.renderSpeakerRuntimeBar();
        this.updateComposerHint();
      },

      refreshNextSpeakerOptions() {
        const select = this.els.nextSpeakerQuick;
        if (!select) return;
        const current = this.state?.nextSpeaker || 'auto';
        const items = [{ value: 'auto', label: 'Auto' }]
          .concat(this.getSpeakerRoster().filter(item => item.id !== 'user').map(item => ({ value: item.id, label: item.name || 'Scene voice' })))
          .concat([{ value: 'narrator', label: 'Narrator' }]);
        select.innerHTML = '';
        items.forEach(item => {
          const opt = document.createElement('option');
          opt.value = item.value;
          opt.textContent = item.label;
          select.appendChild(opt);
        });
        select.value = items.some(item => item.value === current) ? current : 'auto';
      },

      avatarInitial(name) {
        return String(name || '?').trim().slice(0,1).toUpperCase() || '?';
      },

      applyAvatarPreview(el, avatarEl, data, fallbackName) {
        const name = (data?.name || fallbackName || '').trim() || fallbackName;
        const url = (data?.avatarUrl || '').trim();
        avatarEl.style.backgroundImage = url ? `url('${url.replace(/'/g, "%27")}')` : 'none';
        avatarEl.setAttribute('data-has-image', url ? 'true' : 'false');
        const fallbackTextEl = avatarEl && avatarEl.querySelector ? avatarEl.querySelector('.story-avatar-fallback') : null;
        if (fallbackTextEl) {
          fallbackTextEl.textContent = url ? '' : this.avatarInitial(name);
        } else {
          avatarEl.textContent = url ? '' : this.avatarInitial(name);
        }
        const nameEl = el && el.querySelector ? el.querySelector('.story-avatar-name') : null;
        const fallbackEl = el === this.els.primaryPreview ? this.els.primaryName : (el === this.els.userPreview ? this.els.userName : null);
        if (nameEl) nameEl.textContent = name;
        else if (fallbackEl) fallbackEl.textContent = name;
        if (el === this.els.primaryPreview && this.els.primaryDesc) {
          const activeWorldName = String(this.state?.activeWorld?.title || '').trim();
          this.els.primaryDesc.textContent = activeWorldName ? `World: ${activeWorldName}` : '';
        }
      },

      renderAll() {
        this.applyAvatarPreview(this.els.primaryPreview, this.els.primaryAvatar, this.state.primary, 'Primary');
        this.applyAvatarPreview(this.els.userPreview, this.els.userAvatar, this.state.user, 'User');
        this.renderInScene();
        this.refreshSendAsOptions();
        this.updateComposerHint();
        this.renderMessageFeed();
        this.renderStoryWorldPanel();
        this.applyStoryWorldBackground();
        this.renderRecentStoryPanel();
        this.renderRecentStoriesModalList();
        this.scrollFeedToBottom(true);
        this.persistSnapshot();
      },

      renderStoryWorldPanel() {
        const wrap = this.els.worldPanelCard;
        if (!wrap) return;
        const world = this.state?.activeWorld || null;
        if (!world) {
          wrap.innerHTML = `<div class="story-panel-empty">No world is active yet. Add one here, then the image can sit behind the chat as optional ambience.</div>`;
          return;
        }
        const previewStyle = this.worldPreviewStyle(world);
        const summary = this.escapeHtml(world.short || world.premise || world.scenario || 'World package is ready.');
        wrap.innerHTML = `
          <div class="story-world-panel-preview" style="${previewStyle}">
            <div class="story-world-panel-meta">
              <div class="story-world-panel-name">${this.escapeHtml(world.title || 'Untitled World')}</div>
              <div class="story-world-panel-desc">${summary}</div>
            </div>
          </div>`;
        if (this.els.worldOpacity) this.els.worldOpacity.value = String(this.state?.worldBackgroundOpacity ?? 26);
        if (this.els.worldAtmosphereSelect) this.els.worldAtmosphereSelect.value = this.state?.worldAtmosphere || 'none';
      },

      applyStoryWorldBackground() {
        const backdrop = this.els.worldBackdrop;
        const imageEl = this.els.worldImage;
        const atmosphereEl = this.els.worldAtmosphere;
        const world = this.state?.activeWorld || null;
        if (!backdrop || !imageEl || !atmosphereEl) return;
        if (!world) {
          backdrop.hidden = true;
          imageEl.style.backgroundImage = 'none';
          atmosphereEl.innerHTML = '';
          return;
        }
        const imageUrl = String(world.imageUrl || this.worldPreviewCache[String(world.id || world.title || '')] || '').trim();
        backdrop.hidden = false;
        imageEl.style.backgroundImage = imageUrl ? `url('${imageUrl.replace(/'/g, "%27")}')` : this.worldPreviewStyle(world).replace('background-image:', '').trim();
        imageEl.style.opacity = String((Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Number(this.state?.worldBackgroundOpacity ?? 26) || 0)) / 100).toFixed(2));
        this.renderStoryWorldAtmosphere();
      },

      renderStoryWorldAtmosphere() {
        const wrap = this.els.worldAtmosphere;
        if (!wrap) return;
        const mode = String(this.state?.worldAtmosphere || 'none');
        wrap.innerHTML = '';
        if (!this.state?.activeWorld || mode === 'none') return;
        const counts = { drizzle: 24, snow: 16, leaves: 12, ash: 14 };
        const total = counts[mode] || 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < total; i++) {
          const particle = document.createElement('span');
          const cls = mode === 'drizzle' ? 'is-drizzle' : mode === 'snow' ? 'is-snow' : mode === 'leaves' ? 'is-leaves' : 'is-ash';
          particle.className = `story-world-particle ${cls}`;
          particle.style.left = `${Math.random() * 100}%`;
          particle.style.animationDuration = `${mode === 'drizzle' ? 1.8 + Math.random() * 1.6 : 6 + Math.random() * 5.5}s`;
          particle.style.animationDelay = `${Math.random() * 4}s`;
          particle.style.opacity = `${mode === 'drizzle' ? 0.18 + Math.random() * 0.2 : 0.16 + Math.random() * 0.22}`;
          wrap.appendChild(particle);
        }
      },

      setActiveWorld(item, opts={}) {
        const payload = item ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(item)) : null;
        this.state.activeWorld = payload;
        if (payload && opts.applyScenario !== false && this.els?.scenario) {
          this.els.scenario.value = buildWorldStoryPackage(payload);
        }
        if (payload && this.els?.inspiration && !String(this.els.inspiration.value || '').trim()) {
          this.els.inspiration.value = String(payload.title || '').trim();
        }
        this.renderAll();
        this.setStatus(payload ? 'world set for story' : 'world removed from story');
      },

      editActiveWorld() {
        if (!this.state?.activeWorld) {
          this.openStoryWorldPickerModal();
          return;
        }
        window.LoopBuilders?.openWorldBuilderModal?.(this.state.activeWorld || {});
      },

      toggleWorldSettings(forceValue) {
        const panel = this.els.worldSettings;
        if (!panel) return;
        const next = typeof forceValue === 'boolean' ? forceValue : !panel.classList.contains('is-open');
        panel.classList.toggle('is-open', next);
      },

      openStoryWorldInspectorModal(item=null, opts={}) {
        if (!item) return;
        try { this.closeCharacterModal?.(); } catch(e) {}
        if (window.openLoopWorldInspectorPage) return window.openLoopWorldInspectorPage(item, opts || {});
      },

      openStoryWorldPickerModal() {
        this.closeCharacterModal();
        const overlay = document.createElement('div');
        overlay.className = 'story-modal-overlay';
        const defaultWorlds = this.hallWorldBuildingSamples();
        const myWorlds = this.getLibraryWorlds();
        const renderCards = (items, sourceLabel='default') => {
          if (!items.length) return `<div class="story-panel-empty">No ${sourceLabel} worlds yet.</div>`;
          return items.map(item => {
            const key = String(item?.id || item?.title || '');
            const previewStyle = this.worldPreviewStyle(item);
            const shortText = String(item?.short || item?.premise || item?.scenario || '').trim();
            return `
              <div class="story-world-picker-card" data-world-id="${this.escapeHtml(key)}" data-world-source="${sourceLabel}">
                <div class="story-world-picker-preview" style="${previewStyle}">
                  <div class="story-world-picker-genre">${this.escapeHtml(this.worldGenre(item))}</div>
                </div>
                <div class="story-world-picker-body">
                  <div class="story-world-picker-meta">
                    <div class="story-world-picker-title">${this.escapeHtml(item.title || 'Untitled World')}</div>
                    <div class="story-world-picker-desc">${this.escapeHtml(shortText || 'No world summary yet.')}</div>
                  </div>
                  <div class="story-world-picker-actions">
                    <button class="story-btn ghost" type="button" data-world-inspector>Inspector</button>
                    <button class="story-btn ghost" type="button" data-world-use>Use World</button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>`;
          }).join('');
        };
        overlay.innerHTML = `
          <div class="story-modal-shell" style="width:min(920px,96vw);">
            <div class="story-modal-head">
              <div class="story-modal-head-brand">
                <div class="story-modal-head-icon" aria-hidden="true">
                  <svg viewBox="0 0 48 48" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                  <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="17" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"/>
                  <defs>
                    <mask id="storyWorldPickerModalCut">
                      <rect width="48" height="48" fill="white"/>
                      <circle cx="20" cy="16" r="6" fill="black"/>
                    </mask>
                  </defs>
                  <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="10" fill="currentColor" mask="url(#storyWorldPickerModalCut)"/>
                </svg>
                </div>
                <div class="story-modal-head-main">
                  <div class="story-modal-kicker">Story World</div>
                  <div class="story-modal-title">Choose World Building</div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <button class="story-modal-close" type="button" aria-label="Close">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div class="story-section-gap">
              <div class="story-side-section-head">
                <div class="story-side-section-title">Default Worlds</div>
                <button class="story-btn ghost" type="button" data-create-world>Create World</button>
              </div>
              <div class="story-world-picker-grid">${renderCards(defaultWorlds, 'default')}</div>
              <div class="story-side-section-head" style="margin-top:6px;">
                <div class="story-side-section-title">My Worlds</div>
              </div>
              <div class="story-world-picker-grid">${renderCards(myWorlds, 'library')}</div>
            </div>
            <div class="story-modal-actions">
              <button class="story-modal-btn ghost" type="button" data-clear-world>Clear World</button>
              <button class="story-modal-btn ghost" type="button" data-close>Close</button>
            </div>
          </div>`;
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        this.currentModalEl = overlay;
        const close = () => this.closeCharacterModal();
        overlay.querySelectorAll('[data-close], .story-modal-close').forEach(btn => btn.onclick = close);
        overlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === overlay) close(); });
        overlay.querySelector('[data-create-world]')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
          close();
          window.LoopBuilders?.openWorldBuilderModal?.({});
        });
        overlay.querySelector('[data-clear-world]')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
          this.setActiveWorld(null, { applyScenario: false });
          close();
        });
        overlay.querySelectorAll('[data-world-id]').forEach(card => {
          const id = String(card.getAttribute('data-world-id') || '');
          const source = String(card.getAttribute('data-world-source') || 'default');
          const item = source === 'library'
            ? this.getLibraryWorlds().find(v => String(v?.id || v?.title || '') === id)
            : this.hallWorldBuildingSamples().find(v => String(v?.id || v?.title || '') === id);
          if (!item) return;

          card.querySelector('[data-world-use]')?.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
            event.preventDefault();
            event.stopPropagation();
            this.setActiveWorld(item, { applyScenario: true });
            close();
          });

          card.querySelector('[data-world-inspector]')?.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
            event.preventDefault();
            event.stopPropagation();
            this.openStoryWorldInspectorModal(item, { source });
          });
        });
      },

      recentStorageKey() {
        return 'loop_story_recent_runtime_v1';
      },

      recentStoriesStorageKey() {
        return 'loop_story_recent_story_index_v2';
      },

      recentStoryEntryStorageKey(id='') {
        const safeId = String(id || '').trim();
        return safeId ? `loop_story_recent_story_entry_v2_${safeId}` : '';
      },

      makeRecentStoryId() {
        return 'story_' + Date.now().toString(36) + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 7);
      },

      buildRecentStoryMeta() {
        const primary = String(this.state?.primary?.name || 'Primary').trim() || 'Primary';
        const user = String(this.state?.user?.name || 'User').trim() || 'User';
        const scenario = String(this.els?.scenario?.value || this.state?.scenario || '').trim();
        return {
          title: `${user} × ${primary}`,
          subtitle: scenario ? (scenario.length > 160 ? scenario.slice(0, 157).trimEnd() + '…' : scenario) : 'Autosaved local story session',
          updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
        };
      },

      persistRecentStoryMeta() {
        try {
          localStorage.setItem(this.recentStorageKey(), JSON.stringify(this.buildRecentStoryMeta()));
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(e);
        }
      },

      readRecentStoryMeta() {
        try {
          const raw = localStorage.getItem(this.recentStorageKey());
          return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : null;
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(e);
          return null;
        }
      },

      readRecentStories() {
        try {
          const raw = localStorage.getItem(this.recentStoriesStorageKey());
          const parsed = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
          return Array.isArray(parsed)
            ? parsed.filter(Boolean).map(item => ({
                id: String(item?.id || '').trim(),
                title: String(item?.title || 'Untitled Story'),
                subtitle: String(item?.subtitle || 'Saved story'),
                updatedAt: item?.updatedAt || new Date().toISOString()
              })).filter(item => !!item.id)
            : [];
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(e);
          return [];
        }
      },

      writeRecentStories(list=[]) {
        try {
          const safe = (Array.isArray(list) ? list : [])
            .filter(Boolean)
            .map(item => ({
              id: String(item?.id || '').trim(),
              title: String(item?.title || 'Untitled Story'),
              subtitle: String(item?.subtitle || 'Saved story'),
              updatedAt: item?.updatedAt || new Date().toISOString()
            }))
            .filter(item => !!item.id)
            .slice(0, 24);
          localStorage.setItem(this.recentStoriesStorageKey(), JSON.stringify(safe));
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(e);
        }
      },

      readRecentStoryEntry(id='') {
        try {
          const key = this.recentStoryEntryStorageKey(id);
          if (!key) return null;
          const raw = localStorage.getItem(key);
          return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : null;
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(e);
          return null;
        }
      },

      writeRecentStoryEntry(id='', data=null) {
        try {
          const key = this.recentStoryEntryStorageKey(id);
          if (!key || !data || typeof data !== 'object') return false;
          localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(data));
          return true;
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(e);
          return false;
        }
      },

      deleteRecentStoryEntry(id='') {
        try {
          const key = this.recentStoryEntryStorageKey(id);
          if (!key) return;
          localStorage.removeItem(key);
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(e);
        }
      },

      migrateLegacyRecentStoriesIfNeeded() {
        try {
          const hasIndex = this.readRecentStories();
          if (Array.isArray(hasIndex) && hasIndex.length) return;

          const raw = localStorage.getItem('loop_story_recent_stories_v1');
          const parsed = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
          if (!Array.isArray(parsed) || !parsed.length) return;

          const next = [];
          parsed.slice(0, 24).forEach(item => {
            const id = String(item?.id || this.makeRecentStoryId()).trim();
            const data = item?.data && typeof item.data === 'object' ? item.data : null;
            if (!id || !data) return;
            const ok = this.writeRecentStoryEntry(id, data);
            if (!ok) return;
            next.push({
              id,
              title: String(item?.title || 'Untitled Story'),
              subtitle: String(item?.subtitle || 'Saved story'),
              updatedAt: item?.updatedAt || new Date().toISOString()
            });
          });

          if (next.length) {
            this.writeRecentStories(next);
          }
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(e);
        }
      },

      saveCurrentStoryToRecentStories() {
        const meta = this.buildRecentStoryMeta();
        const currentId = String(this.state?.savedStoryId || '').trim();
        const id = currentId || this.makeRecentStoryId();
        const payload = this.currentData();
        payload.savedStoryId = id;

        const saved = this.writeRecentStoryEntry(id, payload);
        if (!saved) {
          this.setStatus('save failed');
          return false;
        }

        this.state.savedStoryId = id;
        const previous = this.readRecentStories();
        const entry = {
          id,
          title: meta.title || 'Untitled Story',
          subtitle: meta.subtitle || 'Saved story',
          updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
        };
        const next = previous.filter(item => String(item?.id || '') !== id);
        next.unshift(entry);
        const trimmed = next.slice(0, 24);
        this.writeRecentStories(trimmed);

        const keepIds = new Set(trimmed.map(item => String(item?.id || '')));
        previous.forEach(item => {
          const oldId = String(item?.id || '');
          if (oldId && !keepIds.has(oldId)) this.deleteRecentStoryEntry(oldId);
        });

        this.renderRecentStoryPanel();
        this.renderRecentStoriesModalList();
        this.setStatus('story saved to recent stories');
        this.persistSnapshot();
        return entry;
      },

      downloadStoryData(data, suggestedBase='loop-story') {
        try {
          const safeBase = String(suggestedBase || 'loop-story').replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_]+/g, '-').replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '') || 'loop-story';
          const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(data || {}, null, 2)], {type:'application/json'});
          const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
          const a = document.createElement('a');
          a.href = url;
          a.download = `${safeBase}.loop-story.json`;
          a.click();
          URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
          return true;
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(e);
          return false;
        }
      },

      exportRecentStoryById(id='') {
        const targetId = String(id || '').trim();
        const meta = this.readRecentStories().find(item => String(item?.id || '') === targetId);
        const data = this.readRecentStoryEntry(targetId);
        if (!meta || !data) return false;
        const base = `${meta.title || 'loop-story'}`.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_]+/g, '-');
        const ok = this.downloadStoryData(data, base);
        if (ok) this.setStatus('saved story exported');
        return ok;
      },

      openRecentStoryById(id='') {
        const targetId = String(id || '').trim();
        const found = this.readRecentStories().find(item => String(item?.id || '') === targetId);
        const data = this.readRecentStoryEntry(targetId);
        if (!found || !data) return false;
        this.loadData(data);
        this.state.savedStoryId = targetId;
        this.renderAll();
        this.renderRecentStoryPanel();
        this.renderRecentStoriesModalList();
        this.closeRecentStoriesModal();
        if (typeof switchPage === 'function') switchPage('story');
        this.setStatus('story opened');
        return true;
      },

      deleteRecentStoryById(id='') {
        const targetId = String(id || '');
        const next = this.readRecentStories().filter(item => String(item?.id || '') !== targetId);
        this.writeRecentStories(next);
        this.deleteRecentStoryEntry(targetId);
        if (String(this.state?.savedStoryId || '') === targetId) {
          this.state.savedStoryId = '';
          this.persistSnapshot();
        }
        this.renderRecentStoryPanel();
        this.renderRecentStoriesModalList();
        this.setStatus('saved story removed');
      },

      openRecentStoriesModal() {
        const overlay = document.getElementById('storyRecentStoriesModal');
        if (!overlay) return;
        this.renderRecentStoriesModalList();
        overlay.hidden = false;
        document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
      },

      closeRecentStoriesModal() {
        const overlay = document.getElementById('storyRecentStoriesModal');
        if (!overlay) return;
        overlay.hidden = true;
        document.body.style.overflow = '';
      },

      renderRecentStoriesModalList() {
        const wrap = document.getElementById('storyRecentStoriesModalList');
        if (!wrap) return;
        const items = this.readRecentStories();
        if (!items.length) {
          wrap.innerHTML = '<div class="story-recent-empty">No saved stories yet. Use <strong>Save Story</strong> from the Story tools menu to place the current draft here.</div>';
          return;
        }
        const activeId = String(this.state?.savedStoryId || '');
        wrap.innerHTML = items.map(item => {
          const safeId = this.escapeHtml(String(item?.id || ''));
          const updated = item?.updatedAt ? new Date(item.updatedAt) : null;
          const stamp = updated && !Number.isNaN(updated.getTime()) ? updated.toLocaleString() : 'Unknown time';
          return `
            <div class="story-recent-entry ${String(item?.id || '') === activeId ? 'is-active' : ''}">
              <div class="story-recent-entry-main">
                <div class="story-recent-entry-title">${this.escapeHtml(item?.title || 'Untitled Story')}</div>
                <div class="story-recent-entry-meta">${this.escapeHtml(item?.subtitle || 'Saved story')}</div>
                <div class="story-recent-entry-meta">Saved: ${this.escapeHtml(stamp)}</div>
              </div>
              <div class="story-recent-entry-actions">
                <button class="story-btn ghost" type="button" onclick="storyOpenRecentStory('${safeId}')">Open</button>
                <button class="story-btn ghost" type="button" onclick="storyExportSavedStory('${safeId}')">Export</button>
                <button class="story-btn ghost" type="button" onclick="storyDeleteSavedStory('${safeId}')">Delete</button>
              </div>
            </div>`;
        }).join('');
      },

      toggleRecentStoryPanel(forceValue) {
        this.uiRecentStoryPanelOpen = typeof forceValue === 'boolean'
          ? forceValue
          : !(this.uiRecentStoryPanelOpen !== false);
        this.renderRecentStoryPanel();
      },

      renderRecentStoryPanel() {
        const wrap = this.els.recentStoryList;
        const toggleBtn = document.getElementById('storyRecentStoriesToggleBtn');
        const isOpen = this.uiRecentStoryPanelOpen !== false;

        if (toggleBtn) {
          toggleBtn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', isOpen ? 'true' : 'false');
          toggleBtn.classList.toggle('is-active', isOpen);
        }

        if (!wrap) return;
        wrap.hidden = !isOpen;
        if (!isOpen) {
          wrap.innerHTML = '';
          return;
        }

        const items = this.readRecentStories();
        if (!items.length) {
          wrap.innerHTML = '<div class="story-recent-sidebar-empty">No saved stories yet.</div>';
          return;
        }

        const activeId = String(this.state?.savedStoryId || '');
        const visible = items.slice(0, 4);
        const rows = visible.map(item => {
          const id = String(item?.id || '');
          const safeId = this.escapeHtml(id);
          return `
            <div class="story-recent-sidebar-row">
              <button type="button" class="story-recent-sidebar-item ${id === activeId ? 'is-active' : ''}" onclick="storyOpenRecentStory('${safeId}')">
                <span class="story-recent-sidebar-item-title">${this.escapeHtml(item?.title || 'Untitled Story')}</span>
                <span class="story-recent-sidebar-item-sub">${this.escapeHtml(item?.subtitle || 'Saved story')}</span>
              </button>
              <button type="button" class="story-recent-sidebar-delete" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); storyDeleteSavedStory('${safeId}')" title="Delete saved story" aria-label="Delete saved story">×</button>
            </div>`;
        });

        if (items.length > 4) {
          rows.push(`<button type="button" class="story-recent-sidebar-seeall" onclick="switchPage('story'); openStoryRecentStoriesModal()">See All</button>`);
        }

        wrap.innerHTML = rows.join('');
      },

      deleteCurrentStorySnapshot() {
        if (!confirm('Delete the current local story session?')) return;
        try {
          localStorage.removeItem(this.storageKey);
          localStorage.removeItem(this.recentStorageKey());
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(e);
        }
        this.state.savedStoryId = '';
        this.loadData(this.defaultData());
        this.renderAll();
        this.setStatus('current story deleted');
      },

      renderInScene() {
        const wrap = this.els.inSceneList;
        wrap.innerHTML = '';
        if(!(this.state.inScene || []).length) {
          wrap.innerHTML = '<div class="story-message-empty">No in-scene characters yet.</div>';
          return;
        }
        this.state.inScene.forEach(item => {
          const row = document.createElement('div');
          row.className = 'story-inscene-item';
          const thumbText = item.avatarUrl ? '' : this.avatarInitial(item.name);
          row.innerHTML = `
            <div class="story-inscene-thumb" style="${item.avatarUrl ? `background-image:url('${item.avatarUrl.replace(/'/g, "%27")}');` : ''}">${thumbText}</div>
            <div style="min-width:0;">
              <div class="story-inscene-name">${this.escapeHtml(item.name || 'In Scene')}</div>
              <div class="story-inscene-meta">in scene</div>
            </div>
            <button class="story-inscene-edit" type="button" title="Edit character" data-act="edit">✎</button>
            <button class="story-inscene-delete" type="button" title="Delete from scene" data-act="delete">×</button>`;
          row.querySelector('[data-act="edit"]').onclick = () => this.openCharacterModal('scene', item.id);
          row.querySelector('[data-act="delete"]').onclick = () => this.deleteSceneCharacterById(item.id);
          wrap.appendChild(row);
        });
      },

      deleteSceneCharacterById(id='') {
        const targetId = String(id || '').trim();
        if (!targetId) return false;
        const before = Array.isArray(this.state.inScene) ? this.state.inScene.length : 0;
        this.state.inScene = (this.state.inScene || []).filter(item => String(item?.id || '') !== targetId);
        if (this.state.inScene.length === before) return false;
        this.renderAll();
        this.persistSnapshot();
        this.setStatus('character removed from scene');
        return true;
      },

      updateComposerHint() {
        const activeSendAs = this.els.sendAs || this.els.sendAsQuick;
        const text = activeSendAs?.options?.[activeSendAs.selectedIndex]?.textContent || 'current speaker';
        const next = this.resolveSpeakerName(this.state.nextSpeaker) || this.getNextTurnName();
        this.els.composerHint.textContent = `send as ${text} • next: ${next}`;
        if (this.els.speakerRuntimeHint) {
          this.els.speakerRuntimeHint.textContent = this.state.nextSpeaker
            ? `Pinned next speaker: ${next}. Clear or switch it any time.`
            : `No speaker is pinned. The scene will choose the next voice from the active cast.`;
        }
      },

      getBlockSpeakerAndContent(blockText='') {
        const trimmed = String(blockText || '').trim();
        const match = trimmed.match(/^([^:\n]{1,60}):\s*([\s\S]*)$/);
        if(match) return { speaker: match[1].trim(), content: (match[2] || '').trim() };
        return { speaker: 'Narrator', content: trimmed };
      },

      getSpeakerMetaByName(name='') {
        const clean = String(name || '').trim();
        if(clean === (this.state.primary.name || '').trim()) return { id:'primary', name:this.state.primary.name || 'Primary', avatarUrl:this.state.primary.avatarUrl || '', role:'primary character' };
        if(clean === (this.state.user.name || '').trim()) return { id:'user', name:this.state.user.name || 'User', avatarUrl:this.state.user.avatarUrl || '', role:'user character' };
        const found = (this.state.inScene || []).find(item => (item.name || '').trim() === clean);
        if(found) return { id:found.id, name:found.name || 'In Scene', avatarUrl:found.avatarUrl || '', role:'in-scene character' };
        return { id:'narrator', name:clean || 'Narrator', avatarUrl:'', role:'narration / system voice' };
      },

      getRenderableBlocks() {
        return (this.state.messages || [])
          .map(msg => this.messageToTranscriptBlock(msg))
          .filter(Boolean);
      },

      getBlockKey(blockText='', index=0) {
        const src = `${index}|${String(blockText || '')}`;
        let hash = 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < src.length; i++) hash = ((hash << 5) - hash + src.charCodeAt(i)) | 0;
        return `blk_${index}_${Math.abs(hash)}`;
      },

      getPromptPairForIndex(index=0) {
        const blocks = this.getRenderableBlocks();
        const start = Math.max(0, index - 1);
        return blocks.slice(start, index + 1);
      },

      composeImagePromptFromPair(index=0) {
        const pair = this.getPromptPairForIndex(index);
        const styleKey = this.els.imageCore?.value || '';
        const styleCore = styleKey && window.CORE_REGISTRY?.[styleKey] ? window.CORE_REGISTRY[styleKey] : null;
        const parts = [];
        if (styleCore) {
          const traits = [];
          if (Array.isArray(styleCore.identity)) traits.push(...styleCore.identity.slice(0,3));
          if (Array.isArray(styleCore.rules)) traits.push(...styleCore.rules.slice(0,3));
          parts.push(`Visual core: ${styleCore.label}. ${styleCore.desc} ${(traits.length ? 'Key traits: ' + traits.join(', ') + '.' : '')}`.trim());
        }
        if ((this.els.scenario?.value || '').trim()) {
          parts.push(`Scenario: ${(this.els.scenario.value || '').trim()}`);
        }
        const castBits = [];
        const roster = this.buildParticipantRoster ? this.buildParticipantRoster() : [];
        roster.forEach(item => {
          const cleanDesc = String(item?.description || '').trim();
          if (!cleanDesc) return;
          castBits.push(`${item.name}: ${cleanDesc.slice(0, 500)}`);
        });
        if (castBits.length) parts.push(`Visible cast reference:
${castBits.join('\n\n')}`);
        parts.push('Use only this immediate conversation exchange as the visual source.');
        parts.push(pair.map(block => {
          const parsed = this.getBlockSpeakerAndContent(block);
          return `${parsed.speaker}: ${parsed.content}`.trim();
        }).join('\n\n'));
        return parts.filter(Boolean).join('\n\n').trim();
      },

      async buildVisualImagePromptFromPair(index=0) {
        const source = this.composeImagePromptFromPair(index);
        if (!source) return '';
        const positive = this.getCombinedImagePositive();
        const negative = this.getCombinedImageNegative();
        const imageCoreLabel = String(this.els.imageCore?.value || '').trim();
        const imageScale = this.getStoryImageScale();
        const instruction = [
          'Turn the following roleplay scene context into a single English image prompt.',
          'Output only the prompt, with no explanation.',
          'Preserve the visible moment, character appearance, setting, mood, action, and camera framing.',
          'Do not include speaker labels, dialogue formatting, or Indonesian text.',
          'Write clean English that works well for an image model.',
          'The scene context is the main direction. Any positive or negative guidance below is only supportive, not directive.',
          positive ? `Supportive image guidance:\n${positive}` : '',
          negative ? `Supportive negative guardrails:\n${negative}` : '',
          imageCoreLabel ? `Preferred image style core: ${imageCoreLabel}` : '',
          `Preferred frame ratio: ${imageScale}.`,
          '',
          source
        ].filter(Boolean).join('\n\n');

        try {
          const result = await ai({ instruction });
          let text = String(result?.text || result || '').trim() || source;
          if (negative && !/\(negativePrompt:::/i.test(text)) {
            text = `${text} (negativePrompt:::${negative})`.trim();
          }
          this.state.imagePositive = this.els.imagePositive?.value || this.state.imagePositive || '';
          this.state.imageNegative = this.els.imageNegative?.value || this.state.imageNegative || '';
          return text;
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(e);
          const fallback = String(source || '').trim();
          this.state.imagePositive = this.els.imagePositive?.value || this.state.imagePositive || '';
          this.state.imageNegative = this.els.imageNegative?.value || this.state.imageNegative || '';
          return negative ? `${fallback} (negativePrompt:::${negative})`.trim() : fallback;
        }
      },

      async generateInlineImagesForBlock(blockText='', index=0) {
        const msg = (this.state.messages || [])[Number(index)] || null;
        if (!msg) return;
        await this.generateInlineImagesForMessage(msg, { index });
      },

      async generateInlineImagesForMessage(msg, opts={index:0, slots:2}) {
        if (!msg) return;
        const index = Number.isFinite(opts.index) ? opts.index : this.getMessageIndexById(msg.id);
        const slots = Math.max(1, Number(opts.slots) || 2);
        const key = this.getInlineImageStoreKey(msg, index);
        const current = this.state.inlineImages?.[key];
        if (current?.status === 'loading' || current?.status === 'bridging') return;
        const imageScale = this.getStoryImageScale();
        const resolution = this.getStoryImageResolution(imageScale);

        this.state.inlineImages = this.state.inlineImages || {};
        const bridgeItems = Array.from({ length: slots }, () => ({ html: this.renderLoopLoaderHtml('synchronizing prompt...') }));
        this.state.inlineImages[key] = {
          status: 'bridging',
          prompt: '',
          items: [],
          images: [],
          kept: current?.kept || {},
          bridgeItems,
          jobId: this.makeMessageId(),
          messageId: msg.id,
          slotCount: slots,
          imageScale,
          resolution
        };
        this.scheduleFeedRender();

        this.setStatus('synchronizing prompt...');
        const prompt = await this.buildVisualImagePromptFromPair(index);
        const payload = this.state.inlineImages[key];
        if (!payload) return;
        if (!prompt) {
          this.state.inlineImages[key] = { ...payload, status: 'error', prompt: '', items: [], images: [], bridgeItems: [] };
          this.scheduleFeedRender();
          return;
        }

        try {
          const runtimeStore = this.ensureInlineImageRuntimeStore();
          const runtimeSlots = [];
          const finishers = [];

          for (let i = 0; i < slots; i++) {
            const runtime = this.createInlinePerchanceImageRuntime(prompt, { width: 240, resolution });
            runtimeSlots.push(runtime);
            finishers.push(
              Promise.resolve(runtime?.onFinishPromise)
                .then(data => data?.imageUrl || data?.url || data?.dataUrl || '')
                .catch(err => {
                  console.error(err);
                  return '';
                })
            );
          }

          runtimeStore[key] = {
            slots: runtimeSlots,
            prompt,
            messageId: msg.id,
            createdAt: Date.now()
          };

          this.state.inlineImages[key] = {
            ...payload,
            status: 'loading',
            prompt,
            images: Array(slots).fill(''),
            bridgeItems: [],
            imageScale,
            resolution
          };
          this.setStatus('rendering scene image...');
          this.scheduleFeedRender();

          Promise.all(finishers).then(urls => {
            const currentPayload = this.state.inlineImages?.[key];
            if (!currentPayload) return;
            const normalized = (urls || []).slice(0, slots).map(url => url || '');
            if (normalized.some(Boolean)) {
              this.state.inlineImages[key] = {
                ...currentPayload,
                status: 'done',
                prompt,
                images: normalized,
                bridgeItems: [],
                imageScale,
                resolution
              };
              this.freezeInlineImageRow(key, normalized);
              this.persistSnapshot();
            } else {
              this.state.inlineImages[key] = {
                ...currentPayload,
                status: 'error',
                prompt,
                images: [],
                bridgeItems: [],
                imageScale,
                resolution
              };
              this.dropInlineImageRuntime(key);
            }
            this.scheduleFeedRender();
          }).catch(err => {
            console.error(err);
            const currentPayload = this.state.inlineImages?.[key];
            if (!currentPayload) return;
            this.state.inlineImages[key] = {
              ...currentPayload,
              status: 'error',
              prompt,
              images: [],
              bridgeItems: []
            };
            this.dropInlineImageRuntime(key);
            this.scheduleFeedRender();
          });
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(e);
          this.state.inlineImages[key] = {
            ...(this.state.inlineImages[key] || payload),
            status: 'error',
            prompt,
            images: [],
            bridgeItems: []
          };
          this.dropInlineImageRuntime(key);
          this.scheduleFeedRender();
        }
      },

      async regenerateInlineImageAt(key='', imageIndex=0) {
        return;
      },

      deleteInlineImageAt(key='', imageIndex=0) {
        const safeKey = String(key || '');
        if (!safeKey) return;
        const payload = this.state.inlineImages?.[safeKey];
        if (!payload) return;

        const idx = Number.isFinite(Number(imageIndex)) ? Number(imageIndex) : 0;
        const row = this.findMessageRow(safeKey);
        const safeSelectorKey = safeKey.replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
        const stackEl = row?.querySelector(`[data-inline-stack-key="${safeSelectorKey}"][data-inline-index="${idx}"]`) || null;
        if (stackEl) {
          stackEl.style.opacity = '0';
          stackEl.style.transform = 'translateY(4px)';
          stackEl.style.transition = 'opacity .14s ease, transform .14s ease';
        }

        const nextImages = Array.isArray(payload.images) ? payload.images.filter((_, i) => i !== idx) : [];
        const nextBridgeItems = Array.isArray(payload.bridgeItems) ? payload.bridgeItems.filter((_, i) => i !== idx) : [];
        const nextItems = Array.isArray(payload.items) ? payload.items.filter((_, i) => i !== idx) : [];
        const nextKept = {};
        Object.entries(payload.kept || {}).forEach(([k, v]) => {
          const n = Number(k);
          if (!Number.isFinite(n) || n === idx) return;
          nextKept[n > idx ? n - 1 : n] = v;
        });

        const runtimeStore = this.ensureInlineImageRuntimeStore();
        const runtime = runtimeStore[safeKey];
        if (runtime && Array.isArray(runtime.slots)) {
          runtime.slots = runtime.slots.filter((_, i) => i !== idx);
        }

        const remainingCount = Math.max(nextImages.length, nextBridgeItems.length, nextItems.length, runtime?.slots?.length || 0);
        if (remainingCount <= 0) {
          this.dropInlineImageRuntime(safeKey);
          delete this.state.inlineImages[safeKey];
        } else {
          this.state.inlineImages[safeKey] = {
            ...payload,
            images: nextImages,
            bridgeItems: nextBridgeItems,
            items: nextItems,
            kept: nextKept,
            slotCount: remainingCount,
            status: payload.status === 'done' && nextImages.length ? 'done' : (payload.status || 'done')
          };
        }

        const finalize = () => {
          this.persistSnapshot();
          this.scheduleFeedRender();
        };

        if (stackEl) {
          setTimeout(finalize, 145);
        } else {
          finalize();
        }
      },

      async keepInlineImageAt(key='', imageIndex=0) {
        const payload = this.state.inlineImages?.[key];
        const idx = Number(imageIndex);
        const url = payload?.images?.[idx] || '';
        if (!url) return;
        try {
          const blob = await fetch(url).then(r => r.blob());
          if (window.__loopPrivateGallery?.add) {
            await window.__loopPrivateGallery.add(blob);
          }
          const row = this.findMessageRow(String(key || ''));
          const btn = row?.querySelector(`[data-act="img-save"][data-inline-key="${String(key || '').replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}"][data-inline-index="${idx}"]`) || null;
          if (btn) {
            const old = btn.textContent;
            btn.textContent = 'saved';
            btn.disabled = true;
            setTimeout(() => {
              if (btn.isConnected) {
                btn.textContent = old;
                btn.disabled = false;
              }
            }, 1200);
          }
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(e);
        }
      },

      renderInlineImageActionOverlay(key='', idx=0, url='') {
        if (!url) return '';
        return `<div class="story-inline-image-overlay"><button type="button" class="story-inline-image-action" title="Image actions" aria-label="Image actions" data-act="img-menu" data-inline-key="${this.escapeHtml(key)}" data-inline-index="${idx}" data-inline-url="${this.escapeHtml(url)}"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true" style="width:14px;height:14px;display:block;"><circle cx="6" cy="12" r="1.8"></circle><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="1.8"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="12" r="1.8"></circle></svg></button></div>`;
      },

      getInlineImageRenderMode(key='') {
        const payload = this.state.inlineImages?.[key];
        if (!payload) return 'empty';
        if (payload.status === 'bridging' && Array.isArray(payload.bridgeItems) && payload.bridgeItems.length) return 'bridging';
        const runtime = this.ensureInlineImageRuntimeStore()[key];
        if (runtime && Array.isArray(runtime.slots) && runtime.slots.length) return 'runtime';
        if (payload.status === 'done' && Array.isArray(payload.images) && payload.images.length) return 'done';
        if (payload.status === 'error') return 'error';
        return 'empty';
      },

      renderInlineImages(key='') {
        const payload = this.state.inlineImages?.[key];
        if (!payload) return '';
        const imageScale = this.getInlineImageScaleForKey(key);
        const gridAttr = ` class="story-inline-image-grid" data-story-scale="${this.escapeHtml(imageScale)}"`;

        if (payload.status === 'bridging' && Array.isArray(payload.bridgeItems) && payload.bridgeItems.length) {
          return `<div${gridAttr}>${payload.bridgeItems.slice(0, 2).map((item, idx) => `<div class="story-inline-image-stack" data-inline-stack-key="${this.escapeHtml(key)}" data-inline-index="${idx}"><div class="story-inline-image-item" data-inline-key="${this.escapeHtml(key)}" data-inline-index="${idx}">${item?.html || ''}</div></div>`).join('')}</div>`;
        }

        if (payload.status === 'done' && Array.isArray(payload.images) && payload.images.length) {
          return `<div${gridAttr}>${payload.images.slice(0,2).map((url, idx) => `<div class="story-inline-image-stack" data-inline-stack-key="${this.escapeHtml(key)}" data-inline-index="${idx}"><div class="story-inline-image-item story-inline-image-item--done"><img src="${this.escapeHtml(url)}" data-url="${this.escapeHtml(url)}" onclick="openStoryInlineImageFullscreen(this.getAttribute('data-url'))">${this.renderInlineImageActionOverlay(key, idx, url)}</div></div>`).join('')}</div>`;
        }

        const runtime = this.ensureInlineImageRuntimeStore()[key];
        if (runtime && Array.isArray(runtime.slots) && runtime.slots.length) {
          return `<div${gridAttr}>${runtime.slots.slice(0, 2).map((slot, idx) => {
            return `<div class="story-inline-image-stack" data-inline-stack-key="${this.escapeHtml(key)}" data-inline-index="${idx}"><div class="story-inline-image-item story-inline-image-item--perchance" data-inline-runtime-key="${this.escapeHtml(key)}" data-inline-slot="${idx}"></div></div>`;
          }).join('')}</div>`;
        }

        if (payload.status === 'error') {
          return `<div${gridAttr}><div class="story-inline-image-loading">render failed</div></div>`;
        }

        return '';
      },

      composeImagePromptFromBlock(blockText='') {
        const parsed = this.getBlockSpeakerAndContent(blockText);
        const meta = this.getSpeakerMetaByName(parsed.speaker);
        const parts = [];
        if((this.els.scenario.value || '').trim()) parts.push(`Scenario: ${this.els.scenario.value.trim()}`);
        if(meta.name && meta.name !== 'Narrator') parts.push(`Character: ${meta.name}`);
        const desc = meta.id === 'primary'
          ? (this.state.primary.description || '')
          : meta.id === 'user'
            ? (this.state.user.description || '')
            : ((this.state.inScene || []).find(v => v.id === meta.id)?.description || '');
        if(desc.trim()) parts.push(`Character details: ${desc.trim()}`);
        if(parsed.content) parts.push(`Scene moment: ${parsed.content}`);
        return parts.join('\n\n').trim();
      },

      async sendBlockToImage(blockText='', opts={autogenerate:false, index:0, triggerEl:null}) {
        this.setStatus('preparing visual prompt for image page...');
        this.setActionButtonBusy(opts.triggerEl, true, '…');
        try {
          const prompt = await this.buildVisualImagePromptFromPair(Number.isFinite(opts.index) ? opts.index : 0);
          const promptInput = document.getElementById('promptInput');
          if(!promptInput) {
            alert('Image prompt box was not found.');
            return;
          }
          promptInput.value = prompt;
          try { promptInput.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', {bubbles:true})); } catch(e) {}
          this.setStatus(opts.autogenerate ? 'opening image generator...' : 'opening image page...');
          await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 160));
          switchPage('image');
          if(opts.autogenerate && typeof window.generateImagesV2 === 'function') {
            setTimeout(() => {
              try { window.generateImagesV2(); } catch(e) { console.error(e); }
            }, 60);
          }
          this.setStatus(opts.autogenerate ? 'scene prompt moved to image generator' : 'scene prompt moved to image page');
        } finally {
          this.setActionButtonBusy(opts.triggerEl, false);
        }
      },

      useBlockAsNextBeat(blockText='') {
        const parsed = this.getBlockSpeakerAndContent(blockText);
        this.els.whatNext.value = parsed.content || String(blockText || '').trim();
        this.persistSnapshot();
        this.setStatus('scene beat copied to what happens next');
      },

      toggleRawTranscript() {
        if (!this.els.rawTranscriptWrap) return;
        this.els.rawTranscriptWrap.hidden = !this.els.rawTranscriptWrap.hidden;
        if (this.els.rawToggleBtn) {
          this.els.rawToggleBtn.textContent = this.els.rawTranscriptWrap.hidden ? '≡' : '▾';
          this.els.rawToggleBtn.title = this.els.rawTranscriptWrap.hidden ? 'Raw transcript' : 'Hide raw transcript';
        }
        this.persistSnapshot();
      },

      scheduleFeedRender() {
        if (this.feedRenderQueued) return;
        this.feedRenderQueued = true;
        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
          this.feedRenderQueued = false;
          this.renderMessageFeed();
        });
      },

      getMessageIndexById(messageId='') {
        return (this.state.messages || []).findIndex(msg => msg.id === messageId);
      },

      getMessageById(messageId='') {
        return (this.state.messages || []).find(msg => msg.id === messageId) || null;
      },

      getInlineImageStoreKey(msg=null, index=0) {
        if (msg?.id) return String(msg.id);
        const safeIndex = Number.isFinite(index) ? index : 0;
        return `msg_inline_${safeIndex}`;
      },

      findMessageRow(messageId='') {
        const safeId = String(messageId || '');
        if (!safeId || !this.els.messageFeed) return null;
        return this.els.messageFeed.querySelector(`[data-message-id="${safeId.replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}"]`);
      },

      removeMessageRowImmediately(messageId='') {
        const row = this.findMessageRow(messageId);
        if (!row) return;
        row.style.opacity = '0';
        row.style.transform = 'translateY(-4px)';
        row.style.transition = 'opacity .12s ease, transform .12s ease';
        setTimeout(() => row.remove(), 120);
      },

      isLatestAssistantMessage(messageId='') {
        const messages = this.state.messages || [];
        for (let i = messages.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
          const msg = messages[i];
          if (msg.role === 'character' || msg.role === 'narrator') {
            return msg.id === messageId;
          }
        }
        return false;
      },

      storyMessageMenuIcon() {
        return `
          <svg viewBox="0 0 30 30" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
            <path d="M4.01,10.99C1.795,10.99,0,12.786,0,15c0,2.215,1.795,4.01,4.01,4.01c2.215,0,4.01-1.795,4.01-4.01C8.02,12.786,6.225,10.99,4.01,10.99z M4.01,17.229c-1.229,0-2.228-1-2.228-2.229c0-1.229,0.999-2.228,2.228-2.228S6.238,13.771,6.238,15C6.238,16.229,5.238,17.229,4.01,17.229z"></path>
            <path d="M15,10.99c-2.215,0-4.01,1.795-4.01,4.01s1.795,4.01,4.01,4.01s4.01-1.795,4.01-4.01C19.01,12.786,17.215,10.99,15,10.99z M15,17.229c-1.229,0-2.228-1-2.228-2.229c0-1.229,0.999-2.228,2.228-2.228c1.229,0,2.229,0.999,2.229,2.228C17.229,16.229,16.229,17.229,15,17.229z"></path>
            <path d="M25.99,10.99c-2.215,0-4.01,1.795-4.01,4.01s1.795,4.01,4.01,4.01S30,17.215,30,15C30,12.786,28.205,10.99,25.99,10.99z M25.99,17.229c-1.229,0-2.227-1-2.227-2.229c0-1.229,0.998-2.228,2.227-2.228s2.228,0.999,2.228,2.228C28.218,16.229,27.218,17.229,25.99,17.229z"></path>
          </svg>
        `;
      },

      buildMessageMenuActions(msg, index=0) {
        const actions = [
          { id: 'copy', title: 'Copy', label: '⧉' },
          { id: 'nextbeat', title: 'Use as next beat', label: '↗' },
          { id: 'image-here', title: 'Render here', label: '✦' },
          { id: 'image', title: 'Send to image page', label: '◫' }
        ];

        if (this.isLatestAssistantMessage(msg.id)) {
          actions.push({ id: 'regen', title: 'Regen text', label: '↻' });
        }

        actions.push({ id: 'delete', title: 'Delete', label: '⌫' });

        return actions.map(action => (
          `<button type="button" class="story-msg-menu-action" title="${this.escapeHtml(action.title)}" aria-label="${this.escapeHtml(action.title)}" data-act="${action.id}" data-message-id="${this.escapeHtml(msg.id)}" data-message-index="${index}">${action.label}</button>`
        )).join('');
      },

      closeAllMessageMenus() {
        document.querySelectorAll('.story-msg-menu[open]').forEach(menu => menu.removeAttribute('open'));
      },

      closeMessageMenu(target) {
        const menu = target?.closest?.('.story-msg-menu') || null;
        if (menu) menu.removeAttribute('open');
      },

      handleMessageMenuToggleClick(event) {
        const summary = event.target.closest('.story-msg-menu-btn');
        if (!summary) return;
        const menu = summary.closest('.story-msg-menu');
        if (!menu) return;
        document.querySelectorAll('.story-msg-menu[open]').forEach(node => {
          if (node !== menu) node.removeAttribute('open');
        });
      },

      async handleMessageFeedClick(event) {
        const actionEl = event.target.closest('[data-act]');
        if (!actionEl || !this.els.messageFeed?.contains(actionEl)) return;

        event.preventDefault();
        event.stopPropagation();

        const action = actionEl.getAttribute('data-act') || '';
        const messageId = actionEl.getAttribute('data-message-id') || '';
        const messageIndex = parseInt(actionEl.getAttribute('data-message-index') || '-1', 10);
        const inlineKey = actionEl.getAttribute('data-inline-key') || '';
        const inlineIndex = parseInt(actionEl.getAttribute('data-inline-index') || '-1', 10);

        await this.dispatchMessageAction(action, {
          messageId,
          messageIndex: Number.isNaN(messageIndex) ? -1 : messageIndex,
          inlineKey,
          inlineIndex: Number.isNaN(inlineIndex) ? -1 : inlineIndex,
          triggerEl: actionEl
        });
      },

      async dispatchMessageAction(action, ctx={}) {
        this.closeMessageMenu(ctx.triggerEl);

        if (action === 'img-menu') {
          const fallbackUrl = String(
            ctx.triggerEl?.getAttribute('data-inline-url')
            || this.state?.inlineImages?.[ctx.inlineKey]?.images?.[ctx.inlineIndex]
            || ''
          ).trim();
          window.showStoryInlineImageActionModal({
            inlineKey: ctx.inlineKey,
            inlineIndex: ctx.inlineIndex,
            url: fallbackUrl
          });
          return;
        }
        if (action === 'img-delete') {
          this.deleteInlineImageAt(ctx.inlineKey, ctx.inlineIndex);
          return;
        }
        if (action === 'img-regen') {
          await this.regenerateInlineImageAt(ctx.inlineKey, ctx.inlineIndex);
          return;
        }
        if (action === 'img-keep' || action === 'img-save') {
          await this.keepInlineImageAt(ctx.inlineKey, ctx.inlineIndex);
          return;
        }

        const msg = this.getMessageById(ctx.messageId);
        if (!msg) return;

        switch (action) {
          case 'copy':
            try { await navigator.clipboard.writeText(this.messageToTranscriptBlock(msg)); } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
            break;
          case 'nextbeat':
            this.useMessageAsNextBeat(msg);
            break;
          case 'image-here':
            this.setActionButtonBusy(ctx.triggerEl, true, '…');
            try {
              await this.renderMessageImageInline(msg, { index: ctx.messageIndex });
            } finally {
              this.setActionButtonBusy(ctx.triggerEl, false);
            }
            break;
          case 'image':
            await this.sendMessageToImage(msg, { autogenerate: false, index: ctx.messageIndex, triggerEl: ctx.triggerEl });
            break;
          case 'raw':
            this.openMessageInRawEditor(msg);
            break;
          case 'regen':
            await this.regenerateMessageById(msg.id);
            break;
          case 'delete':
            this.deleteMessageById(msg.id, { triggerEl: ctx.triggerEl });
            break;
          default:
            return;
        }
      },

      useMessageAsNextBeat(msg) {
        if (!msg) return;
        this.useBlockAsNextBeat(this.messageToTranscriptBlock(msg));
      },

      async sendMessageToImage(msg, opts={autogenerate:false, index:0}) {
        if (!msg) return;
        await this.sendBlockToImage(this.messageToTranscriptBlock(msg), opts);
      },

      async renderMessageImageInline(msg, opts={index:0}) {
        if (!msg) return;
        const index = Number.isFinite(opts.index) ? opts.index : this.getMessageIndexById(msg.id);
        await this.generateInlineImagesForMessage(msg, { index });
      },

      openMessageInRawEditor(msg) {
        if (!msg) return;
        if (this.els.rawTranscriptWrap?.hidden) this.toggleRawTranscript();
        this.transcriptEl?.focus?.();
        this.setStatus(`raw editor opened for ${msg.speakerName || 'message'}`);
      },

      deleteMessageById(messageId='', opts={}) {
        const idx = this.getMessageIndexById(messageId);
        if (idx === -1) return;

        this.removeMessageRowImmediately(messageId);
        const removed = this.state.messages.splice(idx, 1)[0];
        if (!removed) return;
        this.state.deletedMessageStack = this.state.deletedMessageStack || [];
        this.state.deletedMessageStack.push({ ...removed });
        delete (this.state.inlineImages || {})[String(messageId)];
        this.dropInlineImageRuntime(String(messageId));
        this.syncTranscriptEditorFromMessages();
        this.persistSnapshot();
        this.scheduleFeedRender();
        this.renderStoryMessageActions?.();

        const undoBtn = document.getElementById('storyUndoDeleteBtn');
        if (undoBtn) undoBtn.disabled = false;
      },

      async regenerateMessageById(messageId='') {
        if (!this.isLatestAssistantMessage(messageId)) {
          this.setStatus('only the latest assistant turn can be regenerated right now');
          return;
        }
        await this.regenLastAssistantTurn();
      },

      formatRichStoryHtml(text='') {
        let html = this.escapeHtml(String(text || ''));
        html = html.replace(/\*\*([^*\n][\s\S]*?)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>');
        html = html.replace(/\*([^*\n][\s\S]*?)\*/g, '<em>$1</em>');
        html = html.replace(/(^|\n)&gt;\s?([^\n]+)/g, '$1<span class="story-msg-quote">$2</span>');
        html = html.replace(/\n/g, '<br>');
        return html;
      },

      renderMessageFeed() {
        const wrap = this.els.messageFeed;
        if (!wrap) return;

        const messages = this.state.messages || [];
        if (!messages.length) {
          wrap.innerHTML = '<div class="story-feed-empty">The scene feed will appear here as soon as the conversation begins. Start the story by writing a message, continuing the scene, or setting a direction.</div>';
          return;
        }

        const emptyState = wrap.querySelector('.story-feed-empty');
        if (emptyState) emptyState.remove();

        const existingRows = new Map(Array.from(wrap.querySelectorAll('.story-msg[data-message-id]')).map(row => [row.dataset.messageId || '', row]));
        const desiredIds = [];

        messages.forEach((msg, index) => {
          const meta = this.getSpeakerMetaByName(msg.speakerName || '');
          const blockKey = msg.id || ('msg_' + index);
          const inlineImageKey = this.getInlineImageStoreKey(msg, index);
          const inlineMode = this.getInlineImageRenderMode(inlineImageKey);
          const isUser = msg.speakerId === 'user' || msg.role === 'user';
          const isNarrator = msg.speakerId === 'narrator' || msg.role === 'narrator';
          const isStreaming = msg.status === 'streaming';
          const bodyHtml = this.formatRichStoryHtml(msg.content || '');
          const bubbleHtml = bodyHtml
            ? `${bodyHtml}${isStreaming ? this.renderTypingDotsHtml() : ''}`
            : (isStreaming ? this.renderTypingDotsHtml() : '<em>...</em>');
          const avatarStyle = meta.avatarUrl ? `background-image:url('${String(meta.avatarUrl).replace(/'/g, "%27")}');` : '';

          let row = existingRows.get(blockKey);
          if (!row) {
            row = document.createElement('div');
            row.innerHTML = `
              <div class="story-msg-avatar"></div>
              <div class="story-msg-main">
                <div class="story-msg-header">
                  <div class="story-msg-name"></div>
                  <div class="story-msg-role"></div>
                  <div class="story-msg-header-spacer"></div>
                  <details class="story-msg-menu">
                    <summary class="story-msg-menu-btn" aria-label="Open message actions">${this.storyMessageMenuIcon()}</summary>
                    <div class="story-msg-menu-panel"></div>
                  </details>
                </div>
                <div class="story-msg-bubble"></div>
                <div class="story-msg-inline"></div>
              </div>
            `;
          }

          row.className = 'story-msg' + (isUser ? ' is-user' : '') + (isNarrator ? ' is-narrator' : '');
          row.dataset.messageId = blockKey;
          row.dataset.messageIndex = String(index);

          const avatarEl = row.querySelector('.story-msg-avatar');
          if (avatarEl) {
            avatarEl.setAttribute('style', avatarStyle);
            avatarEl.textContent = meta.avatarUrl ? '' : this.avatarInitial(meta.name || msg.speakerName || 'N');
          }

          const nameEl = row.querySelector('.story-msg-name');
          if (nameEl) nameEl.textContent = meta.name || msg.speakerName || 'Narrator';
          const roleEl = row.querySelector('.story-msg-role');
          if (roleEl) roleEl.textContent = meta.role || msg.role || 'scene voice';

          const menuPanel = row.querySelector('.story-msg-menu-panel');
          if (menuPanel) menuPanel.innerHTML = this.buildMessageMenuActions(msg, index);

          const bubbleEl = row.querySelector('.story-msg-bubble');
          if (bubbleEl) {
            bubbleEl.className = 'story-msg-bubble' + (isStreaming ? ' is-streaming' : '');
            bubbleEl.innerHTML = bubbleHtml;
          }

          const inlineWrap = row.querySelector('.story-msg-inline');
          const previousKey = row.dataset.inlineKey || '';
          const previousMode = row.dataset.inlineMode || '';
          const keepFrozenInline = inlineMode === 'done' && previousKey === inlineImageKey && row.dataset.inlineFrozen === '1' && inlineWrap && inlineWrap.children.length;
          if (inlineWrap && !keepFrozenInline && (previousKey !== inlineImageKey || previousMode !== inlineMode || !inlineWrap.children.length)) {
            inlineWrap.innerHTML = this.renderInlineImages(inlineImageKey);
            row.dataset.inlineKey = inlineImageKey;
            row.dataset.inlineMode = inlineMode;
            if (inlineMode !== 'done') {
              delete row.dataset.inlineFrozen;
            }
          }

          desiredIds.push(blockKey);
          const currentRowAtIndex = wrap.children[index] || null;
          if (currentRowAtIndex !== row) {
            wrap.insertBefore(row, currentRowAtIndex);
          }
          if (inlineMode === 'runtime') {
            this.mountInlineImageRuntimeForRow(row, inlineImageKey);
          }
        });

        Array.from(wrap.querySelectorAll('.story-msg[data-message-id]')).forEach(row => {
          if (!desiredIds.includes(row.dataset.messageId || '')) row.remove();
        });

        this.scrollFeedToBottom(false);
      },

      renderStoryMessageActions() {
        return;
      },
      getSpeakerRoster() {
        return [
          { id: 'primary', name: this.state.primary.name || 'Primary', avatarUrl: this.state.primary.avatarUrl || '', role: 'main dialogue counterpart' },
          { id: 'user', name: this.state.user.name || 'User', avatarUrl: this.state.user.avatarUrl || '', role: 'user-side character' }
        ].concat((this.state.inScene || []).map(item => ({
          id: item.id,
          name: item.name || 'In Scene',
          avatarUrl: item.avatarUrl || '',
          role: 'in scene participant'
        })));
      },

      renderSpeakerRuntimeBar() {
        this.refreshNextSpeakerOptions();
        const wrap = this.els.speakerRuntimeBar;
        if (!wrap) return;
        wrap.innerHTML = '';
        const activeResponder = this.state.nextSpeaker || this.pickNextSpeakerId() || 'primary';
        this.getSpeakerRoster()
          .filter(item => item.id !== 'user')
          .forEach(item => {
            const row = document.createElement('div');
            row.className = 'story-speaker-runtime-row';
            const main = document.createElement('button');
            main.type = 'button';
            main.className = 'story-speaker-runtime-main';
            if (activeResponder === item.id) main.classList.add('active');
            const avatarStyle = item.avatarUrl ? `background-image:url('${String(item.avatarUrl).replace(/'/g, "%27")}');` : '';
            main.innerHTML = `
              <div class="story-speaker-runtime-avatar" style="${avatarStyle}">${item.avatarUrl ? '' : this.avatarInitial(item.name)}</div>
              <div class="story-speaker-runtime-text">
                <div class="story-speaker-runtime-name">${this.escapeHtml(item.name)}</div>
              </div>`;
            main.title = `${item.name} replies now`;
            main.onclick = () => { this.triggerActiveCastOutput(item.id); };
            row.append(main);
            wrap.appendChild(row);
          });
        if (this.els.speakerRuntimeHint) {
          this.els.speakerRuntimeHint.hidden = true;
          this.els.speakerRuntimeHint.textContent = '';
        }
      },

      async triggerActiveCastOutput(value) {
        if (value !== 'narrator' && !this.getSpeakerRoster().some(item => item.id === value)) return;
        if (this.currentStreamingOp && !this.currentStreamingOp.stopped) {
          this.setStatus('please wait for the current reply to finish', { loading: true });
          return;
        }
        this._autoFollowFeed = true;
        this._feedUserIsReviewingHistory = false;
        await this.handleSendButtonClick({ mode: 'continue', targetSpeakerId: value, directCast: true });
      },

      setSendAs(value) {
        if (value !== 'narrator' && !this.getSpeakerRoster().some(item => item.id === value)) return;
        if (this.els.sendAs) this.els.sendAs.value = value;
        if (this.els.sendAsQuick) this.els.sendAsQuick.value = value;
        this.state.selectedSpeaker = value;
        this.persistSnapshot();
        this.renderSpeakerRuntimeBar();
        this.updateComposerHint();
        this.setStatus(`manual speaker set to ${this.resolveSpeakerName(value)}`);
      },

      setNextSpeaker(value) {
        if (value !== 'narrator' && !this.getSpeakerRoster().some(item => item.id === value)) return;
        this.state.nextSpeaker = value;
        if (this.els.nextSpeakerQuick) this.els.nextSpeakerQuick.value = value;
        this.persistSnapshot();
        this.renderSpeakerRuntimeBar();
        this.updateComposerHint();
        this.setStatus(`${this.resolveSpeakerName(value)} pinned as next speaker`);
      },

      clearNextSpeaker() {
        this.state.nextSpeaker = '';
        if (this.els.nextSpeakerQuick) this.els.nextSpeakerQuick.value = 'auto';
        this.persistSnapshot();
        this.renderSpeakerRuntimeBar();
        this.updateComposerHint();
        this.setStatus('next-speaker pin cleared');
      },

      setStatus(text, opts={}) {
        const el = this.els.status;
        if(!el) return;
        const spinner = this.els.statusSpinner;
        const safeText = text || '';
        const isLoading = !!opts.loading || /(?:writing|preparing|generating|loading|opening|render started|regenerating|processing)/i.test(safeText);
        el.textContent = safeText;
        el.style.color = opts.error ? '#d9534f' : 'var(--text-secondary)';
        if (spinner) spinner.hidden = !isLoading;
      },

      focusComposer() { this.els.input.focus(); },

      toggleScenario() {
        this.els.scenarioBody.hidden = !this.els.scenarioBody.hidden;
        this.els.scenarioToggleBtn.textContent = this.els.scenarioBody.hidden ? '▸' : '▾';
          this.els.scenarioToggleBtn.title = this.els.scenarioBody.hidden ? 'Show scenario' : 'Hide scenario';
        this.persistSnapshot();
      },

      togglePrimarySettingsMenu(forceValue) {
        const cluster = document.querySelector('.story-avatar-settings-cluster');
        const tray = document.getElementById('storyPrimarySettingsTray');
        const btn = document.getElementById('storyPrimarySettingsBtn');
        if (!cluster || !tray || !btn) return;
        const nextOpen = typeof forceValue === 'boolean' ? forceValue : !cluster.classList.contains('is-open');
        cluster.classList.toggle('is-open', nextOpen);
        tray.hidden = !nextOpen;
        btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', nextOpen ? 'true' : 'false');
      },

      openPrimaryCreateModal() {
        this.togglePrimarySettingsMenu(false);
        this.openCharacterModal('primary');
