        const overlay = this.currentModalEl;
        if (!overlay) return;
        const kickerEl = overlay.querySelector('.hall-world-modal-kicker');
        const titleEl = overlay.querySelector('.hall-world-modal-title');
        const subtitleEl = overlay.querySelector('.hall-world-modal-subtitle');
        if (kickerEl) kickerEl.textContent = 'Create Character';
        if (titleEl) titleEl.textContent = 'Create Character';
        if (subtitleEl) subtitleEl.textContent = 'Create a new primary character for this story without resetting the current story state.';
        ['#primaryCharacterBuilderName', '#primaryCharacterBuilderAvatar', '#primaryCharacterBuilderAppearance', '#primaryCharacterBuilderDescription', '#primaryCharacterBuilderAssist'].forEach((selector) => {
          const field = overlay.querySelector(selector);
          if (!field) return;
          field.value = '';
          field.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
        });
        const statusEl = overlay.querySelector('#primaryCharacterBuilderStatus');
        if (statusEl) statusEl.textContent = '';
        overlay.querySelector('#primaryCharacterBuilderName')?.focus();
      },

      openPrimaryEditModal() {
        this.togglePrimarySettingsMenu(false);
        this.openCharacterModal('primary');
      },

      addInSceneCharacter() {
        this.openStoryCharacterPickerModal('scene');
      },

      applyStoryCharacterAsPrimary(item=null) {
        if (!item) return false;
        this.state.primary = {
          id: item.id || `primary_${Date.now()}`,
          name: item.name || 'Primary',
          avatarUrl: item.avatarUrl || '',
          short: item.short || '',
          appearance: item.appearance || '',
          characterDescription: item.characterDescription || '',
          description: item.description || ''
        };
        this.refreshSendAsOptions();
        this.renderAll();
        this.setStatus('primary character set');
        return true;
      },

      addStoryCharacterToScene(item=null) {
        if (!item) return false;
        const sourceId = String(item.id || item.name || '').trim();
        const exists = (this.state.inScene || []).some(entry => {
          const entrySourceId = String(entry.sourceCharacterId || entry.id || entry.name || '').trim();
          return sourceId && entrySourceId === sourceId;
        });
        if (exists) {
          this.setStatus('character already in scene');
          return false;
        }
        const payload = {
          id: `scene_${Date.now()}`,
          sourceCharacterId: sourceId,
          name: item.name || 'In Scene',
          avatarUrl: item.avatarUrl || '',
          short: item.short || '',
          appearance: item.appearance || '',
          characterDescription: item.characterDescription || '',
          description: item.description || ''
        };
        this.state.inScene.push(payload);
        this.renderAll();
        this.setStatus('character added to scene');
        return true;
      },

      openStoryCharacterInspectorModal(item=null, opts={}) {
        if (!item) return;
        try { this.closeCharacterModal?.(); } catch(e) {}
        if (window.openLoopCharacterInspectorPage) return window.openLoopCharacterInspectorPage(item, opts || {});
      },

      openStoryCharacterPickerModal(kind='scene') {
        this.closeCharacterModal();
        const overlay = document.createElement('div');
        overlay.className = 'story-modal-overlay';
        const defaultCharacters = this.hallQuickCharacters();
        const myCharacters = this.getLibraryCharacters();
        const subtitle = kind === 'primary'
          ? 'Choose a story character, inspect it first, then set it as primary or add it to the active scene.'
          : 'Choose a story character, inspect it first, then add it to the active scene or set it as primary.';

        const renderCards = (items, sourceLabel='default') => {
          if (!items.length) return `<div class="story-panel-empty">No ${sourceLabel} characters yet.</div>`;
          return items.map(item => {
            const key = String(item?.id || item?.name || '');
            const avatarUrl = String(item?.avatarUrl || '').trim();
            const avatarStyle = avatarUrl ? `background-image:url('${avatarUrl.replace(/'/g, "%27")}');` : '';
            const fallback = this.escapeHtml(this.avatarInitial(item?.name || 'C'));
            const short = this.escapeHtml(item?.short || this.makeShortDescription(item?.description || item?.characterDescription || ''));
            return `
              <div class="story-character-picker-card" data-character-id="${this.escapeHtml(key)}" data-character-source="${sourceLabel}">
                <div class="story-character-picker-card-head">
                  <div class="story-character-picker-card-avatar" style="${avatarStyle}">${avatarUrl ? '' : fallback}</div>
                  <div class="story-character-picker-card-meta">
                    <div class="story-character-picker-card-title">${this.escapeHtml(item?.name || 'Untitled Character')}</div>
                    <div class="story-character-picker-card-desc">${short}</div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div class="story-character-picker-card-actions">
                  <button class="story-btn ghost" type="button" data-card-inspector>Inspector</button>
                  <button class="story-btn ghost" type="button" data-card-primary>Primary</button>
                  <button class="story-btn ghost" type="button" data-card-scene>Add to Scene</button>
                </div>
              </div>`;
          }).join('');
        };

        overlay.innerHTML = `
          <div class="story-modal-shell story-character-picker-shell">
            <div class="story-character-picker-head">
              <div class="story-character-picker-brand">
                <div class="story-character-picker-logo" aria-hidden="true">
                  <svg viewBox="0 0 48 48" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                  <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="17" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"/>
                  <defs>
                    <mask id="storyCharacterPickerCut">
                      <rect width="48" height="48" fill="white"/>
                      <circle cx="20" cy="16" r="6" fill="black"/>
                    </mask>
                  </defs>
                  <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="10" fill="currentColor" mask="url(#storyCharacterPickerCut)"/>
                </svg>
                </div>
                <div class="story-character-picker-main">
                  <div class="story-modal-kicker">Story Character</div>
                  <div class="story-modal-title">Story Character</div>
                  <div class="story-character-picker-subtitle">${subtitle}</div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <button class="story-modal-close" type="button" aria-label="Close">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div class="story-character-picker-scroll">
              <div class="story-section-gap">
                <div class="story-side-section-head">
                  <div class="story-side-section-title">Default Characters</div>
                  <button class="story-btn ghost" type="button" data-create-character>Create Character</button>
                </div>
                <div class="story-character-picker-grid">${renderCards(defaultCharacters, 'default')}</div>
                <div class="story-side-section-head" style="margin-top:8px;">
                  <div class="story-side-section-title">My Characters</div>
                </div>
                <div class="story-character-picker-grid">${renderCards(myCharacters, 'library')}</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="story-modal-actions">
              <button class="story-modal-btn ghost" type="button" data-close>Close</button>
            </div>
          </div>`;
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        this.currentModalEl = overlay;
        const close = () => this.closeCharacterModal();
        overlay.querySelectorAll('[data-close], .story-modal-close').forEach(btn => btn.onclick = close);
        overlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === overlay) close(); });
        overlay.querySelector('[data-create-character]')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
          close();
          this.openCharacterModal(kind === 'primary' ? 'primary' : 'scene');
        });

        overlay.querySelectorAll('[data-character-id]').forEach(card => {
          const id = String(card.getAttribute('data-character-id') || '');
          const source = String(card.getAttribute('data-character-source') || 'default');
          const item = source === 'library'
            ? this.getLibraryCharacters().find(v => String(v?.id || v?.name || '') === id)
            : this.hallQuickCharacters().find(v => String(v?.id || v?.name || '') === id);
          if (!item) return;

          card.querySelector('[data-card-primary]')?.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
            event.preventDefault();
            event.stopPropagation();
            this.applyStoryCharacterAsPrimary(item);
            close();
          });
          card.querySelector('[data-card-scene]')?.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
            event.preventDefault();
            event.stopPropagation();
            this.addStoryCharacterToScene(item);
            close();
          });
          card.querySelector('[data-card-inspector]')?.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
            event.preventDefault();
            event.stopPropagation();
            this.openStoryCharacterInspectorModal(item, { source, mode: kind });
          });
        });
      },

      libraryKeys() {
        return {
          characters: 'loop_library_characters_v1',
          worlds: 'loop_library_worlds_v1',
          worldPreviews: 'loop_world_previews_v1'
        };
      },

      loadStoredWorldPreviews() {
        try {
          const raw = localStorage.getItem(this.libraryKeys().worldPreviews);
          const parsed = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : {};
          return parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' && !Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : {};
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(e);
          return {};
        }
      },

      isStorageSafeImageUrl(url='') {
        const value = String(url || '').trim();
        if (!value) return false;
        if (/^data:/i.test(value)) return false;
        return true;
      },

      sanitizeImageUrlForStorage(url='') {
        const value = String(url || '').trim();
        return this.isStorageSafeImageUrl(value) ? value : '';
      },

      saveStoredWorldPreviews(map) {
        const source = map && typeof map === 'object' ? map : {};
        const safe = {};
        Object.entries(source).forEach(([key, value]) => {
          const clean = this.sanitizeImageUrlForStorage(value);
          if (clean) safe[String(key)] = clean;
        });
        try {
          localStorage.setItem(this.libraryKeys().worldPreviews, JSON.stringify(safe));
        } catch (e) {
          console.error('saveStoredWorldPreviews failed:', e);
        }
      },

      worldGenre(item) {
        if (item && item.genre) return String(item.genre);
        const tags = Array.isArray(item?.tags) ? item.tags : [];
        return String(tags[0] || 'world');
      },

      getLibraryCharacters() {
        try {
          const raw = localStorage.getItem(this.libraryKeys().characters);
          const parsed = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
          return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [];
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(e);
          return [];
        }
      },

      saveLibraryCharacters(items) {
        const safeItems = (Array.isArray(items) ? items : []).map(item => Object.assign({}, item, {
          avatarUrl: this.sanitizeImageUrlForStorage(item?.avatarUrl || '')
        }));
        try {
          localStorage.setItem(this.libraryKeys().characters, JSON.stringify(safeItems));
        } catch (e) {
          console.error('saveLibraryCharacters failed:', e);
        }
      },

      getLibraryWorlds() {
        try {
          const raw = localStorage.getItem(this.libraryKeys().worlds);
          const parsed = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
          return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [];
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(e);
          return [];
        }
      },

      saveLibraryWorlds(items) {
        const safeItems = (Array.isArray(items) ? items : []).map(item => Object.assign({}, item, {
          imageUrl: this.sanitizeImageUrlForStorage(item?.imageUrl || '')
        }));
        try {
          localStorage.setItem(this.libraryKeys().worlds, JSON.stringify(safeItems));
        } catch (e) {
          console.error('saveLibraryWorlds failed:', e);
        }
      },

      upsertLibraryCharacter(item) {
        const list = this.getLibraryCharacters();
        const payload = {
          id: item.id || `libchar_${Date.now()}`,
          name: item.name || 'Untitled Character',
          avatarUrl: item.avatarUrl || '',
          short: item.short || this.makeShortDescription(item.description || ''),
          description: item.description || ''
        };
        const idx = list.findIndex(v => (v.id && v.id === payload.id) || (v.name || '').trim().toLowerCase() === (payload.name || '').trim().toLowerCase());
        if (idx >= 0) list[idx] = Object.assign({}, list[idx], payload);
        else list.unshift(payload);
        this.saveLibraryCharacters(list);
        this.renderLibraryPage();
        return payload;
      },

      upsertLibraryWorld(item) {
        const list = this.getLibraryWorlds();
        const cacheUrl = this.worldPreviewCache[String(item?.id || item?.title || '')] || '';
        const runtimeImageUrl = String(item?.imageUrl || cacheUrl || '').trim();
        const payload = {
          id: item.id || `libworld_${Date.now()}`,
          title: item.title || 'Untitled World',
          short: item.short || '',
          premise: item.premise || item.short || '',
          scenario: item.scenario || '',
          contextSummary: item.contextSummary || '',
          contextMemo: item.contextMemo || '',
          contextLore: item.contextLore || '',
          contextGlossary: item.contextGlossary || '',
          imageUrl: this.sanitizeImageUrlForStorage(runtimeImageUrl),
          tags: Array.isArray(item.tags) ? item.tags : []
        };
        const idx = list.findIndex(v => (v.id && v.id === payload.id) || (v.title || '').trim().toLowerCase() === (payload.title || '').trim().toLowerCase());
        if (idx >= 0) list[idx] = Object.assign({}, list[idx], payload);
        else list.unshift(payload);
        this.saveLibraryWorlds(list);
        this.renderLibraryPage();
        return payload;
      },

      removeLibraryCharacter(id) {
        this.saveLibraryCharacters(this.getLibraryCharacters().filter(v => v.id !== id));
        this.renderLibraryPage();
        this.setStatus('character removed from library');
      },

      removeLibraryWorld(id) {
        this.saveLibraryWorlds(this.getLibraryWorlds().filter(v => v.id !== id));
        this.renderLibraryPage();
        this.setStatus('world removed from library');
      },

      makeShortDescription(text) {
        const clean = String(text || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
        return clean.length > 150 ? clean.slice(0, 147) + '...' : clean;
      },

      makeHeroDescription(data, fallback='No character description yet.') {
        const rawDescription = String(data?.description || '').trim();
        const parsed = (typeof parseCharacterSheet === 'function') ? parseCharacterSheet(rawDescription) : null;
        const source = String(
          data?.short
          || parsed?.description
          || parsed?.appearance
          || rawDescription
          || ''
        ).replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
        if (!source) return fallback;
        return source.length > 132 ? source.slice(0, 129).trimEnd() + '…' : source;
      },

      worldPreviewStyle(item) {
        const key = String(item?.id || item?.title || 'world');
        const imgUrl = (item && item.imageUrl) || this.worldPreviewCache[key] || '';
        if (imgUrl) {
          return `background-image:url('${String(imgUrl).replace(/'/g, "%27")}');`;
        }
        const base = key;
        let hash = 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < base.length; i++) hash = ((hash << 5) - hash + base.charCodeAt(i)) | 0;
        const palettes = [
          ['#3a5566', '#8ca0b6'],
          ['#3c4b2f', '#9db47a'],
          ['#42304f', '#b490cf'],
          ['#4b3828', '#c79c6a'],
          ['#243a4a', '#6aa5c7'],
          ['#4d2f38', '#d5959f']
        ];
        const pair = palettes[Math.abs(hash) % palettes.length];
        return `background-image:linear-gradient(160deg, ${pair[0]}, ${pair[1]});`;
      },

      worldPreviewPrompt(item) {
        const bits = [
          item?.title || '',
          item?.genre || '',
          item?.premise || item?.short || '',
          item?.scenario || '',
          Array.isArray(item?.tags) ? item.tags.join(', ') : ''
        ].map(v => String(v || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim()).filter(Boolean);
        return `${bits.join(', ')}, cinematic panoramic environment, wide establishing shot, atmospheric worldbuilding concept art, landscape matte painting, no text, no logo, no UI, no portrait framing`;
      },

      async generateWorldPreview(item, opts = {}) {
        const force = !!opts.force;
        const persistLibrary = !!opts.persistLibrary;
        const key = String(item?.id || item?.title || 'world');
        if (!key) return '';
        if (!force && ((item && item.imageUrl) || this.worldPreviewCache[key])) {
          return (item && item.imageUrl) || this.worldPreviewCache[key] || '';
        }
        if (this.worldPreviewPending[key]) return this.worldPreviewPending[key];
        const job = (async () => {
          try {
            if (typeof image !== 'function') return '';
            const result = await image(this.worldPreviewPrompt(item), {
              resolution: '768x512'
            });
            const url = String((result && result.dataUrl) || result || '');
            if (!url) return '';
            this.worldPreviewCache[key] = url;
            this.saveStoredWorldPreviews(this.worldPreviewCache);
            if (persistLibrary) {
              const worlds = this.getLibraryWorlds();
              const idx = worlds.findIndex(v => String(v?.id || v?.title || '') === key);
              if (idx >= 0) {
                worlds[idx] = Object.assign({}, worlds[idx], { imageUrl: url });
                this.saveLibraryWorlds(worlds);
              }
            }
            return url;
          } catch (err) {
            console.error('generateWorldPreview failed:', err);
            return '';
          } finally {
            delete this.worldPreviewPending[key];
            this.renderHallWorlds();
            this.renderLibraryPage();
          }
        })();
        this.worldPreviewPending[key] = job;
        this.renderHallWorlds();
        this.renderLibraryPage();
        return job;
      },

      async ensureHallWorldPreviews() {
        for (const item of this.hallWorldBuildingSamples()) {
          const key = String(item?.id || item?.title || '');
          if (!key) continue;
          if (this.worldPreviewCache[key]) continue;
          await this.generateWorldPreview(item, { force: false, persistLibrary: false });
        }
      },

      async ensureLibraryWorldPreviews() {
        const worlds = this.getLibraryWorlds();
        for (const item of worlds) {
          if (item?.imageUrl) continue;
          await this.generateWorldPreview(item, { force: false, persistLibrary: true });
        }
      },

      worldPreviewLabel(item) {
        return this.worldGenre(item);
      },

      hallWorldBuildingSamples() {
        return [
          {
            id: 'hall_world_aelthirion_lunareth',
            title: 'Chronicles of Aelthirion — Lunareth',
            imageUrl: 'https://user.uploads.dev/file/99227d306fa88d0599133f956facfd52.jpg',
            short: 'A moonlit high-elf kingdom of silver forests, crystalline courts, old diplomacy, and dangerous royal memory.',
            premise: 'High fantasy court world centered on Moonlight High Elves, ceremonial diplomacy, ancient moon-magic, and a long cold rivalry with Solkarra.',
            scenario: 'You arrive in Lunareth when old tensions are tightening again. Envoys move through the Silver Forest under velvet protocol, palace secrets travel faster than official decrees, and everyone smiles as if the past is safely buried. It is not. Every audience, escort, festival, and private conversation may carry political consequence.',
            contextSummary: 'Lunareth rules the Silver Forest through a culture of ceremony, restraint, and memory. Moon Palace, Moonwood Grove, and Silver Canopy form the emotional center of the kingdom. Lunareth is an old rival of Solkarra, formally neutral toward Nytheris, and treats human powers as separate but legitimate.',
            contextMemo: 'This world plays best through elegant pressure rather than chaotic action. Favor soft authority, courtly language, hidden motives, ritual etiquette, and moments where beauty conceals strategy. The mood should feel luminous, ancient, composed, and quietly dangerous.',
            contextLore: 'Aelthirion remembers great ages shaped by Twin Moons, the Great Sundering, the First Age, the Age of Dawn, and the Age of Darkness. Lunareth keeps more of that memory than it admits. Moon-magic is not merely aesthetic here; it is tied to legitimacy, inheritance, archives, and carefully guarded truths about the old fractures of the world.',
            contextGlossary: 'Lunareth = kingdom of Moonlight High Elves. Silver Forest = Lunareth’s living territory of pale woods and moonlit routes. Moon Palace = ceremonial seat of power. Moonwood Grove = sacred grove tied to ritual and memory. Silver Canopy = high noble district woven into the forest crown. Solkarra = rival sun-elf kingdom. Nytheris = shadow-elf kingdom that watches more than it intervenes.',

      scrollHallRail(kind, dir) {
        const el = document.getElementById(kind === 'worlds' ? 'hallWorldScroller' : 'hallQuickCharactersScroller');
        if (!el) return;
        el.scrollBy({ left: dir * 320, behavior: 'smooth' });
      },

      renderHallWorlds() {
        const wrap = document.getElementById('hallWorldGridEl');
        if (!wrap) return;
        wrap.innerHTML = '';
        const sortedWorlds = this.hallWorldBuildingSamples()
          .slice()
          .sort((a, b) => String(a?.title || a?.name || '').localeCompare(String(b?.title || b?.name || ''), undefined, { sensitivity: 'base' }));
        sortedWorlds.forEach(item => {
          const card = document.createElement('div');
          card.className = 'hall-world-card';
          card.style.width = '320px';
          card.style.minWidth = '320px';
          const key = String(item?.id || item?.title || '');
          const isLoading = !!this.worldPreviewPending[key];
          const genre = this.worldGenre(item);
          card.innerHTML = `
            <div class="hall-world-preview ${isLoading ? 'is-loading' : ''}" style="${this.worldPreviewStyle(item)}">
              <button class="world-preview-refresh-btn" type="button" data-regenerate aria-label="Render world image">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="23 4 23 10 17 10"></polyline><polyline points="1 20 1 14 7 14"></polyline><path d="M3.51 9a9 9 0 0 1 14.13-3.36L23 10"></path><path d="M20.49 15a9 9 0 0 1-14.13 3.36L1 14"></path></svg>
              </button>
              <div class="hall-world-genre">${this.escapeHtml(genre)}</div>
            </div>
            <div class="hall-world-meta">
              <div class="hall-world-title">${this.escapeHtml(item.title)}</div>
              <div class="hall-world-desc">${this.escapeHtml(item.short || '')}</div>
            </div>
            <div class="hall-world-actions">
              <button type="button" class="story-btn ghost hall-world-inspect-btn" data-inspect>
                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M1 12s4-7 11-7 11 7 11 7-4 7-11 7S1 12 1 12z"></path><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"></circle></svg>
                <span>Inspector</span>
              </button>
            </div>`;
          const regenBtn = card.querySelector('[data-regenerate]');
          if (regenBtn) regenBtn.onclick = (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            e.stopPropagation();
            this.generateWorldPreview(item, { force: true, persistLibrary: false });
          };
          const inspectBtn = card.querySelector('[data-inspect]');
          if (inspectBtn) inspectBtn.onclick = (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            e.stopPropagation();
            this.openHallWorldModal(item.id);
          };
          wrap.appendChild(card);
        });
      },

      openHallWorldModal(worldId) {
        const item = this.hallWorldBuildingSamples().find(v => v.id === worldId) || this.getLibraryWorlds().find(v => v.id === worldId);
        if (!item) return;
        if (window.openLoopWorldInspectorPage) return window.openLoopWorldInspectorPage(item, { source: 'hall', returnPage: 'story' });
      },

      renderLibraryPage() {
        const charsWrap = document.getElementById('libraryCharacterGridEl');
        const worldsWrap = document.getElementById('libraryWorldGridEl');
        if (charsWrap) {
          const chars = this.getLibraryCharacters();
          if (!chars.length) {
            charsWrap.innerHTML = `<div class="library-empty">No saved characters yet. Save one from Hall or from a Story character modal, then it will appear here for reuse.</div>`;
          } else {
            charsWrap.innerHTML = '';
            chars.forEach(item => {
              const card = document.createElement('div');
              card.className = 'library-card';
              const short = item.short || this.makeShortDescription(item.description || '');
              card.innerHTML = `
                <div style="display:flex; gap:10px; align-items:flex-start;">
                  <div class="hall-quick-avatar" style="width:54px; height:54px; min-width:54px; ${item.avatarUrl ? `background-image:url('${String(item.avatarUrl).replace(/'/g, "%27")}');` : ''}">${item.avatarUrl ? '' : this.avatarInitial(item.name)}</div>
                  <div style="min-width:0;">
                    <div class="library-card-title">${this.escapeHtml(item.name || 'Untitled Character')}</div>
                    <div class="library-card-desc">${this.escapeHtml(short)}</div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div class="library-card-actions">
                  <button class="story-btn" data-primary>use as primary</button>
                  <button class="story-btn" data-scene>use as cast</button>
                  <button class="story-btn ghost" data-remove>remove</button>
                </div>`;
              card.querySelector('[data-primary]').onclick = () => {
                this.state.primary = { id: item.id || `char_${Date.now()}`, name: item.name || 'Primary', avatarUrl: item.avatarUrl || '', description: item.description || '' };
                this.renderAll();
                switchPage('story');
                this.setStatus('library character added as primary');
              };
              card.querySelector('[data-scene]').onclick = () => {
                this.state.inScene.push({ id: `scene_${Date.now()}`, name: item.name || 'In Scene', avatarUrl: item.avatarUrl || '', description: item.description || '' });
                this.renderAll();
                switchPage('story');
                this.setStatus('library character added in scene');
              };
              card.querySelector('[data-remove]').onclick = () => this.removeLibraryCharacter(item.id);
              charsWrap.appendChild(card);
            });
          }
        }
        if (worldsWrap) {
          const worlds = this.getLibraryWorlds();
          if (!worlds.length) {
            worldsWrap.innerHTML = `<div class="library-empty">No saved world cards yet. Save one from Hall to keep reusable scenario seeds here.</div>`;
          } else {
            worldsWrap.innerHTML = '';
            worlds.forEach(item => {
              const card = document.createElement('div');
              card.className = 'library-card';
              const isLoading = !!this.worldPreviewPending[String(item?.id || item?.title || '')];
              card.innerHTML = `
                <div class="library-world-preview ${isLoading ? 'is-loading' : ''}" style="${this.worldPreviewStyle(item)}">
                  <button class="world-preview-refresh-btn" type="button" data-regenerate title="Regenerate landscape">↻</button>
                  <div class="library-world-preview-label">${this.escapeHtml(this.worldPreviewLabel(item))}</div>
                </div>
                <div class="library-card-title">${this.escapeHtml(item.title || 'Untitled World')}</div>
                <div class="library-card-desc">${this.escapeHtml(item.short || item.premise || '')}</div>
                <div class="library-tag-row">${(item.tags || []).map(tag => `<span class="library-tag">${this.escapeHtml(tag)}</span>`).join('')}</div>
                <div class="library-card-actions">
                  <button class="story-btn" data-use>send to story</button>
                  <button class="story-btn ghost" data-append>append to story</button>
                  <button class="story-btn ghost" data-remove>remove</button>
                </div>`;
              card.querySelector('[data-use]').onclick = () => {
                this.els.scenario.value = buildWorldStoryPackage(item);
                if (this.els.inspiration) if (this.els.inspiration) this.els.inspiration.value = item.title || '';
                this.persistSnapshot();
                switchPage('story');
                this.setStatus('library world loaded into story');
              };
              card.querySelector('[data-append]').onclick = () => {
                const current = (this.els.scenario.value || '').trim();
                const worldPackage = buildWorldStoryPackage(item);
                this.els.scenario.value = current ? `${current}

${worldPackage}` : worldPackage;
                this.persistSnapshot();
                switchPage('story');
                this.setStatus('library world appended to scenario');
              };
              card.querySelector('[data-remove]').onclick = () => this.removeLibraryWorld(item.id);
              const regenBtn = card.querySelector('[data-regenerate]');
              if (regenBtn) regenBtn.onclick = (e) => { e.stopPropagation(); this.generateWorldPreview(item, { force: true, persistLibrary: true }); };
              worldsWrap.appendChild(card);
            });
          }
        }
      },

      renderHallQuickCharacters() {
        const wrap = document.getElementById('hallQuickCharactersEl');
        if(!wrap) return;
        wrap.innerHTML = '';
        const sortedCharacters = this.hallQuickCharacters()
          .slice()
          .sort((a, b) => String(a?.name || a?.title || '').localeCompare(String(b?.name || b?.title || ''), undefined, { sensitivity: 'base' }));
        sortedCharacters.forEach(item => {
          const card = document.createElement('div');
          card.className = 'hall-quick-card';
          const thumbText = item.avatarUrl ? '' : this.avatarInitial(item.name);
          card.innerHTML = `
            <div class="hall-quick-inner">
              <div class="hall-quick-avatar" style="${item.avatarUrl ? `background-image:url('${item.avatarUrl.replace(/'/g, "%27")}');` : ''}">${thumbText}</div>
              <div class="hall-quick-summary">
                <div class="hall-quick-title">${this.escapeHtml(item.name)}</div>
                <div class="hall-quick-desc">${this.escapeHtml(item.short || '')}</div>
              </div>
            </div>`;
          card.onclick = () => this.openHallCharacterModal(item.id);
          wrap.appendChild(card);
        });
      },

      openHallCharacterModal(characterId) {
        const item = this.hallQuickCharacters().find(v => v.id === characterId);
        if(!item) return;
        this.closeCharacterModal();
        const overlay = document.createElement('div');
        overlay.className = 'story-modal-overlay';
        const thumbText = item.avatarUrl ? '' : this.avatarInitial(item.name);
        overlay.innerHTML = `
          <div class="story-modal-shell" style="width:min(680px, 96vw);">
            <div class="story-modal-head">
              <div>
                <div class="story-modal-kicker">Persona Character</div>
                <div class="story-modal-title">${this.escapeHtml(item.name)}</div>
              </div>
              <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;">
                <span class="story-modal-chip">Hall Sample</span>
                <button type="button" class="story-modal-close" data-close>×</button>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="story-modal-grid" style="grid-template-columns: 148px minmax(0,1fr);">
              <div class="story-modal-preview">
                <div class="story-modal-avatar" style="${item.avatarUrl ? `background-image:url('${item.avatarUrl.replace(/'/g, "%27")}');` : ''}"><span class="story-modal-avatar-name">${this.escapeHtml(item.name)}</span>${thumbText && !item.avatarUrl ? `<span style="position:absolute; inset:0; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:34px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text-secondary);">${thumbText}</span>` : ''}</div>
              </div>
              <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px; min-width:0;">
                <div class="story-modal-note">${this.escapeHtml(item.short || '')}</div>
                <div class="story-field">
                  <label>Description</label>
                  <textarea readonly style="min-height:280px;">${this.escapeHtml(item.description || '')}</textarea>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="story-modal-actions">
              <button type="button" class="story-modal-btn ghost" data-close>Cancel</button>
              <button type="button" class="story-modal-btn ghost" data-save-library>Save to Library</button>
              <button type="button" class="story-modal-btn" data-add-primary>Add as Primary</button>
              <button type="button" class="story-modal-btn primary" data-add-scene>Add In Scene</button>
            </div>
          </div>`;
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        this.currentModalEl = overlay;
        overlay.querySelectorAll('[data-close]').forEach(btn => btn.onclick = () => this.closeCharacterModal());
        overlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if(e.target === overlay) this.closeCharacterModal(); });
        overlay.querySelector('[data-save-library]').onclick = () => {
          this.upsertLibraryCharacter(item);
          this.closeCharacterModal();
          this.setStatus('hall character saved to library');
        };
        overlay.querySelector('[data-add-primary]').onclick = () => {
          this.state.primary = {id:item.id, name:item.name, avatarUrl:item.avatarUrl || '', description:item.description || ''};
          this.renderAll();
          this.closeCharacterModal();
          switchPage('story');
          this.setStatus('hall character added as primary');
        };
        overlay.querySelector('[data-add-scene]').onclick = () => {
          const payload = {id:`scene_${Date.now()}`, name:item.name, avatarUrl:item.avatarUrl || '', description:item.description || ''};
          this.state.inScene.push(payload);
          this.renderAll();
          this.closeCharacterModal();
          switchPage('story');
          this.setStatus('hall character added in scene');
        };
      },

      closeCharacterModal() {
        if(this.currentModalEl) this.currentModalEl.remove();
        this.currentModalEl = null;
      },

      openCharacterModal(kind, sceneId=null) {
        this.closeCharacterModal();
        let target;
        if(kind === 'primary') target = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.state.primary));
        else if(kind === 'user') target = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.state.user));
        else {
          target = sceneId ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.state.inScene.find(v => v.id === sceneId) || {id:sceneId, name:'', avatarUrl:'', description:''})) : {id:`scene_${Date.now()}`, name:'', avatarUrl:'', description:''};
        }

        const isUserModal = kind === 'user';

        if (isUserModal) {
          const parsedSheet = (typeof parseCharacterSheet === 'function') ? parseCharacterSheet(target.description || '') : { appearance: '', description: '' };
          const seedName = (target.name || 'Create User Character').trim() || 'Create User Character';
          const seedAppearance = (target.appearance || parsedSheet.appearance || '').trim();
          const seedDescription = (target.characterDescription || parsedSheet.description || target.description || '').trim();
          const overlay = document.createElement('div');
          overlay.className = 'hall-world-modal-overlay';
          overlay.innerHTML = `
            <div class="hall-world-modal-shell" style="width:min(var(--loop-modal-l), calc(100vw - 32px));">
              <div class="hall-world-modal-head">
                <div class="hall-world-modal-brand">
                  <div class="hall-world-modal-logo" aria-hidden="true">
                    <svg viewBox="0 0 48 48" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                      <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="17" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"/>
                      <defs>
                        <mask id="userCharacterBuilderCutPatched">
                          <rect width="48" height="48" fill="white"/>
                          <circle cx="20" cy="16" r="6" fill="black"/>
                        </mask>
                      </defs>
                      <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="10" fill="currentColor" mask="url(#userCharacterBuilderCutPatched)"/>
                    </svg>
                  </div>
                  <div class="hall-world-modal-main">
                    <div class="hall-world-modal-kicker">User Character Builder</div>
                    <div class="hall-world-modal-title">${this.escapeHtml(seedName)}</div>
                    <div class="hall-world-modal-subtitle">Use the same mature LOOP structure as the shared Create Character builder, but apply it directly to the user-side persona for Story and the lower sidebar.</div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <button type="button" class="hall-world-modal-close" data-close aria-label="Close">×</button>
              </div>
              <div class="hall-world-modal-body">
                <div class="forge-character-builder-layout">
                  <div class="forge-character-builder-preview">
                    <div id="userCharacterBuilderAvatarPreview" class="forge-character-builder-avatar">
                      <div id="userCharacterBuilderRenderHost" class="forge-builder-render-host"></div>
                      <span id="userCharacterBuilderAvatarName" class="forge-character-builder-avatar-name">${this.escapeHtml(seedName)}</span>
                      <span id="userCharacterBuilderAvatarFallback" class="forge-character-builder-avatar-fallback">${this.avatarInitial(seedName)}</span>
                    </div>

                    <div class="forge-builder-modal-field">
                      <label for="userCharacterBuilderAvatar">Avatar URL</label>
                      <input id="userCharacterBuilderAvatar" type="text" placeholder="https://...">
                    </div>

                    <div class="forge-builder-modal-source-row">
                      <label class="story-btn ghost">Upload Avatar<input id="userCharacterBuilderAvatarUpload" type="file" accept="image/*" class="story-hidden-file"></label>
                      <button type="button" class="story-btn ghost" data-render-avatar>Render Avatar</button>
                      <button type="button" class="story-btn ghost" data-clear-avatar>Clear</button>
                    </div>

                    <div class="forge-character-builder-note">Render now stays inside this modal preview using the same Perchance runtime pattern as Story, while preserving the hover actions for sharing.</div>
                  </div>

                  <div class="forge-character-builder-form">
                    <div class="forge-character-builder-grid">
                      <div class="forge-builder-modal-field is-full">
                        <label for="userCharacterBuilderName">Name</label>
                        <input id="userCharacterBuilderName" type="text" placeholder="User character name">
                      </div>

                      <div class="forge-builder-modal-field is-full">
                        <div class="forge-builder-modal-label-row">
                          <label for="userCharacterBuilderAssist">Loop Assist</label>
                          <span class="loop-assist-inline-status" aria-hidden="true">Working</span><button type="button" class="story-btn" data-loop-assist>Loop Assist</button>
                        </div>
                        <textarea id="userCharacterBuilderAssist" placeholder="Need help? Use Loop Assist to generate a roleplay-ready user character from a few keywords — or write your own manually below."></textarea>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="forge-character-builder-grid">
                      <div class="forge-builder-modal-field is-full">
                        <label for="userCharacterBuilderAppearance">Character Appearance</label>
                        <textarea id="userCharacterBuilderAppearance" style="min-height:140px;" placeholder="Describe your user character's visual appearance here..."></textarea>
                      </div>

                      <div class="forge-builder-modal-field is-full">
                        <label for="userCharacterBuilderDescription">Character Description</label>
                        <textarea id="userCharacterBuilderDescription" style="min-height:220px;" placeholder="Write or paste the LOOP structure here:
Personality:
...
Background Lore:
...
Roleplay Behavior Examples:
1. ...
2. ...
3. ...
4. ...
5. ..."></textarea>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    <div id="userCharacterBuilderStatus" class="forge-character-builder-status"></div>
                  </div>
                </div>

              </div>
              <div class="hall-world-modal-footer">
                <div class="hall-world-modal-actions">
                  <button type="button" class="story-btn ghost" data-close>Cancel</button>
                  <button type="button" class="story-btn primary" data-save>User Character Save</button>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>`;
          document.body.appendChild(overlay);
          this.currentModalEl = overlay;

          const close = () => this.closeCharacterModal();
          overlay.querySelectorAll('[data-close]').forEach(btn => btn.onclick = close);
          overlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === overlay) close(); });

          const nameInput = overlay.querySelector('#userCharacterBuilderName');
          const avatarInput = overlay.querySelector('#userCharacterBuilderAvatar');
          const avatarUploadInput = overlay.querySelector('#userCharacterBuilderAvatarUpload');
          const appearanceInput = overlay.querySelector('#userCharacterBuilderAppearance');
          const descriptionInput = overlay.querySelector('#userCharacterBuilderDescription');
          const assistInput = overlay.querySelector('#userCharacterBuilderAssist');
          const preview = overlay.querySelector('#userCharacterBuilderAvatarPreview');
          const previewNameEl = overlay.querySelector('#userCharacterBuilderAvatarName');
          const fallbackEl = overlay.querySelector('#userCharacterBuilderAvatarFallback');
          const statusEl = overlay.querySelector('#userCharacterBuilderStatus');

          const setBuilderStatus = (message='', isError=false) => {
            if (!statusEl) return;
            statusEl.textContent = message;
            statusEl.style.color = isError ? 'var(--accent)' : 'var(--text-secondary)';
          };

          const updatePreview = () => {
            const safeName = (nameInput?.value || '').trim() || 'User Character';
            const avatarUrl = (avatarInput?.value || '').trim();
            if (previewNameEl) previewNameEl.textContent = safeName;
            if (preview) preview.style.backgroundImage = avatarUrl ? `url('${String(avatarUrl).replace(/'/g, "%27")}')` : '';
            if (fallbackEl) {
              fallbackEl.textContent = this.avatarInitial(safeName);
              fallbackEl.style.display = avatarUrl ? 'none' : 'flex';
            }
          };

          nameInput.value = target.name || '';
          avatarInput.value = target.avatarUrl || '';
          appearanceInput.value = seedAppearance;
          descriptionInput.value = seedDescription;
          assistInput.value = '';
          updatePreview();

          [nameInput, avatarInput, appearanceInput, descriptionInput].forEach(el => {
            el?.addEventListener('input', updatePreview);
          });

          avatarUploadInput?.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
            const file = e.target.files?.[0];
            if (!file) return;
            const reader = new FileReader();
            reader.onload = () => {
              avatarInput.value = String(reader.result || '');
              updatePreview();
              setBuilderStatus('avatar uploaded');
            };
            reader.readAsDataURL(file);
          });

          const userRenderBtn = overlay.querySelector('[data-render-avatar]');
          const userClearBtn = overlay.querySelector('[data-clear-avatar]');
          const userRenderHost = overlay.querySelector('#userCharacterBuilderRenderHost');
          const syncDraft = () => {};

          const userHasRuntimeNode = () => !!(userRenderHost && userRenderHost.firstElementChild);
          const enhancedUpdatePreview = () => {
            updatePreview();
            if (fallbackEl) {
              const hasImage = userHasRuntimeNode() || !!String(avatarInput?.value || '').trim();
              fallbackEl.style.display = hasImage ? 'none' : 'flex';
            }
            if (preview) {
              const avatarUrl = String(avatarInput?.value || '').trim();
              preview.style.backgroundImage = !userHasRuntimeNode() && avatarUrl ? `url('${avatarUrl.replace(/'/g, "%27")}')` : '';
            }
          };

          window.LoopBuilders?.attachInlineAvatarRender?.call(window.LoopBuilders, {
            overlay,
            avatarInput,
            appearanceInput,
            descriptionInput,
            nameInput,
            renderHost: userRenderHost,
            renderBtn: userRenderBtn,
            clearBtn: userClearBtn,
            syncDraft,
            updatePreview: enhancedUpdatePreview,
            setBuilderStatus
          });

          const assistBtn = overlay.querySelector('[data-loop-assist]');
          assistBtn?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
            const keywords = (assistInput?.value || '').trim();
            const currentName = (nameInput?.value || '').trim();
            if (!keywords && !currentName) {
              setBuilderStatus('add keywords or a name for Loop Assist', true);
              return;
            }
            if (typeof ai !== 'function') {
              setBuilderStatus('Loop Assist is not available right now', true);
              return;
            }
            window.setLoopAssistBusy?.(assistBtn, true);
            setBuilderStatus('');
            try {
              const instruction = [
                `Write a roleplay-ready user character sheet using the following inspiration: ${keywords || '(None provided. Just be creative!)'}`,
                '',
                'This is for LOOP. The output must feel like a strong, immediately usable user-side persona, not a brief or generic summary.',
                'Never write a short shallow profile.',
                '',
                'Use at least this exact minimum structure and do not omit any section:',
                '',
                'Name: (character name)',
                '',
                'Character Appearance:',
                '(one dense, concrete paragraph with visual specificity, silhouette, body language, clothing, textures, distinctive traits, and memorable details)',
                '',
                'Character Description:',
                'Personality:',
                '(one dense paragraph with temperament, instincts, social rhythm, habits, emotional logic, contradictions, preferences, and interpersonal energy)',
                '',
                'Background Lore:',
                '(one dense paragraph with history, motives, tensions, current position, relationships, secrets, fears, conflicts, or driving circumstances)',
                '',
                'Roleplay Behavior Examples:',
                '1. (a strong in-character roleplay example with dialogue and/or action)',
                '2. (a strong in-character roleplay example with dialogue and/or action)',
                '3. (a strong in-character roleplay example with dialogue and/or action)',
                '4. (a strong in-character roleplay example with dialogue and/or action)',
                '5. (a strong in-character roleplay example with dialogue and/or action)',
                '',
                'Requirements:',
                '- Character Appearance must stay visual only.',
                '- Character Description must contain Personality, Background Lore, and Roleplay Behavior Examples inside the same field.',
                '- Avoid generic phrasing and shallow summaries.',
                '- Make the character memorable and immediately playable as the user-side persona in LOOP.'
              ].join('\n');

              const result = await ai({
                instruction,
                startWith: currentName ? `Name: ${literal(currentName)}\n\nCharacter Appearance:` : 'Name:'
              });
              const raw = String(result?.text || '').trim();
              if (!raw) throw new Error('empty response');
              applyCharacterAssistResult({
                raw,
                currentName,
                nameInput,
                appearanceInput,
                descriptionInput,
                updatePreview
              });
              setBuilderStatus('Loop Assist filled the user character fields');
            } catch (e) {
              console.error(e);
              setBuilderStatus('Loop Assist failed', true);
            } finally {
              window.setLoopAssistBusy?.(assistBtn, false);
            }
          });

          overlay.querySelector('[data-save]').onclick = () => {
            const name = (nameInput?.value || '').trim();
            const appearance = (appearanceInput?.value || '').trim();
            const characterDescription = (descriptionInput?.value || '').trim();
            const avatarUrl = (avatarInput?.value || '').trim();
            if (!name) {
              setBuilderStatus('user character name is required', true);
              return;
            }
            const description = (typeof buildCharacterSheet === 'function')
              ? buildCharacterSheet(name, appearance, characterDescription)
              : `Name: ${name}\n\nCharacter Appearance:\n${appearance}\n\nCharacter Description:\n${characterDescription}`;
            const payload = {
              id: target.id || `user_${Date.now()}`,
              name,
              short: this.makeShortDescription(characterDescription || appearance || name),
              appearance,
              characterDescription,
              description,
              avatarUrl
            };
            this.state.user = payload;
            this.renderAll();
            if (typeof window.syncLoopUserCharacterSidebar === 'function') window.syncLoopUserCharacterSidebar();
            close();
            this.setStatus('user character updated');
          };
          return;
        }

        if (kind === 'primary') {
          const parsedSheet = (typeof parseCharacterSheet === 'function') ? parseCharacterSheet(target.description || '') : { appearance: '', description: '' };
          const seedName = (target.name || 'Primary Character').trim() || 'Primary Character';
          const seedAppearance = (target.appearance || parsedSheet.appearance || '').trim();
          const seedDescription = (target.characterDescription || parsedSheet.description || target.description || '').trim();

                  </div>

                  <button type="button" class="story-btn primary" data-save>Save Primary</button>

          document.body.appendChild(overlay);
          this.currentModalEl = overlay;

          const close = () => this.closeCharacterModal();
          overlay.querySelectorAll('[data-close]').forEach(btn => btn.onclick = close);
          overlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === overlay) close(); });

          const nameInput = overlay.querySelector('#primaryCharacterBuilderName');
          const avatarInput = overlay.querySelector('#primaryCharacterBuilderAvatar');
          const avatarUploadInput = overlay.querySelector('#primaryCharacterBuilderAvatarUpload');
          const appearanceInput = overlay.querySelector('#primaryCharacterBuilderAppearance');
          const descriptionInput = overlay.querySelector('#primaryCharacterBuilderDescription');
          const assistInput = overlay.querySelector('#primaryCharacterBuilderAssist');
          const preview = overlay.querySelector('#primaryCharacterBuilderAvatarPreview');
          const previewNameEl = overlay.querySelector('#primaryCharacterBuilderAvatarName');
          const fallbackEl = overlay.querySelector('#primaryCharacterBuilderAvatarFallback');
          const statusEl = overlay.querySelector('#primaryCharacterBuilderStatus');

          const setBuilderStatus = (message='', isError=false) => {
            if (!statusEl) return;
            statusEl.textContent = message;
            statusEl.style.color = isError ? 'var(--accent)' : 'var(--text-secondary)';
          };

          const updatePreview = () => {
            const safeName = (nameInput?.value || '').trim() || 'Primary Character';
            const avatarUrl = (avatarInput?.value || '').trim();
            if (previewNameEl) previewNameEl.textContent = safeName;
            if (preview) preview.style.backgroundImage = avatarUrl ? `url('${String(avatarUrl).replace(/'/g, "%27")}')` : '';
            if (fallbackEl) {
              fallbackEl.textContent = this.avatarInitial(safeName);
              fallbackEl.style.display = avatarUrl ? 'none' : 'flex';
            }
          };

          const buildPrimaryPayload = () => {
            const name = (nameInput?.value || '').trim() || 'Primary Character';
            const appearance = (appearanceInput?.value || '').trim();
            const characterDescription = (descriptionInput?.value || '').trim();
            const avatarUrl = (avatarInput?.value || '').trim();
            const description = (typeof buildCharacterSheet === 'function')
              ? buildCharacterSheet(name, appearance, characterDescription)
              : `Name: ${name}\n\nCharacter Appearance:\n${appearance || '(Not specified.)'}\n\nCharacter Description:\n${characterDescription || '(Not specified.)'}`;
            return {
              id: target.id || 'primary_character',
              name,
              short: this.makeShortDescription(characterDescription || appearance || name),
              appearance,
              characterDescription,
              description,
              avatarUrl
            };
          };

          nameInput.value = target.name || '';
          avatarInput.value = target.avatarUrl || '';
          appearanceInput.value = seedAppearance;
          descriptionInput.value = seedDescription;
          assistInput.value = '';
          updatePreview();

          [nameInput, avatarInput, appearanceInput, descriptionInput].forEach(el => {
            el?.addEventListener('input', updatePreview);
          });

          avatarUploadInput?.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
            const file = e.target.files?.[0];
            if (!file) return;
            const reader = new FileReader();
            reader.onload = () => {
              avatarInput.value = String(reader.result || '');
              updatePreview();
              setBuilderStatus('avatar uploaded');
            };
            reader.readAsDataURL(file);
          });

          const primaryRenderBtn = overlay.querySelector('[data-render-avatar]');
          const primaryClearBtn = overlay.querySelector('[data-clear-avatar]');

            renderBtn: primaryRenderBtn,
            clearBtn: primaryClearBtn,
            syncDraft,
            updatePreview: enhancedUpdatePreview,
            setBuilderStatus
          });

            const keywords = (assistInput?.value || '').trim();
            const currentName = (nameInput?.value || '').trim();
            if (!keywords && !currentName) {
              setBuilderStatus('add keywords or a name for Loop Assist', true);
              return;

            try {

                `Write a roleplay-ready primary character sheet using the following inspiration: ${keywords || '(None provided. Just be creative!)'}`,
                '',
                'This is for LOOP. The output must feel like a strong, immediately usable primary persona, not a brief or generic summary.',
                'Never write a short shallow profile.',
                '',
                'Use at least this exact minimum structure and do not omit any section:',
                '',

                '',
                'Character Appearance:',
                '(one dense, concrete paragraph with visual specificity, silhouette, body language, clothing, textures, distinctive traits, and memorable details)',
                '',
                'Character Description:',
                'Personality:',
                '(one dense paragraph with temperament, instincts, social rhythm, habits, emotional logic, contradictions, preferences, and interpersonal energy)',
                '',
                'Background Lore:',
                '(one dense paragraph with history, motives, tensions, current position, relationships, secrets, fears, conflicts, or driving circumstances)',
                '',

                '4. (a strong in-character roleplay example with dialogue and/or action)',
                '5. (a strong in-character roleplay example with dialogue and/or action)',

              });
              const raw = String(result?.text || '').trim();
              if (!raw) throw new Error('empty response');
              applyCharacterAssistResult({
                raw,
                currentName,
                nameInput,
                appearanceInput,
                descriptionInput,
                updatePreview
              });
              setBuilderStatus('primary character ready');

              window.setLoopAssistBusy?.(assistBtn, false);
            }
          });

          overlay.querySelector('[data-save-library]')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const payload = buildPrimaryPayload();
            this.upsertLibraryCharacter(payload);
            setBuilderStatus('primary character saved to library');
            this.setStatus('primary character saved to library');
          });

          overlay.querySelector('[data-save]')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const payload = buildPrimaryPayload();
            this.state.primary = payload;
            this.renderAll();
            close();

          });
