                    <div id="sceneCharacterBuilderRenderHost" class="forge-builder-render-host"></div>
                    <span id="sceneCharacterBuilderAvatarName" class="forge-character-builder-avatar-name">${this.escapeHtml(seedName)}</span>
                    <span id="sceneCharacterBuilderAvatarFallback" class="forge-character-builder-avatar-fallback">${this.avatarInitial(seedName)}</span>
                  </div>

                  <div class="forge-builder-modal-field">
                    <label for="sceneCharacterBuilderAvatar">Avatar URL</label>
                    <input id="sceneCharacterBuilderAvatar" type="text" placeholder="https://...">
                  </div>

                  <div class="forge-builder-modal-source-row">
                    <label class="story-btn ghost">Upload Avatar<input id="sceneCharacterBuilderAvatarUpload" type="file" accept="image/*" class="story-hidden-file"></label>
                    <button type="button" class="story-btn ghost" data-render-avatar>Render Avatar</button>
                    <button type="button" class="story-btn ghost" data-clear-avatar>Clear</button>
                  </div>

                  <div class="forge-character-builder-note">Render now stays inside this modal preview using the same Perchance runtime pattern as Story, while preserving the hover actions for sharing.</div>
                </div>

                <div class="forge-character-builder-form">
                  <div class="forge-character-builder-grid">
                    <div class="forge-builder-modal-field is-full">
                      <label for="sceneCharacterBuilderName">Name</label>
                      <input id="sceneCharacterBuilderName" type="text" placeholder="Character name">
                    </div>

                    <div class="forge-builder-modal-field is-full">
                      <div class="forge-builder-modal-label-row">
                        <label for="sceneCharacterBuilderAssist">Loop Assist</label>
                        <span class="loop-assist-inline-status" aria-hidden="true">Working</span><button type="button" class="story-btn" data-loop-assist>Loop Assist</button>
                      </div>
                      <textarea id="sceneCharacterBuilderAssist" placeholder="Need help? Use Loop Assist to generate a roleplay-ready in-scene character from a few keywords — or write your own manually below."></textarea>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div class="forge-character-builder-grid">
                    <div class="forge-builder-modal-field is-full">
                      <label for="sceneCharacterBuilderAppearance">Character Appearance</label>
                      <textarea id="sceneCharacterBuilderAppearance" style="min-height:140px;" placeholder="Describe your character's visual appearance here..."></textarea>
                    </div>

                    <div class="forge-builder-modal-field is-full">
                      <label for="sceneCharacterBuilderDescription">Character Description</label>
                      <textarea id="sceneCharacterBuilderDescription" style="min-height:220px;" placeholder="Write or paste the LOOP structure here:
Personality:
...
Background Lore:
...
Roleplay Behavior Examples:
1. ...
2. ...
3. ...
4. ...
5. ..."></textarea>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div id="sceneCharacterBuilderStatus" class="forge-character-builder-status"></div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="hall-world-modal-footer">
              <div class="hall-world-modal-actions">
                <button type="button" class="story-btn ghost" data-close>Cancel</button>
                ${hasExistingScene ? '<button type="button" class="story-btn ghost" data-remove-scene>Remove</button>' : ''}
                <button type="button" class="story-btn ghost" data-save-library>Save to Library</button>
                <button type="button" class="story-btn primary" data-save>Save Character</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>`;
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        this.currentModalEl = overlay;

        const close = () => this.closeCharacterModal();
        overlay.querySelectorAll('[data-close]').forEach(btn => btn.onclick = close);
        overlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === overlay) close(); });

        const nameInput = overlay.querySelector('#sceneCharacterBuilderName');
        const avatarInput = overlay.querySelector('#sceneCharacterBuilderAvatar');
        const avatarUploadInput = overlay.querySelector('#sceneCharacterBuilderAvatarUpload');
        const appearanceInput = overlay.querySelector('#sceneCharacterBuilderAppearance');
        const descriptionInput = overlay.querySelector('#sceneCharacterBuilderDescription');
        const assistInput = overlay.querySelector('#sceneCharacterBuilderAssist');
        const preview = overlay.querySelector('#sceneCharacterBuilderAvatarPreview');
        const previewNameEl = overlay.querySelector('#sceneCharacterBuilderAvatarName');
        const fallbackEl = overlay.querySelector('#sceneCharacterBuilderAvatarFallback');
        const statusEl = overlay.querySelector('#sceneCharacterBuilderStatus');

        const setBuilderStatus = (message='', isError=false) => {
          if (!statusEl) return;
          statusEl.textContent = message;
          statusEl.style.color = isError ? 'var(--accent)' : 'var(--text-secondary)';
        };

        const updatePreview = () => {
          const safeName = (nameInput?.value || '').trim() || 'In Scene Character';
          const avatarUrl = (avatarInput?.value || '').trim();
          if (previewNameEl) previewNameEl.textContent = safeName;
          if (preview) preview.style.backgroundImage = avatarUrl ? `url('${String(avatarUrl).replace(/'/g, "%27")}')` : '';
          if (fallbackEl) {
            fallbackEl.textContent = this.avatarInitial(safeName);
            fallbackEl.style.display = avatarUrl ? 'none' : 'flex';
          }
        };

        const buildScenePayload = () => {
          const name = (nameInput?.value || '').trim() || 'In Scene Character';
          const appearance = (appearanceInput?.value || '').trim();
          const characterDescription = (descriptionInput?.value || '').trim();
          const avatarUrl = (avatarInput?.value || '').trim();
          const description = (typeof buildCharacterSheet === 'function')
            ? buildCharacterSheet(name, appearance, characterDescription)
            : `Name: ${name}\n\nCharacter Appearance:\n${appearance || '(Not specified.)'}\n\nCharacter Description:\n${characterDescription || '(Not specified.)'}`;
          return {
            id: target.id || `scene_${Date.now()}`,
            name,
            short: this.makeShortDescription(characterDescription || appearance || name),
            appearance,
            characterDescription,
            description,
            avatarUrl
          };
        };

        nameInput.value = target.name || '';
        avatarInput.value = target.avatarUrl || '';
        appearanceInput.value = seedAppearance;
        descriptionInput.value = seedDescription;
        assistInput.value = '';
        updatePreview();

        [nameInput, avatarInput, appearanceInput, descriptionInput].forEach(el => {
          el?.addEventListener('input', updatePreview);
        });

        avatarUploadInput?.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
          const file = e.target.files?.[0];
          if (!file) return;
          const reader = new FileReader();
          reader.onload = () => {
            avatarInput.value = String(reader.result || '');
            updatePreview();
            setBuilderStatus('avatar uploaded');
          };
          reader.readAsDataURL(file);
        });

        const sceneRenderBtn = overlay.querySelector('[data-render-avatar]');
        const sceneClearBtn = overlay.querySelector('[data-clear-avatar]');
        const sceneRenderHost = overlay.querySelector('#sceneCharacterBuilderRenderHost');
        const syncDraft = () => {};

        const sceneHasRuntimeNode = () => !!(sceneRenderHost && sceneRenderHost.firstElementChild);
        const enhancedUpdatePreview = () => {
          updatePreview();
          if (fallbackEl) {
            const hasImage = sceneHasRuntimeNode() || !!String(avatarInput?.value || '').trim();
            fallbackEl.style.display = hasImage ? 'none' : 'flex';
          }
          if (preview) {
            const avatarUrl = String(avatarInput?.value || '').trim();
            preview.style.backgroundImage = !sceneHasRuntimeNode() && avatarUrl ? `url('${avatarUrl.replace(/'/g, "%27")}')` : '';
          }
        };

        window.LoopBuilders?.attachInlineAvatarRender?.call(window.LoopBuilders, {
          overlay,
          avatarInput,
          appearanceInput,
          descriptionInput,
          nameInput,
          renderHost: sceneRenderHost,
          renderBtn: sceneRenderBtn,
          clearBtn: sceneClearBtn,
          syncDraft,
          updatePreview: enhancedUpdatePreview,
          setBuilderStatus
        });

        const assistBtn = overlay.querySelector('[data-loop-assist]');
        assistBtn?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
          const keywords = (assistInput?.value || '').trim();
          const currentName = (nameInput?.value || '').trim();
          if (!keywords && !currentName) {
            setBuilderStatus('add keywords or a name for Loop Assist', true);
            return;
          }
          if (typeof ai !== 'function') {
            setBuilderStatus('Loop Assist is not available right now', true);
            return;
          }
          window.setLoopAssistBusy?.(assistBtn, true);
          setBuilderStatus('');
          try {
            const instruction = [
              `Write a roleplay-ready in-scene character sheet using the following inspiration: ${keywords || '(None provided. Just be creative!)'}`,
              '',
              'This is for LOOP. The output must feel like a strong, immediately usable in-scene persona, not a brief or generic summary.',
              'Never write a short shallow profile.',
              '',
              'Use at least this exact minimum structure and do not omit any section:',
              '',
              'Name: (character name)',
              '',
              'Character Appearance:',
              '(one dense, concrete paragraph with visual specificity, silhouette, body language, clothing, textures, distinctive traits, and memorable details)',
              '',
              'Character Description:',
              'Personality:',
              '(one dense paragraph with temperament, instincts, social rhythm, habits, emotional logic, contradictions, preferences, and interpersonal energy)',
              '',
              'Background Lore:',
              '(one dense paragraph with history, motives, tensions, current position, relationships, secrets, fears, conflicts, or driving circumstances)',
              '',
              'Roleplay Behavior Examples:',
              '1. (a strong in-character roleplay example with dialogue and/or action)',
              '2. (a strong in-character roleplay example with dialogue and/or action)',
              '3. (a strong in-character roleplay example with dialogue and/or action)',
              '4. (a strong in-character roleplay example with dialogue and/or action)',
              '5. (a strong in-character roleplay example with dialogue and/or action)',
              '',
              'Requirements:',
              '- Character Appearance must stay visual only.',
              '- Character Description must contain Personality, Background Lore, and Roleplay Behavior Examples inside the same field.',
              '- Avoid generic phrasing and shallow summaries.',
              '- Make the character memorable and immediately playable as an in-scene persona in LOOP.'
            ].join('\n');

            const result = await ai({
              instruction,
              startWith: currentName ? `Name: ${literal(currentName)}\n\nCharacter Appearance:` : 'Name:'
            });
            const raw = String(result?.text || '').trim();
            if (!raw) throw new Error('empty response');
            applyCharacterAssistResult({
              raw,
              currentName,
              nameInput,
              appearanceInput,
              descriptionInput,
              updatePreview
            });
            setBuilderStatus('character ready');
          } catch (e) {
            console.error(e);
            setBuilderStatus('Loop Assist failed for this character', true);
          } finally {
            window.setLoopAssistBusy?.(assistBtn, false);
          }
        });

        overlay.querySelector('[data-save-library]')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
          const payload = buildScenePayload();
          this.upsertLibraryCharacter(payload);
          setBuilderStatus('character saved to library');
          this.setStatus('character saved to library');
        });

        const removeBtn = overlay.querySelector('[data-remove-scene]');
        if (removeBtn) removeBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
          this.state.inScene = this.state.inScene.filter(v => v.id !== target.id);
          this.renderAll();
          close();
          this.setStatus('in-scene character removed');
        });

        overlay.querySelector('[data-save]')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
          const payload = buildScenePayload();
          const idx = this.state.inScene.findIndex(v => v.id === payload.id);
          if (idx >= 0) this.state.inScene[idx] = payload;
          else this.state.inScene.push(payload);
          this.renderAll();
          close();
          this.setStatus('character updated');
        });
      },

      async generateCharacterDescriptionIntoModal({nameEl, descEl, inspirationEl}) {
        const inspiration = (inspirationEl.value || '').trim() || prompt('Keywords / direction for this character?', '') || '';
        if(inspiration === null) return;
        const currentName = (nameEl.value || '').trim();
        descEl.value = '';
        this.setStatus('generating character description...');
        try {
          const response = await ai({
            instruction: `Write a roleplay-ready character sheet using the following inspiration: ${inspiration || '(None provided. Just be creative!)'}

This is for a roleplay chat system. The output must feel like a strong, immediately usable persona, not a brief or generic summary. Never write a short shallow profile.

Use at least this exact minimum structure and do not omit any section:

Name: (character name)

Species & Gender: (species and gender, or the most fitting equivalent for the character)

Visual Appearance:
(one dense, concrete paragraph with visual specificity, silhouette, body language, clothing, textures, distinctive traits, and memorable details)

Personality:
(one dense paragraph with temperament, instincts, social rhythm, habits, emotional logic, contradictions, preferences, and interpersonal energy)

Background Lore:
(one dense paragraph with history, motives, tensions, current position, relationships, secrets, fears, conflicts, or driving circumstances)

Roleplay Behavior Examples:
1. (a strong in-character roleplay example with dialogue and/or action)
2. (a strong in-character roleplay example with dialogue and/or action)
3. (a strong in-character roleplay example with dialogue and/or action)
4. (a strong in-character roleplay example with dialogue and/or action)
5. (a strong in-character roleplay example with dialogue and/or action)

Requirements:
- The writing must be rich, specific, and roleplay-ready.
- Avoid shallow summaries, generic phrasing, and tiny descriptions.
- The examples must feel like real excerpts from a roleplay scene, not abstract notes.
- Keep the structure clear and readable.
- Make the character memorable and playable immediately.`,
            startWith: currentName ? `Name: ${literal(currentName)}\n\nSpecies & Gender:` : 'Name:',
            stopSequences: ['\n\nFavorite Food:', '\n\nSource:']
          });
          const text = (response?.text || '').trim();
          if(text) {
            descEl.value = text.startsWith('Name:') ? text : `Name: ${currentName || 'Character'}\n\n${text}`;
            const parsedName = descEl.value.match(/Name:\s*(.+)/i)?.[1]?.trim();
            if(parsedName && !currentName) nameEl.value = parsedName;
            this.setStatus('character description ready');
          }
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(e);
          this.setStatus('character generation failed', {error:true});
        }
      },

      escapeHtml(text) {
        return String(text || '')
          .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
          .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
          .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
          .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
          .replace(/'/g, '&#039;');
      },

      getTranscriptText() {
        return (this.transcriptEl?.value || '').trim();
      },

      getSpeakerMap() {
        const map = new Map();
        map.set(this.state.primary.name, 'primary');
        map.set(this.state.user.name, 'user');
        (this.state.inScene || []).forEach(item => map.set(item.name, item.id));
        return map;
      },

      getLastMessage() {
        const messages = (this.state.messages || []).filter(m => String(m?.content || '').trim());
        const lastMessage = messages[messages.length - 1];
        if (!lastMessage) return { name: '', content: '' };
        return {
          name: String(lastMessage.speakerName || 'Narrator').trim() || 'Narrator',
          content: String(lastMessage.content || '').trim()
        };
      },

      lastMessageIsEmpty() {
        return this.getLastMessage().content === '';
      },

      getNextTurnName() {
        if (this.state.nextSpeaker) {
          return this.resolveSpeakerName(this.state.nextSpeaker);
        }
        const roster = this.buildParticipantRoster();
        const messages = (this.state.messages || []).filter(m => String(m?.content || '').trim());
        if (!messages.length) return this.state.primary.name || 'Primary';
        const lastMessage = messages[messages.length - 1];
        const lastName = String(lastMessage.speakerName || '').trim();
        if (!String(lastMessage.content || '').trim()) return lastName || (this.state.primary.name || 'Primary');
        const visibleNames = roster.map(v => String(v.name || '').trim()).filter(Boolean);
        const currentIndex = visibleNames.indexOf(lastName);
        if (currentIndex === -1) return this.state.primary.name || 'Primary';
        if (visibleNames.length <= 2) {
          return lastName === (this.state.primary.name || 'Primary')
            ? (this.state.user.name || 'User')
            : (this.state.primary.name || 'Primary');
        }
        return visibleNames[(currentIndex + 1) % visibleNames.length] || (this.state.primary.name || 'Primary');
      },

      getVisibleSpeakerNames() {
        return this.buildParticipantRoster()
          .map(v => String(v.name || '').trim())
          .filter(Boolean)
          .filter((value, index, arr) => arr.indexOf(value) === index);
      },

      getStarterText(opts={}) {
        const numMessagesToPutInStartWith = 2;
        const targetSpeakerId = opts.targetSpeakerId || this.pickNextSpeakerId();
        const targetName = this.resolveSpeakerName(targetSpeakerId) || this.getNextTurnName() || 'Narrator';
        const visibleMessages = (this.state.messages || []).filter(m => String(m?.content || '').trim());
        const lastFew = visibleMessages
          .slice(-numMessagesToPutInStartWith)
          .map(m => this.messageToTranscriptBlock(m))
          .filter(Boolean);
        const text = lastFew.join('\n\n').trim();
        if (opts.continueMode) return text;
        if (this.lastMessageIsEmpty()) return text;
        return (text ? text + '\n\n' : '') + targetName + ':';
      },

      async handleSendButtonClick(opts={mode:'normal'}) {
        this.init();
        this._autoFollowFeed = true;
        this._feedUserIsReviewingHistory = false;
        const mode = opts?.mode || 'normal';
        const userInput = String(this.els.input?.value || '').trim();
        const selectedSpeaker = this.els.sendAs?.value || this.state.selectedSpeaker || 'user';

        if (mode === 'normal' && userInput) {
          const speakerName = this.resolveSpeakerName(selectedSpeaker) || 'User';
          const role = selectedSpeaker === 'user' ? 'user' : (selectedSpeaker === 'narrator' ? 'narrator' : 'character');

          this.appendMessage({
            id: this.makeMessageId(),
            role,
            speakerId: selectedSpeaker,
            speakerName,
            content: userInput,
            status: 'done',
            createdAt: Date.now(),
            updatedAt: Date.now(),
            meta: { source: 'manual_input' }
          });

          this.els.input.value = '';
          this.state.selectedSpeaker = selectedSpeaker;

          if (!this.els.autoRespond?.checked) {
            this.persistSnapshot();
            this.renderStoryMessageActions?.();
            this.setStatus('message added');
            return;
          }
        }

        let targetSpeakerId = opts?.targetSpeakerId || this.pickNextSpeakerId();
        if (mode === 'continue' && this.state.nextSpeaker && !opts?.targetSpeakerId) {
          targetSpeakerId = this.state.nextSpeaker;
        }

        const pendingRole = targetSpeakerId === 'narrator'
          ? 'narrator'
          : (targetSpeakerId === 'user' ? 'user' : 'character');

        const pendingMessage = this.appendMessage({
          id: this.makeMessageId(),
          role: pendingRole,
          speakerId: targetSpeakerId,
          speakerName: this.resolveSpeakerName(targetSpeakerId) || 'Narrator',
          content: '',
          status: 'streaming',
          createdAt: Date.now(),
          updatedAt: Date.now(),
          meta: { source: mode }
        });

        this.renderStoryMessageActions?.();
        await this.runGenerationIntoMessage(pendingMessage, { mode });
      },

      async runGenerationIntoMessage(messageObj, opts={mode:'normal'}) {
        if (!messageObj) return;

        const targetSpeakerId = messageObj.speakerId || this.pickNextSpeakerId();
        const targetSpeakerName = this.resolveSpeakerName(targetSpeakerId) || messageObj.speakerName || 'Narrator';
        const instruction = this.buildInstructionStackText(targetSpeakerId, opts);
        const startWith = this.getStarterText({
          continueMode: opts.mode === 'continue',
          targetSpeakerId
        }).replace(/\{\{user\}\}/ig, this.state.user?.name || 'User').replace(/\{\{char\}\}/ig, this.state.primary?.name || 'Primary');

        const stopNames = ['\n\n']
          .concat(this.getVisibleSpeakerNames().map(name => `\n${name}:`))
          .concat(this.getVisibleSpeakerNames().map(name => `\n\n${name}:`));

        let generated = '';
        let gotFirstChunk = false;

        this.currentStreamingOp = { messageId: messageObj.id, stopped: false };
        this.setStatus(`${targetSpeakerName} is writing...`);

        try {
          const result = await ai({
            instruction: () => instruction,
            startWith: () => startWith,
            stopSequences: stopNames,
            onChunk: (data) => {
              if (this.currentStreamingOp?.stopped) return;
              if (data?.isFromStartWith) return;

              let chunk = String(data?.textChunk || '');
              if (!gotFirstChunk) {
                gotFirstChunk = true;
                chunk = chunk.replace(/^\s+/, '');
                const prefix = `${targetSpeakerName}:`;
                if (chunk.startsWith(prefix)) {
                  chunk = chunk.slice(prefix.length).trimStart();
                }
              }

              generated += chunk;
              this.updateMessageContent(messageObj.id, generated, 'streaming');
            }
          });

          const finalText = generated.trim();
          this.updateMessageContent(messageObj.id, finalText, 'done');
          this.state.nextSpeaker = '';
          this.persistSnapshot();
          this.renderStoryMessageActions?.();
          this.renderSpeakerRuntimeBar?.();
          this.updateComposerHint?.();
          this.setStatus(result?.stopReason === 'error' ? 'generation failed' : 'scene updated');
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(e);
          this.updateMessageContent(messageObj.id, generated || '[generation error]', 'error');
          this.setStatus('generation failed', { error: true });
        } finally {
          this.currentStreamingOp = null;
          this.syncTranscriptEditorFromMessages();
          this.scheduleFeedRender();
        }
      },

      resolveSpeakerName(value) {
        if (value === 'primary') return this.state.primary?.name || 'Primary';
        if (value === 'user') return this.state.user?.name || 'User';
        if (value === 'narrator') return 'Narrator';
        return (this.state.inScene.find(v => v.id === value)?.name) || this.state.primary?.name || 'Primary';
      },

      getBlocks() {
        return (this.state.messages || []).map(msg => this.messageToTranscriptBlock(msg)).filter(Boolean);
      },

      deleteLastMessage() {
        const messages = this.state.messages || [];
        if (!messages.length) return;
        const removed = messages.pop();
        this.state.deletedMessageStack = this.state.deletedMessageStack || [];
        this.state.deletedMessageStack.push({ ...removed });
        this.syncTranscriptEditorFromMessages();
        this.persistSnapshot();
        this.scheduleFeedRender();
        this.renderStoryMessageActions?.();
        this.setStatus('last message deleted');
        const undoBtn = document.getElementById('storyUndoDeleteBtn');
        if (undoBtn) undoBtn.disabled = false;
      },

      undoDeleteLastMessage() {
        const stack = this.state.deletedMessageStack || [];
        if (!stack.length) return;
        const restored = stack.pop();
        this.state.messages.push(restored);
        this.syncTranscriptEditorFromMessages();
        this.persistSnapshot();
        this.scheduleFeedRender();
        this.renderStoryMessageActions?.();
        this.setStatus('message restored');
        const undoBtn = document.getElementById('storyUndoDeleteBtn');
        if (undoBtn) undoBtn.disabled = stack.length === 0;
      },

      async regenLastAssistantTurn() {
        const messages = this.state.messages || [];
        const lastAssistant = [...messages].reverse().find(m => m.role === 'character' || m.role === 'narrator');
        const targetSpeakerId = lastAssistant?.speakerId || this.pickNextSpeakerId();
        const pending = this.replaceLastAssistantMessageAsPending(targetSpeakerId);
        this.persistSnapshot();
        this.scheduleFeedRender();
        await this.runGenerationIntoMessage(pending, { mode: 'regen' });
      },

      clearTranscript() {
        if (!confirm('Clear the story transcript?')) return;
        this.state.messages = [];
        this.state.deletedMessageStack = [];
        this.syncTranscriptEditorFromMessages();
        this.persistSnapshot();
        this.scheduleFeedRender();
        this.renderStoryMessageActions?.();
        this.setStatus('story cleared');
      },

      copyTranscript() {
        const text = this.exportTranscriptFromMessages(this.state.messages || []);
        navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(() => this.setStatus('transcript copied'));
      },

      saveToDevice() {
        const data = this.currentData();
        const baseName = `${data.user.name || 'user'}-${data.primary.name || 'primary'}`.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_]/g, '') || 'loop-story';
        const fileName = (prompt('Choose a filename:', baseName) || baseName) + '.loop-story.json';
        const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(data, null, 2)], {type:'application/json'});
        const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        const a = document.createElement('a');
        a.href = url;
        a.download = fileName;
        a.click();
        URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
        this.setStatus('story saved');
      },

      exportSnapshot() { this.saveToDevice(); },
      importSnapshot() { this.loadFromDevice(); },

      async loadFromDevice() {
        return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
          const input = document.createElement('input');
          input.type = 'file';
          input.accept = 'application/json,.json,application/gzip,.gz';
          input.onchange = async (event) => {
            const file = event.target.files?.[0];
            if(!file) return resolve(false);
            try {
              let blob = (file.name.endsWith('.gz') || (file.type || '').includes('gzip')) ? await this.decompressBlobWithGzip(file) : file;
              let content = await blob.text();
              let data = JSON.parse(content);
              this.loadData(data);
              this.renderAll();
              this.setStatus('story loaded');
              resolve(true);
            } catch(e) {
              console.error(e);
              alert('Could not load that story file.');
              reject(e);
            }
          };
          input.click();
        });
      },

      async generateShareLinkForStory() {
        if(!window.CompressionStream) {
          alert('Story share links require a modern browser.');
          return;
        }
        const data = this.currentData();
        if (this.els.shareBtn) this.els.shareBtn.disabled = true;
        this.setStatus('generating share link...');
        try {
          const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(data)], {type:'application/json'});
          const compressedBlob = await this.compressBlobWithGzip(blob);
          const result = await upload(compressedBlob);
          if(result?.error) throw new Error(result.error);
          const fileName = (result.url || '').split('/').slice(-1)[0];
          const url = new URL(location.href);
          url.searchParams.set('storyData', fileName);
          if (this.els.shareInput) this.els.shareInput.value = url.toString();
          if (this.els.shareCtn) this.els.shareCtn.hidden = false;
          this.setStatus('share link ready');
        } catch(e) {
          console.error(e);
          alert('Could not generate a story share link.');
          this.setStatus('share failed', {error:true});
        } finally {
          if (this.els.shareBtn) this.els.shareBtn.disabled = false;
        }
      },

      async loadStoryFromUrlIfPresent() {
        try {
          const url = new URL(location.href);
          const fileName = url.searchParams.get('storyData');
          if(!fileName || this.__loadedFromUrl) return;
          this.__loadedFromUrl = true;
          this.setStatus('loading shared story...');
          const blob = await fetch('https://user.uploads.dev/file/' + fileName).then(r => r.blob());
          const decompressed = await this.decompressBlobWithGzip(blob);
          const text = await decompressed.text();
          const data = JSON.parse(text);
          this.loadData(data);
          this.renderAll();
          this.setStatus('shared story loaded');
        } catch(e) {
          console.error(e);
        }
      },

      async compressBlobWithGzip(blob) {
        const cs = new CompressionStream('gzip');
        const stream = blob.stream().pipeThrough(cs);
        return await new Response(stream).blob();
      },

      async decompressBlobWithGzip(blob) {
        const ds = new DecompressionStream('gzip');
        const stream = blob.stream().pipeThrough(ds);
        return await new Response(stream).blob();
      },

      async generateScenario() {
        this.els.generateScenarioBtn.disabled = true;
        this.setStatus('generating scenario...');
        try {
          const instruction = [
            `I'm going to get you to write a creative, interesting chat/roleplay scenario using the following keywords/prompt/ideas as inspiration: ${this.els.inspiration.value.trim() || '(None provided. Just be creative!)'}`,
            `The scenario should be based on these two characters:`,
            `# Character 1: ${literal(this.state.primary.name)}`,
            this.state.primary.description || '(Not specified.)',
            `# Character 2: ${literal(this.state.user.name)}`,
            this.state.user.description || '(Not specified.)',
            'Your task is to write a single short paragraph that sets up the scene in an interesting, creative, engaging direction.'
          ].join('\n\n');
          const data = await ai({instruction});
          const scene = (data?.text || '').trim();
          if(scene) {
            this.els.scenario.value = scene;
            this.persistSnapshot();
            this.setStatus('scenario ready');
          }
        } catch(e) {
          console.error(e);
          this.setStatus('scenario generation failed', {error:true});
        } finally {
          this.els.generateScenarioBtn.disabled = false;
        }
      },

      async generateCharactersAndScenario() {
        if (this.els.generatePairBtn) this.els.generatePairBtn.disabled = true;
        this.setStatus('generating pair + scenario...');
        try {
          const intro = (this.els.inspiration.value || '').trim();
          const instruction = [
            'Your task is to come up with an interesting and captivating chat/RP scenario with two characters. Ensure that what you write is subtle, authentic, interesting, descriptive, and something that the roleplay participants will have a lot of fun with. Avoid boring cliches.',
            intro ? `Inspiration: ${intro}` : 'Inspiration: Be creative.',
            '',
            'You must use this EXACT template for your response:',
            '---',
            'CHARACTER 1 NAME: (name of first character)',
            'CHARACTER 1 DESCRIPTION: (must use at least this exact structure: Name, Species & Gender, Visual Appearance, Personality, Background Lore, Roleplay Behavior Examples with 5 strong examples)',
            'CHARACTER 2 NAME: (name of second character)',
            'CHARACTER 2 DESCRIPTION: (must use the same exact minimum structure)',
            'STARTING SCENARIO: (a short one-paragraph roleplay starter)',
            'GENRE: (genre)',
            '---'
          ].join('\n');
          const data = await ai({instruction, stopSequences:['\nGENRE:']});
          const text = data?.text || '';
          const c1 = text.match(/CHARACTER 1 NAME:\s*(.+)/i)?.[1]?.trim();
          const c1d = text.match(/CHARACTER 1 DESCRIPTION:\s*([\s\S]+?)\nCHARACTER 2 NAME:/i)?.[1]?.trim();
          const c2 = text.match(/CHARACTER 2 NAME:\s*(.+)/i)?.[1]?.trim();
          const c2d = text.match(/CHARACTER 2 DESCRIPTION:\s*([\s\S]+?)\nSTARTING SCENARIO:/i)?.[1]?.trim();
          const scene = text.match(/STARTING SCENARIO:\s*([\s\S]+)/i)?.[1]?.trim();
          if(c1) this.state.primary.name = c1;
          if(c1d) this.state.primary.description = c1d;
          if(c2) this.state.user.name = c2;
          if(c2d) this.state.user.description = c2d;
          if(scene) this.els.scenario.value = scene;
          this.renderAll();
          this.setStatus('pair + scenario ready');
        } catch(e) {
          console.error(e);
          this.setStatus('pair generation failed', {error:true});
        } finally {
          if (this.els.generatePairBtn) this.els.generatePairBtn.disabled = false;
        }
      }
    };

  function setSidebarActiveState(pageName) {
    const targets = {
      image: document.querySelector('.sidebar [data-label="Gate"]'),
      story: document.querySelector('.sidebar .item[data-label="Story"]'),
      guide: document.querySelector('.sidebar .item[data-label="How to Loop"]')
    };

    document.querySelectorAll('.sidebar .item.is-active, .sidebar .create.is-active').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('is-active'));
    const activeEl = targets[pageName];
    if (activeEl) activeEl.classList.add('is-active');
  }

  function switchPage(pageName) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(page => { page.classList.remove('active'); });

    if (isMobileSidebarMode()) {
      forceCloseMobileSidebar();
    }

    if (pageName === 'hall' || pageName === 'forge' || pageName === 'forge-projects') pageName = 'story';

    const target = document.getElementById(`page-${pageName}`);
    if (target) target.classList.add('active');

    const appRoot = document.querySelector('.app');
    if (appRoot) {
      appRoot.classList.toggle('page-image-simple', pageName === 'image');
    }

    setSidebarActiveState(pageName);

    const mainContent = document.querySelector('.main-content');
    if (mainContent) mainContent.style.overflowY = ((pageName === 'story' && window.innerWidth > 1024) || pageName === 'guide') ? 'hidden' : 'auto';

    const chatUi = document.querySelector('.chat-ui');
    if (chatUi) chatUi.hidden = (pageName !== 'image');

    if (typeof syncImagePromptDockVisibility === 'function') {
      syncImagePromptDockVisibility();
    }

    const pageTitle = document.querySelector('.page-title');
    if (pageTitle) {
      pageTitle.textContent = pageName === 'story'
        ? 'Story'
        : pageName === 'guide'
        ? 'How to Loop'
        : pageName === 'library'
        ? 'Library'
        : 'Gate';
    }

    const commentsBtn = document.getElementById('commentsToggleBtn');
    if (commentsBtn) {
      commentsBtn.hidden = (pageName === 'library' || pageName === 'guide');
      commentsBtn.title = pageName === 'story' ? 'Show Story Comments' : 'Show Comments';
      if (pageName !== 'story') commentsBtn.classList.remove('active');
    }

    if (window.LoopStory) {
      if (pageName === 'library' && typeof window.LoopStory.renderLibraryPage === 'function') {
        window.LoopStory.renderLibraryPage();
        if (typeof window.LoopStory.ensureLibraryWorldPreviews === 'function') window.LoopStory.ensureLibraryWorldPreviews();
      }
    }

    if (window.LoopyGuide) {
      try {
        if (pageName === 'guide' && typeof window.LoopyGuide.init === 'function') window.LoopyGuide.init();
        if (typeof window.LoopyGuide.updateContext === 'function') window.LoopyGuide.updateContext();
      } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
    }

    if (pageName !== 'image' && typeof showGalleryStage === 'function') {
      try { showGalleryStage(); } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
    } else if (pageName === 'image' && typeof updateCanvasButtonVisibility === 'function') {
      try { updateCanvasButtonVisibility(); syncInlineWidthVisibility(); } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
    }

    if (typeof syncImageMobileStructure === 'function') {
      try { syncImageMobileStructure(); } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
    }
  }

  // === COMMENTS TABS ===
  function syncLoopCommentsMeta(root, tabName) {
    if (!root) return;
    const activeBtn = root.querySelector('.loop-comments-tab[data-comments-tab="' + tabName + '"]');
    const badgeEl = root.querySelector('[data-comments-room-badge]');
    const subtitleEl = root.querySelector('[data-comments-room-subtitle]');
    if (!activeBtn) return;

    const roomLabel = activeBtn.dataset.roomLabel || activeBtn.textContent.trim();
    const roomSubtitle = activeBtn.dataset.roomSubtitle || '';

    if (badgeEl) badgeEl.textContent = roomLabel;
    if (subtitleEl) subtitleEl.textContent = roomSubtitle;
  }

  function applyLoopCommentsTabState(root, tabName) {
    if (!root) return;
    const showAll = tabName === 'all';

    root.classList.toggle('is-showing-all', showAll);

    root.querySelectorAll('.loop-comments-tab').forEach(btn => {
      btn.classList.toggle('is-active', btn.dataset.commentsTab === tabName);
    });

    root.querySelectorAll('.loop-comments-tabpane').forEach(panel => {
      const shouldShow = showAll || panel.dataset.commentsPanel === tabName;
      panel.classList.toggle('is-active', shouldShow);
    });

    syncLoopCommentsMeta(root, tabName);
  }

  function loopSetCommentsTab(trigger, tabName) {
    const root = trigger.closest('[data-loop-comments-root]');
    if (!root) return;
    applyLoopCommentsTabState(root, tabName);
  }
  window.loopSetCommentsTab = loopSetCommentsTab;

  function loopPrimeCommentsTab(tabName) {
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-loop-comments-root]').forEach(root => {
      applyLoopCommentsTabState(root, tabName);
    });
  }
  window.loopPrimeCommentsTab = loopPrimeCommentsTab;

  // === COMMENTS TOGGLE LOGIC ===
  function toggleStoryCommentsFloat(forceState) {
    const panel = document.getElementById('commentsSectionCtn');
    const miniBtn = document.getElementById('storyCommentsMiniBtn');
    const globalBtn = document.getElementById('commentsToggleBtn');
    if(!panel) return;

    const willShow = typeof forceState === 'boolean' ? forceState : panel.hidden;
    panel.hidden = !willShow;

    if (willShow) {
      panel.dataset.positioned = 'false';
      loopPrimeCommentsTab('story');
      initCommentsPanelDrag();
      centerCommentsPanel(true);
    }

    if(miniBtn) miniBtn.classList.toggle('active', willShow);
    if(globalBtn && document.getElementById('page-story')?.classList.contains('active')) {
      globalBtn.classList.toggle('active', willShow);
    }

    syncImageCommentsVisibility();
  }
  window.toggleStoryCommentsFloat = toggleStoryCommentsFloat;

  function closeStoryCommentsFloat() {
    toggleStoryCommentsFloat(false);
  }
  window.closeStoryCommentsFloat = closeStoryCommentsFloat;

  function centerCommentsPanel(forceRecenter) {
    const section = document.getElementById('commentsSectionCtn');
    if (!section) return;
    if (!forceRecenter && section.dataset.positioned === 'true') return;

    const styles = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement);
    const sidebarWidth = parseFloat(styles.getPropertyValue('--sidebar-width')) || 0;
    const headerHeight = parseFloat(styles.getPropertyValue('--header-height')) || document.querySelector('.header')?.offsetHeight || 50;
    const workspaceOpen = !!document.querySelector('.app.image-stage-workspace');
    const workspaceWidth = workspaceOpen ? (parseFloat(styles.getPropertyValue('--image-workspace-panel-width')) || 360) : 0;
    const margin = 16;
    const width = section.offsetWidth || section.getBoundingClientRect().width || Math.min(460, window.innerWidth - sidebarWidth - workspaceWidth - (margin * 2));
    const height = section.offsetHeight || section.getBoundingClientRect().height || Math.min(380, window.innerHeight - headerHeight - (margin * 2));

    const minLeft = sidebarWidth + margin;
    const maxLeft = Math.max(minLeft, window.innerWidth - workspaceWidth - width - margin);
    const preferredLeft = minLeft + 16;
    const left = Math.round(Math.min(Math.max(minLeft, preferredLeft), maxLeft));
    const top = Math.round(headerHeight + margin);

    section.style.left = left + 'px';
    section.style.top = top + 'px';
    section.style.right = 'auto';
    section.style.bottom = 'auto';
    section.style.transform = 'none';
    section.dataset.positioned = 'true';
  }

  function initCommentsPanelDrag() {
    const section = document.getElementById('commentsSectionCtn');
    if (!section || section.dataset.dragReady === 'true') return;
    section.dataset.dragReady = 'true';
    section.classList.add('is-draggable');

    const shell = section.querySelector('.content-container > div');
    const dragHandle = section.querySelector('[data-comments-drag-handle]');
    const resizeHandle = section.querySelector('[data-comments-resize-handle]');
    let mode = null;
    let pointerId = null;
    let startX = 0;
    let startY = 0;
    let originLeft = 0;
    let originTop = 0;
    let originWidth = 0;
    let originRight = 0;

    function getSafeBounds(widthOverride) {
      const styles = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement);
      const sidebarWidth = parseFloat(styles.getPropertyValue('--sidebar-width')) || 0;
      const headerHeight = parseFloat(styles.getPropertyValue('--header-height')) || document.querySelector('.header')?.offsetHeight || 50;
      const workspaceOpen = !!document.querySelector('.app.image-stage-workspace');
      const workspaceWidth = workspaceOpen ? (parseFloat(styles.getPropertyValue('--image-workspace-panel-width')) || 360) : 0;
      const margin = 8;
      const width = widthOverride || section.getBoundingClientRect().width || getMinWidth();
      return {
        minLeft: sidebarWidth + margin,
        maxLeft: Math.max(sidebarWidth + margin, window.innerWidth - workspaceWidth - width - margin),
        minTop: headerHeight + margin,
        maxTop: Math.max(headerHeight + margin, window.innerHeight - section.getBoundingClientRect().height - margin),
        maxWidth: Math.max(320, window.innerWidth - sidebarWidth - workspaceWidth - (margin * 2))
      };
    }

    function getMinWidth() {
      if (window.innerWidth <= 760) return Math.max(300, window.innerWidth - 20);
      if (window.innerWidth <= 860) return 320;
      return 340;
    }

    function getMaxWidth() {
      if (window.innerWidth <= 760) return window.innerWidth - 20;
      return getSafeBounds().maxWidth;
    }

    function clearInteractionClasses() {
      section.classList.remove('is-dragging', 'is-resize-left', 'is-resize-right');
      if (dragHandle) dragHandle.classList.remove('is-dragging');
      if (resizeHandle) resizeHandle.classList.remove('is-resizing');
    }

    function stopInteraction() {
      if (!mode) return;
      mode = null;
      clearInteractionClasses();
      document.body.style.userSelect = '';
      document.body.style.cursor = '';
      document.removeEventListener('pointermove', onMove);
      document.removeEventListener('pointerup', stopInteraction);
      document.removeEventListener('pointercancel', stopInteraction);
    }

    function clampPositionForCurrentSize() {
      const rect = section.getBoundingClientRect();
      const bounds = getSafeBounds(rect.width);
      const nextLeft = Math.min(Math.max(bounds.minLeft, rect.left), bounds.maxLeft);
      const nextTop = Math.min(Math.max(bounds.minTop, rect.top), bounds.maxTop);
      section.style.left = nextLeft + 'px';
      section.style.top = nextTop + 'px';
      section.style.right = 'auto';
      section.style.bottom = 'auto';
      section.style.transform = 'none';
    }

    function onMove(e) {
      if (!mode) return;
      if (pointerId !== null && e.pointerId !== pointerId) return;

      const rect = section.getBoundingClientRect();
      const margin = 8;

      if (mode === 'drag') {
        const bounds = getSafeBounds(rect.width);
        const nextLeft = Math.min(Math.max(bounds.minLeft, originLeft + (e.clientX - startX)), bounds.maxLeft);
        const nextTop = Math.min(Math.max(bounds.minTop, originTop + (e.clientY - startY)), bounds.maxTop);

        section.style.left = nextLeft + 'px';
        section.style.top = nextTop + 'px';
        section.style.right = 'auto';
        section.style.bottom = 'auto';
        section.style.transform = 'none';
        return;
      }

      if (mode === 'resize-right') {
        const minWidth = getMinWidth();
        const maxWidth = getMaxWidth();
        const nextWidth = Math.min(Math.max(minWidth, originWidth + (e.clientX - startX)), maxWidth);

        section.style.width = nextWidth + 'px';
        section.style.minWidth = nextWidth + 'px';
        section.style.maxWidth = nextWidth + 'px';
        section.style.right = 'auto';
        section.style.transform = 'none';
        clampPositionForCurrentSize();
        return;
      }

      if (mode === 'resize-left') {
        const minWidth = getMinWidth();
        const maxWidth = getMaxWidth();
        let nextWidth = originWidth - (e.clientX - startX);
        nextWidth = Math.min(Math.max(minWidth, nextWidth), maxWidth);

        const bounds = getSafeBounds(nextWidth);
        let nextLeft = originRight - nextWidth;
        nextLeft = Math.max(bounds.minLeft, nextLeft);
        nextWidth = originRight - nextLeft;

        section.style.left = nextLeft + 'px';
        section.style.width = nextWidth + 'px';
        section.style.minWidth = nextWidth + 'px';
        section.style.maxWidth = nextWidth + 'px';
        section.style.right = 'auto';
        section.style.transform = 'none';
        clampPositionForCurrentSize();
      }
    }

    function beginInteraction(e, nextMode) {
      if (e.button !== undefined && e.button !== 0) return;

      mode = nextMode;
      pointerId = e.pointerId;
      section.dataset.positioned = 'true';

      const sectionRect = section.getBoundingClientRect();
      startX = e.clientX;
      startY = e.clientY;
      originLeft = sectionRect.left;
      originTop = sectionRect.top;
      originWidth = sectionRect.width;
      originRight = sectionRect.right;

      clearInteractionClasses();
      if (nextMode === 'drag') {
        section.classList.add('is-dragging');
        if (dragHandle) dragHandle.classList.add('is-dragging');
      } else if (nextMode === 'resize-left') {
        section.classList.add('is-resize-left');
        if (resizeHandle) resizeHandle.classList.add('is-resizing');
      } else if (nextMode === 'resize-right') {
        section.classList.add('is-resize-right');
        if (resizeHandle) resizeHandle.classList.add('is-resizing');
      }

      document.body.style.userSelect = 'none';
      document.body.style.cursor = nextMode === 'drag' ? 'grabbing' : 'ew-resize';
      document.addEventListener('pointermove', onMove);
      document.addEventListener('pointerup', stopInteraction);
      document.addEventListener('pointercancel', stopInteraction);
      e.preventDefault();
    }

    function detectEdgeMode(e) {
      if (!shell) return null;
      const rect = shell.getBoundingClientRect();
      const edge = 10;
      if (e.clientX <= rect.left + edge) return 'resize-left';
      if (e.clientX >= rect.right - edge) return 'resize-right';
      return null;
    }

    function onShellPointerDown(e) {
      const edgeMode = detectEdgeMode(e);
      if (edgeMode) {
        beginInteraction(e, edgeMode);
        return;
      }

      const interactive = e.target.closest('button, a, input, textarea, select, label, summary');
      if (interactive) return;

      beginInteraction(e, 'drag');
    }

    function onShellPointerMove(e) {
      if (!shell || mode) return;
      const edgeMode = detectEdgeMode(e);
      if (edgeMode === 'resize-left' || edgeMode === 'resize-right') {
        shell.style.cursor = 'ew-resize';
      } else {
        shell.style.cursor = 'grab';
      }
    }

    function onShellPointerLeave() {
      if (shell && !mode) shell.style.cursor = 'grab';
    }

    if (shell) {
      shell.addEventListener('pointerdown', onShellPointerDown);
      shell.addEventListener('pointermove', onShellPointerMove);
      shell.addEventListener('pointerleave', onShellPointerLeave);
      shell.style.cursor = 'grab';
    }

    if (dragHandle) {
      dragHandle.addEventListener('pointerdown', function(e) {
        beginInteraction(e, 'drag');
      });
    }

    if (resizeHandle) {
      resizeHandle.addEventListener('pointerdown', function(e) {
        beginInteraction(e, 'resize-right');
      });
    }
  }

  function toggleComments(forceState) {
    const isStory = document.getElementById('page-story')?.classList.contains('active');
    const btn = document.getElementById('commentsToggleBtn');
    const miniBtn = document.getElementById('storyCommentsMiniBtn');
    const section = document.getElementById('commentsSectionCtn');
    if (!section) return;

    const isImageMobile = typeof isMobileImageViewport === 'function' && isMobileImageViewport() && !isStory;
    const willShow = typeof forceState === 'boolean' ? forceState : section.hidden;

    if (isImageMobile && willShow && typeof closeImageWorkspaceForMobile === 'function') {
      closeImageWorkspaceForMobile();
    }

    if (willShow) {
      section.hidden = false;
      section.dataset.positioned = 'false';
      loopPrimeCommentsTab(isStory ? 'story' : 'general');
      if (isImageMobile) {
        section.dataset.positioned = 'false';
      } else {
        initCommentsPanelDrag();
        centerCommentsPanel(true);
      }
    } else {
      section.hidden = true;
    }

    if (btn) btn.classList.toggle('active', willShow);
    if (miniBtn) miniBtn.classList.toggle('active', !!(willShow && isStory));

    syncImageCommentsVisibility();
  }
  window.toggleComments = toggleComments;

  document.addEventListener('pointerdown', function(e) {
    const panel = document.getElementById('commentsSectionCtn');
    const btn = document.getElementById('commentsToggleBtn');
    const miniBtn = document.getElementById('storyCommentsMiniBtn');
    if (!panel || panel.hidden) return;
    const insidePanel = panel.contains(e.target);
    const insideBtn = btn && btn.contains(e.target);
    const insideMiniBtn = miniBtn && miniBtn.contains(e.target);
    if (!insidePanel && !insideBtn && !insideMiniBtn) {
      toggleComments(false);
    }
  }, true);

  window.addEventListener('resize', function() {
    const panel = document.getElementById('commentsSectionCtn');
    if (!panel || panel.hidden) return;
    if (typeof isMobileImageViewport === 'function' && isMobileImageViewport() && document.getElementById('page-image')?.classList.contains('active')) return;
    centerCommentsPanel(false);
  });

  window.addEventListener('resize', function() {
    if (typeof reconcileImageStageState === 'function') {
      reconcileImageStageState('window-resize');
    }
  });

  function syncAutoHideHeaderState(shouldHide) {
    const appRoot = document.querySelector('.app');
    if (!appRoot) return;
    appRoot.classList.toggle('header-auto-hidden', !!shouldHide);
  }
  window.syncAutoHideHeaderState = syncAutoHideHeaderState;

  function isApplePlatform() {
    return false;
  }
  window.isApplePlatform = isApplePlatform;

  function applyAppleForcedDarkTheme() {
    const root = document.documentElement;
    if (root) root.classList.remove('apple-force-dark');
    return false;
  }
  window.applyAppleForcedDarkTheme = applyAppleForcedDarkTheme;

  (function initTabletAutoHideHeader() {
    let lastY = window.scrollY || 0;
    let stopTimer = null;
    let ticking = false;

    function enabled() {
      return window.innerWidth <= 1024;
    }

    function showHeader() {
      syncAutoHideHeaderState(false);
    }

    function hideHeader() {
      const appRoot = document.querySelector('.app');
      if (!appRoot) return;
      if (appRoot.dataset.sidebar === 'expanded') return;
      syncAutoHideHeaderState(true);
    }

    function handleScroll() {
      if (!enabled()) {
        showHeader();
        lastY = window.scrollY || 0;
        return;
      }

      const currentY = window.scrollY || 0;
      const delta = currentY - lastY;

      if (currentY <= 8) {
        showHeader();
      } else if (Math.abs(delta) > 2) {
        if (delta > 0) {
          hideHeader();
        } else {
          showHeader();
        }
      }

      lastY = currentY;

      if (stopTimer) clearTimeout(stopTimer);
      stopTimer = setTimeout(() => {
        showHeader();
      }, 180);

      ticking = false;
    }

    window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
      if (!enabled()) return;
      if (ticking) return;
      ticking = true;
      requestAnimationFrame(handleScroll);
    }, { passive: true });

    window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
      if (!enabled()) {
        showHeader();
      }
    });

    document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', () => {
      if (document.hidden) return;
      showHeader();
    });

    document.addEventListener('click', () => {
      if (!enabled()) return;
      if (stopTimer) clearTimeout(stopTimer);
      stopTimer = setTimeout(() => {
        showHeader();
      }, 120);
    });

    showHeader();
  })();

  requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    if (typeof applyAppleForcedDarkTheme === 'function') {
      applyAppleForcedDarkTheme();
    }
    const appRoot = document.querySelector('.app');
    const imagePage = document.getElementById('page-image');
    if (appRoot && imagePage) {
      appRoot.classList.toggle('page-image-simple', imagePage.classList.contains('active'));
    }
    if (isMobileSidebarMode() && typeof forceCloseMobileSidebar === 'function') {
      forceCloseMobileSidebar();
    }
    if (typeof reconcileImageStageState === 'function') {
      reconcileImageStageState('init');
    }
    if (typeof syncImageCommentsVisibility === 'function') {
      syncImageCommentsVisibility();
    }
    if (typeof syncImagePromptDockVisibility === 'function') {
      syncImagePromptDockVisibility();
    }
  });

</script>

<script>
(function(){
  const STORAGE_KEY = 'loop_forge_board_v2';
  const BRIDGE_KEYS = {
    blueprint: 'loop_blueprint_bridge_v1',
    image: 'loop_image_bridge_v1',
    story: 'loop_story_bridge_v1',
    storyBackground: 'loop_story_background_seed_v1'
  };

  function clone(obj) {
    return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(obj));
  }

  function shortText(value, fallback='') {
    const text = String(value || fallback || '').trim();
    if (!text) return '';
    return text.length > 160 ? text.slice(0, 157).trimEnd() + '…' : text;
  }

  function buildCharacterShort(item) {
    return shortText(item.short || item.description || '', 'No character description yet.');
  }

  function buildWorldShort(item) {
    return shortText(item.short || item.contextSummary || item.premise || item.scenario || '', 'No world summary yet.');
  }

  function buildWorldStoryPackage(item) {
    const safe = item || {};
    const blocks = [];
    const scenarioText = [String(safe.scenario || '').trim(), String(safe.premise || '').trim()]
      .filter(Boolean)
      .filter((value, index, arr) => arr.indexOf(value) === index)
      .join('\n\n')
      .trim();
    if (scenarioText) blocks.push(scenarioText);
    if (hasText(safe.contextSummary)) blocks.push(`Context Summary:
${String(safe.contextSummary).trim()}`);
    if (hasText(safe.contextMemo)) blocks.push(`Context Notes:
${String(safe.contextMemo).trim()}`);
    if (hasText(safe.contextLore)) blocks.push(`World Lore / Rules:
${String(safe.contextLore).trim()}`);
    if (hasText(safe.contextGlossary)) blocks.push(`Glossary / Terms:
${String(safe.contextGlossary).trim()}`);
    return blocks.filter(Boolean).join('\n\n').trim();
  }

  window.LoopBuilders = {
    state: {
      sourceTab: 'characters',
      dockTab: 'direction',
      selected: null,
      board: {
        primary: null,
        user: null,
        cast: [],
        world: null
      },
      blueprint: {
        inspiration: '',
        whatNext: '',
        writingInstructions: '',
        imageCore: '',
        imagePositive: '',
        imageNegative: '',
        contextMemo: '',
        contextSummary: '',
        contextLore: '',
        contextGlossary: '',
        memoryDigest: '',
        memoryEntries: '',
        memoryCarry: ''
      },
      presets: [],
      activePresetId: null,
      selectedBoard: null
    },

    defaultBlueprint() {
      return {
        inspiration: '',
        whatNext: '',
        writingInstructions: '',
        imageCore: '',
        imagePositive: '',
        imageNegative: '',
        contextMemo: '',
        contextSummary: '',
        contextLore: '',
        contextGlossary: '',
        memoryDigest: '',
        memoryEntries: '',
        memoryCarry: ''
      };
    },

    load() {
      try {
        const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
        if (!raw) return;
        const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
        if (parsed && typeof parsed === 'object') {
          this.state = Object.assign({}, this.state, parsed);
          this.state.board = Object.assign({primary:null,user:null,cast:[],world:null}, parsed.board || {});
          if (!Array.isArray(this.state.board.cast)) this.state.board.cast = [];
          this.state.blueprint = Object.assign(this.defaultBlueprint(), parsed.blueprint || {});
          if (!Array.isArray(this.state.presets)) this.state.presets = [];
          if (typeof this.state.activePresetId !== 'string') this.state.activePresetId = null;
          if (!this.state.selectedBoard || typeof this.state.selectedBoard !== 'object') this.state.selectedBoard = null;
        }
      } catch (e) {
        console.error(e);
      }
    },

    save() {
      try {
        localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(this.state));
      } catch (e) {
        console.error(e);
      }
    },

    ensureLoaded() {
      if (this._loaded) return;
      this._loaded = true;
      this.load();
      setTimeout(() => {
        const input = document.getElementById('forgeImportFileEl');
        if (input && !input.dataset.loopBuildersBound) {
          input.dataset.loopBuildersBound = 'yes';
          input.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
            const file = e.target.files && e.target.files[0];
            if (file) this.importAssemblyFromFile(file);
          });
        }
      }, 0);
    },

    escapeHtml(value='') {
      return String(value)
        .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
        .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
        .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
        .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
        .replace(/'/g, '&#39;');
    },

    avatarInitial(name='?') {
      return String(name || '?').trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || '?';
    },

    keyFor(item) {
      return `${item.type}:${item.source}:${item.id}`;
    },

    boardKey(kind, id='') {
      return `${kind}:${String(id || '')}`;
    },

    normalizeBoard(board) {
      const safe = Object.assign({primary:null,user:null,cast:[],world:null}, clone(board || {}));
      if (!Array.isArray(safe.cast)) safe.cast = [];
      return safe;
    },

    clearSelection() {
      this.state.selected = null;
      this.state.selectedBoard = null;
    },

    selectBoard(kind, id='') {
      this.ensureLoaded();
      this.state.selected = null;
      this.state.selectedBoard = { kind, id: String(id || '') };
      this.save();
      this.render();
    },

    findSelectedSource() {
      if (!this.state.selected) return null;
      const pool = this.state.sourceTab === 'worlds' ? this.getWorlds() : this.getCharacters();
      return pool.find(item => this.keyFor(item) === this.state.selected) || null;
    },

    findBoardSelection() {
      const sel = this.state.selectedBoard;
      const board = this.normalizeBoard(this.state.board);
      if (!sel || typeof sel !== 'object') return null;
      if (sel.kind === 'primary' && board.primary) {
        return { item: board.primary, type: 'character', origin: 'board', slot: 'Primary Persona' };
      }
      if (sel.kind === 'user' && board.user) {
        return { item: board.user, type: 'character', origin: 'board', slot: 'User Persona' };
      }
      if (sel.kind === 'world' && board.world) {
        return { item: board.world, type: 'world', origin: 'board', slot: 'World / Scenario Seed' };
      }
      if (sel.kind === 'cast') {
        const item = (board.cast || []).find(v => String(v.id || '') === String(sel.id || ''));
        if (item) return { item, type: 'character', origin: 'board', slot: 'In-Scene Cast' };
      }
      return null;
    },

    getInspectorSelection() {
      const sourceItem = this.findSelectedSource();
      if (sourceItem) return { item: sourceItem, type: sourceItem.type, origin: 'source', slot: 'Source' };
      return this.findBoardSelection();
    },

    getLoopStory() {
      return window.LoopStory || null;
    },

    bridgeKeys() {
      return BRIDGE_KEYS;
    },

    buildStoryBackgroundSeed() {
      const board = this.state.board || {};
      const bp = Object.assign(this.defaultBlueprint(), this.state.blueprint || {});
      const world = board.world || null;
      return [
        world?.title ? `World: ${world.title}` : '',
        buildWorldStoryPackage(world),
        bp.contextLore ? `Lore Pressure:
${bp.contextLore}` : '',
        bp.imagePositive ? `Background Intent:
${bp.imagePositive}` : ''
      ].filter(Boolean).join('\n\n').trim();
    },

    captureImageRuntime() {
      return {
        prompt: String(document.getElementById('promptInput')?.value || '').trim(),
        imageCore: String(window.selectedCore || '').trim(),
        negative: '',
        capturedAt: new Date().toISOString()
      };
    },

    syncBridge(source='forge', extras={}) {
      try {
        const payload = {
          source,
          updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
          assembly: this.getAssemblyPayload(),
          backgroundSeed: this.buildStoryBackgroundSeed(),
          imageRuntime: this.captureImageRuntime(),
          ...extras
        };
        localStorage.setItem(this.bridgeKeys().blueprint, JSON.stringify(payload));
        if (payload.imagePayload) localStorage.setItem(this.bridgeKeys().image, JSON.stringify(payload.imagePayload));
        if (payload.storyPayload) localStorage.setItem(this.bridgeKeys().story, JSON.stringify(payload.storyPayload));
        if (payload.backgroundSeed) localStorage.setItem(this.bridgeKeys().storyBackground, payload.backgroundSeed);
      } catch (e) {
        console.error(e);
      }
    },

    getCharacters() {
      const story = this.getLoopStory();
      if (!story) return [];
      const library = (typeof story.getLibraryCharacters === 'function' ? story.getLibraryCharacters() : []).map(item => ({
        type: 'character',
        source: 'library',
        id: item.id || `library_${(item.name||'character').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,'_')}`,
        name: item.name || 'Untitled Character',
        avatarUrl: item.avatarUrl || '',
        short: buildCharacterShort(item),
        description: item.description || ''
      }));
      const hall = (typeof story.hallQuickCharacters === 'function' ? story.hallQuickCharacters() : []).map(item => ({
        type: 'character',
        source: 'hall',
        id: item.id || `hall_${(item.name||'character').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,'_')}`,
        name: item.name || 'Untitled Character',
        avatarUrl: item.avatarUrl || '',
        short: buildCharacterShort(item),
        description: item.description || ''
      }));
      const map = new Map();
      [...library, ...hall].forEach(item => map.set(this.keyFor(item), item));
      return Array.from(map.values());
    },

    getWorlds() {
      const story = this.getLoopStory();
      if (!story) return [];
      const worldPreviewCache = story?.worldPreviewCache || {};
      const library = (typeof story.getLibraryWorlds === 'function' ? story.getLibraryWorlds() : []).map(item => ({
        type: 'world',
        source: 'library',
        id: item.id || `libworld_${(item.title||'world').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,'_')}`,
        title: item.title || 'Untitled World',
        imageUrl: item.imageUrl || worldPreviewCache[String(item.id || item.title || '')] || '',
        short: buildWorldShort(item),
        premise: item.premise || '',
        scenario: item.scenario || '',
        tags: Array.isArray(item.tags) ? item.tags : []
      }));
      const hall = (typeof story.hallWorldBuildingSamples === 'function' ? story.hallWorldBuildingSamples() : []).map(item => ({
        type: 'world',
        source: 'hall',
        id: item.id || `hallworld_${(item.title||'world').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,'_')}`,
        title: item.title || 'Untitled World',
        imageUrl: item.imageUrl || worldPreviewCache[String(item.id || item.title || '')] || '',
        short: buildWorldShort(item),
        premise: item.premise || '',
        scenario: item.scenario || '',
        tags: Array.isArray(item.tags) ? item.tags : []
      }));
      const map = new Map();
      [...library, ...hall].forEach(item => map.set(this.keyFor(item), item));
      return Array.from(map.values());
    },

    findSelected() {
      return this.findSelectedSource();
    },

    setSourceTab(tab) {
      this.ensureLoaded();
      this.state.sourceTab = tab === 'worlds' ? 'worlds' : 'characters';
      this.state.selected = null;
      this.save();
      this.render();
    },

    setDockTab(tab) {
      this.ensureLoaded();
      this.state.dockTab = ['direction','image','context','memory'].includes(tab) ? tab : 'direction';
      this.save();
      this.renderBlueprintDock();
    },

    updateBlueprintField(field, value) {
      this.ensureLoaded();
      if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(this.defaultBlueprint(), field)) return;
      this.state.blueprint[field] = String(value || '');
      this.save();
    },

    selectItem(key) {
      this.ensureLoaded();
      this.state.selected = key;
      this.state.selectedBoard = null;
      this.save();
      this.render();
    },

    cloneCharacterForBoard(item) {
      return {
        id: item.id,
        source: item.source,
        name: item.name || 'Untitled Character',
        avatarUrl: item.avatarUrl || '',
        short: buildCharacterShort(item),
        description: item.description || ''
      };
    },

    cloneWorldForBoard(item) {
      return {
        id: item.id,
        source: item.source,
        title: item.title || 'Untitled World',
        imageUrl: item.imageUrl || '',
        short: buildWorldShort(item),
        premise: item.premise || '',
        scenario: item.scenario || '',
        contextSummary: item.contextSummary || '',
        contextMemo: item.contextMemo || '',
        contextLore: item.contextLore || '',
        contextGlossary: item.contextGlossary || '',
        tags: Array.isArray(item.tags) ? item.tags.slice() : []
      };
    },

    assignCharacter(slot, item) {
      this.ensureLoaded();
      const payload = this.cloneCharacterForBoard(item);
      if (slot === 'primary' || slot === 'user') {
        this.state.board[slot] = payload;
        this.state.selectedBoard = { kind: slot, id: String(payload.id || '') };
      } else if (slot === 'cast') {
        const exists = (this.state.board.cast || []).some(v => (v.id === payload.id) && (v.name || '').trim().toLowerCase() === (payload.name || '').trim().toLowerCase());
        if (!exists) this.state.board.cast.push(payload);
        this.state.selectedBoard = { kind: 'cast', id: String(payload.id || '') };
      }
      this.save();
      this.render();
    },

    assignWorld(item) {
      this.ensureLoaded();
      this.state.board.world = this.cloneWorldForBoard(item);
      this.state.selectedBoard = { kind: 'world', id: String(this.state.board.world?.id || '') };
      this.save();
      this.render();
    },

    appendWorld(item) {
      this.ensureLoaded();
      const payload = this.cloneWorldForBoard(item);
      if (!this.state.board.world) {
        this.state.board.world = payload;
      } else {
        const current = this.cloneWorldForBoard(this.state.board.world);
        const currentText = [current.premise || '', current.scenario || ''].filter(Boolean).join('\n\n').trim();
        const incomingText = [payload.premise || '', payload.scenario || ''].filter(Boolean).join('\n\n').trim();
        current.scenario = [currentText, incomingText].filter(Boolean).join('\n\n');
        current.short = buildWorldShort(current);
        current.tags = Array.from(new Set([...(current.tags || []), ...(payload.tags || [])]));
        if (!current.imageUrl && payload.imageUrl) current.imageUrl = payload.imageUrl;
        this.state.board.world = current;
      }
      this.state.selectedBoard = { kind: 'world', id: String(this.state.board.world?.id || '') };
      this.save();
      this.render();
    },

    receiveCharacter(item, opts={}) {
      this.ensureLoaded();
      const payload = Object.assign({ source: 'library', type: 'character' }, item || {});
      this.state.sourceTab = 'characters';
      this.state.selectedBoard = null;
      this.state.selected = this.keyFor({ type:'character', source:'library', id: payload.id || `library_${(payload.name || 'character').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,'_')}` });
      if (opts.assign && ['primary','user','cast'].includes(opts.assign)) this.assignCharacter(opts.assign, payload);
      else {
        this.save();
        this.render();
      }
    },

    receiveWorld(item, opts={}) {
      this.ensureLoaded();
      const payload = Object.assign({ source: 'library', type: 'world' }, item || {});
      this.state.sourceTab = 'worlds';
      this.state.selectedBoard = null;
      this.state.selected = this.keyFor({ type:'world', source:'library', id: payload.id || `libworld_${(payload.title || 'world').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,'_')}` });
      if (opts.assign === 'append') this.appendWorld(payload);
      else if (opts.assign === 'world' || !opts.assign) this.assignWorld(payload);
      else {
        this.save();
        this.render();
      }
    },

    removeSlot(slot, id=null) {
      this.ensureLoaded();
      if (slot === 'cast') {
        this.state.board.cast = (this.state.board.cast || []).filter(v => v.id !== id);
        if (this.state.selectedBoard?.kind === 'cast' && String(this.state.selectedBoard?.id || '') === String(id || '')) this.state.selectedBoard = null;
      } else {
        this.state.board[slot] = null;
        if (this.state.selectedBoard?.kind === slot) this.state.selectedBoard = null;
      }
      this.save();
      this.render();
    },

    clearBoard() {
      this.ensureLoaded();
      this.state.board = { primary:null, user:null, cast:[], world:null };
      this.clearSelection();
      this.save();
      this.render();
    },

    syncImageCoreOptions() {
      const select = document.getElementById('forgeImageCoreEl');
      if (!select || select.dataset.loopBuildersReady === 'yes') return;
      select.innerHTML = '<option value="">Default</option>';
      const registry = window.CORE_REGISTRY || {};
      Object.keys(registry).forEach(key => {
        const opt = document.createElement('option');
        opt.value = key;
        opt.textContent = key;
        select.appendChild(opt);
      });
      select.dataset.loopBuildersReady = 'yes';
    },

    renderBlueprintDock() {
      this.syncImageCoreOptions();
      const bp = Object.assign(this.defaultBlueprint(), this.state.blueprint || {});
      const tab = this.state.dockTab || 'direction';
      document.querySelectorAll('[data-forge-dock-tab]').forEach(el => el.classList.toggle('active', el.getAttribute('data-forge-dock-tab') === tab));
      document.querySelectorAll('[data-forge-dock-panel]').forEach(el => el.classList.toggle('active', el.getAttribute('data-forge-dock-panel') === tab));
      const map = {
        forgeWhatNextEl: bp.whatNext,
        forgeWritingInstructionsEl: bp.writingInstructions,
        forgeInspirationEl: bp.inspiration,
        forgeImageCoreEl: bp.imageCore,
        forgeImagePositiveEl: bp.imagePositive,
        forgeImageNegativeEl: bp.imageNegative,
        forgeContextMemoEl: bp.contextMemo,
        forgeContextSummaryEl: bp.contextSummary,
        forgeContextLoreEl: bp.contextLore,
        forgeContextGlossaryEl: bp.contextGlossary,
        forgeMemoryDigestEl: bp.memoryDigest,
        forgeMemoryEntriesEl: bp.memoryEntries,
        forgeMemoryCarryEl: bp.memoryCarry
      };
      Object.entries(map).forEach(([id, value]) => {
        const el = document.getElementById(id);
        if (el && el.value !== String(value || '')) el.value = String(value || '');
      });
    },

    importFromStory() {
      const story = this.getLoopStory();
      if (!story) return;
      this.state.board.primary = story.state?.primary ? this.cloneCharacterForBoard({source:'story', ...story.state.primary, short: buildCharacterShort(story.state.primary)}) : null;
      this.state.board.user = story.state?.user ? this.cloneCharacterForBoard({source:'story', ...story.state.user, short: buildCharacterShort(story.state.user)}) : null;
      this.state.board.cast = Array.isArray(story.state?.inScene) ? story.state.inScene.map(item => this.cloneCharacterForBoard({source:'story', ...item, short: buildCharacterShort(item)})) : [];
      const scenarioText = story.els?.scenario?.value || story.state?.scenario || '';
      this.state.board.world = scenarioText.trim() ? {
        id: 'story_world',
        source: 'story',
        title: 'Current Story Scenario',
        imageUrl: '',
        short: shortText(scenarioText),
        premise: shortText(scenarioText),
        scenario: scenarioText,
        tags: ['story import']
      } : null;
      this.state.blueprint = Object.assign(this.defaultBlueprint(), {
        inspiration: story.els?.inspiration?.value || story.state?.inspiration || '',
        whatNext: story.els?.whatNext?.value || story.state?.whatNext || '',
        writingInstructions: story.els?.writingInstructions?.value || story.state?.writingInstructions || '',
        imageCore: story.els?.imageCore?.value || story.state?.imageCore || '',
        imagePositive: story.els?.imagePositive?.value || story.state?.imagePositive || '',
        imageNegative: story.els?.imageNegative?.value || story.state?.imageNegative || '',
        contextMemo: story.els?.contextMemo?.value || story.state?.contextMemo || '',
        contextSummary: story.els?.contextSummary?.value || story.state?.contextSummary || '',
        contextLore: story.els?.contextLore?.value || story.state?.contextLore || '',
        contextGlossary: story.els?.contextGlossary?.value || story.state?.contextGlossary || ''
      });
      this.clearSelection();
      this.save();
      this.render();
      this.syncBridge('story->forge', {
        storyPayload: {
          scenario: scenarioText,
          mode: 'full-import'
        }
      });
      if (story.setStatus) story.setStatus('story imported into forge');
    },

    pullRuntimeOnly() {
      const story = this.getLoopStory();
      if (!story) return;
      this.state.board.primary = story.state?.primary ? this.cloneCharacterForBoard({source:'story', ...story.state.primary, short: buildCharacterShort(story.state.primary)}) : null;
      this.state.board.user = story.state?.user ? this.cloneCharacterForBoard({source:'story', ...story.state.user, short: buildCharacterShort(story.state.user)}) : null;
      this.state.board.cast = Array.isArray(story.state?.inScene) ? story.state.inScene.map(item => this.cloneCharacterForBoard({source:'story', ...item, short: buildCharacterShort(item)})) : [];
      this.clearSelection();
      this.save();
      this.render();
      this.syncBridge('story->forge', {
        storyPayload: { mode: 'runtime-only' }
      });
      if (story.setStatus) story.setStatus('runtime cast pulled into forge');
    },

    pullImagePrompt() {
      this.ensureLoaded();
      const runtime = this.captureImageRuntime();
      if (!runtime.prompt && !runtime.imageCore) {
        this.getLoopStory()?.setStatus?.('no current image prompt to pull', {error:true});
        return;
      }
      if (runtime.imageCore) this.state.blueprint.imageCore = runtime.imageCore;
      if (runtime.prompt) {
        this.state.blueprint.imagePositive = runtime.prompt;
        if (!String(this.state.blueprint.inspiration || '').trim()) this.state.blueprint.inspiration = shortText(runtime.prompt);
      }
      this.state.dockTab = 'image';
      this.save();
      this.render();
      this.syncBridge('image->forge', { imagePayload: runtime });
      this.getLoopStory()?.setStatus?.('current image prompt pulled into forge');
    },

    sendToStory() {
      const story = this.getLoopStory();
      if (!story) return;
