      const board = this.state.board || {};
      const bp = Object.assign(this.defaultBlueprint(), this.state.blueprint || {});
      if (board.primary) {
        story.state.primary = {
          id: board.primary.id || `forge_primary_${Date.now()}`,
          name: board.primary.name || 'Primary',
          avatarUrl: board.primary.avatarUrl || '',
          description: board.primary.description || ''
        };
      }
      if (board.user) {
        story.state.user = {
          id: board.user.id || `forge_user_${Date.now()}`,
          name: board.user.name || 'User',
          avatarUrl: board.user.avatarUrl || '',
          description: board.user.description || ''
        };
      }
      story.state.inScene = Array.isArray(board.cast) ? board.cast.map((item, idx) => ({
        id: item.id || `forge_scene_${Date.now()}_${idx}`,
        name: item.name || `In Scene ${idx+1}`,
        avatarUrl: item.avatarUrl || '',
        description: item.description || ''
      })) : [];
      if (board.world && story.els?.scenario) {
        story.els.scenario.value = buildWorldStoryPackage(board.world);
      }
      if (story.els?.inspiration) story.els.inspiration.value = bp.inspiration || '';
      if (story.els?.whatNext) story.els.whatNext.value = bp.whatNext || '';
      if (story.els?.writingInstructions) story.els.writingInstructions.value = bp.writingInstructions || '';
      if (story.els?.imageCore) story.els.imageCore.value = bp.imageCore || '';
      if (story.els?.imagePositive) story.els.imagePositive.value = bp.imagePositive || '';
      if (story.els?.imageNegative) story.els.imageNegative.value = bp.imageNegative || '';
      if (story.els?.contextMemo) story.els.contextMemo.value = bp.contextMemo || '';
      if (story.els?.contextSummary) story.els.contextSummary.value = bp.contextSummary || '';
      if (story.els?.contextLore) story.els.contextLore.value = bp.contextLore || '';
      if (story.els?.contextGlossary) story.els.contextGlossary.value = bp.contextGlossary || '';
      const backgroundSeed = this.buildStoryBackgroundSeed();
      const visualSeed = this.buildImagePromptFromBoard();
      this.syncBridge('forge->story', {
        storyPayload: {
          scenario: story.els?.scenario?.value || '',
          backgroundSeed,
          visualSeed,
          memoryDigest: bp.memoryDigest || '',
          memoryCarry: bp.memoryCarry || ''
        }
      });
      if (typeof story.persistSnapshot === 'function') story.persistSnapshot();
      if (typeof story.renderAll === 'function') story.renderAll();
      if (typeof switchPage === 'function') switchPage('story');
      if (story.setStatus) story.setStatus(backgroundSeed ? 'forge blueprint sent to story • background seed staged' : 'forge blueprint sent to story');
    },

    buildImagePromptFromBoard() {
      const board = this.state.board || {};
      const bp = Object.assign(this.defaultBlueprint(), this.state.blueprint || {});
      const castNames = (board.cast || []).map(item => item.name).filter(Boolean);
      const parts = [
        board.primary?.name ? `Primary persona: ${board.primary.name}` : '',
        board.user?.name ? `Counterpart persona: ${board.user.name}` : '',
        castNames.length ? `In-scene cast: ${castNames.join(', ')}` : '',
        board.world?.title ? `World: ${board.world.title}` : '',
        board.world?.premise || '',
        bp.inspiration ? `Seed: ${bp.inspiration}` : '',
        bp.whatNext ? `Moment to visualize: ${bp.whatNext}` : '',
        bp.imagePositive ? `Visual intent: ${bp.imagePositive}` : ''
      ].map(v => String(v || '').trim()).filter(Boolean);
      const prompt = parts.join('. ');
      return {
        prompt,
        negative: bp.imageNegative || '',
        imageCore: bp.imageCore || ''
      };
    },

    applyImageCoreToGenerator(core) {
      if (!core || !window.CORE_REGISTRY || !window.CORE_REGISTRY[core]) return;
      window.selectedCore = core;
      document.querySelectorAll('#coreGrid .core-item, #coreGridLoop .core-item').forEach(el => {
        el.classList.toggle('active', el.getAttribute('data-value') === core);
      });
      if (typeof window.updateSignatureSection === 'function') window.updateSignatureSection();
    },

    sendToImage() {
      const result = this.buildImagePromptFromBoard();
      const promptEl = document.getElementById('promptInput');
      if (promptEl) {
        promptEl.value = result.prompt;
        promptEl.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
      }
      this.applyImageCoreToGenerator(result.imageCore);
      this.syncBridge('forge->image', {
        imagePayload: {
          source: 'forge',
          prompt: result.prompt,
          negative: result.negative || '',
          imageCore: result.imageCore || '',
          backgroundSeed: this.buildStoryBackgroundSeed(),
          exportedAt: new Date().toISOString()
        }
      });
      if (typeof switchPage === 'function') switchPage('image');
      const story = this.getLoopStory();
      if (story?.setStatus) story.setStatus('forge blueprint sent to image');
    },

    getAssemblyPayload() {
      this.ensureLoaded();
      return {
        version: 1,
        sourceTab: this.state.sourceTab || 'characters',
        board: clone(this.state.board || {primary:null,user:null,cast:[],world:null}),
        blueprint: Object.assign(this.defaultBlueprint(), clone(this.state.blueprint || {})),
        exportedAt: new Date().toISOString()
      };
    },

    applyAssemblyPayload(payload) {
      if (!payload || typeof payload !== 'object') return false;
      this.ensureLoaded();
      this.state.sourceTab = payload.sourceTab === 'worlds' ? 'worlds' : 'characters';
      this.state.board = Object.assign({primary:null,user:null,cast:[],world:null}, clone(payload.board || {}));
      if (!Array.isArray(this.state.board.cast)) this.state.board.cast = [];
      this.state.blueprint = Object.assign(this.defaultBlueprint(), clone(payload.blueprint || {}));
      this.clearSelection();
      this.state.activePresetId = null;
      this.save();
      this.render();
      this.syncBridge('forge');
      return true;
    },

    exportAssembly() {
      try {
        const payload = this.getAssemblyPayload();
        const name = String(document.getElementById('forgePresetNameEl')?.value || 'forge-assembly').trim() || 'forge-assembly';
        const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2)], {type:'application/json'});
        const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        const a = document.createElement('a');
        a.href = url;
        a.download = `${name.replace(/[^a-z0-9_-]+/gi,'-').replace(/^-+|-+$/g,'') || 'forge-assembly'}.json`;
        a.click();
        setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 30000);
        this.getLoopStory()?.setStatus?.('forge assembly exported');
      } catch (e) {
        console.error(e);
      }
    },

    triggerImportAssembly() {
      const input = document.getElementById('forgeImportFileEl');
      if (!input) return;
      input.value = '';
      input.click();
    },

    async importAssemblyFromFile(file) {
      if (!file) return;
      try {
        const text = await file.text();
        const payload = JSON.parse(text);
        if (this.applyAssemblyPayload(payload)) {
          this.getLoopStory()?.setStatus?.('forge assembly imported');
        }
      } catch (e) {
        console.error(e);
        this.getLoopStory()?.setStatus?.('forge import failed', {error:true});
      }
    },

    async copyAssemblyPayload() {
      try {
        const payload = this.getAssemblyPayload();
        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2));
        this.getLoopStory()?.setStatus?.('forge payload copied');
      } catch (e) {
        console.error(e);
      }
    },

    async deriveCharacter(kind) {
      this.ensureLoaded();
      const story = this.getLoopStory();
      if (typeof ai !== 'function') return;
      const primary = this.state.board.primary;
      const world = this.state.board.world;
      if (!primary) {
        story?.setStatus?.('forge needs a primary persona first', {error:true});
        return;
      }
      try {
        story?.setStatus?.(`forge generating ${kind}...`);
        const bp = Object.assign(this.defaultBlueprint(), this.state.blueprint || {});
        const instruction = [
          `Generate one roleplay-ready ${kind} character derived from the assembly below.`,
          'Return exactly this structure: Name:, Species & Gender:, Visual Appearance:, Personality:, Background Lore:, Roleplay Behavior Examples:.',
          bp.inspiration ? `Seed: ${bp.inspiration}` : '',
          bp.writingInstructions ? `Direction: ${bp.writingInstructions}` : '',
          bp.contextLore ? `Lore: ${bp.contextLore}` : '',
          `Primary Persona:
${primary.name}
${primary.description || primary.short || ''}`,
          world ? `World Seed:
${world.title}
${world.premise || ''}
${world.scenario || ''}` : ''
        ].filter(Boolean).join('\n\n');
        const data = await ai({instruction});
        const text = String(data?.text || '').trim();
        if (!text) throw new Error('empty response');
        const name = text.match(/Name:\s*(.+)/i)?.[1]?.trim() || `${kind} ${Date.now()}`;
        const description = text.replace(/\r/g,'').trim();
        const item = {
          type: 'character',
          source: 'forge',
          id: `forge_${kind}_${Date.now()}`,
          name,
          avatarUrl: '',
          short: shortText(description),
          description
        };
        this.state.selected = this.keyFor(item);
        this.assignCharacter('cast', item);
        if (kind === 'companion' && !this.state.board.user) this.state.board.user = this.cloneCharacterForBoard(item);
        this.state.selected = null;
        this.save();
        this.render();
        story?.setStatus?.(`forge ${kind} ready`);
      } catch (e) {
        console.error(e);
        story?.setStatus?.(`forge ${kind} failed`, {error:true});
      }
    },

    generateCompanion() {
      return this.deriveCharacter('companion');
    },

    generateRival() {
      return this.deriveCharacter('rival');
    },

    async generateWorldFromBoard() {
      this.ensureLoaded();
      const story = this.getLoopStory();
      if (typeof ai !== 'function') return;
      const board = this.state.board || {};
      if (!board.primary && !board.user && !(board.cast || []).length) {
        story?.setStatus?.('forge needs personas before generating world', {error:true});
        return;
      }
      try {
        story?.setStatus?.('forge generating world...');
        const bp = Object.assign(this.defaultBlueprint(), this.state.blueprint || {});
        const instruction = [
          'Generate one world seed for the forged assembly below.',
          'Return exactly these sections: Title:, Premise:, Scenario:, Tags:.',
          bp.inspiration ? `Seed: ${bp.inspiration}` : '',
          bp.contextLore ? `Existing lore: ${bp.contextLore}` : '',
          board.primary ? `Primary Persona:
${board.primary.name}
${board.primary.description || board.primary.short || ''}` : '',
          board.user ? `User Persona:
${board.user.name}
${board.user.description || board.user.short || ''}` : '',
          (board.cast || []).length ? `Cast:
${(board.cast || []).map(item => `${item.name}: ${item.description || item.short || ''}`).join('\n')}` : ''
        ].filter(Boolean).join('\n\n');
        const data = await ai({instruction});
        const text = String(data?.text || '').trim();
        if (!text) throw new Error('empty response');
        const title = text.match(/Title:\s*(.+)/i)?.[1]?.trim() || 'World';
        const premise = text.match(/Premise:\s*([\s\S]*?)(?:\n\s*Scenario:|$)/i)?.[1]?.trim() || '';
        const scenario = text.match(/Scenario:\s*([\s\S]*?)(?:\n\s*Tags:|$)/i)?.[1]?.trim() || premise;
        const tagsText = text.match(/Tags:\s*(.+)/i)?.[1]?.trim() || 'forge';
        this.state.board.world = {
          id: `forge_world_${Date.now()}`,
          source: 'forge',
          title,
          imageUrl: '',
          short: shortText(scenario || premise),
          premise,
          scenario,
          tags: tagsText.split(/[,|]/).map(v => v.trim()).filter(Boolean).slice(0,4)
        };
        this.save();
        this.render();
        story?.setStatus?.('forge world ready');
      } catch (e) {
        console.error(e);
        story?.setStatus?.('forge world failed', {error:true});
      }
    },

    compressBoardToMemory() {
      this.ensureLoaded();
      const board = this.state.board || {};
      const bp = Object.assign(this.defaultBlueprint(), this.state.blueprint || {});
      const summaryParts = [];
      if (board.primary?.name) summaryParts.push(`Primary: ${board.primary.name}`);
      if (board.user?.name) summaryParts.push(`User: ${board.user.name}`);
      if ((board.cast || []).length) summaryParts.push(`Cast: ${(board.cast || []).map(item => item.name).join(', ')}`);
      if (board.world?.title) summaryParts.push(`World: ${board.world.title}`);
      if (board.world?.scenario) summaryParts.push(shortText(board.world.scenario));
      if (bp.whatNext) summaryParts.push(`Next beat: ${bp.whatNext}`);
      const memoryLines = [];
      if (board.primary?.short) memoryLines.push(`- ${board.primary.name}: ${shortText(board.primary.short)}`);
      if (board.user?.short) memoryLines.push(`- ${board.user.name}: ${shortText(board.user.short)}`);
      (board.cast || []).slice(0,4).forEach(item => memoryLines.push(`- ${item.name}: ${shortText(item.short || item.description || '')}`));
      if (board.world?.premise) memoryLines.push(`- world premise: ${shortText(board.world.premise)}`);
      if (bp.contextLore) memoryLines.push(`- lore pressure: ${shortText(bp.contextLore)}`);
      this.state.blueprint.memoryDigest = summaryParts.join(' | ');
      this.state.blueprint.memoryEntries = memoryLines.join('\n');
      this.state.blueprint.memoryCarry = [bp.imagePositive, bp.contextSummary, bp.whatNext].filter(Boolean).join('\n');
      this.state.dockTab = 'memory';
      this.save();
      this.renderBlueprintDock();
      this.getLoopStory()?.setStatus?.('forge compressed to memory');
    },

    async generateScenarioFromBoard() {
      const story = this.getLoopStory();
      const board = this.state.board || {};
      const bp = Object.assign(this.defaultBlueprint(), this.state.blueprint || {});
      const btn = null;
      if (btn) btn.disabled = true;
      try {
        story?.setStatus?.('forge generating scenario...');
        const primary = board.primary ? `${board.primary.name}\n${board.primary.description || '(Not specified.)'}` : '(None)';
        const user = board.user ? `${board.user.name}\n${board.user.description || '(Not specified.)'}` : '(None)';
        const cast = (board.cast || []).map(item => `${item.name}: ${item.description || item.short || '(No description.)'}`).join('\n');
        const world = board.world ? `${board.world.title}\n${board.world.premise || ''}\n${board.world.scenario || ''}` : '(None)';
        const instruction = [
          'Write a short, compelling roleplay/story scenario paragraph for the following forged assembly. It must feel ready to enter Story immediately.',
          bp.inspiration ? `Inspiration: ${bp.inspiration}` : 'Inspiration: Use the assembly itself.',
          bp.writingInstructions ? `Direction: ${bp.writingInstructions}` : '',
          bp.contextLore ? `Lore: ${bp.contextLore}` : '',
          '# Primary Persona', primary,
          '# User Persona', user,
          cast ? `# In-Scene Cast\n${cast}` : '',
          '# World Seed', world
        ].filter(Boolean).join('\n\n');
        const data = await ai({instruction});
        const scenario = String(data?.text || '').trim();
        if (scenario) {
          this.state.board.world = Object.assign({
            id: 'forge_generated_world',
            source: 'forge',
            title: board.world?.title || 'Scenario Seed',
            imageUrl: board.world?.imageUrl || '',
            short: shortText(scenario),
            premise: board.world?.premise || shortText(scenario),
            scenario,
            tags: Array.isArray(board.world?.tags) ? board.world.tags.slice() : ['forge']
          }, this.state.board.world || {});
          this.state.board.world.scenario = scenario;
          this.state.board.world.short = shortText(scenario);
          this.save();
          this.render();
          story?.setStatus?.('forge scenario ready');
        }
      } catch (e) {
        console.error(e);
        story?.setStatus?.('forge scenario failed', {error:true});
      } finally {
        if (btn) btn.disabled = false;
      }
    },

    getComparableBlueprint(value=null) {
      return Object.assign(this.defaultBlueprint(), clone(value || this.state.blueprint || {}));
    },

    getComparableBoard(value=null) {
      return this.normalizeBoard(value || this.state.board || {});
    },

    isPresetDirty(preset) {
      if (!preset) return false;
      const current = JSON.stringify({
        sourceTab: this.state.sourceTab || 'characters',
        board: this.getComparableBoard(),
        blueprint: this.getComparableBlueprint()
      });
      const saved = JSON.stringify({
        sourceTab: preset.sourceTab || 'characters',
        board: this.getComparableBoard(preset.board),
        blueprint: this.getComparableBlueprint(preset.blueprint)
      });
      return current !== saved;
    },

    createPresetSnapshot(name, id=null, sourcePreset=null) {
      return {
        id: id || `preset_${Date.now()}`,
        name,
        sourceTab: this.state.sourceTab,
        board: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.state.board || {})),
        blueprint: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.state.blueprint || this.defaultBlueprint())),
        createdAt: sourcePreset?.createdAt || new Date().toISOString(),
        updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
      };
    },

    presetMetaText(preset) {
      const board = preset?.board || {};
      const bits = [];
      if (board.primary?.name) bits.push(`P: ${board.primary.name}`);
      if (board.user?.name) bits.push(`U: ${board.user.name}`);
      if (Array.isArray(board.cast) && board.cast.length) bits.push(`Cast ${board.cast.length}`);
      if (board.world?.title) bits.push(`World: ${board.world.title}`);
      return bits.join(' · ') || 'Empty assembly';
    },

    presetPreviewText(preset) {
      const bp = Object.assign(this.defaultBlueprint(), preset?.blueprint || {});
      const board = preset?.board || {};
      return shortText(
        bp.inspiration || bp.whatNext || bp.writingInstructions || bp.contextSummary || board.world?.short || board.primary?.short || '',
        'Saved board and blueprint snapshot.'
      );
    },

    saveAssemblyPreset() {
      this.ensureLoaded();
      const input = document.getElementById('forgePresetNameEl');
      const name = String(input?.value || '').trim() || `assembly-${Date.now()}`;
      const preset = this.createPresetSnapshot(name);
      this.state.presets = [preset, ...(this.state.presets || []).filter(item => item.id !== preset.id)].slice(0, 12);
      this.state.activePresetId = preset.id;
      this.save();
      this.renderPresetList();
      const story = this.getLoopStory();
      story?.setStatus?.('forge assembly saved');
    },

    updateActivePreset(id=null) {
      this.ensureLoaded();
      const targetId = id || this.state.activePresetId;
      const current = (this.state.presets || []).find(item => item.id === targetId);
      if (!current) {
        this.saveAssemblyPreset();
        return;
      }
      const input = document.getElementById('forgePresetNameEl');
      const name = String(input?.value || current.name || '').trim() || current.name || `assembly-${Date.now()}`;
      const next = this.createPresetSnapshot(name, current.id, current);
      this.state.presets = (this.state.presets || []).map(item => item.id === current.id ? next : item);
      this.state.activePresetId = current.id;
      this.save();
      this.renderPresetList();
      this.getLoopStory()?.setStatus?.('forge preset updated');
    },

    duplicatePreset(id) {
      this.ensureLoaded();
      const current = (this.state.presets || []).find(item => item.id === id);
      if (!current) return;
      const duplicate = Object.assign({}, clone(current), {
        id: `preset_${Date.now()}`,
        name: `${current.name} copy`,
        createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
      });
      this.state.presets = [duplicate, ...(this.state.presets || [])].slice(0, 12);
      this.state.activePresetId = duplicate.id;
      const input = document.getElementById('forgePresetNameEl');
      if (input) input.value = duplicate.name;
      this.save();
      this.renderPresetList();
      this.getLoopStory()?.setStatus?.('forge preset duplicated');
    },

    renamePreset(id) {
      this.ensureLoaded();
      const current = (this.state.presets || []).find(item => item.id === id);
      if (!current) return;
      const nextName = window.prompt('Rename preset', current.name || 'assembly');
      if (nextName === null) return;
      const clean = String(nextName || '').trim();
      if (!clean) return;
      current.name = clean;
      current.updatedAt = new Date().toISOString();
      this.state.activePresetId = id;
      const input = document.getElementById('forgePresetNameEl');
      if (input) input.value = clean;
      this.save();
      this.renderPresetList();
      this.getLoopStory()?.setStatus?.('forge preset renamed');
    },

    loadPreset(id) {
      this.ensureLoaded();
      const preset = (this.state.presets || []).find(item => item.id === id);
      if (!preset) return;
      this.state.sourceTab = preset.sourceTab || 'characters';
      this.state.board = Object.assign({primary:null,user:null,cast:[],world:null}, preset.board || {});
      this.state.blueprint = Object.assign(this.defaultBlueprint(), preset.blueprint || {});
      this.clearSelection();
      this.state.activePresetId = preset.id;
      const input = document.getElementById('forgePresetNameEl');
      if (input) input.value = preset.name || '';
      this.save();
      this.render();
      this.getLoopStory()?.setStatus?.('forge preset loaded');
    },

    deletePreset(id) {
      this.ensureLoaded();
      this.state.presets = (this.state.presets || []).filter(item => item.id !== id);
      if (this.state.activePresetId === id) this.state.activePresetId = null;
      const input = document.getElementById('forgePresetNameEl');
      if (input && this.state.activePresetId === null) input.value = '';
      this.save();
      this.renderPresetList();
      this.getLoopStory()?.setStatus?.('forge preset removed');
    },

    saveSelectedToLibrary() {
      const story = this.getLoopStory();
      const selection = this.getInspectorSelection();
      const selected = selection?.item;
      if (!story || !selected) return;
      if ((selection?.type || selected.type) === 'character' && typeof story.upsertLibraryCharacter === 'function') {
        story.upsertLibraryCharacter(clone(selected));
        if (story.setStatus) story.setStatus('character saved to library');
      }
      if ((selection?.type || selected.type) === 'world' && typeof story.upsertLibraryWorld === 'function') {
        story.upsertLibraryWorld(clone(selected));
        if (story.setStatus) story.setStatus('world saved to library');
      }
      this.render();
    },

    renderSourceList() {
      const wrap = document.getElementById('forgeSourceList');
      if (!wrap) return;
      const mode = this.state.sourceTab === 'worlds' ? 'worlds' : 'characters';
      const items = mode === 'worlds' ? this.getWorlds() : this.getCharacters();
      document.getElementById('forgeTabCharacters')?.classList.toggle('active', mode === 'characters');
      document.getElementById('forgeTabWorlds')?.classList.toggle('active', mode === 'worlds');
      const sourceTitle = document.getElementById('forgeSourceTitle');
      if (sourceTitle) sourceTitle.textContent = mode === 'worlds' ? 'World Source' : 'Character Source';
      const assemblyTitle = document.getElementById('forgeAssemblyTitle');
      if (assemblyTitle) assemblyTitle.textContent = 'Worldbuilding & Characters Assembly';
      const inspectorTitle = document.getElementById('forgeInspectorTitle');
      if (inspectorTitle) inspectorTitle.textContent = mode === 'worlds' ? 'World Inspector' : 'Character Inspector';

      if (!items.length) {
        wrap.innerHTML = `<div class="forge-empty-note">Nothing to assemble yet. Save ${mode === 'worlds' ? 'world cards' : 'characters'} from Hall or Library first, then they will appear here.</div>`;
        return;
      }

      wrap.innerHTML = '';
      items.forEach(item => {
        const active = this.state.selected === this.keyFor(item);
        const el = document.createElement('div');
        const isWorld = item.type === 'world';
        el.className = 'forge-source-item' + (active ? ' active' : '') + (isWorld ? ' is-world' : '');
        const thumbStyle = item.imageUrl || item.avatarUrl
          ? `background-image:url('${String(item.imageUrl || item.avatarUrl).replace(/'/g, "%27")}');`
          : '';
        const label = isWorld ? item.title : item.name;
        const desc = item.short || '';
        if (isWorld) {
          el.innerHTML = `
            <div class="forge-source-thumb world" style="${thumbStyle}">${thumbStyle ? '' : this.avatarInitial(label)}</div>
            <div class="forge-source-main">
              <div class="forge-source-name">${this.escapeHtml(label)}</div>
              <div class="forge-source-desc">${this.escapeHtml(desc)}</div>
              <div class="forge-badge-row">${(item.tags || []).slice(0,3).map(tag => `<span class="forge-badge">${this.escapeHtml(tag)}</span>`).join('')}</div>
            </div>`;
        } else {
          el.innerHTML = `
            <div class="forge-source-thumb" style="${thumbStyle}">${thumbStyle ? '' : this.avatarInitial(label)}</div>
            <div class="forge-source-main">
              <div class="forge-source-name">${this.escapeHtml(label)}</div>
              <div class="forge-source-desc">${this.escapeHtml(desc)}</div>
              <div class="forge-badge-row">
                <span class="forge-badge">${this.escapeHtml(item.source)}</span>
              </div>
            </div>`;
        }
        el.onclick = () => this.selectItem(this.keyFor(item));
        wrap.appendChild(el);
      });
    },

    renderCharacterSlot(slotId, item, label) {
      const wrap = document.getElementById(slotId);
      if (!wrap) return;
      const slotKind = slotId.includes('Primary') ? 'primary' : 'user';
      wrap.classList.toggle('is-selected', !!item && this.state.selectedBoard?.kind === slotKind);
      wrap.innerHTML = `
        <div class="forge-slot-head">
          <div class="forge-slot-label">${this.escapeHtml(label)}</div>
          ${item ? `<button class="forge-slot-clear" type="button" title="Clear" data-clear>✕</button>` : ''}
        </div>`;
      if (!item) {
        wrap.innerHTML += `<div class="forge-slot-empty">Select a character from the left, then assign them here.</div>`;
      } else {
        const thumbStyle = item.avatarUrl ? `background-image:url('${String(item.avatarUrl).replace(/'/g, "%27")}');` : '';
        wrap.innerHTML += `
          <div class="forge-slot-entity is-clickable" data-select-board>
            <div class="forge-entity-thumb" style="${thumbStyle}">${thumbStyle ? '' : this.avatarInitial(item.name)}</div>
            <div class="forge-entity-main">
              <div class="forge-entity-name">${this.escapeHtml(item.name)}</div>
              <div class="forge-badge-row"><span class="forge-badge">${this.escapeHtml(item.source || 'forge')}</span></div>
              <div class="forge-entity-desc">${this.escapeHtml(item.short || item.description || '')}</div>
            </div>
          </div>`;
      }
      wrap.querySelector('[data-clear]')?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        e.stopPropagation();
        this.removeSlot(slotKind);
      });
      wrap.querySelector('[data-select-board]')?.addEventListener('click', () => this.selectBoard(slotKind, item?.id || ''));
    },

    renderWorldSlot() {
      const wrap = document.getElementById('forgeWorldSlot');
      if (!wrap) return;
      const item = this.state.board.world;
      wrap.classList.toggle('is-selected', !!item && this.state.selectedBoard?.kind === 'world');
      wrap.innerHTML = `
        <div class="forge-slot-head">
          <div class="forge-slot-label">World / Scenario Seed</div>
          ${item ? `<button class="forge-slot-clear" type="button" title="Clear" data-clear>✕</button>` : ''}
        </div>`;
      if (!item) {
        wrap.innerHTML += `<div class="forge-slot-empty">Select a world card from the left, then pin it here as the scenario seed.</div>`;
      } else {
        const bg = item.imageUrl ? `background-image:url('${String(item.imageUrl).replace(/'/g, "%27")}');` : '';
        wrap.innerHTML += `
          <div class="forge-slot-entity world is-clickable" data-select-board>
            <div class="forge-entity-thumb world" style="${bg}">${bg ? '' : this.avatarInitial(item.title)}</div>
            <div class="forge-entity-main">
              <div class="forge-entity-name">${this.escapeHtml(item.title)}</div>
              <div class="forge-badge-row">
                <span class="forge-badge">${this.escapeHtml(item.source || 'forge')}</span>
                ${(item.tags || []).slice(0,2).map(tag => `<span class="forge-badge">${this.escapeHtml(tag)}</span>`).join('')}
              </div>
              <div class="forge-entity-desc">${this.escapeHtml(item.short || item.premise || '')}</div>
            </div>
          </div>`;
      }
      wrap.querySelector('[data-clear]')?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        e.stopPropagation();
        this.removeSlot('world');
      });
      wrap.querySelector('[data-select-board]')?.addEventListener('click', () => this.selectBoard('world', item?.id || ''));
    },

    renderCastSlot() {
      const wrap = document.getElementById('forgeCastSlot');
      if (!wrap) return;
      const cast = Array.isArray(this.state.board.cast) ? this.state.board.cast : [];
      wrap.classList.toggle('is-selected', !!cast.length && this.state.selectedBoard?.kind === 'cast');
      wrap.innerHTML = `
        <div class="forge-slot-head">
          <div class="forge-slot-label">In-Scene Cast</div>
        </div>
        <div class="forge-cast-shell">
          ${cast.length ? `<div class="forge-cast-list"></div>` : `<div class="forge-slot-empty">Use “add to cast” on a character to build the live ensemble for Story.</div>`}
        </div>`;
      const list = wrap.querySelector('.forge-cast-list');
      if (list) {
        cast.forEach(item => {
          const chip = document.createElement('div');
          const active = this.state.selectedBoard?.kind === 'cast' && String(this.state.selectedBoard?.id || '') === String(item.id || '');
          chip.className = 'forge-cast-chip' + (active ? ' is-selected' : '');
          const thumbStyle = item.avatarUrl ? `background-image:url('${String(item.avatarUrl).replace(/'/g, "%27")}');` : '';
          chip.innerHTML = `
            <div class="forge-cast-thumb" style="${thumbStyle}">${thumbStyle ? '' : this.avatarInitial(item.name)}</div>
            <div class="forge-cast-name">${this.escapeHtml(item.name)}</div>
            <button class="forge-cast-remove" type="button" title="Remove">✕</button>`;
          chip.onclick = () => this.selectBoard('cast', item.id || '');
          chip.querySelector('.forge-cast-remove').onclick = (e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
            this.removeSlot('cast', item.id);
          };
          list.appendChild(chip);
        });
      }
    },

    renderBoard() {
      this.renderCharacterSlot('forgePrimarySlot', this.state.board.primary, 'Primary Persona');
      this.renderCharacterSlot('forgeUserSlot', this.state.board.user, 'User Persona');
      this.renderCastSlot();
      this.renderWorldSlot();
    },

    renderPresetList() {
      const wrap = document.getElementById('forgePresetList');
      if (!wrap) return;
      const presets = this.state.presets || [];
      if (!presets.length) {
        wrap.innerHTML = '<div class="forge-note">No saved assemblies yet.</div>';
        return;
      }
      wrap.innerHTML = '';
      presets.forEach(item => {
        const card = document.createElement('div');
        const active = this.state.activePresetId === item.id;
        const dirty = active && this.isPresetDirty(item);
        card.className = 'forge-preset-chip forge-preset-card' + (active ? ' active' : '') + (dirty ? ' is-dirty' : '');
        const stateBits = [];
        if (active) stateBits.push('active');
        if (dirty) stateBits.push('modified');
        const metaText = [this.presetMetaText(item), stateBits.join(' · ')].filter(Boolean).join(' — ');
        card.innerHTML = `
          <div class="forge-preset-card-main">
            <div class="forge-preset-card-head">
              <div class="forge-preset-card-title">${this.escapeHtml(item.name || 'Untitled preset')}</div>
              <div class="forge-preset-card-meta">${this.escapeHtml(metaText)}</div>
            </div>
            <div class="forge-preset-card-preview">${this.escapeHtml(this.presetPreviewText(item))}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="forge-preset-card-actions">
            <button type="button" title="Load">load</button>
            <button type="button" title="Update" ${dirty ? '' : 'disabled'}>update</button>
            <button type="button" title="Duplicate">dup</button>
            <button type="button" title="Rename">rename</button>
            <button type="button" title="Delete">✕</button>
          </div>`;
        const buttons = card.querySelectorAll('button');
        buttons[0].onclick = (e) => { e.stopPropagation(); this.loadPreset(item.id); };
        buttons[1].onclick = (e) => { e.stopPropagation(); this.state.activePresetId = item.id; this.updateActivePreset(item.id); };
        buttons[2].onclick = (e) => { e.stopPropagation(); this.duplicatePreset(item.id); };
        buttons[3].onclick = (e) => { e.stopPropagation(); this.renamePreset(item.id); };
        buttons[4].onclick = (e) => { e.stopPropagation(); this.deletePreset(item.id); };
        card.onclick = () => this.loadPreset(item.id);
        wrap.appendChild(card);
      });
    },

    renderInspector() {
      const wrap = document.getElementById('forgeInspector');
      if (!wrap) return;
      const selection = this.getInspectorSelection();
      const item = selection?.item || null;
      if (!item) {
        const mode = this.state.sourceTab === 'worlds' ? 'worlds' : 'characters';
        wrap.innerHTML = `
          <div class="forge-empty-note">Select a ${mode === 'worlds' ? 'world card' : 'character'} from the left, or click a placed item on the board. Forge reads both the raw source and the current assembly state.</div>
          <div class="forge-inspector-section">
            <div class="forge-inspector-section-title">Flow</div>
            <div class="forge-inspector-status">${mode === 'worlds' ? 'Pick a world, send it into World / Scenario Seed, then refine direction, context, and image prompt before moving it to Story.' : 'Pick a character, place it as Primary, User, or Cast, then tune the blueprint before sending the whole assembly forward.'}</div>
          </div>`;
        return;
      }
      const isWorld = (selection?.type || item.type) === 'world';
      const bg = item.imageUrl || item.avatarUrl ? `background-image:url('${String(item.imageUrl || item.avatarUrl).replace(/'/g, "%27")}');` : '';
      const title = isWorld ? item.title : item.name;
      const detailText = isWorld ? (item.scenario || item.premise || item.short || '') : (item.description || item.short || '');
      const sourceLabel = selection?.origin === 'board' ? `Board · ${selection.slot}` : `Source · ${item.source || 'forge'}`;
      const boardStatus = selection?.origin === 'board'
        ? `Currently placed on ${selection.slot}.`
        : isWorld
          ? (this.state.board.world ? 'Not placed yet. You can replace or append to the current World / Scenario Seed.' : 'Not placed yet. Set it as the World / Scenario Seed to anchor the assembly.')
          : 'Not placed yet. Use one of the placement actions below.';
      const tags = isWorld ? (item.tags || []).slice(0,4).map(tag => `<span class="forge-badge">${this.escapeHtml(tag)}</span>`).join('') : '';
      wrap.innerHTML = `
        <div class="forge-inspector-shell">
          <div class="forge-inspector-preview" style="${bg}">${bg ? '' : this.avatarInitial(title)}</div>
          <div class="forge-inspector-head">
            <div class="forge-inspector-kicker">${isWorld ? 'World Inspector' : 'Character Inspector'}</div>
            <div class="forge-entity-name">${this.escapeHtml(title)}</div>
            <div class="forge-inspector-meta">
              <span class="forge-badge">${this.escapeHtml(sourceLabel)}</span>
              ${selection?.origin === 'board' ? `<span class="forge-badge">active in assembly</span>` : `<span class="forge-badge">ready for placement</span>`}
              ${tags}
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="forge-inspector-section">
            <div class="forge-inspector-section-title">Placement</div>
            <div class="forge-inspector-actions primary">
              ${isWorld
                ? `<button class="forge-btn primary full" data-world>set as world / scenario seed</button>
                   <button class="forge-btn" data-append-world>append to world / scenario seed</button>
                   <button class="forge-btn ghost" data-story>send to story</button>
                   <button class="forge-btn ghost" data-image>send to image</button>`
                : `<button class="forge-btn primary" data-primary>use as primary</button>
                   <button class="forge-btn" data-user>use as user</button>
                   <button class="forge-btn" data-cast>use as cast</button>`}
            </div>
            <div class="forge-inspector-status">${this.escapeHtml(boardStatus)}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="forge-inspector-section">
            <div class="forge-inspector-section-title">Detail</div>
            <div class="forge-inspector-body">${this.escapeHtml(detailText || 'No additional detail.')}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="forge-inspector-actions secondary">
            ${item.source === 'hall' || item.source === 'story' || selection?.origin === 'board' ? `<button class="forge-btn ghost" data-save>save to library</button>` : ''}
            ${selection?.origin === 'board' ? `<button class="forge-btn ghost" data-remove>remove from board</button>` : ''}
          </div>
        </div>`;
      wrap.querySelector('[data-primary]')?.addEventListener('click', () => this.assignCharacter('primary', item));
      wrap.querySelector('[data-user]')?.addEventListener('click', () => this.assignCharacter('user', item));
      wrap.querySelector('[data-cast]')?.addEventListener('click', () => this.assignCharacter('cast', item));
      wrap.querySelector('[data-world]')?.addEventListener('click', () => this.assignWorld(item));
      wrap.querySelector('[data-append-world]')?.addEventListener('click', () => this.appendWorld(item));
      wrap.querySelector('[data-story]')?.addEventListener('click', () => this.sendToStory());
      wrap.querySelector('[data-image]')?.addEventListener('click', () => this.sendToImage());
      wrap.querySelector('[data-save]')?.addEventListener('click', () => this.saveSelectedToLibrary());
      wrap.querySelector('[data-remove]')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
        if (selection?.origin !== 'board') return;
        if (selection.slot === 'Primary Persona') this.removeSlot('primary');
        else if (selection.slot === 'User Persona') this.removeSlot('user');
        else if (selection.slot === 'World / Scenario Seed') this.removeSlot('world');
        else if (selection.slot === 'In-Scene Cast') this.removeSlot('cast', item.id);
      });
    },

    render() {
      this.ensureLoaded();
      this.renderSourceList();
      this.renderBoard();
      this.renderInspector();
      this.renderBlueprintDock();
      this.renderPresetList();
      const presetNameInputCurrent = document.getElementById('forgePresetNameEl');
      const activePreset = (this.state.presets || []).find(item => item.id === this.state.activePresetId);
      if (presetNameInputCurrent && presetNameInputCurrent !== document.activeElement) {
        presetNameInputCurrent.value = activePreset ? (activePreset.name || '') : '';
      }
      const input = document.getElementById('forgeImportFileEl');
      if (input && !input.dataset.loopBuildersBound) {
        input.dataset.loopBuildersBound = 'yes';
        input.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
          const file = e.target.files && e.target.files[0];
          if (file) this.importAssemblyFromFile(file);
        });
      }
      const presetNameInput = document.getElementById('forgePresetNameEl');
      if (presetNameInput && !presetNameInput.dataset.loopBuildersBound) {
        presetNameInput.dataset.loopBuildersBound = 'yes';
        presetNameInput.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
          if (e.key === 'Enter') {
            e.preventDefault();
            if (this.state.activePresetId) this.updateActivePreset(this.state.activePresetId);
            else this.saveAssemblyPreset();
          }
        });
      }
    }
  };
})();
</script>


<script>
(function(){
  function shortText(value, fallback='') {
    const text = String(value || fallback || '').trim();
    if (!text) return '';
    return text.length > 160 ? text.slice(0, 157).trimEnd() + '…' : text;
  }

  function defaultDrafts() {
    return {
      characterBuilder: {
        name: '',
        avatarUrl: '',
        appearance: '',
        description: '',
        assist: ''
      },
      worldBuilder: {
        title: '',
        imageUrl: '',
        short: '',
        scenario: '',
        contextMemo: '',
        contextSummary: '',
        contextLore: '',
        contextGlossary: '',
        tags: ''
      }
    };
  }

  function draftHasContent(draft) {
    return Object.values(draft || {}).some(v => hasText(v));
  }

  function applyCharacterDraftSeed(base, seed) {
    return Object.assign({}, base || {}, seed || {});
  }

  function applyWorldDraftSeed(base, seed) {
    return Object.assign({}, base || {}, seed || {});
  }

  function buildStructuredQuickDescription(config) {
    return [
      'Personality:',
      config.personality,
      '',
      'Background Lore:',
      config.background,
      '',
      'Roleplay Behavior Examples:',
      `1. ${config.examples[0]}`,
      `2. ${config.examples[1]}`,
      `3. ${config.examples[2]}`,
      `4. ${config.examples[3]}`,
      `5. ${config.examples[4]}`
    ].join('\n');
  }

  function buildCharacterSheet(name, appearance, description) {
    return [
      `Name: ${name || 'Character'}`,
      '',
      'Character Appearance:',
      (appearance || '').trim() || '(Not specified.)',
      '',
      'Character Description:',
      (description || '').trim() || '(Not specified.)'
    ].join('\n');
  }

  function normalizeCharacterAssistText(rawText='') {
    return String(rawText || '')
      .replace(/\r/g, '')
      .split('\n')
      .map(line => {
        let next = String(line || '').trimEnd();
        next = next.replace(/^\s*#{1,6}\s*/, '');
        next = next.replace(/^\s*[-*•]\s+/, '');
        next = next.replace(/^\s*\*\*([^*]+?)\*\*\s*/, (_, inner) => `${String(inner || '').trim()} `);
        next = next.replace(/^\s*__([^_]+?)__\s*/, (_, inner) => `${String(inner || '').trim()} `);
        next = next.replace(/^([A-Za-z][A-Za-z\s/()'-]{0,48})\s+:\s*/, '$1: ');
        return next;
      })
      .join('\n')
      .trim();
  }

  function parseCharacterSheet(rawText='') {
    const text = normalizeCharacterAssistText(rawText);
    if (!text) return { name: '', appearance: '', description: '' };

    const canonicalLabel = (label='') => {
      const key = String(label || '').toLowerCase().replace(/[()]/g, '').replace(/[\/_-]+/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
      if (key === 'name' || key === 'character name') return 'name';
      if (
        key === 'character appearance' ||
        key === 'appearance' ||
        key === 'visual appearance' ||
        key === 'physical appearance' ||
        key === 'character visual' ||
        key === 'visual description' ||
        key === 'avatar appearance' ||
        key === 'image prompt' ||
        key === 'avatar prompt'
      ) return 'appearance';
      if (
        key === 'character description' ||
        key === 'description' ||
        key === 'character profile' ||
        key === 'profile' ||
        key === 'overview' ||
        key === 'summary'
      ) return 'description';
      if (key === 'personality' || key === 'traits' || key === 'character personality') return 'personality';
      if (key === 'background lore' || key === 'background' || key === 'backstory' || key === 'lore') return 'background';
      if (
        key === 'roleplay behavior examples' ||
        key === 'roleplay behavior' ||
        key === 'behavior examples' ||
        key === 'behaviour examples' ||
        key === 'behavior' ||
        key === 'behaviour' ||
        key === 'dialogue examples' ||
        key === 'example dialogue'
      ) return 'examples';
      return key;
    };

    const rawLabels = [
      'Character Name',
      'Name',
      'Character Appearance',
      'Visual Appearance',
      'Physical Appearance',
      'Avatar Appearance',
      'Image Prompt',
      'Avatar Prompt',
      'Appearance',
      'Visual Description',
      'Character Visual',
      'Character Description',
      'Character Profile',
      'Description',
      'Profile',
      'Overview',
      'Summary',
      'Character Personality',
      'Personality',
      'Traits',
      'Background Lore',
      'Background',
      'Backstory',
      'Lore',
      'Roleplay Behavior Examples',
      'Roleplay Behavior',
      'Behavior Examples',
      'Behaviour Examples',
      'Dialogue Examples',
      'Example Dialogue',
      'Behavior',
      'Behaviour'
    ];
    const labelPattern = rawLabels
      .sort((a, b) => b.length - a.length)
      .map(label => label.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&').replace(/\s+/g, '\\s+'))
      .join('|');
    const headerRegex = new RegExp(`(?:^|\\n)\\s*(?:[-*•]\\s*)?(?:\\*\\*)?(${labelPattern})(?:\\*\\*)?\\s*:\\s*`, 'gi');

    const sections = {};
    const matches = [];
    let match;
    while ((match = headerRegex.exec(text)) !== null) {
      matches.push({
        label: canonicalLabel(match[1]),
        start: match.index,
        contentStart: headerRegex.lastIndex
      });
    }

    for (let i = 0; i < matches.length; i++) {
      const item = matches[i];
      const end = i + 1 < matches.length ? matches[i + 1].start : text.length;
      const value = text.slice(item.contentStart, end).trim();
      if (!sections[item.label]) sections[item.label] = value;
    }

    const extractedName = (sections.name || text.match(/(?:^|\n)\s*(?:Character\s+)?Name\s*:\s*([^\n]+)/i)?.[1] || '').trim().split('\n')[0].trim();
    const extractedAppearance = (sections.appearance || '').trim();

    const descriptionParts = [];
    const introDescription = (sections.description || '').trim();
    if (introDescription && !/^\(?not specified\.?\)?$/i.test(introDescription)) {
      descriptionParts.push(introDescription);
    }
    if (sections.personality) descriptionParts.push(`Personality:\n${sections.personality.trim()}`);
    if (sections.background) descriptionParts.push(`Background Lore:\n${sections.background.trim()}`);
    if (sections.examples) descriptionParts.push(`Roleplay Behavior Examples:\n${sections.examples.trim()}`);

    let extractedDescription = descriptionParts.join('\n\n').trim();

    if (!extractedDescription) {
      const withoutNameAndAppearance = text
        .replace(/(?:^|\n)\s*(?:Character\s+)?Name\s*:\s*[^\n]+/i, '')
        .replace(/(?:^|\n)\s*(?:Character\s+Appearance|Visual\s+Appearance|Physical\s+Appearance|Avatar\s+Appearance|Appearance)\s*:\s*[\s\S]*?(?=\n\s*(?:Character\s+Description|Description|Personality|Background\s+Lore|Background|Backstory|Roleplay\s+Behavior|Behavior|Behaviour)\s*:|\n*$)/i, '')
        .trim();
      extractedDescription = withoutNameAndAppearance || text;
    }

    return {
      name: extractedName,
      appearance: extractedAppearance,
      description: extractedDescription
    };
  }

  function cleanCharacterAssistField(value='') {
    return String(value || '')
      .replace(/^\s*(?:Character\s+Appearance|Appearance|Visual\s+Appearance|Physical\s+Appearance|Avatar\s+Appearance|Character\s+Description|Description|Character\s+Profile|Profile|Overview|Summary):\s*/i, '')
      .replace(/^\s*\(Not specified\.\)\s*$/i, '')
      .trim();
  }

  function inferAppearanceFromCharacterText(rawText='') {
    const text = normalizeCharacterAssistText(rawText);
    if (!text) return '';

    const appearanceSection = (
      text.match(/(?:Character\s+Appearance|Appearance|Visual\s+Appearance|Physical\s+Appearance|Avatar\s+Appearance|Visual\s+Description|Character\s+Visual|Image\s+Prompt|Avatar\s+Prompt):\s*([\s\S]*?)(?:\n[A-Z][A-Za-z\s/()'-]{1,48}:\s|\n*$)/i)?.[1]
      || ''
    ).trim();

    if (appearanceSection) {
      return appearanceSection
        .replace(/^\s*\(Not specified\.\)\s*$/i, '')
        .trim();
    }

    const descriptionSection = (
      text.match(/(?:Character\s+Description|Description|Personality|Profile|Overview|Summary):\s*([\s\S]*?)(?:\n[A-Z][A-Za-z\s/()'-]{1,48}:\s|\n*$)/i)?.[1]
      || text
    ).trim();

    const sentences = descriptionSection
      .split(/(?<=[.!?])\s+/)
      .map(part => String(part || '').trim())
      .filter(Boolean);

    const appearanceHints = sentences.filter(sentence =>
      /\b(hair|eyes|face|skin|height|build|body|wear|wearing|clothes|outfit|dress|jacket|shirt|coat|armor|armour|hood|glasses|tattoo|scar|voice|look|appearance|silhouette|physique)\b/i.test(sentence)
    );

    return appearanceHints.join(' ').trim();
  }

  function applyCharacterAssistResult(config={}) {
    const raw = String(config.raw || '').trim();
    if (!raw) return { ok: false };
    const parsed = parseCharacterSheet(raw);
    const resolvedAppearance = cleanCharacterAssistField(parsed.appearance || '') || inferAppearanceFromCharacterText(raw);
    let resolvedDescription = cleanCharacterAssistField(parsed.description || '');

    if (!resolvedDescription) {
      resolvedDescription = String(raw || '')
        .replace(/^\s*(?:Character\s+)?Name:\s*[^\n]+\n*/i, '')
        .trim();
    }

    if (parsed.name && config.nameInput) config.nameInput.value = parsed.name;
    else if (!config.nameInput?.value && config.currentName && config.nameInput) config.nameInput.value = String(config.currentName || '').trim();

    if (resolvedAppearance && config.appearanceInput) {
      config.appearanceInput.value = resolvedAppearance;
      config.appearanceInput.dispatchEvent?.(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
      config.appearanceInput.dispatchEvent?.(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
    }
    if (resolvedDescription && config.descriptionInput) {
      config.descriptionInput.value = resolvedDescription;
      config.descriptionInput.dispatchEvent?.(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
      config.descriptionInput.dispatchEvent?.(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
    }
    if (parsed.name && config.nameInput) {
      config.nameInput.dispatchEvent?.(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
      config.nameInput.dispatchEvent?.(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
    }

    config.updatePreview?.();
    config.syncDraft?.();
    return { ok: !!(parsed.name || resolvedAppearance || resolvedDescription) };
  }

  window.normalizeCharacterAssistText = normalizeCharacterAssistText;
  window.buildCharacterSheet = buildCharacterSheet;
  window.parseCharacterSheet = parseCharacterSheet;
  window.cleanCharacterAssistField = cleanCharacterAssistField;
  window.inferAppearanceFromCharacterText = inferAppearanceFromCharacterText;
  window.applyCharacterAssistResult = applyCharacterAssistResult;

  window.setLoopAssistBusy = function setLoopAssistBusy(trigger, busy=false) {
    const btn = trigger || null;
    const row = btn?.closest?.('.forge-builder-modal-label-row') || null;
    const indicator = row?.querySelector?.('.loop-assist-inline-status') || null;
    if (indicator) {
      indicator.classList.toggle('is-visible', !!busy);
      indicator.setAttribute('aria-hidden', busy ? 'false' : 'true');
    }
    if (btn) btn.disabled = !!busy;
  }

  function patchQuickCharacters() {
    if (!window.LoopStory || window.LoopStory.__loopQuickCharactersStandardPatched) return;
    const baseFn = window.LoopStory.hallQuickCharacters?.bind(window.LoopStory);
    if (typeof baseFn !== 'function') return;
    window.LoopStory.hallQuickCharacters = function() {
      const base = baseFn();
      const structuredById = {
        hall_lyra: buildStructuredQuickDescription({
          personality: 'Lyra is composed, observant, and difficult to rattle, with a disciplined calm that comes from repeated contact with risk rather than natural serenity. She thinks in routes, patterns, and consequences, often treating danger as a problem to be solved before it becomes something to be feared. Socially she is restrained, dryly witty, and sparing with intimacy, but beneath that control is a stubborn desire to reach what others call impossible.',
          background: 'Lyra built her name by surviving passages other navigators refused to map, turning impossible roads, ruined thresholds, and unstable borders into the center of her life rather than its warning sign. She carries the pressure of someone who has been right at the edge of disaster often enough to distrust ease, and she now moves through the world with the private conviction that every destination has a cost hidden inside it.',
          examples: [
            '"No, that path is wrong." *Lyra kneels beside the cracked milestone, brushing dust away with two fingers before looking up.* "It wants us to walk where everyone else already failed."',
            '*She studies the locked gate in silence, then glances over her shoulder.* "Give me one minute. If this opens the way I think it does, stay close and don\'t touch the walls."',
            '"I am calm," *Lyra says, though her grip tightens on the folded map.* "I am simply accounting for how many ways this can go bad before one of them tries to surprise us."',
            '*When the others start arguing, Lyra quietly marks three exits with chalk on the stone.* "If this room turns against us, choose left. Don\'t hesitate. Just move."',
            '"Trust me once," *she says without softness, only precision.* "Not because I\'m asking nicely. Because I already know what happens if you don\'t."'
          ]
        }),
        hall_kael: buildStructuredQuickDescription({
          personality: 'Kael is warm, socially fluent, and instinctively protective, the sort of man who can steady a room with humor and then move into danger without warning if someone vulnerable is threatened. He makes closeness easy for other people while hiding his own strain behind charm, competence, and a near-automatic tendency to carry burdens alone. His emotional logic is driven by loyalty, guilt, and unfinished debts, which makes him brave in ways that are admirable but not always healthy.',
          background: 'Raised inside institutions that rewarded service more than honesty, Kael learned early how to make himself useful, welcome, and difficult to refuse. The history he carries is full of promises he kept at personal cost and people he could not save in time, so his kindness now arrives with an undertow of self-punishment, as if being needed is the one role he never permits himself to step away from.',
          examples: [
            '"Easy, easy." *Kael lifts both hands with a disarming grin even as he steps between the threat and the frightened stranger.* "We can all pretend this is still a conversation if that helps."',
            '*He laughs first so no one notices how tired he looks.* "Of course I have a plan. It\'s reckless, unfair to my spine, and unfortunately the best one available."',
            '"You stay behind me," *Kael says, voice suddenly stripped of charm.* "That is not a suggestion. That is me making sure you survive this."',
            '*When the room quiets, he leans against the doorway and exhales through his nose.* "I\'m fine. I just need ten seconds where nobody asks me to be noble."',
            '"I know what this costs," *he says, softer now, tightening the strap around his wrist.* "I\'m doing it anyway. Some debts don\'t vanish because they hurt."'
          ]
        }),
        hall_sable: buildStructuredQuickDescription({
          personality: 'Sable is analytical, patient, and emotionally guarded, but never detached. She is drawn to people through contradiction, memory, and consequence, and she has a gift for asking the precise question that turns performance into truth. Useful, unsettling, and difficult to forget, she rarely seeks drama openly; instead, she draws it into the light by noticing what everyone else has agreed not to name.',
          background: 'Sable built her life around records, testimony, and the dangerous residue left behind by events other people preferred to mythologize or erase. Years spent among forbidden documents and unstable histories taught her that memory is never neutral, and now she treats conversation the way other people treat excavation: slowly, carefully, and with full awareness that the deepest layer is rarely the cleanest one.',
          examples: [
            '"That isn\'t what you\'re afraid of," *Sable says, not looking up from her notebook.* "It\'s only the version you found easiest to say aloud."',
            '*She adjusts her glasses, eyes fixed on the witness.* "Start again. This time tell me the part you removed to make yourself sound innocent."',
            '"Interesting," *Sable murmurs as the silence thickens.* "The room changed the moment that name was spoken. Which means everyone here knows more than they planned to admit."',
            '*When someone reaches for the old ledger, Sable catches their wrist with surprising firmness.* "Careful. Some histories resist being handled by people who still need them to stay simple."',
            '"I am not trying to unsettle you," *she says, almost kindly.* "I am only refusing to help you hide from what is already in the room."'
          ]
        }),
        hall_tarin: buildStructuredQuickDescription({
          personality: 'Tarin is resourceful, skeptical, and plainspoken, with a strong bias toward repair over rhetoric and proof over display. He distrusts polished authority and grand promises, but once trust is earned he becomes deeply dependable, expressing loyalty through action long before he would ever call it devotion. His emotional rhythm is dry, grounded, and quietly stubborn, and he often reveals care in the form of competence rather than tenderness.',
          background: 'Most of Tarin\'s life has been spent in damaged places, inside failing systems, and beside people who only survived because somebody practical stayed long enough to keep things running. He comes from work that demanded endurance more than recognition, so he carries himself like someone who expects collapse, prepares for it, and resents being thanked for doing what should have been obvious in the first place.',
          examples: [
            '*Tarin glances at the smoking panel, wipes his hands on his sleeve, and mutters,* "You can panic after I stop this from killing us. Give me a minute."',
            '"No, I heard you," *he says flatly, already kneeling beside the broken mechanism.* "I just trust the machine more than the speech you gave about it."',
            '*He passes over the repaired part without ceremony.* "Try it now. And if it fails again, don\'t hit it. That was your last bad idea for tonight."',
            '"I\'m not staying because I like this mess," *Tarin says, tightening a bolt with careful pressure.* "I\'m staying because walking away would make it worse."',
            '*When the injured stranger reaches for the tool kit, he nudges it out of reach and sits down beside them.* "You can help by doing absolutely nothing heroic for five minutes."'
          ]
        }),
        hall_iora: buildStructuredQuickDescription({
          personality: 'Iora is bold, theatrical, emotionally quick, and hungry for recognition, but beneath that force is a person who fears becoming irrelevant more than being disliked. She uses performance as armor, confession as bait, and charm as leverage, yet she is not insincere; her sincerity and self-staging have simply grown inseparable. She can electrify a quiet room in seconds, but admiration turning unstable often reveals how precarious her confidence really is.',
          background: 'Iora learned early that spectacle could protect as effectively as it attracted, and she turned that lesson into a life built from stagecraft, occult display, and the careful manipulation of attention. Applause taught her how to survive, but it also left her dependent on being vividly perceived, so she now moves through the world treating intimacy, performance, and danger as if all three belong to the same ritual.',
          examples: [
            '"If you\'re going to stare," *Iora says, lifting her chin as candlelight catches the rings on her hands,* "at least do it with the respect due to an entrance this good."',
            '*She laughs too brightly, then lets the smile sharpen at the edges.* "Oh, I can tell the truth. I just prefer the version with better lighting."',
            '"Do not mistake drama for weakness," *Iora says, stepping into the center of the room as if it were a stage.* "I know exactly how loud I am being, and exactly why."',
            '*When the praise falters, her expression changes for a heartbeat before she rebuilds it into charm.* "Go on. Say what you really think. I promise I\'ll make it useful."',
            '"I wanted attention," *she admits, quieter now, hands falling still for once.* "I did not say I wanted to be invisible the moment it stopped feeling safe."'
          ]
        })
      };
      return base.map(item => {
        const structured = structuredById[item.id];
        if (!structured) return item;
        const fullSheet = buildCharacterSheet(item.name, item.appearance || '', structured);
        return Object.assign({}, item, {
          short: shortText(item.short || structured, item.short || ''),
          characterDescription: structured,
          description: fullSheet
        });
      });
    };
    window.LoopStory.__loopQuickCharactersStandardPatched = true;
  }

  function patchBuilders() {
    const builders = window.LoopBuilders;
    if (!builders || builders.__loopBuildersPatchApplied) return;
    builders.__loopBuildersPatchApplied = true;

    const originalLoad = builders.load?.bind(builders);
    builders.load = function() {
      if (originalLoad) originalLoad();
      this.state.drafts = Object.assign(defaultDrafts(), this.state.drafts || {});
    };

    const originalSave = builders.save?.bind(builders);
    builders.save = function() {
      this.state.drafts = Object.assign(defaultDrafts(), this.state.drafts || {});
      if (originalSave) originalSave();
    };

    builders.closeForgeModal = function() {
      if (this._forgeModalEl && this._forgeModalEl.remove) {
        this._forgeModalEl.remove();
      }
      this._forgeModalEl = null;
      this._builderPreviewRuntime = null;
    };

    builders.createBuilderPerchanceRuntime = function(prompt='', opts={}) {
      if (typeof image !== 'function') {
        throw new Error('text-to-image-plugin is not available');
      }
      const width = Number(opts.width) || 320;
      const resolution = opts.resolution || '512x512';
      let customButton = null;
      try {
        customButton = this.getLoopStory?.()?.buildInlineImageCustomButton?.();
      } catch (e) {
        console.error(e);
      }
      const img = image({
        prompt,
        resolution,
        width,
        count: 1,
        customButton
      });
      const temp = document.createElement('div');
      temp.innerHTML = img?.evaluateItem || '';
      const node = temp.firstElementChild || document.createElement('div');
      return {
        node,
        onFinishPromise: img?.onFinishPromise || Promise.resolve(null)
      };
    };

    builders.buildCharacterAvatarRenderPrompt = function(values={}) {
      const name = String(values?.name || '').trim();
      const appearance = String(values?.appearance || '').trim();
      const description = String(values?.description || '').trim();
      const parts = [];
      parts.push(name ? `${name}, solo character portrait` : 'solo character portrait');
      if (appearance) parts.push(appearance);
      if (description) parts.push(`Character essence: ${description}`);
      parts.push('focus on one character only');
      parts.push('portrait framing');
      parts.push('clear face visibility');
      parts.push('highly readable silhouette');
      return parts.filter(Boolean).join(', ');
    };

    builders.attachInlineAvatarRender = function(config={}) {
      const overlay = config.overlay;
      const avatarInput = config.avatarInput;
      const appearanceInput = config.appearanceInput;
      const descriptionInput = config.descriptionInput;
      const nameInput = config.nameInput;
      const renderHost = config.renderHost;
      const renderBtn = config.renderBtn;
      const clearBtn = config.clearBtn;
      const syncDraft = config.syncDraft || function(){};
      const updatePreview = config.updatePreview || function(){};
      const setBuilderStatus = config.setBuilderStatus || function(){};

      const hasRuntimeNode = () => !!(renderHost && renderHost.firstElementChild);

      const clearRuntimePreview = ({keepValue=false}={}) => {
        if (renderHost) renderHost.innerHTML = '';
        this._builderPreviewRuntime = null;
        if (!keepValue && avatarInput) avatarInput.value = '';
        updatePreview();
      };

      const renderAvatarInline = async () => {
        const prompt = this.buildCharacterAvatarRenderPrompt({
          name: nameInput?.value || '',
          appearance: appearanceInput?.value || '',
          description: descriptionInput?.value || ''
        });
        const hasVisualSource = String(appearanceInput?.value || '').trim() || String(descriptionInput?.value || '').trim();
        if (!hasVisualSource) {
          setBuilderStatus('add Character Appearance or Character Description first', true);
          return;
        }
        if (typeof image !== 'function') {
          setBuilderStatus('text-to-image-plugin is not available right now', true);
          return;
        }
        clearRuntimePreview({keepValue:true});
        updatePreview();
        setBuilderStatus('rendering avatar inside builder...');
        if (renderBtn) renderBtn.disabled = true;
        try {
          const runtime = this.createBuilderPerchanceRuntime(prompt, { width: 320, resolution: '512x512' });
          this._builderPreviewRuntime = runtime;
          if (renderHost) {
            renderHost.innerHTML = '';
            if (runtime?.node) renderHost.appendChild(runtime.node);
          }
          updatePreview();
          const result = await Promise.resolve(runtime?.onFinishPromise);
          const finalUrl = String(result?.imageUrl || result?.url || result?.dataUrl || '').trim();
          if (finalUrl) {
            if (avatarInput) avatarInput.value = finalUrl;
            syncDraft();
            updatePreview();
            setBuilderStatus('avatar rendered — you can save it now or use the Perchance hover actions to share it');
          } else {
            setBuilderStatus('render finished, but no image URL was returned', true);
          }
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(e);
          clearRuntimePreview({keepValue:true});
          setBuilderStatus('avatar render failed', true);
        } finally {
          if (renderBtn) renderBtn.disabled = false;
        }
      };

      renderBtn?.addEventListener('click', renderAvatarInline);
      clearBtn?.addEventListener('click', () => {
        clearRuntimePreview();
        syncDraft();
        setBuilderStatus('avatar cleared');
      });

      avatarInput?.addEventListener('input', () => {
        if (String(avatarInput.value || '').trim()) {
          clearRuntimePreview({keepValue:true});
        }
      });

      return { clearRuntimePreview, hasRuntimeNode };
    };

    builders.openCharacterBuilderModal = function(seed={}) {
      if (window.openLoopCreateCharacterPage) return window.openLoopCreateCharacterPage(seed || {});
      if (typeof window.switchPage === 'function') return window.switchPage('create-character');
    };

    builders.buildWorldRenderPrompt = function(values={}) {
      const title = String(values?.title || '').trim();
      const short = String(values?.short || '').trim();
      const premise = String(values?.premise || values?.scenario || '').trim();
      const contextSummary = String(values?.contextSummary || '').trim();
      const contextMemo = String(values?.contextMemo || '').trim();
      const contextLore = String(values?.contextLore || '').trim();
      const contextGlossary = String(values?.contextGlossary || '').trim();
      const tags = Array.isArray(values?.tags)
        ? values.tags.filter(Boolean).join(', ')
        : String(values?.tags || '').trim();

      const parts = [];
      parts.push(title ? `${title}, cinematic world scene` : 'cinematic world scene');
      if (short) parts.push(short);
      if (premise) parts.push(`Scenario seed: ${premise}`);
      if (contextSummary) parts.push(`World summary: ${contextSummary}`);
      if (contextMemo) parts.push(`Atmosphere cues: ${contextMemo}`);
      if (contextLore) parts.push(`World rules and lore: ${contextLore}`);
      if (contextGlossary) parts.push(`Key terms and entities: ${contextGlossary}`);
      if (tags) parts.push(`Tags: ${tags}`);
      parts.push('environment-focused visual');
      parts.push('no text overlay');
      parts.push('strong sense of place');
      return parts.filter(Boolean).join(', ');
    };

    builders.openWorldBuilderModal = function(seed={}) {
      if (window.openLoopCreateWorldPage) return window.openLoopCreateWorldPage(seed || {});
      if (typeof window.switchPage === 'function') return window.switchPage('create-world');
    };


  }

  function closeTopLoopModal() {
    const overlays = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('div[tabindex]'));
    const overlay = overlays[overlays.length - 1];
    if (overlay) overlay.remove();
  }
  window.closeTopLoopModal = closeTopLoopModal;

  function runPatches() {
    patchQuickCharacters();
    patchBuilders();
    
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', runPatches, { once: true });
  } else {
    setTimeout(runPatches, 0);
  }
  window.addEventListener('load', runPatches, { once: true });
})();
</script>

}

  position: relative;

}

}

  margin-bottom: calc(var(--story-composer-reserved-height) + 10px);
}

#page-story .story-composer-dock {
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  z-index: 24;
  width: auto;
  padding: 0 18px 12px 18px;
  background: transparent;
  border-top: none;
