<script>
(function(){
  if (window.__LOOP_STORY_INPUT_IMAGE_BEHAVIOR__) return;
  window.__LOOP_STORY_INPUT_IMAGE_BEHAVIOR__ = true;

  function patchStoryInputBehavior(){
    const story = window.LoopStory;
    const page = document.getElementById('page-story');
    if (!story || !page || !story.els?.input) return;

    story.syncStoryComposerReservedSpace = function(){
      const dock = page.querySelector('.story-composer-dock');
      if (!dock) return;
      const measured = Math.max(46, Math.ceil(dock.getBoundingClientRect().height || 0));
      page.style.setProperty('--story-composer-reserved-height', measured + 'px');
    };

    story.refreshStoryInputShape = function(forceReset=false){
      const input = this.els?.input;
      const shell = input?.closest('.story-input-shell');
      const container = input?.closest('.input-container');
      if (!input || !shell || !container) return;

      const COLLAPSED_HEIGHT = 28;
      const ACTIVE_MIN_HEIGHT = 44;
      const MAX_HEIGHT = 220;
      const isCollapsed = forceReset === true || !shell.classList.contains('active');

      input.style.height = 'auto';

      if (isCollapsed) {
        input.style.height = COLLAPSED_HEIGHT + 'px';
        input.style.overflowY = 'hidden';
        container.style.borderRadius = '14px';
        if (this.els.sendBtn) this.els.sendBtn.disabled = input.value.trim() === '';
        this.syncStoryComposerReservedSpace?.();
        return;
      }

      const nextHeight = Math.max(ACTIVE_MIN_HEIGHT, Math.min(input.scrollHeight, MAX_HEIGHT));
      input.style.height = nextHeight + 'px';
      input.style.overflowY = input.scrollHeight > MAX_HEIGHT ? 'auto' : 'hidden';
      container.style.borderRadius = (nextHeight > ACTIVE_MIN_HEIGHT ? 10 : 14) + 'px';
      if (this.els.sendBtn) this.els.sendBtn.disabled = input.value.trim() === '';
      this.syncStoryComposerReservedSpace?.();
    };

    story.syncStoryInputShell = function(isActive=false){
      const shell = this.els?.input?.closest('.story-input-shell');
      if (!shell) return;
      shell.classList.toggle('active', !!isActive);
      this.syncStoryComposerReservedSpace?.();
    };

    const input = story.els.input;
    const shell = input.closest('.story-input-shell');
    const container = input.closest('.input-container');
    if (!shell || !container) return;

    if (!story.els.sendBtn) story.els.sendBtn = document.getElementById('storySendBtn');

    if (!shell.dataset.storyImageBehaviorBound) {
      shell.dataset.storyImageBehaviorBound = '1';

      container.addEventListener('pointerdown', function(){
        shell.classList.add('active');
        requestAnimationFrame(() => story.refreshStoryInputShape(false));
      });

      document.addEventListener('pointerdown', function(e){
        if (!page.classList.contains('active')) return;
        const directionPanel = document.getElementById('storyDirectionPanel');
        const commentsPanel = document.getElementById('commentsSectionCtn');
        if (shell.contains(e.target)) return;
        if (directionPanel && directionPanel.contains(e.target)) return;
        if (commentsPanel && !commentsPanel.hidden && commentsPanel.contains(e.target)) return;
        shell.classList.remove('active');
        story.refreshStoryInputShape(true);
      }, true);

      window.addEventListener('resize', function(){
        if (shell.classList.contains('active')) story.refreshStoryInputShape(false);
        else story.refreshStoryInputShape(true);
        if (typeof story.positionDirectionPanel === 'function' && story.els?.directionPanel?.classList.contains('show')) {
          story.positionDirectionPanel();
        }
      });
    }

    if (input.value.trim()) shell.classList.add('active');
    story.refreshStoryInputShape(input.value.trim() === '');
    story.syncStoryComposerReservedSpace?.();
  }

  function runPatch(){
    patchStoryInputBehavior();
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', runPatch, { once: true });
  } else {
    setTimeout(runPatch, 0);
  }

  if (typeof window.switchPage === 'function' && !window.switchPage.__storyInputImageBehaviorPatched) {
    const originalSwitchPage = window.switchPage;
    const wrappedSwitchPage = function(){
      const result = originalSwitchPage.apply(this, arguments);
      requestAnimationFrame(runPatch);
      return result;
    };
    wrappedSwitchPage.__storyInputImageBehaviorPatched = true;
    window.switchPage = wrappedSwitchPage;
  }
})();
</script>

<script>
(function(){
  if (window.__LOOP_STORY_COMPOSER_MENU__) return;
  window.__LOOP_STORY_COMPOSER_MENU__ = true;

  function getStoryComposerMenuEls(){
    return {
      page: document.getElementById('page-story'),
      shell: document.querySelector('#page-story .story-input-shell'),
      button: document.getElementById('storyComposerMenuBtn'),
      menu: document.getElementById('storyComposerMiniMenu')
    };
  }

  window.toggleStoryComposerMenu = function(forceState){
    const { page, button, menu } = getStoryComposerMenuEls();
    if (!page || !button || !menu) return;
    const willShow = typeof forceState === 'boolean' ? forceState : menu.hidden;
    menu.hidden = !willShow;
    button.classList.toggle('is-open', willShow);
  };

  window.closeStoryComposerMenu = function(){
    window.toggleStoryComposerMenu(false);
  };

  document.addEventListener('pointerdown', function(event){
    const { page, shell, button, menu } = getStoryComposerMenuEls();
    if (!page || !shell || !button || !menu) return;
    if (!page.classList.contains('active')) {
      menu.hidden = true;
      button.classList.remove('is-open');
      return;
    }
    if (shell.contains(event.target)) return;
    menu.hidden = true;
    button.classList.remove('is-open');
  }, true);

  document.addEventListener('keydown', function(event){
    if (event.key === 'Escape') window.closeStoryComposerMenu();
  });
})();
</script>

<script>
/* LOOP GUARD
   Final legacy iframe stabilizer. Keep this at the very end.
   Single source of truth after runtime trace cleanup.
*/
(function(){
  if (window.__LOOP_FINAL_IFRAME_GUARD__) return;
  window.__LOOP_FINAL_IFRAME_GUARD__ = true;

  function ensureLegacyHost() {
    let ctn = document.getElementById('customCodeIframeCtn');
    if (!ctn) {
      ctn = document.createElement('div');
      ctn.id = 'customCodeIframeCtn';
      ctn.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
      ctn.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;left:-9999px;top:-9999px;width:1px;height:1px;overflow:hidden;pointer-events:none;opacity:0;';
      (document.body || document.documentElement).appendChild(ctn);
    }
    let iframe = document.getElementById('customCodeIframe') || ctn.querySelector('iframe');
    if (!iframe) {
      iframe = document.createElement('iframe');
      iframe.id = 'customCodeIframe';
      iframe.src = 'about:blank';
      iframe.tabIndex = -1;
      iframe.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
      iframe.style.cssText = 'display:block;width:1px;height:1px;border:0;';
      ctn.appendChild(iframe);
    }
    return iframe;
  }

  function noopLegacyResult() {
    return {
      text: '',
      generatedText: '',
      stopReason: 'stopped',
      stop() {},
      cancel() {}
    };
  }

  function lockWindowFn(name, fn) {
    try {
      Object.defineProperty(window, name, {
        configurable: true,
        get() { return fn; },
        set(_) { return true; }
      });
    } catch (e) {
      try { window[name] = fn; } catch (e2) {}
    }
    try { globalThis[name] = fn; } catch (e) {}
  }

  const safeStream = function(){
    ensureLegacyHost();
    console.warn('LOOP GUARD: legacy iframe streaming disabled');
    return noopLegacyResult();
  };

  const safeStart = async function(){
    ensureLegacyHost();
    console.warn('LOOP GUARD: legacy iframe streaming disabled');
    return null;
  };

  lockWindowFn('streamTextFromIframe', safeStream);
  lockWindowFn('startStreamingResponse', safeStart);

  const proxyTarget = {};
  const proxy = new Proxy(proxyTarget, {
    get(target, prop) {
      if (!(prop in target)) target[prop] = ensureLegacyHost();
      return target[prop];
    },
    set(target, prop, value) {
      target[prop] = value || ensureLegacyHost();
      return true;
    },
    deleteProperty(target, prop) {
      target[prop] = ensureLegacyHost();
      return true;
    },
    getOwnPropertyDescriptor(target, prop) {
      return Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(target, prop) || { configurable:true, enumerable:true, writable:true, value:ensureLegacyHost() };
    }
  });
  try { window.customCodeIframes = proxy; } catch (e) {}
  try { globalThis.customCodeIframes = proxy; } catch (e) {}

  function swallowLegacyIframeFailure(evtOrError) {
    const reason = evtOrError && evtOrError.reason ? evtOrError.reason : evtOrError && evtOrError.error ? evtOrError.error : evtOrError;
    const msg = String(reason && reason.message || evtOrError && evtOrError.message || '');
    const stack = String(reason && reason.stack || '');
    const hit = msg.includes('contentWindow') && (stack.includes('streamTextFromIframe') || stack.includes('startStreamingResponse') || stack.includes('customCodeIframe'));
    if (hit) {
      console.warn('LOOP GUARD: legacy iframe call suppressed');
      if (evtOrError && typeof evtOrError.preventDefault === 'function') evtOrError.preventDefault();
      return true;
    }
    return false;
  }

  window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection', swallowLegacyIframeFailure);
  window.addEventListener('error', swallowLegacyIframeFailure);

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', ensureLegacyHost, { once:true });
  } else {
    ensureLegacyHost();
  }
})();
</script>

@media (max-width: 760px) {

  }

  .app.image-mobile-ready.image-mobile-comments-open #imageMobileSheetBackdrop,
  .app.image-mobile-ready.image-mobile-workspace-open #imageMobileSheetBackdrop {

  .app.image-mobile-ready #commentsSectionCtn {

    grid-template-rows: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
    gap: 12px;
  }

    max-height: 34vh;

    display: none;
  }

    display: none;

    overflow-x: auto;
    overflow-y: hidden;

    scrollbar-width: none;
  }

    max-width: calc(100% - 42px);

  .loopy-action-row::-webkit-scrollbar {
