<script id="loop-comments-final-consolidated-pass2-script">
(function(){
  "use strict";

  const DEFAULT_W = 560;
  const DEFAULT_H = 400;
  const ALL_W = 720;
  const ALL_H = 420;
  const MIN_W = 380;
  const MIN_H = 320;
  const MARGIN = 16;

  function panel() { return document.getElementById('commentsSectionCtn'); }
  function rootPanel() { return document.querySelector('[data-loop-comments-root]'); }
  function cssNum(name, fallback) {
    const v = parseFloat(getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue(name));
    return Number.isFinite(v) ? v : fallback;
  }
  function isMobile() {
    return !!(window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(max-width: 760px)').matches);
  }
  function workspaceWidth() {
    const open = !!document.querySelector('.app.image-stage-workspace') && !!document.querySelector('#imageWorkspaceStage.show');
    return open ? cssNum('--image-workspace-panel-width', 360) : 0;
  }
  function safeBounds(width, height) {
    const sidebar = isMobile() ? 0 : cssNum('--sidebar-width', 0);
    const header = isMobile() ? 0 : cssNum('--header-height', 50);
    const wSpace = isMobile() ? 0 : workspaceWidth();
    const maxW = Math.max(MIN_W, window.innerWidth - sidebar - wSpace - (MARGIN * 2));
    const maxH = Math.max(MIN_H, window.innerHeight - header - (MARGIN * 2));
    const w = Math.min(width || DEFAULT_W, maxW);
    const h = Math.min(height || DEFAULT_H, maxH);
    return {
      sidebar, header, wSpace, maxW, maxH,
      minLeft: sidebar + MARGIN,
      maxLeft: Math.max(sidebar + MARGIN, window.innerWidth - wSpace - w - MARGIN),
      minTop: header + MARGIN,
      maxTop: Math.max(header + MARGIN, window.innerHeight - h - MARGIN)
    };
  }
  function setVar(el, name, value) {
    if (!el || !Number.isFinite(value)) return;
    el.style.setProperty(name, Math.round(value) + 'px');
  }
  function getVar(el, name, fallback) {
    const v = parseFloat(el && el.style ? el.style.getPropertyValue(name) : '');
    return Number.isFinite(v) ? v : fallback;
  }
  function getState(el) {
    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
    const shell = el.querySelector('.content-container > div');
    const shellRect = shell ? shell.getBoundingClientRect() : null;
    return {
      left: getVar(el, '--loop-comments-left', rect.left || cssNum('--sidebar-width', 0) + 32),
      top: getVar(el, '--loop-comments-top', rect.top || cssNum('--header-height', 50) + 16),
      width: getVar(el, '--loop-comments-width', rect.width || DEFAULT_W),
      height: getVar(el, '--loop-comments-height', (shellRect && shellRect.height) || DEFAULT_H)
    };
  }
  function clampAndApply(el, state) {
    if (!el || isMobile()) return;
    let w = Math.min(Math.max(MIN_W, state.width), safeBounds(state.width, state.height).maxW);
    let h = Math.min(Math.max(MIN_H, state.height), safeBounds(w, state.height).maxH);
    const b = safeBounds(w, h);
    let l = Math.min(Math.max(b.minLeft, state.left), b.maxLeft);
    let t = Math.min(Math.max(b.minTop, state.top), b.maxTop);
    setVar(el, '--loop-comments-width', w);
    setVar(el, '--loop-comments-height', h);
    setVar(el, '--loop-comments-left', l);
    setVar(el, '--loop-comments-top', t);
    el.style.right = 'auto';
    el.style.bottom = 'auto';
    el.style.transform = 'none';
    el.dataset.commentsPositioned = 'true';
  }
  function placeDefault(force) {
    const el = panel();
    if (!el || el.hidden || isMobile()) return;
    if (!force && el.dataset.commentsUserAdjusted === 'true') {
      clampAndApply(el, getState(el));
      return;
    }
    const sidebar = cssNum('--sidebar-width', 0);
    const header = cssNum('--header-height', 50);
    const wSpace = workspaceWidth();
    const maxW = Math.max(MIN_W, window.innerWidth - sidebar - wSpace - (MARGIN * 2));
    const w = Math.min(DEFAULT_W, maxW);
    const h = Math.min(DEFAULT_H, Math.max(MIN_H, window.innerHeight - header - (MARGIN * 2)));
    clampAndApply(el, { left: sidebar + 32, top: header + 16, width: w, height: h });
  }
  function expandForAllIfNeeded() {
    const el = panel();
    if (!el || el.hidden || isMobile() || el.dataset.commentsUserAdjusted === 'true') return;
    const cur = getState(el);
    const b = safeBounds(ALL_W, ALL_H);
    clampAndApply(el, {
      left: cur.left,
      top: cur.top,
      width: Math.min(ALL_W, b.maxW),
      height: Math.min(ALL_H, b.maxH)
    });
  }

  function applyMobileCommentsTab(root, tabName) {
    if (!root) return;
    var next = String(tabName || 'general').toLowerCase();
    if (next === 'all') next = 'general';
    var activeBtn = root.querySelector('.loop-comments-tab[data-comments-tab="' + next + '"]') || root.querySelector('.loop-comments-tab[data-comments-tab="general"]');
    if (!activeBtn) return;
    next = activeBtn.dataset.commentsTab || 'general';

    root.classList.remove('is-showing-all');
    root.querySelectorAll('.loop-comments-tab').forEach(function(btn) {
      btn.classList.toggle('is-active', btn.dataset.commentsTab === next);
    });
    root.querySelectorAll('.loop-comments-tabpane').forEach(function(tabpane) {
      tabpane.classList.toggle('is-active', tabpane.dataset.commentsPanel === next);
    });

    var badgeEl = root.querySelector('[data-comments-room-badge]');
    var subtitleEl = root.querySelector('[data-comments-room-subtitle]');
    if (badgeEl) badgeEl.textContent = activeBtn.dataset.roomLabel || activeBtn.textContent.trim();
    if (subtitleEl) subtitleEl.textContent = activeBtn.dataset.roomSubtitle || '';
  }
  function sanitizeMobileComments() {
    if (!isMobile()) return;
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-loop-comments-root]').forEach(function(root) {
      var active = root.querySelector('.loop-comments-tab.is-active');
      var activeName = active ? active.dataset.commentsTab : 'general';
      applyMobileCommentsTab(root, activeName === 'all' ? 'general' : activeName);
    });
  }

  function bindInteractions() {
    const el = panel();
    if (!el || el.dataset.commentsFinalReady === 'true') return;
    el.dataset.commentsFinalReady = 'true';
    const head = el.querySelector('.loop-comments-head');
    const dragHandle = el.querySelector('[data-comments-drag-handle]');
    const resizeHandle = el.querySelector('[data-comments-resize-handle]');
    let action = null;
    let startX = 0;
    let startY = 0;
    let startState = null;

    function start(e, mode) {
      if (isMobile()) return;
      if (e.button !== undefined && e.button !== 0) return;
      action = mode;
      startX = e.clientX;
      startY = e.clientY;
      startState = getState(el);
      el.dataset.commentsUserAdjusted = 'true';
      el.classList.toggle('is-dragging', mode === 'drag');
      el.classList.toggle('is-resizing', mode === 'resize');
      if (mode === 'drag' && dragHandle) dragHandle.classList.add('is-dragging');
      if (mode === 'resize' && resizeHandle) resizeHandle.classList.add('is-resizing');
      e.preventDefault();
    }
    function move(e) {
      if (!action || !startState) return;
      const dx = e.clientX - startX;
      const dy = e.clientY - startY;
      if (action === 'drag') {
        clampAndApply(el, {
          left: startState.left + dx,
          top: startState.top + dy,
          width: startState.width,
          height: startState.height
        });
      } else if (action === 'resize') {
        clampAndApply(el, {
          left: startState.left,
          top: startState.top,
          width: startState.width + dx,
          height: startState.height + dy
        });
      }
      e.preventDefault();
    }
    function end() {
      if (!action) return;
      action = null;
      startState = null;
      el.classList.remove('is-dragging', 'is-resizing');
      if (dragHandle) dragHandle.classList.remove('is-dragging');
      if (resizeHandle) resizeHandle.classList.remove('is-resizing');
    }

    if (dragHandle) dragHandle.addEventListener('pointerdown', function(e) { start(e, 'drag'); });
    if (resizeHandle) resizeHandle.addEventListener('pointerdown', function(e) { start(e, 'resize'); });
    if (head) {
      head.addEventListener('pointerdown', function(e) {
        if (e.target && e.target.closest && e.target.closest('button,a,input,textarea,select,[data-comments-resize-handle]')) return;
        start(e, 'drag');
      });
    }
    window.addEventListener('pointermove', move, true);
    window.addEventListener('pointerup', end, true);
    window.addEventListener('pointercancel', end, true);
  }

  const baseToggleComments = window.toggleComments;
  if (typeof baseToggleComments === 'function') {
    window.toggleComments = function(forceState) {
      const elBefore = panel();
      const wasHidden = !elBefore || elBefore.hidden;
      const result = baseToggleComments.apply(this, arguments);
      bindInteractions();
      sanitizeMobileComments();
      const el = panel();
      if (el && !el.hidden && !isMobile() && (wasHidden || forceState === true)) {
        el.dataset.commentsUserAdjusted = '';
        setTimeout(function(){ placeDefault(true); }, 0);
      }
      return result;
    };
  }

  const baseStoryToggle = window.toggleStoryCommentsFloat;
  if (typeof baseStoryToggle === 'function') {
    window.toggleStoryCommentsFloat = function(forceState) {
      const result = baseStoryToggle.apply(this, arguments);
      bindInteractions();
      sanitizeMobileComments();
      const el = panel();
      if (el && !el.hidden && !isMobile()) setTimeout(function(){ placeDefault(true); }, 0);
      return result;
    };
  }

  const baseLoopSetCommentsTab = window.loopSetCommentsTab;
  if (typeof baseLoopSetCommentsTab === 'function') {
    window.loopSetCommentsTab = function(trigger, tabName) {
      if (isMobile()) {
        const root = trigger && trigger.closest ? trigger.closest('[data-loop-comments-root]') : rootPanel();
        applyMobileCommentsTab(root, tabName);
        return;
      }
      const result = baseLoopSetCommentsTab.apply(this, arguments);
      bindInteractions();
      if (String(tabName || '').toLowerCase() === 'all') setTimeout(expandForAllIfNeeded, 0);
      return result;
    };
  }

  window.loopCommentsPlaceDefault = placeDefault;
  window.loopCommentsSanitizeMobile = sanitizeMobileComments;

  window.addEventListener('resize', function(){
    sanitizeMobileComments();
    const el = panel();
    if (!el || el.hidden || isMobile()) return;
    clampAndApply(el, getState(el));
  });

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){
      bindInteractions();
      sanitizeMobileComments();
      placeDefault(false);
    }, { once: true });
  } else {
    setTimeout(function(){
      bindInteractions();
      sanitizeMobileComments();
      placeDefault(false);
    }, 0);
  }
})();
</script>


<script id="loop-resize-observer-stabilization-stage32">
(function(){
  "use strict";

  function isResizeObserverLoopMessage(message) {
    return /ResizeObserver loop (completed with undelivered notifications|limit exceeded)/i.test(String(message || ""));
  }

  // Prevent the browser's non-fatal ResizeObserver warning from becoming a visible Perchance error card.
  window.addEventListener('error', function(event) {
    if (isResizeObserverLoopMessage(event && event.message)) {
      event.preventDefault();
      event.stopImmediatePropagation();
      return false;
    }
  }, true);

  window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection', function(event) {
    const reason = event && event.reason;
    const message = reason && (reason.message || reason.toString && reason.toString());
    if (isResizeObserverLoopMessage(message)) {
      event.preventDefault();
      event.stopImmediatePropagation();
      return false;
    }
  }, true);

  // Stage 25 used a ResizeObserver on outputCtn. During generation the output area changes size,
  // then the callback recalculates grid/canvas size, which can trigger another resize in the same frame.
  // Disconnect it and replace it with a requestAnimationFrame-gated reflow.
  try {
    if (window.__loopStage25OutputResizeObserver && typeof window.__loopStage25OutputResizeObserver.disconnect === 'function') {
      window.__loopStage25OutputResizeObserver.disconnect();
    }
  } catch (e) {}
  window.__loopStage25OutputResizeObserver = null;

  let reflowQueued = false;
  let reflowForceMax = false;
  let lastOutputW = 0;
  let lastOutputH = 0;
  let lastReflowAt = 0;

  function readOutputSize() {
    const output = document.getElementById('outputCtn');
    if (!output) return { w: 0, h: 0 };
    const rect = output.getBoundingClientRect();
    return { w: Math.round(rect.width || 0), h: Math.round(rect.height || 0) };
  }

  function runStableImageReflow(forceMax) {
    const size = readOutputSize();
    const now = performance.now ? performance.now() : Date.now();
    const sameSize = Math.abs(size.w - lastOutputW) < 2 && Math.abs(size.h - lastOutputH) < 2;

    if (!forceMax && sameSize && (now - lastReflowAt) < 120) return;

    lastOutputW = size.w;
    lastOutputH = size.h;
    lastReflowAt = now;

    try { if (typeof syncRenderPreviewWidthBounds === 'function') syncRenderPreviewWidthBounds(null, forceMax !== false); } catch(e) {}
    try { if (typeof rebalanceLoopRenderGrid === 'function') rebalanceLoopRenderGrid(); } catch(e) {}
    try { if (typeof syncCanvasLayoutMode === 'function') syncCanvasLayoutMode(true); } catch(e) {}
    try { if (typeof updateComposerStageButtons === 'function') updateComposerStageButtons(); } catch(e) {}
  }

  function scheduleStableImageReflow(forceMax) {
    reflowForceMax = !!(reflowForceMax || forceMax);
    if (reflowQueued) return;
    reflowQueued = true;
    requestAnimationFrame(function(){
      reflowQueued = false;
      const shouldForce = reflowForceMax;
      reflowForceMax = false;
      runStableImageReflow(shouldForce);
    });
  }

  window.safeReflowImageArea = scheduleStableImageReflow;
  window.loopStableImageReflow = scheduleStableImageReflow;

  const output = document.getElementById('outputCtn');
  if (output && !window.__loopStage32OutputMutationObserver) {
    window.__loopStage32OutputMutationObserver = new MutationObserver(function(){
      scheduleStableImageReflow(false);
    });
    try {
      window.__loopStage32OutputMutationObserver.observe(output, { childList: true, subtree: true });
    } catch (e) {}
  }

  const originalSyncComposerReservedSpace = window.syncComposerReservedSpace;
  let composerQueued = false;
  let lastComposerHeight = -1;

  window.syncComposerReservedSpace = function loopSafeSyncComposerReservedSpace() {
    if (composerQueued) return;
    composerQueued = true;
    requestAnimationFrame(function(){
      composerQueued = false;
      const root = document.documentElement;
      const chatUiEl = document.querySelector('.chat-ui');
      const appEl = document.querySelector('.app');
      if (!root || !chatUiEl) return;

      let measured = 0;
      if (appEl && appEl.classList.contains('page-image-simple') && appEl.classList.contains('image-prompt-hidden')) {
        measured = 28;
      } else {
        measured = Math.max(44, Math.ceil(chatUiEl.getBoundingClientRect().height || 0));
      }

      if (Math.abs(measured - lastComposerHeight) < 2) return;
      lastComposerHeight = measured;
      root.style.setProperty('--composer-reserved-height', measured + 'px');
    });
  };

  // Preserve compatibility if any old code stored the original function indirectly.
  window.loopOriginalSyncComposerReservedSpace = originalSyncComposerReservedSpace || null;

  const generateBtn = document.getElementById('sendBtn');
  if (generateBtn && !generateBtn.dataset.loopStage32ReflowBound) {
    generateBtn.dataset.loopStage32ReflowBound = 'true';
    generateBtn.addEventListener('click', function(){
      scheduleStableImageReflow(true);
      setTimeout(function(){ scheduleStableImageReflow(true); }, 220);
      setTimeout(function(){ scheduleStableImageReflow(false); }, 900);
    }, true);
  }

  window.addEventListener('resize', function(){ scheduleStableImageReflow(false); }, { passive: true });
  setTimeout(function(){
    try { window.syncComposerReservedSpace(); } catch(e) {}
    scheduleStableImageReflow(false);
  }, 0);
})();
</script>


<style id="loop-page-switch-image-state-stage33-style">
/* Stage 33: Image chrome must never cover non-image pages. */
.app:not(.page-image-simple) #imageWorkspaceStage,
.app:not(.page-image-simple) #imageMobileOverlayHost,
.app:not(.page-image-simple) #promptDockToggleBtn,
.app:not(.page-image-simple) #promptDockHint,
.app:not(.page-image-simple) .canvas-nav-btn {
  display: none !important;
  opacity: 0 !important;
  pointer-events: none !important;
}

.app:not(.page-image-simple) .chat-ui {
  display: none !important;
  opacity: 0 !important;
  pointer-events: none !important;
}
</style>

<script id="loop-page-switch-image-state-stage33-script">
(function(){
  if (window.__LOOP_PAGE_SWITCH_IMAGE_STATE_STAGE33__) return;
  window.__LOOP_PAGE_SWITCH_IMAGE_STATE_STAGE33__ = true;

  function isImagePageActive() {
    return !!document.getElementById('page-image')?.classList.contains('active');
  }

  function closeImageChromeForNonImagePage() {
    const app = document.querySelector('.app');
    const workspace = document.getElementById('imageWorkspaceStage');
    const chatSettings = document.querySelector('.chat-settings');
    const chatUi = document.querySelector('.chat-ui');
    const mobileHost = document.getElementById('imageMobileOverlayHost');
    const dockBtn = document.getElementById('promptDockToggleBtn');
    const dockHint = document.getElementById('promptDockHint');

    if (app) {
      app.classList.remove(
        'page-image-simple',
        'image-stage-canvas',
        'image-stage-workspace',
        'image-mobile-workspace-open',
        'image-mobile-comments-open'
      );
    }

    if (workspace) workspace.classList.remove('show');
    if (chatSettings) chatSettings.classList.remove('show');
    if (mobileHost) mobileHost.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
    if (dockBtn) dockBtn.hidden = true;
    if (dockHint) {
      dockHint.hidden = true;
      dockHint.classList.remove('is-visible');
    }
    if (chatUi) chatUi.hidden = true;

    if (typeof closeComposerMenu === 'function') {
      try { closeComposerMenu(); } catch(e) {}
    }
    if (typeof syncInlineWidthVisibility === 'function') {
      try { syncInlineWidthVisibility(); } catch(e) {}
    }
    if (typeof updateComposerStageButtons === 'function') {
      try { updateComposerStageButtons(); } catch(e) {}
    }
  }

  function restoreImageChromeForImagePage() {
    const app = document.querySelector('.app');
    const chatUi = document.querySelector('.chat-ui');
    if (app) app.classList.add('page-image-simple');
    if (chatUi) chatUi.hidden = false;

    requestAnimationFrame(function(){
      try {
        if (window.loopImageWorkspacePinned && typeof showWorkspaceStage === 'function' && !(window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(max-width: 760px)').matches)) {
          showWorkspaceStage();
        } else if (window.activeImageStage === 'canvas' && typeof showCanvasStage === 'function') {
          showCanvasStage();
        } else if (typeof showGalleryStage === 'function') {
          showGalleryStage();
        }
      } catch(e) {}

      try { if (typeof syncImagePromptDockVisibility === 'function') syncImagePromptDockVisibility(); } catch(e) {}
      try { if (typeof syncImageMobileStructure === 'function') syncImageMobileStructure(); } catch(e) {}
      try { if (typeof syncComposerReservedSpace === 'function') syncComposerReservedSpace(); } catch(e) {}
      try { if (typeof updateComposerStageButtons === 'function') updateComposerStageButtons(); } catch(e) {}
    });
  }

  window.loopCloseImageChromeForNonImagePage = closeImageChromeForNonImagePage;
  window.loopRestoreImageChromeForImagePage = restoreImageChromeForImagePage;

  function installSwitchPageGuard() {
    if (typeof window.switchPage !== 'function') return false;
    if (window.switchPage.__loopPageSwitchImageStateStage33) return true;

    const original = window.switchPage;
    const guarded = function(pageName) {
      const normalized = (pageName === 'hall' || pageName === 'forge' || pageName === 'forge-projects') ? 'story' : pageName;
      const result = original.apply(this, arguments);

      requestAnimationFrame(function(){
        if (normalized === 'image' || isImagePageActive()) restoreImageChromeForImagePage();
        else closeImageChromeForNonImagePage();
      });

      return result;
    };

    guarded.__loopPageSwitchImageStateStage33 = true;
    window.switchPage = guarded;
    return true;
  }

  if (!installSwitchPageGuard()) {
    const timer = setInterval(function(){
      if (installSwitchPageGuard()) clearInterval(timer);
    }, 100);
    setTimeout(function(){ clearInterval(timer); }, 5000);
  }

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){
    if (!isImagePageActive()) closeImageChromeForNonImagePage();
  }, { once: true });
})();
</script>

<script id="loop-need-help-stage36-script">
(function() {
  const NEED_HELP_TEMPLATE = `Character Name:
Role: protagonist / companion / rival / villain / mysterious stranger / world NPC
Short Description:
Personality:
Avatar Prompt:
Story Use:

Profile guide:
You can follow the Create Character format in Story Mode, or ask Loopy to help shape the profile.

How to submit:
1. Generate a character avatar in 1:1 or 2:3 ratio.
2. Send it to the gallery named "characters".
3. Open the comment button on your image.
4. Paste this profile as the first comment.`;

  function buildNeedHelpModal() {
    if (document.getElementById('loopNeedHelpOverlay')) return;
    const overlay = document.createElement('div');
    overlay.id = 'loopNeedHelpOverlay';
    overlay.className = 'loop-need-help-overlay';
    overlay.hidden = true;
    overlay.innerHTML = `
      <section class="loop-need-help-modal" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="loopNeedHelpTitle">
        <div class="loop-need-help-head">
          <div>
            <div class="loop-need-help-kicker">✦ LOOP Need Help</div>
            <div id="loopNeedHelpTitle" class="loop-need-help-title">Help shape LOOP’s default Story cast</div>
            <div class="loop-need-help-subtitle">We’d be grateful for character avatar submissions for Story Mode. Up to <b>10 characters</b> may be selected, then curated and adapted to fit LOOP.</div>
          </div>
          <button class="loop-need-help-close" type="button" onclick="closeLoopNeedHelpModal()" aria-label="Close">×</button>
        </div>

        <div class="loop-need-help-body">
          <div class="loop-need-help-steps">
            <div class="loop-need-help-step"><div class="loop-need-help-num">1</div><div><strong>Create a character avatar</strong><span>Use LOOP Image Generator to make a clean avatar in <b>1:1</b> or <b>2:3</b> ratio.</span></div></div>
            <div class="loop-need-help-step"><div class="loop-need-help-num">2</div><div><strong>Share it to gallery: characters</strong><span>Use Perchance’s built-in “send to gallery” menu, then choose or type <b>characters</b>.</span></div></div>
            <div class="loop-need-help-step"><div class="loop-need-help-num">3</div><div><strong>Open the image comments</strong><span>Click the comment button on your gallery image. That thread belongs to your image.</span></div></div>
            <div class="loop-need-help-step"><div class="loop-need-help-num">4</div><div><strong>Add the character profile</strong><span>Paste the template below as the first comment. For profile format, you can follow <b>Create Character</b> in Story Mode or ask <b>Loopy</b>.</span></div></div>
          </div>

          <div class="loop-need-help-template-wrap">
            <div class="loop-need-help-template-label">Character profile template</div>
            <textarea id="loopNeedHelpTemplate" class="loop-need-help-template" readonly>${NEED_HELP_TEMPLATE}</textarea>
          </div>

          <div class="loop-need-help-note">Thank you for helping LOOP grow. Selected characters will keep their submitted name and visual design. LOOP may only adjust written descriptions when needed for clarity, safety, or Story Mode consistency, especially if a profile includes explicit, NSFW, or unsafe content.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="loop-need-help-actions">
          <button class="loop-need-help-btn primary" type="button" onclick="copyLoopNeedHelpTemplate(this)">Copy Template</button>
          <button class="loop-need-help-btn" type="button" onclick="goToLoopNeedHelpGallery()">Open Gallery</button>
          <button class="loop-need-help-btn" type="button" onclick="closeLoopNeedHelpModal()">Close</button>
        </div>
      </section>
    `;
    overlay.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
      if (e.target === overlay) closeLoopNeedHelpModal();
    });
    document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  }

  function makeNeedHelpTrack() {
    const unit = `
      <span>LOOP Need Help</span><span class="loop-need-help-dot">•</span>
      <span>We’d love your help shaping Story Mode’s default cast</span><span class="loop-need-help-dot">•</span>
      <span>Share a character avatar to gallery: characters</span><span class="loop-need-help-dot">•</span>
      <span>Add the profile as the first image comment</span><span class="loop-need-help-dot">•</span>
      <span>Up to 10 characters may be selected and curated for LOOP</span><span class="loop-need-help-dot">•</span>`;
    return `<div class="loop-need-help-track">${unit}${unit}</div>`;
  }

  function installNeedHelpHeader() {
    const header = document.querySelector('.header');
    const brand = document.querySelector('.header-brand');
    if (!header || !brand) return;

    let banner = document.getElementById('loopNeedHelpBanner');
    if (!banner) {
      banner = document.createElement('div');
      banner.id = 'loopNeedHelpBanner';
      banner.className = 'loop-need-help-banner';
      banner.setAttribute('aria-label', 'LOOP Need Help announcement');
      banner.innerHTML = `
        <div class="loop-need-help-art" aria-hidden="true">
          <span class="loop-need-help-pixel"></span>
          <span class="loop-need-help-pixel"></span>
          <span class="loop-need-help-pixel"></span>
          <span class="loop-need-help-pixel"></span>
          <span class="loop-need-help-pixel"></span>
          <span class="loop-need-help-pixel"></span>
          <span class="loop-need-help-pixel"></span>
          <span class="loop-need-help-pixel"></span>
          <span class="loop-need-help-pixel"></span>
          <span class="loop-need-help-pixel"></span>
          <span class="loop-need-help-pixel"></span>
          <span class="loop-need-help-pixel"></span>
          <span class="loop-need-help-pixel"></span>
          <span class="loop-need-help-pixel"></span>
        </div>
        <div class="loop-need-help-marquee" aria-hidden="true">${makeNeedHelpTrack()}</div>
        <button id="loopNeedHelpTrigger" class="loop-need-help-trigger" type="button" title="LOOP Need Help" aria-label="Open LOOP Need Help">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 32 32" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M28 6a2 2 0 0 0-2-2h-4V2h-2v2h-8V2h-2v2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v20a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h4v-2H6V6h4v2h2V6h8v2h2V6h4v6h2Z"/><path d="m21 15l2.549 4.938l5.451.791l-4 3.844L26 30l-5-2.562L16 30l1-5.427l-4-3.844l5.6-.791z"/></svg>
        </button>
      `;
      brand.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', banner);
    }

    const trigger = document.getElementById('loopNeedHelpTrigger');
    if (trigger && !trigger.dataset.boundNeedHelp) {
      trigger.dataset.boundNeedHelp = '1';
      trigger.addEventListener('click', openLoopNeedHelpModal);
    }
  }

  window.openLoopNeedHelpModal = function() {
    buildNeedHelpModal();
    const overlay = document.getElementById('loopNeedHelpOverlay');
    const trigger = document.getElementById('loopNeedHelpTrigger');
    if (overlay) overlay.hidden = false;
    if (trigger) trigger.classList.add('active');
    setTimeout(function() {
      const template = document.getElementById('loopNeedHelpTemplate');
      if (template) template.focus({ preventScroll: true });
    }, 0);
  };

  window.closeLoopNeedHelpModal = function() {
    const overlay = document.getElementById('loopNeedHelpOverlay');
    const trigger = document.getElementById('loopNeedHelpTrigger');
    if (overlay) overlay.hidden = true;
    if (trigger) trigger.classList.remove('active');
  };

  window.copyLoopNeedHelpTemplate = function(btn) {
    const template = document.getElementById('loopNeedHelpTemplate');
    const text = template ? template.value : NEED_HELP_TEMPLATE;
    const original = btn ? btn.textContent : '';
    const done = function() {
      if (!btn) return;
      btn.textContent = 'Copied';
      setTimeout(function() { btn.textContent = original || 'Copy Template'; }, 1300);
    };
    if (navigator.clipboard && navigator.clipboard.writeText) {
      navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(done).catch(function() {
        if (template) { template.select(); document.execCommand('copy'); done(); }
      });
    } else if (template) {
      template.select();
      document.execCommand('copy');
      done();
    }
  };

  window.goToLoopNeedHelpGallery = function() {
    closeLoopNeedHelpModal();
    try {
      if (typeof showPage === 'function') showPage('image');
    } catch (e) {}
    try {
      if (typeof showGalleryStage === 'function') showGalleryStage();
    } catch (e) {}
    const gallery = document.getElementById('gallerySection') || document.getElementById('gallerySectionCtn');
    if (gallery && gallery.scrollIntoView) {
      setTimeout(function() { gallery.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }); }, 80);
    }
  };

  document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
    if (e.key === 'Escape') closeLoopNeedHelpModal();
  });

  function bootNeedHelp() {
    buildNeedHelpModal();
    installNeedHelpHeader();
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', bootNeedHelp, { once: true });
  } else {
    setTimeout(bootNeedHelp, 0);
  }
})();
</script>

<script id="loop-gallery-comment-modal-stage42-script">
(function() {
  function hasGalleryCommentSignature(root) {
    if (!root || !(root instanceof HTMLElement)) return false;
    if (root.classList.contains('loop-gallery-comment-overlay')) return true;
    const text = String(root.textContent || '').toLowerCase();
    const hasTextarea = !!root.querySelector('textarea');
    if (!hasTextarea) return false;
    const hasCommentText = text.includes('no comments yet') || text.includes('type a comment') || text.includes('submit');
    const hasSubmit = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('button,input[type="button"],input[type="submit"]')).some(function(el) {
      return /submit/i.test(String(el.textContent || el.value || ''));
    });
    return hasCommentText || hasSubmit;
  }

  function getDirectChildren(el) {
    return el ? Array.from(el.children || []) : [];
  }

  function polishGalleryCommentOverlay(overlay) {
    if (!overlay || overlay.dataset.loopGalleryCommentPolished === '1') return;
    if (!hasGalleryCommentSignature(overlay)) return;

    const wrapper = overlay.firstElementChild;
    if (!wrapper) return;

    const children = getDirectChildren(wrapper);
    const closeBtn = children.find(function(child) {
      return child.tagName === 'BUTTON' && String(child.textContent || '').trim().includes('✕');
    }) || wrapper.querySelector('button');

    const card = children.find(function(child) { return child !== closeBtn; }) || wrapper.lastElementChild;
    if (!card) return;

    overlay.dataset.loopGalleryCommentPolished = '1';
    overlay.classList.add('loop-gallery-comment-overlay');
    wrapper.classList.add('loop-gallery-comment-wrapper');
    card.classList.add('loop-gallery-comment-card');
    if (closeBtn) {
      closeBtn.classList.add('loop-gallery-comment-close');
      closeBtn.setAttribute('title', 'Close');
      closeBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Close gallery comments');
    }

    if (!card.querySelector(':scope > .loop-gallery-comment-header')) {
      const body = document.createElement('div');
      body.className = 'loop-gallery-comment-body';
      Array.from(card.childNodes).forEach(function(node) { body.appendChild(node); });

      const header = document.createElement('div');
      header.className = 'loop-gallery-comment-header';
      header.innerHTML = '<div class="loop-gallery-comment-title">Gallery Comments</div><div class="loop-gallery-comment-subtitle">This thread belongs to this image</div>';

      card.appendChild(header);
      card.appendChild(body);
    }
  }

  let scanRaf = 0;
  function scanGalleryCommentModals() {
    scanRaf = 0;
    document.querySelectorAll('div[tabindex]').forEach(function(el) {
      if (hasGalleryCommentSignature(el)) polishGalleryCommentOverlay(el);
    });
  }

  function queueGalleryCommentScan() {
    if (scanRaf) return;
    scanRaf = requestAnimationFrame(scanGalleryCommentModals);
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', queueGalleryCommentScan, { once: true });
  } else {
    queueGalleryCommentScan();
  }

  const observer = new MutationObserver(queueGalleryCommentScan);
  observer.observe(document.documentElement, { childList: true, subtree: true });
})();
</script>

  max-height: 0;
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(4px);
  font-size: 11.5px;
  line-height: 1.38;
  font-weight: 400;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.88);
  text-shadow: 0 1px 5px rgba(0,0,0,.42);
  display: -webkit-box;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: opacity .16s ease, transform .16s ease, max-height .16s ease;
}

<script id="loop-gate-default-assets-stage59-script">
(function() {
  function escapeHtml(value) {
    return String(value == null ? '' : value)
      .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
      .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
      .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
      .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
      .replace(/'/g, '&#039;');
  }
  function short(value, max) {
    var text = String(value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
    if (!text) return '';
    return text.length > max ? text.slice(0, max - 1).trimEnd() + '…' : text;
  }
  function initial(name) {
    return String(name || '?').trim().slice(0, 1).toUpperCase() || '?';
  }
  function slug(value) {
    return String(value || '')
      .toLowerCase()
      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')
      .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
      .slice(0, 54) || 'asset';
  }
  function currentAccent() {
    var val = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--accent').trim();
    return /^#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}$/.test(val) ? val : '#ffbe0a';
  }
  function firstText() {
    for (var i = 0; i < arguments.length; i++) {
      var value = String(arguments[i] == null ? '' : arguments[i]).trim();
      if (value) return value;
    }
    return '';
  }
  function normalizeDefaultCharacter(item, index) {
    var source = item && typeof item === 'object' ? item : {};
    var name = firstText(source.name, source.title, 'Character ' + (index + 1));
    var id = firstText(source.id, slug(name), 'default-character-' + (index + 1));
    var appearance = firstText(source.appearance, source.characterAppearance, source.visualAppearance, source.avatarPrompt);
    var characterDescription = firstText(source.characterDescription, source.description, source.personality, source.backgroundLore, source.lore);
    var shortText = firstText(source.short, source.summary, characterDescription, appearance);
    return Object.assign({}, source, {
      id: id,
      name: name,
      title: firstText(source.title, name),
      avatarUrl: firstText(source.avatarUrl, source.imageUrl, source.previewUrl, source.coverUrl),
      short: short(shortText, 180),
      appearance: appearance,
      characterDescription: characterDescription,
      description: firstText(source.description, characterDescription),
      sourceType: 'default-character',
      _empty: !!source._empty
    });
  }
  function normalizeDefaultWorld(item, index) {
    var source = item && typeof item === 'object' ? item : {};
    var title = firstText(source.title, source.name, 'World ' + (index + 1));
    var id = firstText(source.id, slug(title), 'default-world-' + (index + 1));
    var premise = firstText(source.premise, source.scenario, source.contextSummary, source.description);
    var summary = firstText(source.contextSummary, source.summary, source.short, premise);
    var imageUrl = firstText(source.imageUrl, source.previewUrl, source.coverUrl, source.avatarUrl);
    return Object.assign({}, source, {
      id: id,
      title: title,
      name: firstText(source.name, title),
      short: short(firstText(source.short, summary, premise), 190),
      imageUrl: imageUrl,
      previewUrl: firstText(source.previewUrl, imageUrl),
      premise: premise,
      contextSummary: summary,
      contextLore: firstText(source.contextLore, source.lore, source.rules),
      contextGlossary: firstText(source.contextGlossary, source.glossary, source.terms),
      sourceType: 'default-world'
    });
  }
  function emptyDefaultCharacterSlot(n) {
    return normalizeDefaultCharacter({ id: 'empty-character-slot-' + n, name: '', short: '', avatarUrl: '', _empty: true }, n - 1);
  }
  function getDefaultCharacters() {
    var list = [];
    try {
      if (window.LoopStory && typeof window.LoopStory.hallQuickCharacters === 'function') {
        list = window.LoopStory.hallQuickCharacters().slice(0, 15).map(normalizeDefaultCharacter);
      }
    } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
    while (list.length < 15) {
      list.push(emptyDefaultCharacterSlot(list.length + 1));
    }
    return list.slice(0, 15);
  }
  function worldSeriesKey(item) {
    var title = String(item && (item.title || item.name) || '').trim();
    var parts = title.split(/\s+—\s+|\s+-\s+/);
    if (parts.length > 1) return parts[0].trim().toLowerCase();
    return 'single:' + String(item && (item.id || title) || '').toLowerCase();
  }
  function worldDisplaySortKey(item) {
    var title = String(item && (item.title || item.name) || '').trim();
    var parts = title.split(/\s+—\s+|\s+-\s+/);
    return (parts.length > 1 ? parts.slice(1).join(' — ') : title).trim().toLowerCase();
  }
  function sortWorldsByReadableName(list) {
    return (list || []).slice().sort(function(a, b) {
      return worldDisplaySortKey(a).localeCompare(worldDisplaySortKey(b), undefined, { sensitivity: 'base' });
    });
  }
  function interleaveSeriesWorlds(list) {
    var source = sortWorldsByReadableName(list || []);
    var groups = {};
    source.forEach(function(item) {
      var key = worldSeriesKey(item);
      if (!groups[key]) groups[key] = [];
      groups[key].push(item);
    });
    var featuredKey = Object.keys(groups).sort(function(a, b) {
      return groups[b].length - groups[a].length || a.localeCompare(b);
    })[0];
    if (!featuredKey || groups[featuredKey].length <= 1) return source;
    var featured = groups[featuredKey].slice();
    var rest = source.filter(function(item) { return worldSeriesKey(item) !== featuredKey; });
    var out = [];
    var max = Math.max(rest.length, featured.length);
    for (var i = 0; i < max; i++) {
      if (rest[i]) out.push(rest[i]);
      if (featured[i]) out.push(featured[i]);
    }
    return out;
  }
  function getDefaultWorlds() {
    try {
      if (window.LoopStory && typeof window.LoopStory.hallWorldBuildingSamples === 'function') {
        return interleaveSeriesWorlds(window.LoopStory.hallWorldBuildingSamples().slice(0, 10).map(normalizeDefaultWorld));
      }
    } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
    return [];
  }
  function worldPreviewStyle(item) {
    try {
      if (window.LoopStory && typeof window.LoopStory.worldPreviewStyle === 'function') return window.LoopStory.worldPreviewStyle(item);
    } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
    var url = String(item && (item.imageUrl || item.previewUrl || item.coverUrl || item.avatarUrl) || '').trim();
    return url ? "background-image:url('" + url.replace(/'/g, '%27') + "');" : '';
  }
  function iconUse() {
    return '<svg viewBox="0 0 1000 1000" aria-hidden="true"><path fill="currentColor" d="M329 807q-4-18-1.5-36t12.5-33q-57-15-104-51-9-7-12-19t2-23q24-53 75-119 28-37 56-66-53-24-79.5-75.5T263 276t57-93.5T423.5 146 527 182.5t57 93.5-14.5 108.5T490 460q41 45 77 94h95v-37q0-25 13-46t35-32.5 46.5-9.5 44.5 17l15 11q2-17 2-33l-1-21h1q-6-103-61-189-53-85-140-134-90-51-193-51h-1q-103 0-193 51-87 49-141 133-54 87-60 190h1l-1 21q0 76 28.5 146.5T138 696t122 87q33 15 69 24zm635-110H425q-13-3-21.5-13t-8.5-23v-2q0-15 10.5-25.5T431 623h299V517q0-12 10.5-17.5T761 501l216 159q5 4 7 10.5t-.5 12.5-8 10-11.5 4zm20 104v2q0 15-10.5 25.5T948 839H649v106q0 12-10.5 17.5T618 961L403 802q-6-4-7.5-10.5t.5-12.5 7.5-10 11.5-4h539q13 3 21.5 13t8.5 23z"/></svg>';
  }
  function iconScene() {
    return '<svg viewBox="0 0 1000 1000" aria-hidden="true"><path fill="currentColor" d="M238 407V303q0-6-5-11t-11-5h-55q-6 0-11 5t-5 11v104q0 5-3 8t-8 3H37q-7 0-12 4.5T20 434v54q0 7 5 12t12 5h103q5 0 8 3t3 8v103q0 7 5 12t12 5h54q6 0 11-5t5-12V516q0-5 3-8t8-3h104q6 0 11-5t5-12v-54q0-7-5-11.5t-11-4.5H249q-5 0-8-3t-3-8zm270 224q-96 21-156 60-70 45-70 105v14q0 18 13 31t31 13h610q18 0 31-13t13-31v-14q0-60-72-106-61-38-158-59-25-5-40.5-24.5T694 562v-6q0-10 4.5-19t12.5-15q43-29 69-85 25-54 25-107 0-47-23.5-86.5T718 181t-87-23-87 23-63.5 62.5T456 330q0 52 25 104 25 55 65 85 17 13 17 33v11q0 24-15.5 43.5T508 631z"/></svg>';
  }
  function iconInspect() {
    return '<svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" aria-hidden="true"><path fill="currentColor" d="M56.774,10.391c-17.679,0-32.001,14.329-32.001,32c0,6.044,1.676,11.695,4.588,16.517L13.846,74.423l0.054,0.054 c-1.656,1.585-2.673,3.835-2.673,6.378c-0.001,4.913,3.913,8.755,8.821,8.754c2.507-0.001,4.749-1.004,6.349-2.636l0.039,0.039 l16.008-16.009c4.312,2.163,9.176,3.388,14.33,3.388c17.68,0,31.999-14.327,31.999-32C88.773,24.72,74.453,10.391,56.774,10.391z M56.968,61.808c-11.05,0-20.001-8.954-20.001-20c0-11.044,8.951-20,20.001-20c11.05,0,19.999,8.955,19.999,20 C76.968,52.854,68.018,61.808,56.968,61.808z"/></svg>';
  }
  function iconComment() {
    return '<svg viewBox="0 0 512 512" aria-hidden="true"><path fill="currentColor" d="M144 208c-17.7 0-32 14.3-32 32s14.3 32 32 32s32-14.3 32-32s-14.3-32-32-32m112 0c-17.7 0-32 14.3-32 32s14.3 32 32 32s32-14.3 32-32s-14.3-32-32-32m112 0c-17.7 0-32 14.3-32 32s14.3 32 32 32s32-14.3 32-32s-14.3-32-32-32M256 32C114.6 32 0 125.1 0 240c0 47.6 19.9 91.2 52.9 126.3C38 405.7 7 439.1 6.5 439.5c-6.6 7-8.4 17.2-4.6 26S14.4 480 24 480c61.5 0 110-25.7 139.1-46.3C192 442.8 223.2 448 256 448c141.4 0 256-93.1 256-208S397.4 32 256 32m0 368c-26.7 0-53.1-4.1-78.4-12.1l-22.7-7.2l-19.5 13.8c-14.3 10.1-33.9 21.4-57.5 29c7.3-12.1 14.4-25.7 19.9-40.2l10.6-28.1l-20.6-21.8C69.7 314.1 48 282.2 48 240c0-88.2 93.3-160 208-160s208 71.8 208 160s-93.3 160-208 160"/></svg>';
  }
  function iconArrowLeft() {
    return '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M13 8L9 12M9 12L13 16M9 12H21M19.4845 7C17.8699 4.58803 15.1204 3 12 3C7.02944 3 3 7.02944 3 12C3 16.9706 7.02944 21 12 21C15.1204 21 17.8699 19.412 19.4845 17" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>';
  }
  function iconArrowRight() {
    return '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M11 16L15 12M15 12L11 8M15 12H3M4.51555 17C6.13007 19.412 8.87958 21 12 21C16.9706 21 21 16.9706 21 12C21 7.02944 16.9706 3 12 3C8.87958 3 6.13007 4.58803 4.51555 7" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>';
  }
  function buildCharacterCard(item) {
    var isEmpty = !!(item && item._empty);
    var id = escapeHtml(item.id || item.name || 'character');
    var avatar = String(item.avatarUrl || '').trim();
    var visualStyle = avatar ? "background-image:url('" + avatar.replace(/'/g, '%27') + "');" : '';
    var title = isEmpty ? '' : (item.name || 'Untitled');
    var desc = isEmpty ? '' : short(item.short || item.characterDescription || item.description || item.personality || '', 150);
    return `
      <article class="loop-gate-asset-card${isEmpty ? ' is-empty' : ''}" data-gate-character="${id}">
        <div class="loop-gate-asset-visual" style="${visualStyle}">
          <div class="loop-gate-asset-overlay-left">
            <button type="button" class="loop-gate-asset-icon-btn" ${isEmpty ? 'disabled' : ''} onclick="loopGateUseDefaultCharacter('${id}', 'primary')" title="Use as Primary" aria-label="Use as Primary">${iconUse()}</button>
            <button type="button" class="loop-gate-asset-icon-btn" ${isEmpty ? 'disabled' : ''} onclick="loopGateUseDefaultCharacter('${id}', 'scene')" title="Add to Scene" aria-label="Add to Scene">${iconScene()}</button>
            <button type="button" class="loop-gate-asset-icon-btn" ${isEmpty ? 'disabled' : ''} onclick="loopGateInspectDefaultCharacter('${id}')" title="Inspector" aria-label="Inspector">${iconInspect()}</button>
          </div>
          <div class="loop-gate-asset-overlay-right">
            <button type="button" class="loop-gate-asset-icon-btn" ${isEmpty ? 'disabled' : ''} onclick="event.stopPropagation(); openLoopGateAssetComments('character','${id}')" title="Comments" aria-label="Comments">${iconComment()}</button>
          </div>
          ${avatar ? '' : escapeHtml(isEmpty ? '' : initial(item.name))}
          <div class="loop-gate-asset-meta">
            <div class="loop-gate-asset-title">${escapeHtml(title)}</div>
            <div class="loop-gate-asset-desc">${escapeHtml(desc)}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </article>`;
  }
  function buildWorldCard(item) {
    var id = escapeHtml(item.id || item.title || 'world');
    var style = worldPreviewStyle(item);
    var title = item.title || 'Untitled World';
    var desc = short(item.short || item.premise || item.contextSummary || item.description || '', 170);
    return `
      <article class="loop-gate-asset-card is-world" data-gate-world="${id}">
        <div class="loop-gate-asset-visual" style="${style}">
          <div class="loop-gate-asset-overlay-left">
            <button type="button" class="loop-gate-asset-icon-btn" onclick="loopGateUseDefaultWorld('${id}')" title="Use World" aria-label="Use World">${iconUse()}</button>
            <button type="button" class="loop-gate-asset-icon-btn" onclick="loopGateInspectDefaultWorld('${id}')" title="Inspector" aria-label="Inspector">${iconInspect()}</button>
          </div>
          <div class="loop-gate-asset-overlay-right">
            <button type="button" class="loop-gate-asset-icon-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); openLoopGateAssetComments('world','${id}')" title="Comments" aria-label="Comments">${iconComment()}</button>
          </div>
          ${style ? '' : escapeHtml(initial(item.title))}
          <div class="loop-gate-asset-meta">
            <div class="loop-gate-asset-title">${escapeHtml(title)}</div>
            <div class="loop-gate-asset-desc">${escapeHtml(desc)}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </article>`;
  }
  function buildCarousel(itemsHtml, kindLabel) {
    var safeKind = slug(kindLabel || 'assets');
    return `
      <div class="loop-gate-default-carousel" data-gate-carousel="${safeKind}">
        <button type="button" class="loop-gate-carousel-arrow is-prev" data-dir="prev" aria-label="Scroll ${escapeHtml(kindLabel)} left">${iconArrowLeft()}</button>
        <div class="loop-gate-default-viewport">
          <div class="loop-gate-default-strip">${itemsHtml}</div>
        </div>
        <button type="button" class="loop-gate-carousel-arrow is-next" data-dir="next" aria-label="Scroll ${escapeHtml(kindLabel)} right">${iconArrowRight()}</button>
      </div>`;
  }
  function buildHubHtml(chars, worlds) {
    return `
      <section class="loop-gate-default-section" aria-label="Characters">
        <div class="loop-gate-default-list-title">Characters</div>
        ${buildCarousel(chars.map(buildCharacterCard).join('') || '<div class="library-empty">Default characters are not ready yet.</div>', 'characters')}
      </section>
      <section class="loop-gate-default-section" aria-label="World Building">
        <div class="loop-gate-default-list-title">World Building</div>
        ${buildCarousel(worlds.map(buildWorldCard).join('') || '<div class="library-empty">Default worlds are not ready yet.</div>', 'worlds')}
      </section>`;
  }
  function refreshCarouselState(root) {
    var scope = root || document;
    var carousels = [];
    if (scope.matches && scope.matches('.loop-gate-default-carousel')) carousels.push(scope);
    scope.querySelectorAll?.('.loop-gate-default-carousel').forEach(function(carousel) {
      if (!carousels.includes(carousel)) carousels.push(carousel);
    });
    carousels.forEach(function(carousel) {
      var strip = carousel.querySelector('.loop-gate-default-strip');
      var prev = carousel.querySelector('.loop-gate-carousel-arrow.is-prev');
      var next = carousel.querySelector('.loop-gate-carousel-arrow.is-next');
      if (!strip || !prev || !next) return;
      var maxScroll = Math.max(0, strip.scrollWidth - strip.clientWidth);
      prev.classList.toggle('is-disabled', strip.scrollLeft <= 2);
      next.classList.toggle('is-disabled', strip.scrollLeft >= maxScroll - 2 || maxScroll <= 2);
    });
  }
  function bindCarouselControls(root) {
    (root || document).querySelectorAll('.loop-gate-default-carousel').forEach(function(carousel) {
      if (carousel.dataset.bound === '1') return;
      carousel.dataset.bound = '1';
      var strip = carousel.querySelector('.loop-gate-default-strip');
      if (!strip) return;
      var step = function() {
        return Math.max(180, Math.round(strip.clientWidth * 0.82));
      };
      carousel.querySelectorAll('.loop-gate-carousel-arrow').forEach(function(btn) {
        btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
          var direction = btn.dataset.dir === 'prev' ? -1 : 1;
          strip.scrollBy({ left: direction * step(), behavior: 'smooth' });
          setTimeout(function() { refreshCarouselState(carousel); }, 180);
        });
      });
      strip.addEventListener('scroll', function() { refreshCarouselState(carousel); }, { passive: true });
      setTimeout(function() { refreshCarouselState(carousel); }, 60);
    });
    if (!window.__loopGateCarouselResizeBound) {
      window.__loopGateCarouselResizeBound = true;
      window.addEventListener('resize', function() { refreshCarouselState(document); }, { passive: true });
    }
    refreshCarouselState(root);
  }
  function renderLoopGateDefaultAssets() {
    var gallerySection = document.getElementById('gallerySection');
    if (!gallerySection) return;
    var galleryShell = gallerySection.querySelector('.gallery-shell');
    if (!galleryShell) return;
    var hub = document.getElementById('loopGateDefaultHub');
    if (!hub) {
      hub = document.createElement('div');
      hub.id = 'loopGateDefaultHub';
      hub.className = 'loop-gate-default-hub';
      gallerySection.insertBefore(hub, galleryShell);
    }
    hub.innerHTML = buildHubHtml(getDefaultCharacters(), getDefaultWorlds());
    bindCarouselControls(hub);
  }
  function findDefaultCharacter(id) {
    var key = String(id || '');
    return getDefaultCharacters().find(function(item) { return String(item.id || item.name || '') === key; });
  }
  function findDefaultWorld(id) {
    var key = String(id || '');
    return getDefaultWorlds().find(function(item) { return String(item.id || item.title || '') === key; });
  }
  function loopGateUseDefaultCharacter(id, mode) {
    var item = findDefaultCharacter(id);
    if (!item || !window.LoopStory) return;
    try {
      if (mode === 'scene') {
        if (typeof window.LoopStory.addStoryCharacterToScene === 'function') window.LoopStory.addStoryCharacterToScene(item);
      } else {
        if (typeof window.LoopStory.applyStoryCharacterAsPrimary === 'function') window.LoopStory.applyStoryCharacterAsPrimary(item);
      }
      if (typeof window.LoopStory.persistSnapshot === 'function') window.LoopStory.persistSnapshot();
      if (typeof switchPage === 'function') switchPage('story');
    } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
  }
  function loopGateInspectDefaultCharacter(id) {
    var item = findDefaultCharacter(id);
    if (!item || item._empty || !window.LoopStory || typeof window.LoopStory.openStoryCharacterInspectorModal !== 'function') return;
    try {
      window.LoopStory.openStoryCharacterInspectorModal(item, { source: 'gate', mode: 'scene' });
    } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
  }
  function buildWorldPackage(item) {
    var safe = item || {}, blocks = [];
    var scenario = [safe.scenario, safe.premise].map(function(v) { return String(v || '').trim(); }).filter(Boolean).filter(function(v, i, a) { return a.indexOf(v) === i; }).join('\n\n').trim();
    if (scenario) blocks.push(scenario);
    if (String(safe.contextSummary || '').trim()) blocks.push('Context Summary:\n' + String(safe.contextSummary).trim());
    if (String(safe.contextMemo || '').trim()) blocks.push('Context Notes:\n' + String(safe.contextMemo).trim());
    if (String(safe.contextLore || '').trim()) blocks.push('World Lore / Rules:\n' + String(safe.contextLore).trim());
    if (String(safe.contextGlossary || '').trim()) blocks.push('Glossary / Terms:\n' + String(safe.contextGlossary).trim());
    return blocks.join('\n\n').trim();
  }
  function loopGateUseDefaultWorld(id) {
    var item = findDefaultWorld(id);
    if (!item || !window.LoopStory) return;
    try {
      if (typeof window.LoopStory.setActiveWorld === 'function') {
        window.LoopStory.setActiveWorld(item, { applyScenario: true });
      } else if (window.LoopStory.els && window.LoopStory.els.scenario) {
        window.LoopStory.els.scenario.value = buildWorldPackage(item);
        if (typeof window.LoopStory.renderAll === 'function') window.LoopStory.renderAll();
      }
      if (window.LoopStory.els && window.LoopStory.els.inspiration && !String(window.LoopStory.els.inspiration.value || '').trim()) {
        window.LoopStory.els.inspiration.value = String(item.title || '').trim();
      }
      if (typeof window.LoopStory.persistSnapshot === 'function') window.LoopStory.persistSnapshot();
      if (typeof switchPage === 'function') switchPage('story');
    } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
  }
  function loopGateInspectDefaultWorld(id) {
    var item = findDefaultWorld(id);
    if (!item || !window.LoopStory || typeof window.LoopStory.openStoryWorldInspectorModal !== 'function') return;
    try {
      window.LoopStory.openStoryWorldInspectorModal(item, { source: 'gate' });
    } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
  }
  function syncPrivateLibraryIdentity() {
    document.querySelectorAll('.loop-userhub-btn').forEach(function(btn) {
      var textEl = btn.querySelector('span:last-child');
      if (textEl && String(textEl.textContent || '').trim() === 'Gate') {
        textEl.textContent = 'Library';
        btn.setAttribute('title', 'Open Library');
      }
    });
    var page = document.getElementById('page-library');
    var shell = page ? page.querySelector('.library-shell') : null;
    if (shell) {
      var cards = shell.querySelectorAll('.story-card');
      if (cards[0]) {
        var title = cards[0].querySelector('.story-card-title');
        var sub = cards[0].querySelector('.story-subtitle');
        if (title) title.textContent = 'Character Library';
        if (sub) sub.textContent = 'Private reusable characters gathered from Hall, Story modals, Gallery routes, or future builder outputs.';
      }
      if (cards[1]) {
        var wtitle = cards[1].querySelector('.story-card-title');
        var wsub = cards[1].querySelector('.story-subtitle');
        if (wtitle) wtitle.textContent = 'World Library';
        if (wsub) wsub.textContent = 'Private reusable world cards and scenario seeds.';
      }
    }
    if (document.getElementById('page-library')?.classList.contains('active')) {
      var pageTitle = document.querySelector('.page-title');
      if (pageTitle) pageTitle.textContent = 'Library';
    }
  }
  function openLoopGateAssetComments(kind, id, label) {
    var asset = kind === 'world' ? findDefaultWorld(id) : findDefaultCharacter(id);
    label = label || (kind === 'world' ? asset?.title : asset?.name) || (kind === 'world' ? 'World' : 'Character');
    var channel = 'gate-' + slug(kind) + '-' + slug(id || label);
    var title = kind === 'world' ? 'World Comments' : 'Character Comments';
    var commentsHtml = '';
    try {
      var fn = (typeof window.commentsPlugin === 'function') ? window.commentsPlugin : (typeof commentsPlugin === 'function' ? commentsPlugin : null);
      if (fn) {
        commentsHtml = fn({
          channel: channel,
          channelLabel: String(label || title),
          width: '100%',
          height: '100%',
          loadFonts: 'Inter',
          forceColorScheme: document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark' ? 'dark' : 'light',
          commentPlaceholderText: 'Add a friendly comment...',
          submitButtonText: 'send',
          submitButtonStyle: 'background:' + currentAccent() + ';color:#111;border:none;border-radius:9px;font-weight:800;min-height:32px;',
          inputAreaStyle: 'border-radius:9px;font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif;'
        });
      }
    } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
    if (!commentsHtml) {
      if (typeof window.toggleComments === 'function') {
        try { window.toggleComments(true); return; } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
      }
      alert('Comments are not available from Gate yet.');
      return;
    }
    var old = document.getElementById('loopGateAssetCommentsOverlay');
    if (old) old.remove();
    var overlay = document.createElement('div');
    overlay.id = 'loopGateAssetCommentsOverlay';
    overlay.className = 'loop-gate-comments-overlay';
    overlay.innerHTML = `
      <section class="loop-gate-comments-card" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="${escapeHtml(title)}">
        <div class="loop-gate-comments-head">
          <div>
            <div class="loop-gate-comments-title">${escapeHtml(title)}</div>
            <div class="loop-gate-comments-subtitle">${escapeHtml(label || '')}</div>
          </div>
          <button type="button" class="loop-gate-comments-close" aria-label="Close">×</button>
        </div>
        <div class="loop-gate-comments-body">${commentsHtml}</div>
      </section>`;
    var close = function() { overlay.remove(); };
    overlay.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) { if (e.target === overlay) close(); });
    overlay.querySelector('.loop-gate-comments-close').onclick = close;
    document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  }
  function initLoopGateDefaultAssetsStage59() {
    renderLoopGateDefaultAssets();
    syncPrivateLibraryIdentity();
  }
  window.normalizeLoopGateDefaultCharacter = normalizeDefaultCharacter;
  window.normalizeLoopGateDefaultWorld = normalizeDefaultWorld;
  window.getLoopGateDefaultCharacters = getDefaultCharacters;
  window.getLoopGateDefaultWorlds = getDefaultWorlds;
  window.renderLoopGateDefaultAssets = renderLoopGateDefaultAssets;
  window.loopGateUseDefaultCharacter = loopGateUseDefaultCharacter;
  window.loopGateInspectDefaultCharacter = loopGateInspectDefaultCharacter;
  window.loopGateUseDefaultWorld = loopGateUseDefaultWorld;
  window.loopGateInspectDefaultWorld = loopGateInspectDefaultWorld;
  window.openLoopGateAssetComments = openLoopGateAssetComments;
  window.syncPrivateLibraryIdentity = syncPrivateLibraryIdentity;

  var previousSwitchPage = window.switchPage;
  if (typeof previousSwitchPage === 'function' && !window.__loopGateDefaultAssetsSwitchPatch) {
    window.__loopGateDefaultAssetsSwitchPatch = true;
    window.switchPage = function(pageName) {
      var result = previousSwitchPage.apply(this, arguments);
      try {
        if (pageName === 'image') renderLoopGateDefaultAssets();
        syncPrivateLibraryIdentity();
      } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
      return result;
    };
  }
  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { setTimeout(initLoopGateDefaultAssetsStage59, 0); }, { once: true });
  } else {
    setTimeout(initLoopGateDefaultAssetsStage59, 0);
  }
  setTimeout(initLoopGateDefaultAssetsStage59, 650);
})();
</script>

<script id="loop-create-character-page-stage68-script">
(function() {
  function escapeHtml(value) {
    return String(value == null ? '' : value)
      .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
      .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
      .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
      .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
      .replace(/'/g, '&#039;');
  }
  function slug(value) {
    return String(value || '')
      .toLowerCase()
      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')
      .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
      .slice(0, 64) || ('character-' + Date.now());
  }
  function field(id) {
    return document.getElementById('loopCreateCharacter' + id);
  }
  function value(id) {
    return String(field(id)?.value || '').trim();
  }
  function setValue(id, next) {
    const el = field(id);
    if (!el) return;
    el.value = String(next || '').trim();
    el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
  }
  function linesToText(value) {
    return String(value || '')
      .split(/\n+/)
      .map(v => v.trim().replace(/^[-•*]\s*/, ''))
      .filter(Boolean)
      .join('\n');
  }
  function section(title, body) {
    const clean = String(body || '').trim();
    return clean ? title + ':\n' + clean : '';
  }
  function buildFullSheet(data) {
    return [
      'Name: ' + (data.name || ''),
      data.gender ? 'Gender: ' + data.gender : '',
      data.age ? 'Age: ' + data.age : '',
      data.affiliation ? 'Affiliation: ' + data.affiliation : '',
      data.companion ? 'Companion: ' + data.companion : '',
      section('Physical Appearance', data.physicalAppearance),
      section('Clothing', data.clothing),
      section('Personality', data.personality),
      section('Social Role', data.socialRole),
      section('Background', data.background)
    ].filter(Boolean).join('\n\n').trim();
  }
  function collectCharacterPageData() {
    const name = value('Name') || 'Untitled Character';
    const physicalAppearance = linesToText(value('PhysicalAppearance'));
    const clothing = linesToText(value('Clothing'));
    const personality = linesToText(value('Personality'));
    const socialRole = linesToText(value('SocialRole'));
    const background = String(value('Background') || '').trim();
    const data = {
      id: value('Id') || slug(name),
      sourceType: 'user-character',
      name,
      title: name,
      gender: value('Gender'),
      age: value('Age'),
      affiliation: value('Affiliation'),
      companion: value('Companion'),
      avatarUrl: value('AvatarUrl'),
      short: value('Short') || [value('Affiliation'), value('Companion')].filter(Boolean).join(' · '),
      physicalAppearance,
      clothing,
      personality,
      socialRole,
      background
    };
    data.appearance = [section('Physical Appearance', physicalAppearance), section('Clothing', clothing)].filter(Boolean).join('\n\n').trim();
    data.characterDescription = [section('Personality', personality), section('Social Role', socialRole), section('Background', background)].filter(Boolean).join('\n\n').trim();
    data.description = buildFullSheet(data);
    data.updatedAt = new Date().toISOString();
    if (!data.createdAt) data.createdAt = data.updatedAt;
    return data;
  }
  function setStatus(text, isError) {
    const el = document.getElementById('loopCreateCharacterStatus');
    if (!el) return;
    el.textContent = text || '';
    el.style.color = isError ? '#d9534f' : 'var(--text-secondary)';
  }
  function updatePreview() {
    const data = collectCharacterPageData();
    const avatar = document.getElementById('loopCreateCharacterAvatar');
    const initial = document.getElementById('loopCreateCharacterInitial');
    const nameEl = document.getElementById('loopCreateCharacterPreviewName');
    const shortEl = document.getElementById('loopCreateCharacterPreviewShort');
    if (avatar) {
      if (data.avatarUrl) {
        avatar.style.backgroundImage = "url('" + data.avatarUrl.replace(/'/g, '%27') + "')";
        avatar.classList.add('has-image');
      } else {
        avatar.style.backgroundImage = '';
        avatar.classList.remove('has-image');
      }
    }
    if (initial) initial.textContent = data.avatarUrl ? '' : (data.name.trim().slice(0, 1).toUpperCase() || '?');
    if (nameEl) nameEl.textContent = data.name || 'Untitled Character';
    if (shortEl) shortEl.textContent = data.short || 'Short character note will appear here.';
    ['Gender', 'Age', 'Affiliation', 'Companion'].forEach(key => {
      const el = document.getElementById('loopCreateCharacterPreview' + key);
      if (el) el.textContent = data[key.charAt(0).toLowerCase() + key.slice(1)] || '—';
    });
  }
  function resetCreateCharacterPage() {
    ['Id','Name','Gender','Age','Affiliation','Companion','AvatarUrl','Short','PhysicalAppearance','Clothing','Personality','SocialRole','Background','AssistSeed'].forEach(id => setValue(id, ''));
    setValue('Id', '');
    setStatus('');
    updatePreview();
  }
  function saveCreateCharacterToLibrary(options) {
    const data = collectCharacterPageData();
    if (!data.name || data.name === 'Untitled Character') {
      setStatus('Name is required before saving.', true);
      field('Name')?.focus();
      return null;
    }
    if (!window.LoopStory || typeof window.LoopStory.getLibraryCharacters !== 'function' || typeof window.LoopStory.saveLibraryCharacters !== 'function') {
      setStatus('Library is not ready yet.', true);
      return null;
    }
    const list = window.LoopStory.getLibraryCharacters();
    const id = data.id || slug(data.name);
    data.id = id;
    const idx = list.findIndex(item => String(item.id || '') === id);
    if (idx >= 0) {
      data.createdAt = list[idx].createdAt || data.createdAt;
      list[idx] = Object.assign({}, list[idx], data);
    } else {
      data.createdAt = data.updatedAt;
      list.unshift(data);
    }
    window.LoopStory.saveLibraryCharacters(list);
    if (typeof window.LoopStory.renderLibraryPage === 'function') window.LoopStory.renderLibraryPage();
    setValue('Id', id);
    setStatus(options && options.label ? options.label : 'Character saved to Library.');
    return data;
  }
  function useCreatedCharacter(mode) {
    const data = saveCreateCharacterToLibrary({ label: mode === 'scene' ? 'Character saved and added to scene.' : 'Character saved and set as primary.' });
    if (!data || !window.LoopStory) return;
    try {
      if (mode === 'scene' && typeof window.LoopStory.addStoryCharacterToScene === 'function') {
        window.LoopStory.addStoryCharacterToScene(data);
      } else if (typeof window.LoopStory.applyStoryCharacterAsPrimary === 'function') {
        window.LoopStory.applyStoryCharacterAsPrimary(data);
      }
      if (typeof window.LoopStory.persistSnapshot === 'function') window.LoopStory.persistSnapshot();
      if (typeof window.switchPage === 'function') window.switchPage('story');
    } catch (e) {
      console.error(e);
      setStatus('Saved, but Story could not use it yet.', true);
    }
  }
  function parseSection(raw, labels, stopLabels) {
    const text = String(raw || '').replace(/\r/g, '');
    for (const label of labels) {
      const escaped = label.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
      const stop = stopLabels.map(v => v.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&')).join('|');
      const re = new RegExp('(?:^|\\n)\\s*(?:\\*\\*)?' + escaped + '\\s*:?\\s*(?:\\*\\*)?\\s*\\n?([\\s\\S]*?)(?=\\n\\s*(?:\\*\\*)?(?:' + stop + ')\\s*:?|$)', 'i');
      const m = text.match(re);
      if (m && m[1]) return m[1].trim().replace(/^[-•*]\s*/gm, '').trim();
    }
    return '';
  }
  function fillFromRawCharacterSheet(raw) {
    const labels = ['Name','Gender','Age','Affiliation','Companion','Physical Appearance','Clothing','Personality','Social Role','Background','Short Description','Avatar URL'];
    const get = (names) => parseSection(raw, names, labels);
    setValue('Name', get(['Name','Character Name']) || value('Name'));
    setValue('Gender', get(['Gender']) || value('Gender'));
    setValue('Age', get(['Age']) || value('Age'));
    setValue('Affiliation', get(['Affiliation']) || value('Affiliation'));
    setValue('Companion', get(['Companion']) || value('Companion'));
    setValue('AvatarUrl', get(['Avatar URL','AvatarUrl','Image URL']) || value('AvatarUrl'));
    setValue('Short', get(['Short Description','Short','Summary']) || value('Short'));
    setValue('PhysicalAppearance', get(['Physical Appearance','Appearance','Visual Appearance']) || value('PhysicalAppearance'));
    setValue('Clothing', get(['Clothing','Outfit']) || value('Clothing'));
    setValue('Personality', get(['Personality']) || value('Personality'));
    setValue('SocialRole', get(['Social Role','Role','Occupation']) || value('SocialRole'));
    setValue('Background', get(['Background','Backstory','Lore']) || value('Background'));
    updatePreview();
  }

  function buildCreateCharacterAvatarPrompt() {
    const data = collectCharacterPageData();
    const core = String(document.getElementById('loopCreateCharacterCoreStyle')?.value || 'Cinematic Realism').trim();
    const base = window.LoopBuilders && typeof window.LoopBuilders.buildCharacterAvatarRenderPrompt === 'function'
      ? window.LoopBuilders.buildCharacterAvatarRenderPrompt({
          name: data.name,
          appearance: data.appearance,
          description: data.characterDescription
        })
      : [data.name ? data.name + ', solo character portrait' : 'solo character portrait', data.appearance, data.characterDescription].filter(Boolean).join(', ');
    return [
      core ? core + ' core style' : '',
      base,
      'single character avatar portrait',
      'clear face visibility',
      'high quality character profile image',
      'no extra characters, no text, no watermark'
    ].filter(Boolean).join(', ');
  }

  async function renderCreateCharacterAvatar() {
    const status = document.getElementById('loopCreateCharacterStatus');
    const btn = document.getElementById('loopCreateCharacterRenderAvatarBtn');
    const host = document.getElementById('loopCreateCharacterRenderHost');
    const avatarInput = field('AvatarUrl');
    const data = collectCharacterPageData();
    if (!data.appearance && !data.characterDescription) {
      if (status) status.textContent = 'add appearance or character notes before rendering avatar';
      return;
    }
    if (typeof image !== 'function') {
      if (status) status.textContent = 'text-to-image-plugin is not available right now';
      return;
    }
    const prompt = buildCreateCharacterAvatarPrompt();
    if (status) status.textContent = 'rendering avatar...';
    if (btn) btn.disabled = true;
    if (host) host.innerHTML = '';
    try {
      const runtime = window.LoopBuilders && typeof window.LoopBuilders.createBuilderPerchanceRuntime === 'function'
        ? window.LoopBuilders.createBuilderPerchanceRuntime(prompt, { width: 320, resolution: '512x512' })
        : null;
      if (!runtime) throw new Error('builder image runtime unavailable');
      if (host && runtime.node) host.appendChild(runtime.node);
      const result = await Promise.resolve(runtime.onFinishPromise);
      const finalUrl = String(result?.imageUrl || result?.url || result?.dataUrl || '').trim();
      if (finalUrl && avatarInput) {
        avatarInput.value = finalUrl;
        avatarInput.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
        if (status) status.textContent = 'avatar rendered';
      } else if (status) {
        status.textContent = 'render finished, but no image URL was returned';
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error(e);
      if (status) status.textContent = 'avatar render failed';
    } finally {
      if (btn) btn.disabled = false;
    }
  }

  async function assistCreateCharacterPage() {
    const seed = value('AssistSeed');
    if (!seed) {
      setStatus('Write a short idea for Loop Assist first.', true);
      field('AssistSeed')?.focus();
      return;
    }
    if (typeof ai !== 'function') {
      setStatus('Loop Assist is not available here yet.', true);
      return;
    }
    setStatus('Loop Assist is shaping the character...', false);
    try {
      const instruction = [
        'Create a LOOP character sheet using exactly this structure and headings:',
        'Name:',
        'Gender:',
        'Age:',
        'Affiliation:',
        'Companion:',
        'Short Description:',
        'Physical Appearance:',
        'Clothing:',
        'Personality:',
        'Social Role:',
        'Background:',
        '',
        'Rules:',
        '- Make each section concrete and useful for roleplay.',
        '- Physical Appearance and Clothing should be visual, image-friendly, and specific.',
        '- Personality, Social Role, and Background should be story-ready.',
        '- Do not add commentary outside the sheet.',
        '',
        'User idea:',
        seed
      ].join('\n');
      const result = await ai({ instruction });
      fillFromRawCharacterSheet(String(result || ''));
      setStatus('Loop Assist filled the character form. Review before saving.');
    } catch (e) {
      console.error(e);
      setStatus('Loop Assist failed. You can still fill the form manually.', true);
    }
  }

            </div>
          </main>
        </div>
      </div>`;
    const guidePage = document.getElementById('page-guide');
    if (guidePage) mainContent.insertBefore(section, guidePage);
    else mainContent.appendChild(section);
    section.querySelectorAll('input, textarea').forEach(el => el.addEventListener('input', updatePreview));
    updatePreview();
  }
  function ensureCreateCharacterNav() {
    if (document.querySelector('[data-label="Create Character"]')) return;
    const imageBtn = document.querySelector('.sidebar .create[data-label="Image"]');
    const parent = imageBtn && imageBtn.parentElement;
    if (!parent || !imageBtn) return;
    const item = document.createElement('div');
    item.className = 'item loop-create-character-nav-item';
    item.setAttribute('data-label', 'Create Character');
    item.setAttribute('onclick', "switchPage('create-character')");
    item.innerHTML = `
      <svg class="icon" viewBox="0 0 1000 1000" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M238 407V303q0-6-5-11t-11-5h-55q-6 0-11 5t-5 11v104q0 5-3 8t-8 3H37q-7 0-12 4.5T20 434v54q0 7 5 12t12 5h103q5 0 8 3t3 8v103q0 7 5 12t12 5h54q6 0 11-5t5-12V516q0-5 3-8t8-3h104q6 0 11-5t5-12v-54q0-7-5-11.5t-11-4.5H249q-5 0-8-3t-3-8zm270 224q-96 21-156 60-70 45-70 105v14q0 18 13 31t31 13h610q18 0 31-13t13-31v-14q0-60-72-106-61-38-158-59-25-5-40.5-24.5T694 562v-6q0-10 4.5-19t12.5-15q43-29 69-85 25-54 25-107 0-47-23.5-86.5T718 181t-87-23-87 23-63.5 62.5T456 330q0 52 25 104 25 55 65 85 17 13 17 33v11q0 24-15.5 43.5T508 631z"/></svg>
      <span class="text">Create Character</span>`;
    imageBtn.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', item);
  }
  function setCreateCharacterActive(pageName) {
    if (pageName !== 'create-character') return;
    document.querySelectorAll('.sidebar .item.is-active, .sidebar .create.is-active').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('is-active'));
    document.querySelector('[data-label="Create Character"]')?.classList.add('is-active');
    const pageTitle = document.querySelector('.page-title');
    if (pageTitle) pageTitle.textContent = 'Create Character';
    const commentsBtn = document.getElementById('commentsToggleBtn');
    if (commentsBtn) commentsBtn.hidden = true;
    const mainContent = document.querySelector('.main-content');
    if (mainContent) mainContent.style.overflowY = 'auto';
  }
  function openLoopCreateCharacterPage(prefill) {
    buildCreateCharacterPage();
    ensureCreateCharacterNav();
    if (prefill && typeof prefill === 'object') {
      setValue('Name', prefill.name || '');
      setValue('Gender', prefill.gender || '');
      setValue('Age', prefill.age || '');
      setValue('Affiliation', prefill.affiliation || '');
      setValue('Companion', prefill.companion || '');
      setValue('AvatarUrl', prefill.avatarUrl || prefill.imageUrl || '');
      setValue('Short', prefill.short || '');
      setValue('PhysicalAppearance', prefill.physicalAppearance || prefill.appearance || '');
      setValue('Clothing', prefill.clothing || '');
      setValue('Personality', prefill.personality || '');
      setValue('SocialRole', prefill.socialRole || '');
      setValue('Background', prefill.background || '');
    }
    if (typeof window.switchPage === 'function') window.switchPage('create-character');
  }
  function initStage62() {
    buildCreateCharacterPage();
    ensureCreateCharacterNav();
  }
  window.loopCreateCharacterSave = function() { return saveCreateCharacterToLibrary(); };
  window.loopCreateCharacterUse = useCreatedCharacter;
  window.loopCreateCharacterReset = resetCreateCharacterPage;
  window.loopCreateCharacterAssist = assistCreateCharacterPage;
  window.loopCreateCharacterRenderAvatar = renderCreateCharacterAvatar;
  window.openLoopCreateCharacterPage = openLoopCreateCharacterPage;
  window.collectLoopCreateCharacterPageData = collectCharacterPageData;

  const previousSwitchPage = window.switchPage;
  if (typeof previousSwitchPage === 'function' && !window.__loopCreateCharacterPageSwitchPatch) {
    window.__loopCreateCharacterPageSwitchPatch = true;
    window.switchPage = function(pageName) {
      buildCreateCharacterPage();
      ensureCreateCharacterNav();
      const result = previousSwitchPage.apply(this, arguments);
      setCreateCharacterActive(pageName);
      return result;
    };
  }
  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initStage62, { once: true });
  } else {
    initStage62();
  }
  setTimeout(initStage62, 500);
})();
</script>
