<script id="loop-final-navigation-stage70-script">
(function(){
  if (window.__LOOP_FINAL_NAVIGATION_STAGE70__) return;
  window.__LOOP_FINAL_NAVIGATION_STAGE70__ = true;

  function clearSidebarActive() {
    document.querySelectorAll('.sidebar .item.is-active, .sidebar .create.is-active').forEach(function(el){
      el.classList.remove('is-active');
    });
  }

  function setActiveByLabel(label) {
    clearSidebarActive();
    var safe = String(label || '').replace(/"/g, '\\"');
    var el = document.querySelector('.sidebar [data-label="' + safe + '"]');
    if (el) el.classList.add('is-active');
  }

  function setHeaderTitle(title) {
    var pageTitle = document.querySelector('.page-title');
    if (pageTitle) pageTitle.textContent = title;
  }

  function focusImageComposerSoon() {
    setTimeout(function(){
      var prompt = document.querySelector('#prompt, textarea[name="prompt"], textarea, [contenteditable="true"]');
      try { if (prompt && typeof prompt.focus === 'function') prompt.focus({ preventScroll: true }); } catch(e) {}
    }, 80);
  }

  function openImageSurface(mode) {
    window.__loopFinalImageMode = mode || 'gate';
    if (typeof window.switchPage === 'function') window.switchPage('image');
    applyFinalNavState('image');
  }

  function applyFinalNavState(pageName) {
    var mode = window.__loopFinalImageMode || 'gate';
    if (pageName === 'image' || pageName === 'gate') {
      if (mode === 'image') {
        setActiveByLabel('Image');
        setHeaderTitle('Image');
      } else {
        setActiveByLabel('Gate');
        setHeaderTitle('Gate');
      }
      return;
    }
    if (pageName === 'story') { setActiveByLabel('Story'); setHeaderTitle('Story'); return; }
    if (pageName === 'guide') { setActiveByLabel('How to Loop'); setHeaderTitle('How to Loop'); return; }
    if (pageName === 'create-character') { setActiveByLabel('Character'); setHeaderTitle('Character'); return; }
    if (pageName === 'library') { setHeaderTitle('Library'); return; }
  }

  window.toggleLoopCreateNav = function(event) {
    if (event && typeof event.preventDefault === 'function') event.preventDefault();
    if (event && typeof event.stopPropagation === 'function') event.stopPropagation();

    var group = document.getElementById('loopCreateNavChildren');
    var btn = document.querySelector('.loop-nav-create-root');
    var app = document.querySelector('.app');
    if (!group) return;

    var sidebarIsCollapsed = !!(app && app.dataset && app.dataset.sidebar === 'collapsed');
    if (sidebarIsCollapsed) {
      try {
        if (typeof window.toggleSidebarState === 'function') {
          window.toggleSidebarState('expanded');
        } else if (app) {
          app.dataset.sidebar = 'expanded';
        }
      } catch (e) {
        if (app) app.dataset.sidebar = 'expanded';
      }
      group.setAttribute('data-open', 'true');
      if (btn) btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
      setTimeout(function(){
        try { group.setAttribute('data-open', 'true'); } catch(e) {}
        try { if (btn) btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true'); } catch(e) {}
      }, 40);
      return;
    }

    var isOpen = group.getAttribute('data-open') !== 'false';
    group.setAttribute('data-open', isOpen ? 'false' : 'true');
    if (btn) btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', isOpen ? 'false' : 'true');
  };

  window.loopOpenGatePage = function() {
    openImageSurface('gate');
    try { if (typeof window.renderLoopGateDefaultAssets === 'function') window.renderLoopGateDefaultAssets(); } catch(e) { console.error(e); }
  };

  window.loopOpenImageGeneratorPage = function() {
    openImageSurface('image');
    focusImageComposerSoon();
  };

  window.loopOpenCreateImage = function() {
    openImageSurface('image');
    focusImageComposerSoon();
  };

  window.loopOpenCreateWorld = function() {
    setActiveByLabel('World');
    setHeaderTitle('World');
    try {
      if (window.LoopBuilders && typeof window.LoopBuilders.openWorldBuilderModal === 'function') {
        window.LoopBuilders.openWorldBuilderModal({});
      } else if (window.LoopStory && typeof window.LoopStory.openStoryWorldPickerModal === 'function') {
        window.switchPage && window.switchPage('story');
        window.LoopStory.openStoryWorldPickerModal();
      }
    } catch(e) { console.error(e); }
  };

  var previousSwitchPage = window.switchPage;
  if (typeof previousSwitchPage === 'function') {
    window.switchPage = function(pageName) {
      if (pageName === 'gate') pageName = 'image';
      if (pageName === 'image' && !window.__loopFinalImageMode) window.__loopFinalImageMode = 'gate';
      var result = previousSwitchPage.apply(this, arguments);
      try { applyFinalNavState(pageName); } catch(e) { console.error(e); }
      return result;
    };
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){ applyFinalNavState('image'); }, { once: true });
  } else {
    setTimeout(function(){ applyFinalNavState('image'); }, 0);
  }
})();
</script>



<style id="loop-gate-image-split-stage71-style">
/* LOOP Stage 71: split Gate and Create > Image more cleanly */
.app.loop-surface-gate-mode #page-image.active #outputCtn,
.app.loop-surface-gate-mode #page-image.active #outputCtn[hidden] {
  display: none !important;
}

.app.loop-surface-image-mode #page-image.active .section-divider,
.app.loop-surface-image-mode #page-image.active #gallerySection,
.app.loop-surface-image-mode #page-image.active #gallerySection[hidden],
.app.loop-surface-image-mode #page-image.active .gallery-shell,
.app.loop-surface-image-mode #page-image.active .gallery-shell > div,
.app.loop-surface-image-mode #page-image.active #loopGateDefaultHub {
  display: none !important;
  visibility: hidden !important;
  opacity: 0 !important;
  pointer-events: none !important;
  height: 0 !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
  max-height: 0 !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  border: 0 !important;
}

.app.loop-surface-image-mode #page-image.active #outputCtn {
  display: block !important;
}

.app.loop-surface-image-mode #page-image.active #outputCtn.loop-empty-render-stage {
  display: block !important;
  min-height: clamp(260px, 46vh, 620px) !important;
}
</style>

<script id="loop-gate-image-split-stage71-script">
(function(){
  if (window.__LOOP_GATE_IMAGE_SPLIT_STAGE71__) return;
  window.__LOOP_GATE_IMAGE_SPLIT_STAGE71__ = true;

  function app(){ return document.querySelector('.app'); }
  function pageImage(){ return document.getElementById('page-image'); }
  function gallery(){ return document.getElementById('gallerySection'); }
  function output(){ return document.getElementById('outputCtn'); }

  function setModeClass(mode) {
    var root = app();
    if (!root) return;
    root.classList.toggle('loop-surface-gate-mode', mode === 'gate');
    root.classList.toggle('loop-surface-image-mode', mode === 'image');
  }

  function updateEmptyRenderStage() {
    var el = output();
    if (!el) return;
    var hasRender = !!el.querySelector('.render-item, .image-grid-container, img, iframe, canvas, video');
    el.classList.toggle('loop-empty-render-stage', !hasRender);
  }

  function setPromptCollapsed(collapsed) {
    var root = app();
    if (!root) return;
    if (typeof window.toggleImagePromptDock === 'function' && pageImage() && pageImage().classList.contains('active')) {
      try {
        window.toggleImagePromptDock(!!collapsed);
        return;
      } catch (e) {}
    }
    root.classList.toggle('image-prompt-hidden', !!collapsed);
    try {
      if (typeof window.syncImagePromptDockVisibility === 'function') window.syncImagePromptDockVisibility();
    } catch (e) {}
  }

  function applyGateSurfaceState() {
    if (!pageImage() || !pageImage().classList.contains('active')) return;
    window.__loopFinalImageMode = 'gate';
    window.loopImageWorkspacePinned = false;
    setModeClass('gate');
    try {
      if (typeof window.showGalleryStage === 'function') window.showGalleryStage();
    } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
    if (gallery()) {
      gallery().removeAttribute('hidden');
      gallery().classList.add('show');
    }
    if (output()) {
      output().setAttribute('hidden', 'true');
    }
    setPromptCollapsed(true);
    updateEmptyRenderStage();
  }

  function applyCreateImageSurfaceState() {
    if (!pageImage() || !pageImage().classList.contains('active')) return;
    window.__loopFinalImageMode = 'image';
    window.loopImageWorkspacePinned = true;
    setModeClass('image');
    try {
      if (typeof window.showWorkspaceStage === 'function') window.showWorkspaceStage();
    } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
    if (gallery()) {
      gallery().setAttribute('hidden', 'true');
      gallery().classList.remove('show');
    }
    if (output()) {
      output().removeAttribute('hidden');
    }
    setPromptCollapsed(false);
    updateEmptyRenderStage();
  }

  function applyByMode(mode) {
    if (mode === 'image') applyCreateImageSurfaceState();
    else applyGateSurfaceState();
  }
  window.applyLoopGateImageMode = applyByMode;

  var prevLoopOpenGatePage = window.loopOpenGatePage;
  window.loopOpenGatePage = function() {
    window.__loopFinalImageMode = 'gate';
    if (typeof prevLoopOpenGatePage === 'function') prevLoopOpenGatePage.apply(this, arguments);
    setTimeout(function(){ applyByMode('gate'); }, 0);
  };

  var prevLoopOpenCreateImage = window.loopOpenCreateImage;
  window.loopOpenCreateImage = function() {
    window.__loopFinalImageMode = 'image';
    if (typeof prevLoopOpenCreateImage === 'function') prevLoopOpenCreateImage.apply(this, arguments);
    setTimeout(function(){ applyByMode('image'); }, 0);
  };

  var prevSwitchPage = window.switchPage;
  if (typeof prevSwitchPage === 'function' && !prevSwitchPage.__loopGateImageSplitWrapped) {
    var wrapped = function(pageName) {
      var normalized = pageName === 'gate' ? 'image' : pageName;
      var result = prevSwitchPage.apply(this, arguments);
      if (normalized === 'image') {
        setTimeout(function(){ applyByMode(window.__loopFinalImageMode || 'gate'); }, 0);
      } else {
        setModeClass('');
      }
      return result;
    };
    wrapped.__loopGateImageSplitWrapped = true;
    window.switchPage = wrapped;
  }

  function bindOutputObserver() {
    var el = output();
    if (!el || el.__loopGateImageObserverBound) return;
    el.__loopGateImageObserverBound = true;
    try {
      var observer = new MutationObserver(function(){ updateEmptyRenderStage(); });
      observer.observe(el, { childList: true, subtree: true });
    } catch (e) {}
  }

  function init() {
    bindOutputObserver();
    if (!pageImage() || !pageImage().classList.contains('active')) return;
    if (!window.__loopFinalImageMode) window.__loopFinalImageMode = 'gate';
    applyByMode(window.__loopFinalImageMode || 'gate');
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){ setTimeout(init, 40); }, { once: true });
  } else {
    setTimeout(init, 40);
  }
  window.addEventListener('load', function(){ setTimeout(init, 120); }, { once: true });
})();
</script>


<style id="loop-gate-detach-stage72-style-retired-v20">
/* V20: retired legacy Gate detach. Gate is now a real page (#page-gate).
   The old detach script moved #gallerySection into #page-image or hidden storage on reload. */
#loopDetachedGateStorage {
  display:none !important;
  visibility:hidden !important;
  pointer-events:none !important;
  width:0 !important;
  height:0 !important;
  overflow:hidden !important;
}
</style>

  window.__LOOP_GATE_DETACH_RETIRED_V20__ = true;
})();
</script>


<style id="loop-private-gallery-layer-stage73-style">
/* LOOP Stage 73: Perchance Private Gallery must win over LOOP chrome. */
body.loop-private-gallery-open .app,
body.loop-private-gallery-open .header,
body.loop-private-gallery-open .sidebar,
body.loop-private-gallery-open .chat-ui,
body.loop-private-gallery-open #floatingLayer,
body.loop-private-gallery-open #commentsSectionCtn,
body.loop-private-gallery-open #loopAmbiencePanel {
  z-index: 1 !important;
}

body.loop-private-gallery-open .header,
body.loop-private-gallery-open .sidebar,
body.loop-private-gallery-open .chat-ui {
  pointer-events: none !important;
}

body.loop-private-gallery-open .loop-private-gallery-layer,
body.loop-private-gallery-open .loop-private-gallery-layer * {
  pointer-events: auto !important;
}

body.loop-private-gallery-open .loop-private-gallery-layer {
  z-index: 2147483000 !important;
}
</style>

<script id="loop-private-gallery-layer-stage73-script">
(function(){
  if (window.__LOOP_PRIVATE_GALLERY_LAYER_STAGE73__) return;
  window.__LOOP_PRIVATE_GALLERY_LAYER_STAGE73__ = true;

  var trackedLayers = [];
  var closeTimer = null;

  function isLoopRoot(el) {
    if (!el || el.nodeType !== 1) return true;
    return !!(
      el.classList.contains('app') ||
      el.id === 'initialLoader' ||
      el.id === 'customCodeColumn' ||
      el.id === 'loopDetachedGateStorage' ||
      el.tagName === 'SCRIPT' ||
      el.tagName === 'STYLE' ||
      el.tagName === 'LINK'
    );
  }

  function rectLooksOverlay(el) {
    try {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var vw = Math.max(document.documentElement.clientWidth || 0, window.innerWidth || 0);
      var vh = Math.max(document.documentElement.clientHeight || 0, window.innerHeight || 0);
      if (!rect || rect.width < 160 || rect.height < 120) return false;
      if (rect.width >= vw * 0.48 && rect.height >= vh * 0.42) return true;
      return false;
    } catch (e) {
      return false;
    }
  }

  function styleLooksOverlay(el) {
    try {
      var cs = getComputedStyle(el);
      return /fixed|sticky|absolute/i.test(cs.position || '') && cs.display !== 'none' && cs.visibility !== 'hidden' && Number(cs.opacity || 1) !== 0;
    } catch (e) {
      return false;
    }
  }

  function markPrivateGalleryLayers() {
    trackedLayers = [];
    Array.from(document.body.children).forEach(function(el){
      if (isLoopRoot(el)) return;
      if (!styleLooksOverlay(el) && !rectLooksOverlay(el)) return;
      el.classList.add('loop-private-gallery-layer');
      el.style.setProperty('z-index', '2147483000', 'important');
      el.style.setProperty('pointer-events', 'auto', 'important');
      trackedLayers.push(el);

      el.querySelectorAll('*').forEach(function(child){
        try {
          var cs = getComputedStyle(child);
          if (/fixed|sticky|absolute/i.test(cs.position || '')) {
            child.style.setProperty('z-index', '2147483001', 'important');
          }
        } catch (e) {}
      });
    });
  }

  function setPrivateGalleryOpenState(isOpen) {
    document.body.classList.toggle('loop-private-gallery-open', !!isOpen);
    var app = document.querySelector('.app');
    if (app) app.classList.toggle('private-gallery-open', !!isOpen);
  }

  function openStatePulse() {
    setPrivateGalleryOpenState(true);
    markPrivateGalleryLayers();
    setTimeout(markPrivateGalleryLayers, 80);
    setTimeout(markPrivateGalleryLayers, 240);
    setTimeout(markPrivateGalleryLayers, 600);
  }

  function findCloseButton(root) {
    if (!root || !root.querySelectorAll) return null;
    var candidates = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"], a'));
    return candidates.find(function(el){
      var text = String(el.textContent || '').trim().toLowerCase();
      var label = String(el.getAttribute('aria-label') || el.getAttribute('title') || '').trim().toLowerCase();
      return /^(×|x|close|back|done)$/i.test(text) || /close|dismiss|back|done/i.test(label);
    }) || null;
  }

  function closePrivateGalleryIfOpen() {
    var gallery = window.__loopPrivateGallery;
    try {
      if (gallery) {
        ['hide', 'close', 'dismiss', 'destroy'].some(function(method){
          if (typeof gallery[method] === 'function') {
            gallery[method]();
            return true;
          }
          return false;
        });
      }
    } catch (e) {}

    trackedLayers.forEach(function(layer){
      try {
        var btn = findCloseButton(layer);
        if (btn) btn.click();
      } catch (e) {}
    });

    try {
      document.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Escape', code: 'Escape', keyCode: 27, which: 27, bubbles: true }));
      window.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Escape', code: 'Escape', keyCode: 27, which: 27, bubbles: true }));
    } catch (e) {}

    setPrivateGalleryOpenState(false);
    trackedLayers.forEach(function(layer){
      try { layer.classList.remove('loop-private-gallery-layer'); } catch (e) {}
    });
    trackedLayers = [];
  }

  window.closePrivateGalleryIfOpen = closePrivateGalleryIfOpen;

  function wrapOpenPrivateGallery() {
    if (typeof window.openPrivateGallery !== 'function' || window.openPrivateGallery.__loopPrivateGalleryLayerWrapped) return;
    var original = window.openPrivateGallery;
    var wrapped = function(){
      var result = original.apply(this, arguments);
      openStatePulse();
      return result;
    };
    wrapped.__loopPrivateGalleryLayerWrapped = true;
    window.openPrivateGallery = wrapped;
  }

  function wrapPrivateGalleryShow() {
    var gallery = window.__loopPrivateGallery;
    if (!gallery || typeof gallery.show !== 'function' || gallery.show.__loopPrivateGalleryLayerWrapped) return;
    var originalShow = gallery.show;
    gallery.show = function(){
      var result = originalShow.apply(this, arguments);
      openStatePulse();
      return result;
    };
    gallery.show.__loopPrivateGalleryLayerWrapped = true;
  }

  function wrapSwitchPage() {
    if (typeof window.switchPage !== 'function' || window.switchPage.__loopPrivateGalleryCloseWrapped) return;
    var originalSwitchPage = window.switchPage;
    var wrappedSwitchPage = function(){
      closePrivateGalleryIfOpen();
      return originalSwitchPage.apply(this, arguments);
    };
    wrappedSwitchPage.__loopPrivateGalleryCloseWrapped = true;
    window.switchPage = wrappedSwitchPage;
  }

  function bindOutsideCleanup() {
    document.addEventListener('click', function(event){
      if (!document.body.classList.contains('loop-private-gallery-open')) return;
      var closeEl = event.target && event.target.closest && event.target.closest('button, [role="button"], a');
      if (!closeEl) return;
      var text = String(closeEl.textContent || '').trim().toLowerCase();
      var label = String(closeEl.getAttribute('aria-label') || closeEl.getAttribute('title') || '').trim().toLowerCase();
      if (/^(×|x|close|back|done)$/i.test(text) || /close|dismiss|back|done/i.test(label)) {
        setTimeout(function(){ setPrivateGalleryOpenState(false); }, 120);
      }
    }, true);
  }

  function init() {
    wrapOpenPrivateGallery();
    wrapPrivateGalleryShow();
    wrapSwitchPage();
    bindOutsideCleanup();
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){ setTimeout(init, 80); }, { once: true });
  } else {
    setTimeout(init, 80);
  }
  setTimeout(init, 800);
  setTimeout(init, 1800);
})();
</script>

<script id="loop-create-world-page-stage73-script">
(function(){
  if (window.__LOOP_CREATE_WORLD_PAGE_STAGE73__) return;
  window.__LOOP_CREATE_WORLD_PAGE_STAGE73__ = true;

  function escapeHtml(value) {
    return String(value == null ? '' : value)
      .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
      .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
      .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
      .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
      .replace(/'/g, '&#039;');
  }

  function slug(value) {
    return String(value || '')
      .toLowerCase()
      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')
      .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
      .slice(0, 64) || ('world-' + Date.now());
  }

  function shortText(value, fallback) {
    var text = String(value || fallback || '').trim();
    return text.length > 160 ? text.slice(0, 157).trimEnd() + '…' : text;
  }

  function field(id) { return document.getElementById('loopCreateWorld' + id); }
  function value(id) { return String(field(id)?.value || '').trim(); }
  function setValue(id, next, silent) {
    var el = field(id);
    if (!el) return;
    el.value = String(next || '').trim();
    if (!silent) el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
  }

  function getBuilders() { return window.LoopBuilders || null; }
  function getStory() { return window.LoopStory || null; }

  function ensureBuilderDraft() {
    var builders = getBuilders();
    if (!builders) return {};
    try { if (typeof builders.ensureLoaded === 'function') builders.ensureLoaded(); } catch(e) {}
    builders.state = builders.state || {};
    builders.state.drafts = builders.state.drafts || {};
    builders.state.drafts.worldBuilder = Object.assign({
      id: '', title: '', imageUrl: '', short: '', premise: '', scenario: '',
      contextSummary: '', contextMemo: '', contextLore: '', contextGlossary: '', tags: ''
    }, builders.state.drafts.worldBuilder || {});
    return builders.state.drafts.worldBuilder;
  }

  function collectWorldPageData() {
    var rawTags = value('Tags');
    var tags = rawTags.split(',').map(function(v){ return v.trim(); }).filter(Boolean);
    var title = value('Title') || 'Untitled World';
    var scenario = value('Premise');
    var contextSummary = value('ContextSummary');
    var contextMemo = value('ContextMemo');
    var contextLore = value('ContextLore');
    var contextGlossary = value('ContextGlossary');
    var short = value('Short') || shortText(contextSummary || scenario || title, 'No world summary yet.');
    return {
      id: value('Id') || '',
      title: title,
      short: short,
      imageUrl: value('Image'),
      premise: scenario,
      scenario: scenario,
      contextSummary: contextSummary,
      contextMemo: contextMemo,
      contextLore: contextLore,
      contextGlossary: contextGlossary,
      tags: tags,
      tagsText: rawTags,
      updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
    };
  }

  function setStatus(text, isError) {
    var el = document.getElementById('loopCreateWorldStatus');
    if (!el) return;
    el.textContent = text || '';
    el.style.color = isError ? '#d9534f' : 'var(--text-secondary)';
  }

  function syncDraft() {
    var builders = getBuilders();
    if (!builders) return;
    var data = collectWorldPageData();
    builders.state = builders.state || {};
    builders.state.drafts = builders.state.drafts || {};
    builders.state.drafts.worldBuilder = Object.assign({}, data, {
      tags: data.tagsText || data.tags.join(', ')
    });
    try { if (typeof builders.save === 'function') builders.save(); } catch(e) {}
    updatePreview();
  }

  function clearRuntimePreview(keepValue) {
    var host = document.getElementById('loopCreateWorldRenderHost');
    var builders = getBuilders();
    if (builders && builders._builderPreviewRuntime && typeof builders._builderPreviewRuntime.cleanup === 'function') {
      try { builders._builderPreviewRuntime.cleanup(); } catch(e) {}
    }
    if (host) host.innerHTML = '';
    if (!keepValue) setValue('Image', '', true);
  }

  function updatePreview() {
    var data = collectWorldPageData();
    var preview = document.getElementById('loopCreateWorldPreview');
    var fallback = document.getElementById('loopCreateWorldFallback');
    var titleEl = document.getElementById('loopCreateWorldPreviewTitle');
    var shortEl = document.getElementById('loopCreateWorldPreviewShort');
    if (preview) {
      if (data.imageUrl) {
        preview.style.backgroundImage = "url('" + data.imageUrl.replace(/'/g, '%27') + "')";
        preview.classList.add('has-image');
      } else {
        preview.style.backgroundImage = '';
        preview.classList.remove('has-image');
      }
    }
    if (fallback) fallback.textContent = data.imageUrl ? '' : (data.title.slice(0, 1).toUpperCase() || 'W');
    if (titleEl) titleEl.textContent = data.title || 'Untitled World';
    if (shortEl) shortEl.textContent = data.short || 'Short world summary will appear here.';
    var summaryEl = document.getElementById('loopCreateWorldPreviewSummary');
    var loreEl = document.getElementById('loopCreateWorldPreviewLore');
    var tagsEl = document.getElementById('loopCreateWorldPreviewTags');
    if (summaryEl) summaryEl.textContent = data.contextSummary || data.scenario || '—';
    if (loreEl) loreEl.textContent = data.contextLore || '—';
    if (tagsEl) tagsEl.textContent = data.tags.length ? data.tags.join(' · ') : '—';
  }

  function populateFromWorld(seed) {
    var draft = ensureBuilderDraft();
    var source = Object.assign({}, draft || {}, seed || {});
    setValue('Id', source.id || '', true);
    setValue('Title', source.title || '', true);
    setValue('Image', source.imageUrl || '', true);
    setValue('Short', source.short || '', true);
    setValue('Premise', source.premise || source.scenario || '', true);
    setValue('ContextSummary', source.contextSummary || '', true);
    setValue('ContextMemo', source.contextMemo || '', true);
    setValue('ContextLore', source.contextLore || '', true);
    setValue('ContextGlossary', source.contextGlossary || '', true);
    var tags = Array.isArray(source.tags) ? source.tags.join(', ') : String(source.tags || '');
    setValue('Tags', tags, true);
    setValue('Assist', source.assist || '', true);
    updatePreview();
    syncDraft();
  }

  function resetCreateWorldPage() {
    ['Id','Title','Image','Short','Premise','ContextSummary','ContextMemo','ContextLore','ContextGlossary','Tags','Assist'].forEach(function(id){ setValue(id, '', true); });
    clearRuntimePreview(true);
    syncDraft();
    setStatus('');
  }

  function saveCreateWorld(options) {
    var story = getStory();
    var builders = getBuilders();
    var data = collectWorldPageData();
    data.id = data.id || ('loop_world_' + slug(data.title) + '_' + Date.now());
    data.createdAt = data.createdAt || data.updatedAt;
    if (!data.title || data.title === 'Untitled World') {
      setStatus('Title is required before saving.', true);
      field('Title')?.focus();
      return null;
    }
    var payload = {
      id: data.id,
      title: data.title,
      short: data.short,
      premise: data.premise,
      scenario: data.scenario,
      contextSummary: data.contextSummary,
      contextMemo: data.contextMemo,
      contextLore: data.contextLore,
      contextGlossary: data.contextGlossary,
      imageUrl: data.imageUrl,
      tags: data.tags,
      updatedAt: data.updatedAt,
      createdAt: data.createdAt
    };
    var savedPayload = story && typeof story.upsertLibraryWorld === 'function' ? story.upsertLibraryWorld(payload) : payload;
    if (story) {
      story.worldPreviewCache = story.worldPreviewCache || {};
      var keys = [savedPayload.id, savedPayload.title, payload.id, payload.title].map(function(v){ return String(v || '').trim(); }).filter(Boolean);
      if (savedPayload.imageUrl) {
        keys.forEach(function(key){ story.worldPreviewCache[key] = savedPayload.imageUrl; });
        try { if (typeof story.saveStoredWorldPreviews === 'function') story.saveStoredWorldPreviews(story.worldPreviewCache); } catch(e) {}
      }
      if (options && options.applyToStory && typeof story.setActiveWorld === 'function') {
        story.setActiveWorld(savedPayload, { applyScenario: true });
      }
      try { if (typeof story.persistSnapshot === 'function') story.persistSnapshot(); } catch(e) {}
      try { if (typeof story.renderAll === 'function') story.renderAll(); } catch(e) {}
    }
    if (builders) {
      builders.state = builders.state || {};
      builders.state.drafts = builders.state.drafts || {};
      builders.state.drafts.worldBuilder = Object.assign({}, savedPayload, { tags: Array.isArray(savedPayload.tags) ? savedPayload.tags.join(', ') : savedPayload.tags });
      builders.state.sourceTab = 'worlds';
      try {
        if (typeof builders.keyFor === 'function') builders.state.selected = builders.keyFor({ type:'world', source:'library', id: savedPayload.id || payload.id });
      } catch(e) {}
      try { if (typeof builders.save === 'function') builders.save(); } catch(e) {}
      try { if (typeof builders.render === 'function') builders.render(); } catch(e) {}
    }
    setValue('Id', savedPayload.id || payload.id, true);
    syncDraft();
    setStatus(options && options.applyToStory ? 'World saved and applied to Story.' : 'World saved to Library.');
    return savedPayload;
  }

  async function renderCreateWorldPreview() {
    var builders = getBuilders();
    var btn = document.getElementById('loopCreateWorldRenderBtn');
    var host = document.getElementById('loopCreateWorldRenderHost');
    if (!builders || typeof builders.buildWorldRenderPrompt !== 'function' || typeof builders.createBuilderPerchanceRuntime !== 'function') {
      setStatus('World render runtime is not ready yet.', true);
      return;
    }
    var data = collectWorldPageData();
    var prompt = builders.buildWorldRenderPrompt(data);
    if (!prompt) {
      setStatus('Add at least a title, short, premise, or lore before rendering.', true);
      return;
    }
    clearRuntimePreview(true);
    if (btn) btn.disabled = true;
    setStatus('Rendering world preview...');
    try {
      var runtime = builders.createBuilderPerchanceRuntime(prompt, { width: 420, resolution: '768x512' });
      builders._builderPreviewRuntime = runtime;
      if (host) {
        host.innerHTML = '';
        if (runtime && runtime.node) host.appendChild(runtime.node);
      }
      var result = await Promise.resolve(runtime && runtime.onFinishPromise);
      var finalUrl = String((result && (result.imageUrl || result.url || result.dataUrl)) || '').trim();
      if (finalUrl) {
        setValue('Image', finalUrl, true);
        syncDraft();
        setStatus('World preview rendered. Save it when ready.');
      } else {
        setStatus('Render finished, but no image URL was returned.', true);
      }
    } catch(e) {
      console.error(e);
      clearRuntimePreview(true);
      setStatus('World render failed.', true);
    } finally {
      if (btn) btn.disabled = false;
    }
  }

  function parseWorldPackage(raw) {
    var text = String(raw || '').replace(/\r/g, '').trim();
    var labels = ['Title','Short','Premise / Scenario Seed','Premise','Scenario Seed','Context Summary','Context Notes','World Lore / Rules','World Lore','Rules','Glossary / Terms','Glossary','Tags'];
    function esc(s){ return String(s).replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&'); }
    function pick(labelSet) {
      for (var i = 0; i < labelSet.length; i++) {
        var label = labelSet[i];
        var other = labels.filter(function(v){ return v !== label; }).map(esc).join('|');
        var re = new RegExp('(?:^|\\n)\\s*(?:\\*\\*)?' + esc(label) + '(?:\\*\\*)?\\s*:?\\s*([\\s\\S]*?)(?=\\n\\s*(?:\\*\\*)?(?:' + other + ')(?:\\*\\*)?\\s*:|$)', 'i');
        var m = text.match(re);
        if (m && m[1]) return m[1].trim();
      }
      return '';
    }
    return {
      title: pick(['Title']),
      short: pick(['Short']),
      premise: pick(['Premise / Scenario Seed','Premise','Scenario Seed']),
      contextSummary: pick(['Context Summary']),
      contextMemo: pick(['Context Notes']),
      contextLore: pick(['World Lore / Rules','World Lore','Rules']),
      contextGlossary: pick(['Glossary / Terms','Glossary']),
      tags: pick(['Tags'])
    };
  }

  async function runCreateWorldAssist() {
    var assistEl = field('Assist');
    var btn = document.getElementById('loopCreateWorldAssistBtn');
    var keywords = String(assistEl?.value || '').trim();
    var currentTitle = value('Title');
    if (!keywords && !currentTitle) {
      setStatus('Add a few world keywords or a title for Loop Assist.', true);
      return;
    }
    if (typeof ai !== 'function') {
      setStatus('Loop Assist is not available right now.', true);
      return;
    }
    try { window.setLoopAssistBusy?.(btn, true); } catch(e) {}
    setStatus('Loop Assist is building the world package...');
    try {
      var instruction = [
        'Build a roleplay-ready world package for LOOP from this inspiration:',
        keywords || currentTitle,
        '',
        'Use exactly this structure:',
        'Title:',
        'Short:',
        'Premise / Scenario Seed:',
        'Context Summary:',
        'Context Notes:',
        'World Lore / Rules:',
        'Glossary / Terms:',
        'Tags:',
        '',
        'Make the world specific, atmospheric, playable, and coherent. Output only the structured package.'
      ].join('\n');
      var result = await ai({ instruction: instruction, startWith: currentTitle ? ('Title: ' + currentTitle + '\n\nShort:') : 'Title:' });
      var parsed = parseWorldPackage(String((result && result.text) || '').trim());
      var count = 0;
      if (parsed.title) { setValue('Title', parsed.title, true); count++; }
      if (parsed.short) { setValue('Short', parsed.short, true); count++; }
      if (parsed.premise) { setValue('Premise', parsed.premise, true); count++; }
      if (parsed.contextSummary) { setValue('ContextSummary', parsed.contextSummary, true); count++; }
      if (parsed.contextMemo) { setValue('ContextMemo', parsed.contextMemo, true); count++; }
      if (parsed.contextLore) { setValue('ContextLore', parsed.contextLore, true); count++; }
      if (parsed.contextGlossary) { setValue('ContextGlossary', parsed.contextGlossary, true); count++; }
      if (parsed.tags) { setValue('Tags', parsed.tags, true); count++; }
      if (!count) throw new Error('No sections parsed');
      syncDraft();
      setStatus(count < 8 ? 'Loop Assist filled some fields. Review the missing sections.' : 'Loop Assist filled the world fields.');
    } catch(e) {
      console.error(e);
      setStatus('Loop Assist failed.', true);
    } finally {
      try { window.setLoopAssistBusy?.(btn, false); } catch(e) {}
    }
  }

  function createPage() {
    if (document.getElementById('page-create-world')) return;
    var main = document.querySelector('.main-content');
    if (!main) return;
    var section = document.createElement('section');
    section.id = 'page-create-world';
    section.className = 'page';
    section.innerHTML = `
      <div class="loop-create-character-page-shell loop-create-world-page-shell">
        <div class="loop-create-character-page-head">
          <div class="loop-create-character-page-kicker">Create</div>
          <div class="loop-create-character-page-title">Create World</div>
          <p class="loop-create-character-page-copy">Build one reusable world package for Story. Keep the scenario seed, context, lore, glossary, tags, and preview together.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="loop-create-world-layout">
          <aside class="loop-create-world-preview-card">
            <div id="loopCreateWorldPreview" class="loop-create-world-preview">
              <div id="loopCreateWorldRenderHost" class="loop-create-world-render-host"></div>
              <div id="loopCreateWorldFallback" class="loop-create-world-fallback">W</div>
              <div class="loop-create-world-preview-meta">
                <div id="loopCreateWorldPreviewTitle" class="loop-create-world-preview-title">Untitled World</div>
                <div id="loopCreateWorldPreviewShort" class="loop-create-world-preview-short">Short world summary will appear here.</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="loop-create-world-preview-body">
              <div class="loop-create-world-preview-row"><div class="loop-create-world-preview-label">Context</div><div id="loopCreateWorldPreviewSummary" class="loop-create-world-preview-value">—</div></div>
              <div class="loop-create-world-preview-row"><div class="loop-create-world-preview-label">Lore / Rules</div><div id="loopCreateWorldPreviewLore" class="loop-create-world-preview-value">—</div></div>
              <div class="loop-create-world-preview-row"><div class="loop-create-world-preview-label">Tags</div><div id="loopCreateWorldPreviewTags" class="loop-create-world-preview-value">—</div></div>
            </div>
            <div class="loop-create-character-render-panel">
              <label class="loop-create-character-render-label" for="loopCreateWorldImage">Preview URL</label>
              <input id="loopCreateWorldImage" class="loop-create-character-core-select" type="text" placeholder="https://...">
              <button type="button" id="loopCreateWorldRenderBtn" class="loop-create-character-render-btn loop-create-world-btn" onclick="loopCreateWorldRenderPreview()"><span>Render World</span></button>
              <button type="button" class="loop-create-character-render-btn loop-create-world-btn" onclick="loopCreateWorldClearPreview()"><span>Clear Preview</span></button>
            </div>
          </aside>
          <main class="loop-create-world-form-card">
            <input id="loopCreateWorldId" type="hidden">
            <div class="loop-create-character-assist">
              <div class="loop-create-character-assist-row">
                <textarea id="loopCreateWorldAssist" placeholder="Need help? Enter tone, setting, conflict, era, factions, atmosphere, or world pressure here."></textarea>
                <button type="button" id="loopCreateWorldAssistBtn" class="loop-create-character-btn loop-create-world-btn" onclick="loopCreateWorldRunAssist()"><span>Loop Assist</span></button>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="loop-create-character-form-grid">
              <div class="loop-create-character-field loop-create-world-field is-full"><label for="loopCreateWorldTitle">Title</label><input id="loopCreateWorldTitle" type="text" placeholder="World title"></div>
              <div class="loop-create-character-field loop-create-world-field is-full"><label for="loopCreateWorldShort">Short</label><textarea id="loopCreateWorldShort" class="is-sm" placeholder="A concise world summary."></textarea></div>
              <div class="loop-create-character-field loop-create-world-field is-full"><label for="loopCreateWorldPremise">Premise / Scenario Seed</label><textarea id="loopCreateWorldPremise" class="is-xl" placeholder="World pressure, scenario seed, setting frame, opening conflict, and what this world immediately does to the story."></textarea></div>
              <div class="loop-create-character-field loop-create-world-field is-full"><label for="loopCreateWorldContextSummary">Context Summary</label><textarea id="loopCreateWorldContextSummary" class="is-md" placeholder="Compressed explanation of what matters in this world."></textarea></div>
              <div class="loop-create-character-field loop-create-world-field is-full"><label for="loopCreateWorldContextMemo">Context Notes</label><textarea id="loopCreateWorldContextMemo" class="is-md" placeholder="Short memory anchors, recurring tensions, hidden reminders."></textarea></div>
              <div class="loop-create-character-field loop-create-world-field is-full"><label for="loopCreateWorldContextLore">World Lore / Rules</label><textarea id="loopCreateWorldContextLore" class="is-md" placeholder="Rules, institutions, setting constants, secret structure, and durable facts."></textarea></div>
              <div class="loop-create-character-field loop-create-world-field is-full"><label for="loopCreateWorldContextGlossary">Glossary / Terms</label><textarea id="loopCreateWorldContextGlossary" class="is-md" placeholder="Names, terms, factions, artifacts, and recurring shorthand."></textarea></div>
              <div class="loop-create-character-field loop-create-world-field is-full"><label for="loopCreateWorldTags">Tags</label><input id="loopCreateWorldTags" type="text" placeholder="comma, separated, tags"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="loop-create-world-actions">
              <div id="loopCreateWorldStatus" class="loop-create-world-status"></div>
              <button type="button" class="loop-create-character-btn ghost loop-create-world-btn" onclick="loopCreateWorldReset()"><span>Reset</span></button>
              <button type="button" class="loop-create-character-btn ghost loop-create-world-btn" onclick="loopCreateWorldSave()"><span>Save</span></button>
              <button type="button" class="loop-create-character-btn primary loop-create-world-btn" onclick="loopCreateWorldUseInStory()"><span>Use in Story</span></button>
            </div>
          </main>
        </div>
      </div>`;
    main.appendChild(section);
    ['Title','Image','Short','Premise','ContextSummary','ContextMemo','ContextLore','ContextGlossary','Tags','Assist'].forEach(function(id){
      var el = field(id);
      if (!el || el.dataset.loopCreateWorldBound) return;
      el.dataset.loopCreateWorldBound = '1';
      el.addEventListener('input', function(){
        if (id === 'Image' && value('Image')) clearRuntimePreview(true);
        syncDraft();
      });
    });
  }

  function setActiveNav() {
    document.querySelectorAll('.sidebar .item.is-active, .sidebar .create.is-active').forEach(function(el){ el.classList.remove('is-active'); });
    var world = document.querySelector('.sidebar [data-label="World"]');
    if (world) world.classList.add('is-active');
    var group = document.getElementById('loopCreateNavChildren');
    var btn = document.querySelector('.loop-nav-create-root');
    if (group) group.setAttribute('data-open', 'true');
    if (btn) btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
    var title = document.querySelector('.page-title');
    if (title) title.textContent = 'Create World';
  }

  window.openLoopCreateWorldPage = function(seed) {
    createPage();
    if (seed && Object.keys(seed || {}).length) populateFromWorld(seed);
    else populateFromWorld(ensureBuilderDraft());
    if (typeof window.switchPage === 'function') window.switchPage('create-world');
    setTimeout(function(){ setActiveNav(); field('Title')?.focus({ preventScroll: true }); }, 0);
  };

  window.loopOpenCreateWorld = function(seed) {
    window.openLoopCreateWorldPage(seed || {});
  };

  window.loopCreateWorldReset = resetCreateWorldPage;
  window.loopCreateWorldSave = function(){ saveCreateWorld({ applyToStory: false }); };
  window.loopCreateWorldUseInStory = function(){
    var saved = saveCreateWorld({ applyToStory: true });
    if (saved && typeof window.switchPage === 'function') window.switchPage('story');
  };
  window.loopCreateWorldRenderPreview = renderCreateWorldPreview;
  window.loopCreateWorldClearPreview = function(){ clearRuntimePreview(false); syncDraft(); setStatus('World preview cleared.'); };
  window.loopCreateWorldRunAssist = runCreateWorldAssist;

  var previousSwitchPage = window.switchPage;
  if (typeof previousSwitchPage === 'function' && !previousSwitchPage.__loopCreateWorldPageWrapped) {
    var wrapped = function(pageName) {
      var result = previousSwitchPage.apply(this, arguments);
      if (pageName === 'create-world') setTimeout(setActiveNav, 0);
      return result;
    };
    wrapped.__loopCreateWorldPageWrapped = true;
    window.switchPage = wrapped;
  }

  function init() {
    createPage();
    ensureBuilderDraft();
    populateFromWorld(ensureBuilderDraft());
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){ setTimeout(init, 80); }, { once: true });
  } else {
    setTimeout(init, 80);
  }
})();
</script>

<script id="loop-builder-data-tools-stage76-script">
(function() {
  if (window.__LOOP_BUILDER_DATA_TOOLS_STAGE76__) return;
  window.__LOOP_BUILDER_DATA_TOOLS_STAGE76__ = true;

  var ICONS = {"import": "<svg class=\"loop-builder-btn-icon\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" xmlns:xlink=\"http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink\" aria-hidden=\"true\" role=\"img\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"><g fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" stroke-width=\"2\"><path d=\"M12 3v12m-4-4l4 4l4-4\"></path><path d=\"M8 5H4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v10a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h16a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V7a2 2 0 0 0-2-2h-4\"></path></g></svg>", "export": "<svg class=\"loop-builder-btn-icon\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" xmlns:xlink=\"http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink\" aria-hidden=\"true\" role=\"img\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"><path fill=\"currentColor\" d=\"M12 1L8 5h3v9h2V5h3m2 18H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V9a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h3v2H6v12h12V9h-3V7h3a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v12a2 2 0 0 1-2 24\"><g fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" stroke-width=\"2\"><path d=\"M5 15H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1\"></path><rect 146.318-129.062 165.376s-154.896-15.838-191.92-84.695C58.141 289.63 72.637 204.42 130.347 151.68a85.33 85.33 0 0 0 33.28 30.507a124.59 124.59 0 0 0-46.294 97.066c1.05 69.942 58.051 126.088 128 126.08c64.072 1.056 118.71-46.195 126.906-109.749c6.124-47.483-15.135-92.74-52.236-118.947L320 256h-42.667V106.667zM202.667 64c23.564 0 42.666 19.103 42.666 42.667s-19.102 42.666-42.666 42.666S160 130.231 160 106.667S179.103 64 202.667 64\"></path></svg>", "save": "<svg class=\"loop-builder-btn-icon\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" xmlns:xlink=\"http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink\" aria-hidden=\"true\" role=\"img\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"><path fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" stroke-width=\"2\" d=\"M8 4H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v12a2 "saveFilled": "<svg class=\"loop-builder-btn-icon\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" xmlns:xlink=\"http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink\" aria-hidden=\"true\" role=\"img\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\"><path fill=\"currentColor\" fill-rule=\"evenodd\" d=\"M2 2.5a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h9a.5.5 0 0 1 .354.146l2 2A.5.5 0 0 1 14 4.5v9a.5.5 0 0 1-.5.5h-11a.5.5 0 0 1-.5-.5zM3 3v10h2V8.5a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5a.5.5 0 0 1 .5.5V13h2V4.707L11.293 3H11v2.5a.5.5 0 0 1-.5.5h-5a.5.5 0 0 1-.5-.5V3zm3 0v2h4V3z\" clip-rule=\"evenodd\"></path></svg>", "ai": "<svg class=\"loop-builder-btn-icon\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" xmlns:xlink=\"http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink\" aria-hidden=\"true\" role=\"img\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"><path fill=\"currentColor\" d=\"M18 3a4 4 0 0 1 4 4v10a4 4 0 0 1-4 4H6a4 4 0 0 1-4-4V7a4 4 0 0 1 4-4zM6 5a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v10a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V7a2 2 0 0 0-2-2zm5.412 2.4a.632.632 0 0 1 1.176 0l.316.763a5.46 5.46 0 0 0 2.815 2.908l.896.399c.513.228.514.975 0 1.204l-.95.422a5.45 5.45 0 0 0-2.773 2.813l-.308.707a.633.633 0 0 1-1.168 0l-.308-.707a5.45 5.45 0 0 0-2.773-2.813l-.95-.422c-.513-.229-.513-.976 0-1.204l.896-.399a5.46 5.46 0 0 0 2.814-2.908z\"></path></svg>"};

  function icon(name) {
    return ICONS[name] || '';
  }

  function slug(value) {
    return String(value || '')
      .toLowerCase()
      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')
      .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
      .slice(0, 64) || 'loop-data';
  }

  function charField(id) { return document.getElementById('loopCreateCharacter' + id); }
  function worldField(id) { return document.getElementById('loopCreateWorld' + id); }
  function getValue(el) { return String((el && el.value) || '').trim(); }
  function setInputValue(el, value) {
    if (!el) return;
    el.value = String(value == null ? '' : value).trim();
    el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
  }

  function getCharacterData() {
    try {
      if (typeof window.collectLoopCreateCharacterPageData === 'function') {
        return window.collectLoopCreateCharacterPageData();
      }
    } catch (e) { console.warn(e); }
    return {
      id: getValue(charField('Id')),
      name: getValue(charField('Name')),
      title: getValue(charField('Name')),
      gender: getValue(charField('Gender')),
      age: getValue(charField('Age')),
      affiliation: getValue(charField('Affiliation')),
      companion: getValue(charField('Companion')),
      avatarUrl: getValue(charField('AvatarUrl')),
      short: getValue(charField('Short')),
      physicalAppearance: getValue(charField('PhysicalAppearance')),
      clothing: getValue(charField('Clothing')),
      personality: getValue(charField('Personality')),
      socialRole: getValue(charField('SocialRole')),
      background: getValue(charField('Background')),
      assistSeed: getValue(charField('AssistSeed'))
    };
  }

  function getWorldData() {
    var tagsText = getValue(worldField('Tags'));
    var tags = tagsText.split(',').map(function(v){ return v.trim(); }).filter(Boolean);
    var premise = getValue(worldField('Premise'));
    return {
      id: getValue(worldField('Id')),
      title: getValue(worldField('Title')),
      short: getValue(worldField('Short')),
      imageUrl: getValue(worldField('Image')),
      premise: premise,
      scenario: premise,
      contextSummary: getValue(worldField('ContextSummary')),
      contextMemo: getValue(worldField('ContextMemo')),
      contextLore: getValue(worldField('ContextLore')),
      contextGlossary: getValue(worldField('ContextGlossary')),
      tags: tags,
      tagsText: tagsText,
      assist: getValue(worldField('Assist'))
    };
  }

  window.collectLoopCreateWorldPageData = getWorldData;

  function envelope(type, data) {
    return {
      loopDataType: type,
      loopSchema: type === 'world' ? 'loop-world-builder-v1' : 'loop-character-builder-v1',
      exportedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      data: data || {}
    };
  }

  function currentData(type) {
    return type === 'world' ? getWorldData() : getCharacterData();
  }

  function status(type, message, isError) {
    var el = document.getElementById(type === 'world' ? 'loopCreateWorldStatus' : 'loopCreateCharacterStatus');
    if (!el) return;
    el.textContent = message || '';
    el.style.color = isError ? '#d9534f' : 'var(--text-secondary)';
  }

  async function writeClipboard(text) {
    if (navigator.clipboard && window.isSecureContext) {
      await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
      return;
    }
    var ta = document.createElement('textarea');
    ta.value = text;
    ta.setAttribute('readonly', 'true');
    ta.style.position = 'fixed';
    ta.style.left = '-9999px';
    ta.style.top = '0';
    document.body.appendChild(ta);
    ta.select();
    document.execCommand('copy');
    ta.remove();
  }

  window.loopBuilderCopyData = async function(type) {
    var data = envelope(type, currentData(type));
    var json = JSON.stringify(data, null, 2);
    try {
      await writeClipboard(json);
      status(type, (type === 'world' ? 'World' : 'Character') + ' data copied.');
    } catch (e) {
      console.error(e);
      status(type, 'Copy failed.', true);
    }
  };

  window.loopBuilderExportData = function(type) {
    var data = envelope(type, currentData(type));
    var json = JSON.stringify(data, null, 2);
    var nameSource = (type === 'world' ? data.data.title : data.data.name) || type;
    var blob = new Blob([json], { type: 'application/json;charset=utf-8' });
    var url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    var a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url;
    a.download = 'loop-' + type + '-' + slug(nameSource) + '.json';
    document.body.appendChild(a);
    a.click();
    a.remove();
    setTimeout(function(){ URL.revokeObjectURL(url); }, 1200);
    status(type, (type === 'world' ? 'World' : 'Character') + ' data exported.');
  };

  function unpackImported(raw, expectedType) {
    var parsed = JSON.parse(String(raw || '').trim());
    if (parsed && parsed.data && typeof parsed.data === 'object') parsed = parsed.data;
    if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object') throw new Error('Invalid LOOP data');
    return parsed;
  }

  function populateCharacter(data) {
    setInputValue(charField('Id'), data.id || '');
    setInputValue(charField('Name'), data.name || data.title || '');
    setInputValue(charField('Gender'), data.gender || '');
    setInputValue(charField('Age'), data.age || '');
    setInputValue(charField('Affiliation'), data.affiliation || '');
    setInputValue(charField('Companion'), data.companion || '');
    setInputValue(charField('AvatarUrl'), data.avatarUrl || data.imageUrl || '');
    setInputValue(charField('Short'), data.short || '');
    setInputValue(charField('PhysicalAppearance'), data.physicalAppearance || data.appearance || '');
    setInputValue(charField('Clothing'), data.clothing || '');
    setInputValue(charField('Personality'), data.personality || '');
    setInputValue(charField('SocialRole'), data.socialRole || data.role || '');
    setInputValue(charField('Background'), data.background || data.backstory || data.characterDescription || data.description || '');
    setInputValue(charField('AssistSeed'), data.assistSeed || data.assist || '');
    status('character', 'Character data imported. Review before saving.');
  }

  function populateWorld(data) {
    var tags = Array.isArray(data.tags) ? data.tags.join(', ') : (data.tagsText || data.tags || '');
    setInputValue(worldField('Id'), data.id || '');
    setInputValue(worldField('Title'), data.title || data.name || '');
    setInputValue(worldField('Image'), data.imageUrl || data.previewUrl || data.avatarUrl || '');
    setInputValue(worldField('Short'), data.short || data.summary || '');
    setInputValue(worldField('Premise'), data.premise || data.scenario || '');
    setInputValue(worldField('ContextSummary'), data.contextSummary || '');
    setInputValue(worldField('ContextMemo'), data.contextMemo || data.contextNotes || '');
    setInputValue(worldField('ContextLore'), data.contextLore || data.lore || data.rules || '');
    setInputValue(worldField('ContextGlossary'), data.contextGlossary || data.glossary || '');
    setInputValue(worldField('Tags'), tags);
    setInputValue(worldField('Assist'), data.assist || '');
    status('world', 'World data imported. Review before saving.');
  }

  window.loopBuilderImportData = function(type) {
    var input = document.createElement('input');
    input.type = 'file';
    input.accept = '.json,application/json,text/json';
    input.addEventListener('change', function() {
      var file = input.files && input.files[0];
      if (!file) return;
      var reader = new FileReader();
      reader.onload = function() {
        try {
          var data = unpackImported(reader.result, type);
          if (type === 'world') populateWorld(data);
          else populateCharacter(data);
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(e);
          status(type, 'Import failed. Use a valid LOOP JSON file.', true);
        }
      };
      reader.onerror = function() { status(type, 'Import failed. File could not be read.', true); };
      reader.readAsText(file);
    });
    input.click();
  };

  function dataPanel(type) {
    return '<div class="loop-builder-data-panel" data-loop-builder-data-panel="' + type + '">' +
      '<div class="loop-builder-data-title">Data</div>' +
      '<div class="loop-builder-data-grid">' +
        '<button type="button" class="loop-builder-data-btn" data-loop-builder-action="export" data-loop-builder-type="' + type + '">' + icon('export') + '<span>Export</span></button>' +
        '<button type="button" class="loop-builder-data-btn" data-loop-builder-action="import" data-loop-builder-type="' + type + '">' + icon('import') + '<span>Import</span></button>' +
        '<button type="button" class="loop-builder-data-btn" data-loop-builder-action="copy" data-loop-builder-type="' + type + '">' + icon('copy') + '<span>Copy</span></button>' +
      '</div>' +
    '</div>';
  }

  function ensurePanel(type) {
    var page = document.getElementById(type === 'world' ? 'page-create-world' : 'page-create-character');
    if (!page) return;
    var selector = type === 'world' ? '.loop-create-world-preview-card' : '.loop-create-character-preview-card';
    var card = page.querySelector(selector);
    if (!card || card.querySelector('[data-loop-builder-data-panel]')) return;
    var anchor = card.querySelector('.loop-create-character-render-panel') || card.lastElementChild;
    if (!anchor) return;
    anchor.insertAdjacentHTML('afterend', dataPanel(type));
  }

  function clearButtonSvg(btn) {
    if (!btn) return;
    btn.querySelectorAll('svg').forEach(function(svg){ svg.remove(); });
  }

  function decorateButton(btn, iconName, force) {
    if (!btn) return;
    if (force) clearButtonSvg(btn);
    if (!btn.querySelector('svg')) btn.insertAdjacentHTML('afterbegin', icon(iconName));
    btn.classList.add('loop-icon-ready');
  }

  function decorateButtons() {
    decorateButton(document.getElementById('loopCreateWorldRenderBtn'), 'ai', false);
    decorateButton(document.querySelector('#page-create-world button[onclick="loopCreateWorldClearPreview()"]'), 'reset', false);
    decorateButton(document.getElementById('loopCreateWorldAssistBtn'), 'ai', true);
    decorateButton(document.querySelector('#page-create-world button[onclick="loopCreateWorldReset()"]'), 'reset', false);
    decorateButton(document.querySelector('#page-create-world button[onclick="loopCreateWorldSave()"]'), 'save', false);
    decorateButton(document.querySelector('#page-create-world button[onclick="loopCreateWorldUseInStory()"]'), 'saveFilled', false);
    decorateButton(document.querySelector('#page-create-character button[onclick="loopCreateCharacterAssist()"]'), 'ai', true);
  }

  function refreshBuilderDataTools() {
    ensurePanel('character');
    ensurePanel('world');
    decorateButtons();
  }

  document.addEventListener('click', function(event) {
    var btn = event.target && event.target.closest && event.target.closest('[data-loop-builder-action]');
    if (!btn) return;
    var action = btn.getAttribute('data-loop-builder-action');
    var type = btn.getAttribute('data-loop-builder-type') || 'character';
    if (action === 'export') window.loopBuilderExportData(type);
    if (action === 'import') window.loopBuilderImportData(type);
    if (action === 'copy') window.loopBuilderCopyData(type);
  });

  window.loopRefreshBuilderDataTools = refreshBuilderDataTools;

  var prevOpenCharacter = window.openLoopCreateCharacterPage;
  if (typeof prevOpenCharacter === 'function' && !prevOpenCharacter.__loopDataToolsWrapped) {
    var wrappedCharacter = function() {
      var result = prevOpenCharacter.apply(this, arguments);
      setTimeout(refreshBuilderDataTools, 0);
      return result;
    };
    wrappedCharacter.__loopDataToolsWrapped = true;
    window.openLoopCreateCharacterPage = wrappedCharacter;
  }

  var prevOpenWorld = window.openLoopCreateWorldPage;
  if (typeof prevOpenWorld === 'function' && !prevOpenWorld.__loopDataToolsWrapped) {
    var wrappedWorld = function() {
      var result = prevOpenWorld.apply(this, arguments);
      setTimeout(refreshBuilderDataTools, 0);
      return result;
    };
    wrappedWorld.__loopDataToolsWrapped = true;
    window.openLoopCreateWorldPage = wrappedWorld;
    window.loopOpenCreateWorld = function(seed) { return window.openLoopCreateWorldPage(seed || {}); };
  }

  var prevSwitchPage = window.switchPage;
  if (typeof prevSwitchPage === 'function' && !prevSwitchPage.__loopDataToolsWrapped) {
    var wrappedSwitch = function() {
      var result = prevSwitchPage.apply(this, arguments);
      setTimeout(refreshBuilderDataTools, 0);
      return result;
    };
    wrappedSwitch.__loopDataToolsWrapped = true;
    window.switchPage = wrappedSwitch;
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { setTimeout(refreshBuilderDataTools, 80); }, { once: true });
  } else {
    setTimeout(refreshBuilderDataTools, 80);
  }
  window.addEventListener('load', function() { setTimeout(refreshBuilderDataTools, 180); }, { once: true });
  setTimeout(refreshBuilderDataTools, 700);
})();
</script>

.app.page-image-simple #page-gate {
  display: none !important;

<script id="loop-gate-image-final-split-script">
(function(){
  if (window.__LOOP_GATE_IMAGE_FINAL_SPLIT__) return;
  window.__LOOP_GATE_IMAGE_FINAL_SPLIT__ = true;

  function appRoot(){ return document.querySelector('.app'); }
  function getPage(name){ return document.getElementById('page-' + name); }
  function getChatUi(){ return document.querySelector('.chat-ui'); }
  function getMainContent(){ return document.querySelector('.main-content'); }
  function getCommentsBtn(){ return document.getElementById('commentsToggleBtn'); }
  function getPageTitle(){ return document.querySelector('.page-title'); }

  function setHeaderTitle(title) {
    var el = getPageTitle();
    if (el) el.textContent = title;
  }

  function setSidebarLabelActive(label) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.sidebar .item.is-active, .sidebar .create.is-active').forEach(function(el){
      el.classList.remove('is-active');
    });
    var target = Array.prototype.find.call(document.querySelectorAll('.sidebar .item, .sidebar .create'), function(el){
      return String(el.getAttribute('data-label') || '').trim() === label;
    });
    if (target) target.classList.add('is-active');
  }

  function collapseImagePromptForGate() {
    var app = appRoot();
    if (!app) return;
    if (typeof window.toggleImagePromptDock === 'function') {
      try { window.toggleImagePromptDock(true); return; } catch (e) {}
    }
    app.classList.add('image-prompt-hidden');
    try { if (typeof window.syncImagePromptDockVisibility === 'function') window.syncImagePromptDockVisibility(); } catch (e) {}
  }

  function openImagePromptForImage() {
    var app = appRoot();
    if (!app) return;
    if (typeof window.toggleImagePromptDock === 'function') {
      try { window.toggleImagePromptDock(false); return; } catch (e) {}
    }
    app.classList.remove('image-prompt-hidden');
    try { if (typeof window.syncImagePromptDockVisibility === 'function') window.syncImagePromptDockVisibility(); } catch (e) {}
  }

  function activateGatePage(options) {
    options = options || {};
    if (typeof window.closePrivateGalleryIfOpen === 'function') {
      try { window.closePrivateGalleryIfOpen(); } catch (e) {}
    }
    if (typeof isMobileSidebarMode === 'function' && isMobileSidebarMode() && typeof forceCloseMobileSidebar === 'function') {
      try { forceCloseMobileSidebar(); } catch (e) {}
    }

    document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(function(page){ page.classList.remove('active'); });
    var gate = getPage('gate');
    if (gate) gate.classList.add('active');

    var app = appRoot();
    if (app) {
      app.classList.remove('page-image-simple');
      app.classList.remove('loop-surface-image-mode');
      app.classList.add('loop-surface-gate-mode');
    }

    window.__loopFinalImageMode = 'gate';
    window.loopImageWorkspacePinned = false;

    var mainContent = getMainContent();
    if (mainContent) mainContent.style.overflowY = 'auto';

    var chatUi = getChatUi();
    if (chatUi) chatUi.hidden = true;

    var commentsBtn = getCommentsBtn();
    if (commentsBtn) {
      commentsBtn.hidden = false;
      commentsBtn.title = 'Show Comments';
      commentsBtn.classList.remove('active');
    }

    setSidebarLabelActive('Gate');
    setHeaderTitle('Gate');
    collapseImagePromptForGate();

    try { if (typeof window.renderLoopGateDefaultAssets === 'function') window.renderLoopGateDefaultAssets(); } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
    try { if (typeof window.syncImageMobileStructure === 'function') window.syncImageMobileStructure(); } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
    if (!options.silent && typeof window.applyLoopSurfaceStateFromMode === 'function') {
      try { window.applyLoopSurfaceStateFromMode('gate'); } catch (e) {}
    }
  }

  function openImagePage() {
    window.__loopFinalImageMode = 'image';
    openImagePromptForImage();
    if (typeof window.__loopGateImageOriginalSwitchPage === 'function') {
      window.__loopGateImageOriginalSwitchPage('image');
    } else if (typeof window.__loopGateImageFallbackSwitchPage === 'function') {
      window.__loopGateImageFallbackSwitchPage('image');
    }
    var app = appRoot();
    if (app) {
      app.classList.remove('loop-surface-gate-mode');
      app.classList.add('loop-surface-image-mode');
    }
    try { if (typeof window.showWorkspaceStage === 'function') window.showWorkspaceStage(); } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
    try { if (typeof window.updateCanvasButtonVisibility === 'function') { window.updateCanvasButtonVisibility(); if (typeof window.syncInlineWidthVisibility === 'function') window.syncInlineWidthVisibility(); } } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
    try { if (typeof window.syncImageMobileStructure === 'function') window.syncImageMobileStructure(); } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
    setSidebarLabelActive('Image');
    setHeaderTitle('Image');
  }

  if (typeof window.switchPage === 'function' && !window.__loopGateImageFallbackSwitchPage) {
    window.__loopGateImageFallbackSwitchPage = window.switchPage;
  }

  var currentSwitchPage = window.switchPage;
  window.__loopGateImageOriginalSwitchPage = currentSwitchPage;
  window.switchPage = function(pageName) {
    if (pageName === 'gate') {
      activateGatePage();
      return;
    }
    return currentSwitchPage.apply(this, arguments);
  };

  window.loopOpenGatePage = function() {
    activateGatePage();
  };

  window.loopOpenImageGeneratorPage = function() {
    openImagePage();
    setTimeout(function(){
      try {
        var prompt = document.querySelector('#prompt, textarea[name="prompt"], textarea.prompt-input, textarea');
        if (prompt && typeof prompt.focus === 'function') prompt.focus({ preventScroll: true });
      } catch (e) {}
    }, 80);
  };

  window.loopOpenCreateImage = function() {
    window.loopOpenImageGeneratorPage();
  };

  function initDefaultGatePage() {
    var gate = getPage('gate');
    if (!gate) return;
    activateGatePage({ silent: true });
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){ setTimeout(initDefaultGatePage, 0); }, { once: true });
  } else {
    setTimeout(initDefaultGatePage, 0);
  }
  window.addEventListener('load', function(){ setTimeout(initDefaultGatePage, 60); }, { once: true });
})();
</script>


<style id="loop-image-final-cleanup-stage74-style">
/* Stage 74: clean residual image-page chrome */
#galleryToggleBtn {
  display: none !important;
  visibility: hidden !important;
  pointer-events: none !important;
}

/* The mobile sheet backdrop should never exist visually on desktop/tablet.
   When left unstyled outside mobile, it can appear as a tiny clickable dot. */
#imageMobileOverlayHost,
#imageMobileSheetBackdrop {
  display: none !important;
}

@media (max-width: 760px) {
  .app.image-mobile-ready #imageMobileOverlayHost {
    display: block !important;
  }
  .app.image-mobile-ready #imageMobileSheetBackdrop {
    display: block !important;
  }
}
</style>

<script id="loop-image-final-cleanup-stage74-script">
(function(){
  if (window.__LOOP_IMAGE_FINAL_CLEANUP_STAGE74__) return;
  window.__LOOP_IMAGE_FINAL_CLEANUP_STAGE74__ = true;

  function hideLegacyGalleryToggle() {
    var btn = document.getElementById('galleryToggleBtn');
    if (!btn) return;
    btn.hidden = true;
    btn.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
    btn.tabIndex = -1;
  }

  function hardenDesktopOverlayHost() {
    var host = document.getElementById('imageMobileOverlayHost');
    var backdrop = document.getElementById('imageMobileSheetBackdrop');
    var isMobile = window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(max-width: 760px)').matches;
    var app = document.querySelector('.app');
    var mobileReady = !!(app && app.classList.contains('image-mobile-ready'));
    if (!isMobile || !mobileReady) {
      if (host) {
        host.hidden = true;
        host.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
      }
      if (backdrop) {
        backdrop.hidden = true;
        backdrop.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
      }
    } else {
      if (host) host.hidden = false;
      if (backdrop) backdrop.hidden = false;
    }
  }

  function run() {
    hideLegacyGalleryToggle();
    hardenDesktopOverlayHost();
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){ setTimeout(run, 0); }, { once: true });
  } else {
    setTimeout(run, 0);
  }

  window.addEventListener('resize', run, { passive: true });
  window.addEventListener('load', function(){ setTimeout(run, 80); }, { once: true });
})();
</script>
