<script id="loop-retire-legacy-modal-cleanup-v18-script">
(function(){
  if (window.__LOOP_RETIRE_LEGACY_MODAL_CLEANUP_V18__) return;
  window.__LOOP_RETIRE_LEGACY_MODAL_CLEANUP_V18__ = true;

  var ICONS = {
    back: '<svg class="loop-inspector-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M15 18l-6-6 6-6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M10 12h10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>',
    primary: '<svg class="loop-inspector-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M16 19v-1.2c0-1.9-1.6-3.5-3.5-3.5h-5A3.5 3.5 0 0 0 4 17.8V19" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.9" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M10 10.8a3.4 3.4 0 1 0 0-6.8 3.4 3.4 0 0 0 0 6.8Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.9"/><path d="M16.5 10.8l1.7 1.7 3.3-3.6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>',
    scene: '<svg class="loop-inspector-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M15 19v-1.2c0-1.9-1.5-3.4-3.4-3.4H7.4A3.4 3.4 0 0 0 4 17.8V19" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.9" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M9.5 10.8a3.3 3.3 0 1 0 0-6.6 3.3 3.3 0 0 0 0 6.6Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.9"/><path d="M18.5 8v6M15.5 11h6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>',
    edit: '<svg class="loop-inspector-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M4 20h4.6L19.3 9.3a2.1 2.1 0 0 0 0-3l-1.6-1.6a2.1 2.1 0 0 0-3 0L4 15.4V20Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.85" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M13.8 5.6l4.6 4.6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.85" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>',
    copy: '<svg class="loop-inspector-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M8 8V5.8C8 4.8 8.8 4 9.8 4h8.4c1 0 1.8.8 1.8 1.8v8.4c0 1-.8 1.8-1.8 1.8H16" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.9" stroke-linecap="round"/><rect x="4" y="8" width="12" height="12" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.9"/></svg>',
    check: '<svg class="loop-inspector-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M20 6L9 17l-5-5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>',
    world: '<svg class="loop-inspector-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="8.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.9"/><path d="M3.7 12h16.6M12 3.5c2.1 2.2 3.2 5 3.2 8.5S14.1 18.3 12 20.5M12 3.5C9.9 5.7 8.8 8.5 8.8 12s1.1 6.3 3.2 8.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.55" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>'
  };

  function icon(name){ return ICONS[name] || ''; }
  function story(){ return window.LoopStory || null; }
  function text(value){ return String(value == null ? '' : value).trim(); }
  function esc(value){
    var raw = String(value == null ? '' : value);
    var s = story();
    if (s && typeof s.escapeHtml === 'function') return s.escapeHtml(raw);
    return raw.replace(/[&<>"']/g, function(ch){ return ({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#39;'})[ch]; });
  }
  function safeUrl(value){ return String(value || '').trim().replace(/'/g, '%27').replace(/\)/g, '%29'); }
  function inspectorSlug(value) {
    return String(value || '')
      .toLowerCase()
      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')
      .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
      .slice(0, 54) || 'asset';
  }
  function inspectorAccent() {
    var val = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--accent').trim();
    return /^#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}$/.test(val) ? val : '#ffbe0a';
  }
  function inspectorCommentsId(kind, item, label) {
    var raw = kind === 'world'
      ? (item && (item.id || item.title || item.name))
      : (item && (item.id || item.name || item.title));
    return raw || label || (kind === 'world' ? 'World' : 'Character');
  }
  function inspectorCommentsChannel(kind, item, label) {
    return 'gate-' + inspectorSlug(kind) + '-' + inspectorSlug(inspectorCommentsId(kind, item, label));
  }
  function buildInspectorComments(kind, item, label) {
    var channel = inspectorCommentsChannel(kind, item, label);
    var title = kind === 'world' ? 'World Comments' : 'Character Comments';
    var commentsHtml = '';
    try {
      var fn = (typeof window.commentsPlugin === 'function') ? window.commentsPlugin : (typeof commentsPlugin === 'function' ? commentsPlugin : null);
      if (fn) {
        commentsHtml = fn({
          channel: channel,
          channelLabel: String(label || title),
          width: '100%',
          height: '100%',
          loadFonts: 'Inter',
          forceColorScheme: document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark' ? 'dark' : 'light',
          commentPlaceholderText: 'Add a friendly comment...',
          submitButtonText: 'send',
          submitButtonStyle: 'background:' + inspectorAccent() + ';color:#111;border:none;border-radius:9px;font-weight:800;min-height:32px;',
          inputAreaStyle: 'border-radius:9px;font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif;'
        });
      }
    } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
    if (!commentsHtml) {
      commentsHtml = '<div class="loop-inspector-comments-empty">Comments are not available yet. Open the same item from Gate if the plugin has not initialized.</div>';
    }
    return '<section class="loop-inspector-comments" data-loop-inspector-comments="' + esc(kind) + '" data-comments-channel="' + esc(channel) + '">' +
      '<div class="loop-inspector-comments-head"><div><div class="loop-inspector-comments-title">' + esc(title) + '</div>' +
      '<div class="loop-inspector-comments-subtitle">Same comment room as the Gate list.</div></div>' +
      '<div class="loop-inspector-comments-channel">' + esc(channel) + '</div></div>' +
      '<div class="loop-inspector-comments-body">' + commentsHtml + '</div></section>';
  }
  function initial(name){
    var s = story();
    if (s && typeof s.avatarInitial === 'function') return s.avatarInitial(name || 'C');
    return (String(name || '?').trim().charAt(0) || '?').toUpperCase();
  }
  function activePageName(){
    var active = document.querySelector('.page.active');
    return active && active.id ? active.id.replace(/^page-/, '') : '';
  }
  function pageEl(page){ return document.getElementById('page-' + String(page || '').replace(/^page-/, '')); }
  function setHeader(title){ var el = document.querySelector('.page-title'); if (el && title) el.textContent = title; }
  function clearSidebarActive(){
    document.querySelectorAll('.sidebar .item.is-active, .sidebar .create.is-active').forEach(function(el){ el.classList.remove('is-active'); });
  }
  function openCreateGroup(){
    var group = document.getElementById('loopCreateNavChildren');
    var btn = document.querySelector('.loop-nav-create-root');
    if (group) group.setAttribute('data-open', 'true');
    if (btn) btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
  }
  function setSidebarByLabel(label){
    clearSidebarActive();
    if (label === 'Character' || label === 'World' || label === 'Image') openCreateGroup();
    var target = document.querySelector('.sidebar .loop-nav-subitem[data-label="' + label + '"]') || document.querySelector('.sidebar [data-label="' + label + '"]');
    if (target) target.classList.add('is-active');
  }
  function syncCommonForPage(page){
    var main = document.querySelector('.main-content');
    if (main) main.style.overflowY = (page === 'story' && window.innerWidth > 1024) ? 'hidden' : 'auto';
    var chat = document.querySelector('.chat-ui');
    if (chat) chat.hidden = (page !== 'image');
    var commentsBtn = document.getElementById('commentsToggleBtn');
    if (commentsBtn) {
      commentsBtn.hidden = (page === 'create-character' || page === 'create-world' || page === 'character-inspector' || page === 'world-inspector' || page === 'guide' || page === 'library');
      if (page !== 'story') commentsBtn.classList.remove('active');
    }
  }
  function setSurfaceClasses(page){
    var app = document.querySelector('.app');
    if (!app) return;
    app.classList.toggle('loop-surface-gate-mode', page === 'gate');
    app.classList.toggle('loop-surface-image-mode', page === 'image');
    app.classList.toggle('page-image-simple', page === 'image');
  }
  function directActivate(page, title, label){
    var target = pageEl(page);
    if (!target) return false;
    document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(function(p){ p.classList.remove('active'); });
    target.classList.add('active');
    setSurfaceClasses(page);
    syncCommonForPage(page);
    if (title) setHeader(title);
    if (label) setSidebarByLabel(label);
    return true;
  }

  function normalizeGateHeadings(){
    var gate = pageEl('gate');
    if (!gate || !gate.classList.contains('active')) return;
    var hub = document.getElementById('loopGateDefaultHub');
    if (hub) {
      var titles = hub.querySelectorAll('.loop-gate-default-list-title');
      if (titles[0]) titles[0].textContent = 'Characters';
      if (titles[1]) titles[1].textContent = 'World Building';
    }
    var gallerySection = document.getElementById('gallerySection');
    var shell = gallerySection ? gallerySection.querySelector('.gallery-shell') : null;
    if (!gallerySection || !shell) return;
    var hero = document.getElementById('loopGateGalleryHeroTitle');
    if (!hero) {
      hero = document.createElement('div');
      hero.id = 'loopGateGalleryHeroTitle';
      hero.className = 'loop-gate-gallery-hero-title';
      hero.textContent = 'Gallery';
      gallerySection.insertBefore(hero, shell);
    } else {
      hero.textContent = 'Gallery';
      if (hero.nextElementSibling !== shell) gallerySection.insertBefore(hero, shell);
    }

    var limited = /too_many_requests|status\\s*[:=]\\s*too_many_requests/i.test(String(shell.textContent || ''));
    var note = document.getElementById('loopGateGalleryFallbackNote');
    gate.classList.toggle('loop-gate-gallery-rate-limited', limited);
    if (limited && !note) {
      note = document.createElement('div');
      note.id = 'loopGateGalleryFallbackNote';
      note.className = 'loop-gate-gallery-fallback-note';
      note.textContent = 'Gallery is temporarily rate-limited by Perchance. LOOP keeps the Gate content visible; the gallery should return after the limit clears.';
      gallerySection.appendChild(note);
    } else if (!limited && note) {
      note.remove();
    }
  }
  function ensureGateVisible(){
    directActivate('gate', 'Gate', 'Gate');
    var gate = pageEl('gate');
    if (!gate) return;
    var gateStage = gate.querySelector('.image-stage-main') || gate;
    var gallery = document.getElementById('gallerySection');
    if (gallery && gateStage && gallery.parentElement !== gateStage) {
      gateStage.appendChild(gallery);
    }
    if (gallery) {
      gallery.hidden = false;
      gallery.removeAttribute('hidden');
      gallery.style.display = '';
      gallery.style.visibility = '';
      gallery.style.opacity = '';
      gallery.style.pointerEvents = '';
      gallery.classList.add('show');
    }
    try { if (typeof window.renderLoopGateDefaultAssets === 'function') window.renderLoopGateDefaultAssets(); } catch(e){ console.error(e); }
    setTimeout(normalizeGateHeadings, 0);
    setTimeout(normalizeGateHeadings, 80);
  }

  function ensureInspectorPages(){
    var main = document.querySelector('.main-content');
    if (!main) return;
    function insert(section){
      var guide = document.getElementById('page-guide');
      if (guide && guide.parentElement === main) main.insertBefore(section, guide);
      else main.appendChild(section);
    }
    if (!document.getElementById('page-character-inspector')) {
      var c = document.createElement('section');
      c.id = 'page-character-inspector';
      c.className = 'page';
      c.innerHTML = '<div class="loop-inspector-page-shell" data-character-inspector-root></div>';
      insert(c);
    }
    if (!document.getElementById('page-world-inspector')) {
      var w = document.createElement('section');
      w.id = 'page-world-inspector';
      w.className = 'page';
      w.innerHTML = '<div class="loop-inspector-page-shell" data-world-inspector-root></div>';
      insert(w);
    }
  }

  function lineField(raw, label){
    raw = String(raw || '');
    var re = new RegExp('^\\s*' + label.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&').replace(/\\s+/g, '\\s+') + '\\s*:\\s*(.+)$', 'im');
    var m = raw.match(re);
    return m ? text(m[1]) : '';
  }
  function headingBlock(raw, heading, stopHeadings){
    raw = String(raw || '');
    if (!raw.trim()) return '';
    var all = [heading].concat(stopHeadings || []).filter(Boolean).map(function(v){ return String(v).replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&').replace(/\s+/g, '\\s+'); });
    var startRe = new RegExp('(?:^|\\n)\\s*' + all[0] + '\\s*:\\s*', 'i');
    var start = raw.search(startRe);
    if (start < 0) return '';
    var after = raw.slice(start).replace(startRe, '');
    if ((stopHeadings || []).length) {
      var stopRe = new RegExp('\\n\\s*(?:' + all.slice(1).join('|') + ')\\s*:', 'i');
      var stop = after.search(stopRe);
      if (stop >= 0) after = after.slice(0, stop);
    }
    return text(after);
  }
  function section(title, body){
    body = text(body);
    return '<div class="loop-inspector-section"><div class="loop-inspector-section-title">' + esc(title) + '</div><div class="loop-inspector-text ' + (body ? '' : 'loop-inspector-empty') + '">' + esc(body || 'No data yet.') + '</div></div>';
  }
  function combined(list){
    return '<div class="loop-inspector-combined-panel">' + list.map(function(pair){ return section(pair[0], pair[1]); }).join('') + '</div>';
  }
  function panel(id, html, active){
    return '<div class="loop-inspector-panel ' + (active ? 'is-active' : '') + '" data-inspector-panel="' + esc(id) + '">' + html + '</div>';
  }
  function tabButton(id, label, active){
    return '<button type="button" class="loop-inspector-tab ' + (active ? 'is-active' : '') + '" data-inspector-tab="' + esc(id) + '">' + esc(label) + '</button>';
  }
  function actionButton(kind, iconName, label, attr){
    var cls = kind === 'primary' ? 'is-primary' : (kind === 'secondary' ? 'is-secondary' : 'is-utility');
    return '<button type="button" class="loop-inspector-btn ' + cls + '" ' + attr + '>' + icon(iconName) + '<span>' + esc(label) + '</span></button>';
  }
  function metaRows(rows){
    var html = rows.filter(function(row){ return text(row[1]); }).map(function(row){
      return '<div class="loop-inspector-meta-row"><div class="loop-inspector-meta-label">' + esc(row[0]) + '</div><div class="loop-inspector-meta-value">' + esc(row[1]) + '</div></div>';
    }).join('');
    return html ? '<div class="loop-inspector-meta-list is-compact">' + html + '</div>' : '';
  }
  function bindTabs(root){
    if (!root || root.__loopInspectorTabsBound) return;
    root.__loopInspectorTabsBound = true;
    root.addEventListener('click', function(event){
      var btn = event.target.closest('[data-inspector-tab]');
      if (!btn || !root.contains(btn)) return;
      var tab = btn.getAttribute('data-inspector-tab') || '';
      root.querySelectorAll('[data-inspector-tab]').forEach(function(b){ b.classList.toggle('is-active', b === btn); });
      root.querySelectorAll('[data-inspector-panel]').forEach(function(p){ p.classList.toggle('is-active', p.getAttribute('data-inspector-panel') === tab); });
    }, { once: false });
  }
  function markButton(btn, iconName, label, cls, resetMs){
    if (!btn) return;
    if (!btn.dataset.loopOriginalHtml) btn.dataset.loopOriginalHtml = btn.innerHTML;
    btn.innerHTML = icon(iconName || 'check') + '<span>' + esc(label || 'Done') + '</span>';
    if (cls) btn.classList.add(cls);
    if (resetMs) {
      window.clearTimeout(btn.__loopInspectorResetTimer);
      btn.__loopInspectorResetTimer = window.setTimeout(function(){
        if (btn.dataset.loopOriginalHtml) btn.innerHTML = btn.dataset.loopOriginalHtml;
        if (cls) btn.classList.remove(cls);
      }, resetMs);
    }
  }
  function setInspectorStatus(message){
    try { if (story() && typeof story().setStatus === 'function') story().setStatus(message); } catch(e) {}
  }
  function goStorySoon(){
    window.setTimeout(function(){
      try {
        if (typeof window.switchPage === 'function') window.switchPage('story');
        else directActivate('story', 'Story', 'Story');
      } catch(e) { console.error(e); }
    }, 420);
  }
  function copyJSON(data, label, btn){
    var raw = JSON.stringify(data || {}, null, 2);
    function done(){
      setInspectorStatus(label + ' data copied');
      markButton(btn, 'check', 'Copied', 'is-copied', 1400);
    }
    if (navigator.clipboard && navigator.clipboard.writeText) navigator.clipboard.writeText(raw).then(done).catch(fallback);
    else fallback();
    function fallback(){
      var ta = document.createElement('textarea');
      ta.value = raw;
      ta.style.position = 'fixed';
      ta.style.left = '-9999px';
      document.body.appendChild(ta);
      ta.select();
      try { document.execCommand('copy'); done(); } catch(e) { setInspectorStatus('Copy failed'); }
      ta.remove();
    }
  }
  function localWorldPackage(item){
    var safe = item || {}, blocks = [];
    var scenario = [safe.scenario, safe.scenarioSeed, safe.premise].map(function(v){ return text(v); }).filter(Boolean).filter(function(v, i, a){ return a.indexOf(v) === i; }).join('\n\n').trim();
    if (scenario) blocks.push(scenario);
    if (text(safe.contextSummary || safe.summary)) blocks.push('Context Summary:\n' + text(safe.contextSummary || safe.summary));
    if (text(safe.contextNotes || safe.contextMemo || safe.notes)) blocks.push('Context Notes:\n' + text(safe.contextNotes || safe.contextMemo || safe.notes));
    if (text(safe.contextLore || safe.lore || safe.rules)) blocks.push('World Lore / Rules:\n' + text(safe.contextLore || safe.lore || safe.rules));
    if (text(safe.contextGlossary || safe.glossary || safe.terms)) blocks.push('Glossary / Terms:\n' + text(safe.contextGlossary || safe.glossary || safe.terms));
    return blocks.join('\n\n').trim();
  }
  function applyWorldFromInspector(item, btn){
    var s = story();
    if (!item || !s) { setInspectorStatus('Story is not ready yet'); return false; }
    try {
      if (typeof s.setActiveWorld === 'function') s.setActiveWorld(item, { applyScenario: true });
      else {
        s.state = s.state || {};
        s.state.activeWorld = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(item));
        if (s.els && s.els.scenario) s.els.scenario.value = localWorldPackage(item);
        if (s.els && s.els.inspiration && !text(s.els.inspiration.value)) s.els.inspiration.value = text(item.title || item.name || '');
        if (typeof s.renderAll === 'function') s.renderAll();
        if (typeof s.setStatus === 'function') s.setStatus('world set for story');
      }
      if (typeof s.persistSnapshot === 'function') s.persistSnapshot();
      markButton(btn, 'check', 'World Set', 'is-applied', 900);
      goStorySoon();
      return true;
    } catch(e) { console.error(e); setInspectorStatus('Failed to use world'); return false; }
  }
  function applyCharacterFromInspector(item, mode, btn){
    var s = story();
    if (!item || !s) { setInspectorStatus('Story is not ready yet'); return false; }
    try {
      var ok = false;
      if (mode === 'scene') {
        if (typeof s.addStoryCharacterToScene === 'function') ok = s.addStoryCharacterToScene(item) !== false;
        else {
          s.state = s.state || {}; s.state.inScene = s.state.inScene || [];
          s.state.inScene.push({ id: 'scene_' + Date.now(), sourceCharacterId: text(item.id || item.name), name: item.name || 'In Scene', avatarUrl: item.avatarUrl || item.imageUrl || '', short: item.short || '', appearance: item.appearance || '', characterDescription: item.characterDescription || '', description: item.description || '' });
          if (typeof s.renderAll === 'function') s.renderAll();
          if (typeof s.setStatus === 'function') s.setStatus('character added to scene');
          ok = true;
        }
        markButton(btn, 'check', ok ? 'Added' : 'Already Added', 'is-applied', 900);
      } else {
        if (typeof s.applyStoryCharacterAsPrimary === 'function') ok = s.applyStoryCharacterAsPrimary(item) !== false;
        else {
          s.state = s.state || {};
          s.state.primary = { id: item.id || ('primary_' + Date.now()), name: item.name || 'Primary', avatarUrl: item.avatarUrl || item.imageUrl || '', short: item.short || '', appearance: item.appearance || '', characterDescription: item.characterDescription || '', description: item.description || '' };
          if (typeof s.refreshSendAsOptions === 'function') s.refreshSendAsOptions();
          if (typeof s.renderAll === 'function') s.renderAll();
          if (typeof s.setStatus === 'function') s.setStatus('primary character set');
          ok = true;
        }
        markButton(btn, 'check', ok ? 'Primary Set' : 'Not Applied', 'is-applied', 900);
      }
      if (typeof s.persistSnapshot === 'function') s.persistSnapshot();
      goStorySoon();
      return !!ok;
    } catch(e) { console.error(e); setInspectorStatus('Failed to apply character'); return false; }
  }
  function rememberBackTarget(opts){
    opts = opts || {};
    if (opts.fromEditor) return window.__loopInspectorStableBackTarget || opts.returnPage || 'gate';
    var active = activePageName();
    var target = opts.returnPage || ((active && active !== 'character-inspector' && active !== 'world-inspector' && active !== 'create-character' && active !== 'create-world') ? active : '');
    if (!target) target = (opts.source === 'gate' ? 'gate' : (window.__loopInspectorStableBackTarget || 'gate'));
    window.__loopInspectorStableBackTarget = target;
    return target;
  }
  function goBackFromInspector(){
    var target = window.__loopInspectorStableBackTarget || 'gate';
    if (target === 'gate') { ensureGateVisible(); return; }
    if (typeof window.switchPage === 'function') window.switchPage(target);
    else directActivate(target, target, target);
  }
  function openEditorFromInspector(type, item, opts){
    window.__loopInspectorReturnTarget = { type: type, item: item, opts: Object.assign({}, opts || {}, { fromEditor: true }) };
    if (type === 'world') {
      if (window.openLoopCreateWorldPage) window.openLoopCreateWorldPage(item, { fromInspector: true });
      injectReturnButton('world');
    } else {
      if (window.openLoopCreateCharacterPage) window.openLoopCreateCharacterPage(item, { fromInspector: true });
      injectReturnButton('character');
    }
  }
  function injectReturnButton(type){
    var page = document.getElementById(type === 'world' ? 'page-create-world' : 'page-create-character');
    if (!page) return;
    var head = page.querySelector('.loop-create-world-page-head, .loop-create-character-page-head, [class*="page-head"]');
    if (!head) return;
    head.classList.add('loop-inspector-return-host');
    var old = head.querySelector('[data-loop-return-inspector]');
    if (old) old.remove();
    var btn = document.createElement('button');
    btn.type = 'button';
    btn.className = 'loop-inspector-return-btn';
    btn.setAttribute('data-loop-return-inspector', type);
    btn.innerHTML = icon('back') + '<span>Back to Inspector</span>';
    btn.addEventListener('click', function(){ window.loopReturnToInspector && window.loopReturnToInspector(); });
    head.appendChild(btn);
  }
  window.loopReturnToInspector = function(){
    var ref = window.__loopInspectorReturnTarget;
    if (!ref || !ref.item) return;
    if (ref.type === 'world') return openWorldInspectorPage(ref.item, Object.assign({}, ref.opts || {}, { fromEditor: true }));
    return openCharacterInspectorPage(ref.item, Object.assign({}, ref.opts || {}, { fromEditor: true }));
  };

  function openCharacterInspectorPage(item, opts){
    if (!item) return;
    ensureInspectorPages();
    opts = opts || {};
    var backTarget = rememberBackTarget(opts);
    try { story() && story().closeCharacterModal && story().closeCharacterModal(); } catch(e) {}

    var root = document.querySelector('[data-character-inspector-root]');
    if (!root) return;

    var descriptionRaw = text(item.description || '');
    var characterRaw = text(item.characterDescription || '');
    var appearanceRaw = text(item.appearance || '');
    var name = text(item.name || item.title || lineField(descriptionRaw, 'Name') || 'Character') || 'Character';
    var gender = text(item.gender || lineField(descriptionRaw, 'Gender') || lineField(descriptionRaw, 'Species & Gender'));
    var age = text(item.age || lineField(descriptionRaw, 'Age'));
    var affiliation = text(item.affiliation || lineField(descriptionRaw, 'Affiliation'));
    var companion = text(item.companion || lineField(descriptionRaw, 'Companion'));
    var avatarUrl = text(item.avatarUrl || item.imageUrl || '');
    var shortText = text(item.short || item.shortDescription || (story() && story().makeShortDescription ? story().makeShortDescription(descriptionRaw || characterRaw || appearanceRaw) : ''));
    var physicalAppearance = text(item.physicalAppearance || headingBlock(appearanceRaw, 'Physical Appearance', ['Clothing']) || headingBlock(descriptionRaw, 'Physical Appearance', ['Clothing', 'Personality', 'Social Role', 'Background']) || appearanceRaw);
    var clothing = text(item.clothing || headingBlock(appearanceRaw, 'Clothing', []) || headingBlock(descriptionRaw, 'Clothing', ['Personality', 'Social Role', 'Background']));
    var personality = text(item.personality || headingBlock(characterRaw, 'Personality', ['Social Role', 'Background', 'Roleplay Behavior Examples']) || headingBlock(descriptionRaw, 'Personality', ['Social Role', 'Background', 'Roleplay Behavior Examples']));
    var socialRole = text(item.socialRole || headingBlock(characterRaw, 'Social Role', ['Background', 'Roleplay Behavior Examples']) || headingBlock(descriptionRaw, 'Social Role', ['Background', 'Roleplay Behavior Examples']));
    var background = text(item.background || headingBlock(characterRaw, 'Background', ['Roleplay Behavior Examples']) || headingBlock(descriptionRaw, 'Background', ['Roleplay Behavior Examples']));
    var examples = text(item.examples || item.roleplayBehaviorExamples || headingBlock(characterRaw, 'Roleplay Behavior Examples', []) || headingBlock(descriptionRaw, 'Roleplay Behavior Examples', []));
    var source = text(opts.source || item.sourceType || item.source || 'Story');

    root.innerHTML =
      '<div class="loop-inspector-page-head"><div><div class="loop-inspector-kicker">Character Inspector</div><div class="loop-inspector-title">' + esc(name) + '</div></div>' +
      actionButton('utility', 'back', 'Back', 'data-inspector-back') + '</div>' +
      '<div class="loop-inspector-layout"><aside class="loop-inspector-profile-card">' +
        '<div class="loop-inspector-avatar" style="' + (avatarUrl ? 'background-image:url(\'' + safeUrl(avatarUrl) + '\');' : '') + '">' + (avatarUrl ? '' : '<div class="loop-inspector-avatar-fallback">' + esc(initial(name)) + '</div>') + '</div>' +
        '<div class="loop-inspector-profile-name">' + esc(name) + '</div>' +
        '<div class="loop-inspector-profile-short">' + esc(shortText || 'No short description yet.') + '</div>' +
        metaRows([['Source', source], ['Gender', gender], ['Age', age], ['Affiliation', affiliation], ['Companion', companion]]) +
        '<div class="loop-inspector-actions"><div class="loop-inspector-action-row">' + actionButton('primary', 'primary', 'Set as Primary', 'data-character-primary') + '</div>' +
        '<div class="loop-inspector-action-row">' + actionButton('secondary', 'scene', 'Add to Scene', 'data-character-scene') + '</div>' +
        '<div class="loop-inspector-action-row is-utility">' + actionButton('utility', 'edit', 'Edit', 'data-character-edit') + actionButton('utility', 'copy', 'Copy Data', 'data-character-copy') + '</div></div>' +
      '</aside><main class="loop-inspector-content-card">' +
        '<div class="loop-inspector-tabs">' + tabButton('appearance', 'Appearance', true) + tabButton('personality', 'Personality', false) + tabButton('background', 'Background', false) + tabButton('examples', 'Examples', false) + '</div>' +
        '<div class="loop-inspector-panels">' +
          panel('appearance', combined([['Physical Appearance', physicalAppearance], ['Clothing', clothing]]), true) +
          panel('personality', combined([['Personality', personality], ['Social Role', socialRole]]), false) +
          panel('background', section('Background', background), false) +
          panel('examples', section('Roleplay Behavior Examples', examples), false) +
        '</div>' + buildInspectorComments('character', item, name) + '</main></div>';

    bindTabs(root);
    var back = root.querySelector('[data-inspector-back]'); if (back) back.addEventListener('click', goBackFromInspector);
    var primary = root.querySelector('[data-character-primary]'); if (primary) primary.addEventListener('click', function(){ applyCharacterFromInspector(item, 'primary', primary); });
    var scene = root.querySelector('[data-character-scene]'); if (scene) scene.addEventListener('click', function(){ applyCharacterFromInspector(item, 'scene', scene); });
    var edit = root.querySelector('[data-character-edit]'); if (edit) edit.addEventListener('click', function(){ openEditorFromInspector('character', item, Object.assign({}, opts, { returnPage: backTarget })); });
    var copy = root.querySelector('[data-character-copy]'); if (copy) copy.addEventListener('click', function(){ copyJSON(item, 'Character', copy); });

    directActivate('character-inspector', 'Character Inspector', 'Gate');
  }

  function normalizeTags(tags){
    if (Array.isArray(tags)) return tags.filter(Boolean).join(', ');
    return text(tags);
  }
  function openWorldInspectorPage(item, opts){
    if (!item) return;
    ensureInspectorPages();
    opts = opts || {};
    var backTarget = rememberBackTarget(opts);
    try { story() && story().closeCharacterModal && story().closeCharacterModal(); } catch(e) {}

    var root = document.querySelector('[data-world-inspector-root]');
    if (!root) return;

    var title = text(item.title || item.name || 'World') || 'World';
    var shortText = text(item.short || item.summary || item.contextSummary || item.premise || item.scenario || '');
    var imageUrl = text(item.imageUrl || item.previewUrl || item.coverUrl || item.avatarUrl || '');
    var source = text(opts.source || item.sourceType || item.source || 'Gate');
    var tags = normalizeTags(item.tags);
    var premise = text(item.premise || '');
    var scenario = text(item.scenario || item.scenarioSeed || '');
    var contextSummary = text(item.contextSummary || item.summary || '');
    var contextNotes = text(item.contextNotes || item.contextMemo || item.notes || '');
    var contextLore = text(item.contextLore || item.lore || item.rules || '');
    var contextGlossary = text(item.contextGlossary || item.glossary || item.terms || '');

    root.innerHTML =
      '<div class="loop-inspector-page-head"><div><div class="loop-inspector-kicker">World Inspector</div><div class="loop-inspector-title">' + esc(title) + '</div></div>' +
      actionButton('utility', 'back', 'Back', 'data-inspector-back') + '</div>' +
      '<div class="loop-inspector-layout"><aside class="loop-inspector-profile-card">' +
        '<div class="loop-inspector-world-preview" style="' + (imageUrl ? 'background-image:url(\'' + safeUrl(imageUrl) + '\');' : '') + '">' + (imageUrl ? '' : '<div class="loop-inspector-world-fallback">' + esc(initial(title)) + '</div>') + '</div>' +
        '<div class="loop-inspector-profile-name">' + esc(title) + '</div>' +
        '<div class="loop-inspector-profile-short">' + esc(shortText || 'No short world summary yet.') + '</div>' +
        metaRows([['Source', source], ['Tags', tags]]) +
        '<div class="loop-inspector-actions"><div class="loop-inspector-action-row">' + actionButton('primary', 'world', 'Use World', 'data-world-use') + '</div>' +
        '<div class="loop-inspector-action-row is-utility">' + actionButton('utility', 'edit', 'Edit', 'data-world-edit') + actionButton('utility', 'copy', 'Copy Data', 'data-world-copy') + '</div></div>' +
      '</aside><main class="loop-inspector-content-card">' +
        '<div class="loop-inspector-tabs">' + tabButton('premise', 'Premise', true) + tabButton('context', 'Context', false) + tabButton('lore', 'Lore', false) + '</div>' +
        '<div class="loop-inspector-panels">' +
          panel('premise', section('Premise / Scenario Seed', [premise, scenario].filter(Boolean).join('\n\n')), true) +
          panel('context', combined([['Context Summary', contextSummary], ['Context Notes', contextNotes]]), false) +
          panel('lore', combined([['World Lore / Rules', contextLore], ['Glossary / Terms', contextGlossary]]), false) +
        '</div>' + buildInspectorComments('world', item, title) + '</main></div>';

    bindTabs(root);
    var back = root.querySelector('[data-inspector-back]'); if (back) back.addEventListener('click', goBackFromInspector);
    var use = root.querySelector('[data-world-use]'); if (use) use.addEventListener('click', function(){ applyWorldFromInspector(item, use); });
    var edit = root.querySelector('[data-world-edit]'); if (edit) edit.addEventListener('click', function(){ openEditorFromInspector('world', item, Object.assign({}, opts, { returnPage: backTarget })); });
    var copy = root.querySelector('[data-world-copy]'); if (copy) copy.addEventListener('click', function(){ copyJSON(item, 'World', copy); });

    directActivate('world-inspector', 'World Inspector', 'Gate');
  }

  function hasSeed(seed, keys){
    if (!seed || typeof seed !== 'object') return false;
    return keys.some(function(k){
      var v = seed[k];
      if (Array.isArray(v)) return v.length > 0;
      if (typeof v === 'string') return !!v.trim();
      return v != null && typeof v !== 'undefined';
    });
  }
  function removeReturnButton(type){
    var page = document.getElementById(type === 'world' ? 'page-create-world' : 'page-create-character');
    if (!page) return;
    page.querySelectorAll('[data-loop-return-inspector]').forEach(function(btn){ btn.remove(); });
  }
  function wrapCreateOpeners(){
    if (typeof window.openLoopCreateCharacterPage === 'function' && !window.openLoopCreateCharacterPage.__loopV18CleanWrapped) {
      var originalCharacter = window.openLoopCreateCharacterPage;
      window.openLoopCreateCharacterPage = function(seed, options){
        var editing = hasSeed(seed, ['id','name','title','gender','age','affiliation','companion','avatarUrl','imageUrl','short','physicalAppearance','appearance','clothing','personality','socialRole','background','description','characterDescription']);
        var result = originalCharacter.call(this, editing ? seed : {});
        if (!editing) {
          try { if (typeof window.loopCreateCharacterReset === 'function') window.loopCreateCharacterReset(); } catch(e) {}
          removeReturnButton('character');
          if (window.__loopInspectorReturnTarget && window.__loopInspectorReturnTarget.type === 'character') window.__loopInspectorReturnTarget = null;
          directActivate('create-character', 'Create Character', 'Character');
        } else {
          directActivate('create-character', 'Edit Character', 'Character');
          injectReturnButton('character');
        }
        return result;
      };
      window.openLoopCreateCharacterPage.__loopV18CleanWrapped = true;
    }

    if (typeof window.openLoopCreateWorldPage === 'function' && !window.openLoopCreateWorldPage.__loopV18CleanWrapped) {
      var originalWorld = window.openLoopCreateWorldPage;
      window.openLoopCreateWorldPage = function(seed, options){
        var editing = hasSeed(seed, ['id','title','name','short','summary','premise','scenario','description','contextSummary','contextMemo','contextNotes','notes','contextLore','lore','rules','contextGlossary','glossary','imageUrl','previewUrl','preview','tags']);
        var result = originalWorld.call(this, editing ? seed : {});
        if (!editing) {
          try { if (typeof window.loopCreateWorldReset === 'function') window.loopCreateWorldReset(); } catch(e) {}
          removeReturnButton('world');
          if (window.__loopInspectorReturnTarget && window.__loopInspectorReturnTarget.type === 'world') window.__loopInspectorReturnTarget = null;
          directActivate('create-world', 'Create World', 'World');
        } else {
          directActivate('create-world', 'Edit World', 'World');
          injectReturnButton('world');
        }
        return result;
      };
      window.openLoopCreateWorldPage.__loopV18CleanWrapped = true;
    }

    window.loopOpenCreateCharacter = function(seed){ return window.openLoopCreateCharacterPage ? window.openLoopCreateCharacterPage(seed || {}) : directActivate('create-character', 'Create Character', 'Character'); };
    window.loopOpenCreateWorld = function(seed){ return window.openLoopCreateWorldPage ? window.openLoopCreateWorldPage(seed || {}) : directActivate('create-world', 'Create World', 'World'); };
  }

  function wrapRoutes(){
    if (typeof window.switchPage === 'function' && !window.switchPage.__loopV18RouteWrapped) {
      var previous = window.switchPage;
      window.switchPage = function(pageName){
        var page = pageName === 'gate' ? 'gate' : pageName;
        var result = previous.apply(this, arguments);
        if (page === 'gate') setTimeout(ensureGateVisible, 0);
        if (page === 'create-character') setTimeout(function(){ directActivate('create-character', 'Create Character', 'Character'); }, 0);
        if (page === 'create-world') setTimeout(function(){ directActivate('create-world', 'Create World', 'World'); }, 0);
        if (page === 'character-inspector') setTimeout(function(){ directActivate('character-inspector', 'Character Inspector', 'Gate'); }, 0);
        if (page === 'world-inspector') setTimeout(function(){ directActivate('world-inspector', 'World Inspector', 'Gate'); }, 0);
        return result;
      };
      window.switchPage.__loopV18RouteWrapped = true;
    }

    window.loopOpenGatePage = function(){ ensureGateVisible(); };
  }

  function installLegacyAliases(){
    window.openLoopCharacterInspectorPage = openCharacterInspectorPage;
    window.openLoopWorldInspectorPage = openWorldInspectorPage;

    var builders = window.LoopBuilders;
    if (builders) {
      builders.openCharacterBuilderModal = function(seed){ return window.openLoopCreateCharacterPage ? window.openLoopCreateCharacterPage(seed || {}) : directActivate('create-character', 'Create Character', 'Character'); };
      builders.openWorldBuilderModal = function(seed){ return window.openLoopCreateWorldPage ? window.openLoopCreateWorldPage(seed || {}) : directActivate('create-world', 'Create World', 'World'); };
    }

    var s = story();
    if (s) {
      s.openStoryCharacterInspectorModal = function(item, opts){ return openCharacterInspectorPage(item, opts || {}); };
      s.openStoryWorldInspectorModal = function(item, opts){ return openWorldInspectorPage(item, opts || {}); };
      s.openStoryCharacterInspectorPage = function(item, opts){ return openCharacterInspectorPage(item, opts || {}); };
      s.openStoryWorldInspectorPage = function(item, opts){ return openWorldInspectorPage(item, opts || {}); };
      s.openHallWorldModal = function(worldId){
        var item = (s.hallWorldBuildingSamples ? s.hallWorldBuildingSamples().find(function(v){ return v.id === worldId; }) : null) ||
          (s.getLibraryWorlds ? s.getLibraryWorlds().find(function(v){ return v.id === worldId; }) : null);
        if (item) return openWorldInspectorPage(item, { source: 'hall', returnPage: 'story' });
      };
    }
  }

  function wrapGateRenderer(){
    if (typeof window.renderLoopGateDefaultAssets === 'function' && !window.renderLoopGateDefaultAssets.__loopV18HeadingsWrapped) {
      var oldRender = window.renderLoopGateDefaultAssets;
      window.renderLoopGateDefaultAssets = function(){
        var result = oldRender.apply(this, arguments);
        setTimeout(normalizeGateHeadings, 0);
        return result;
      };
      window.renderLoopGateDefaultAssets.__loopV18HeadingsWrapped = true;
    }
  }

  function setLoopAssistBusy(btn, busy){
    if (!btn) return;
    var wrap = btn.parentElement || btn;
    var marker = wrap.querySelector(':scope > .loop-assist-busy');
    if (busy) {
      if (!marker) {
        marker = document.createElement('span');
        marker.className = 'loop-assist-busy';
        marker.textContent = 'Working';
        btn.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', marker);
      }
      btn.disabled = true;
      btn.setAttribute('aria-busy', 'true');
    } else {
      if (marker) marker.remove();
      btn.disabled = false;
      btn.removeAttribute('aria-busy');
    }
  }
  window.setLoopAssistBusy = setLoopAssistBusy;

  function wrapAssist(name, selector){
    var fn = window[name];
    if (typeof fn !== 'function' || fn.__loopV18AssistWrapped) return;
    window[name] = function(){
      var btn = document.querySelector(selector);
      setLoopAssistBusy(btn, true);
      try {
        var result = fn.apply(this, arguments);
        if (result && typeof result.finally === 'function') {
          return result.finally(function(){ setLoopAssistBusy(btn, false); });
        }
        setTimeout(function(){ setLoopAssistBusy(btn, false); }, 1200);
        return result;
      } catch(e) {
        setLoopAssistBusy(btn, false);
        throw e;
      }
    };
    window[name].__loopV18AssistWrapped = true;
  }

  function init(){
    ensureInspectorPages();
    wrapGateRenderer();
    wrapCreateOpeners();
    wrapRoutes();
    installLegacyAliases();
    wrapAssist('loopCreateCharacterAssist', '#loopCreateCharacterAssistBtn, [onclick*="loopCreateCharacterAssist"]');
    wrapAssist('loopCreateWorldRunAssist', '#loopCreateWorldAssistBtn, [onclick*="loopCreateWorldRunAssist"]');
    if (activePageName() === 'gate' || !activePageName()) {
      setTimeout(normalizeGateHeadings, 0);
    }
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init, { once: true });
  else init();
  window.addEventListener('load', function(){ setTimeout(init, 80); }, { once: true });
})();
</script>

<style id="loop-gate-reload-recovery-v19-style">
/* V19: finite reload recovery for Gate. Do not resize gallery grid. */
.app.page-image-simple #page-gate.active,
.app.loop-surface-gate-mode #page-gate.active,
#page-gate.active {
  display: block !important;
  visibility: visible !important;
  opacity: 1 !important;
  pointer-events: auto !important;
}

.app.page-image-simple #page-gate.active #gallerySection,
.app.loop-surface-gate-mode #page-gate.active #gallerySection,
#page-gate.active #gallerySection {
  display: block !important;
  visibility: visible !important;
  opacity: 1 !important;
  pointer-events: auto !important;
  height: auto !important;
  max-height: none !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

.app.page-image-simple #page-gate.active .gallery-shell,
.app.loop-surface-gate-mode #page-gate.active .gallery-shell,
#page-gate.active .gallery-shell {
  display: block !important;
  visibility: visible !important;
  opacity: 1 !important;
}
</style>

<script id="loop-gate-reload-recovery-v19-script">
(function(){
  if (window.__LOOP_GATE_RELOAD_RECOVERY_V19__) return;
  window.__LOOP_GATE_RELOAD_RECOVERY_V19__ = true;

  var userInteracted = false;
  function markInteraction(){ userInteracted = true; }
  document.addEventListener('pointerdown', markInteraction, { once: true, capture: true });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', markInteraction, { once: true, capture: true });

  function page(name){ return document.getElementById('page-' + name); }
  function activePage(){ return document.querySelector('.page.active'); }
  function setHeader(title){ var el = document.querySelector('.page-title'); if (el) el.textContent = title; }
  function setGateNavActive(){
    document.querySelectorAll('.sidebar .item.is-active, .sidebar .create.is-active').forEach(function(el){ el.classList.remove('is-active'); });
    var gate = document.querySelector('.sidebar [data-label="Gate"]');
    if (gate) gate.classList.add('is-active');
  }
  function showGateDom(){
    var gate = page('gate');
    if (!gate) return false;
    document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(function(p){ p.classList.remove('active'); });
    gate.classList.add('active');

    var app = document.querySelector('.app');
    if (app) {
      app.classList.remove('page-image-simple');
      app.classList.remove('loop-surface-image-mode');
      app.classList.add('loop-surface-gate-mode');
      app.classList.add('image-prompt-hidden');
    }

    var gateStage = gate && (gate.querySelector('.image-stage-main') || gate);
    var gallery = document.getElementById('gallerySection');
    if (gallery && gateStage && gallery.parentElement !== gateStage) {
      gateStage.appendChild(gallery);
    }
    if (gallery) {
      gallery.hidden = false;
      gallery.removeAttribute('hidden');
      gallery.style.display = '';
      gallery.style.visibility = '';
      gallery.style.opacity = '';
      gallery.style.pointerEvents = '';
      gallery.style.height = '';
      gallery.style.maxHeight = '';
      gallery.style.overflow = '';
      gallery.classList.add('show');
    }

    var chat = document.querySelector('.chat-ui');
    if (chat) chat.hidden = true;
    var main = document.querySelector('.main-content');
    if (main) main.style.overflowY = 'auto';
    var commentsBtn = document.getElementById('commentsToggleBtn');
    if (commentsBtn) {
      commentsBtn.hidden = false;
      commentsBtn.classList.remove('active');
      commentsBtn.title = 'Show Comments';
    }

    window.__loopFinalImageMode = 'gate';
    window.loopImageWorkspacePinned = false;
    setHeader('Gate');
    setGateNavActive();

    try { if (typeof window.renderLoopGateDefaultAssets === 'function') window.renderLoopGateDefaultAssets(); } catch(e) { console.error(e); }
    try { if (typeof window.syncImagePromptDockVisibility === 'function') window.syncImagePromptDockVisibility(); } catch(e) {}
    try { if (typeof window.syncImageMobileStructure === 'function') window.syncImageMobileStructure(); } catch(e) {}
    try { if (typeof window.syncPrivateLibraryIdentity === 'function') window.syncPrivateLibraryIdentity(); } catch(e) {}
    return true;
  }
  function normalizeGateText(){
    var gate = page('gate');
    if (!gate || !gate.classList.contains('active')) return;
    var hub = document.getElementById('loopGateDefaultHub');
    if (hub) {
      var titles = hub.querySelectorAll('.loop-gate-default-list-title');
      if (titles[0]) titles[0].textContent = 'Characters';
      if (titles[1]) titles[1].textContent = 'World Building';
    }
    var gallerySection = document.getElementById('gallerySection');
    var shell = gallerySection ? gallerySection.querySelector('.gallery-shell') : null;
    if (gallerySection && shell && !document.getElementById('loopGateGalleryHeroTitle')) {
      var hero = document.createElement('div');
      hero.id = 'loopGateGalleryHeroTitle';
      hero.className = 'loop-gate-gallery-hero-title';
      hero.textContent = 'Gallery';
      gallerySection.insertBefore(hero, shell);
    }
  }
  function gateLooksBlank(){
    var gate = page('gate');
    if (!gate) return false;
    if (!gate.classList.contains('active')) return true;
    var hub = document.getElementById('loopGateDefaultHub');
    var gallery = document.getElementById('gallerySection');
    if (!gallery) return true;
    var rect = null;
    try { rect = gallery.getBoundingClientRect(); } catch(e) {}
    var visible = !gallery.hidden && getComputedStyle(gallery).display !== 'none' && getComputedStyle(gallery).visibility !== 'hidden' && (!rect || rect.height >= 1);
    return !hub || !visible;
  }
  function shouldRecover(force){
    if (force) return true;
    if (userInteracted) return false;
    var active = activePage();
    if (!active) return true;
    if (active.id === 'page-gate') return gateLooksBlank();
    if (active.id === 'page-image' && window.__loopFinalImageMode !== 'image') return true;
    return false;
  }
  function recoverGate(force){
    if (!shouldRecover(force)) return;
    showGateDom();
    normalizeGateText();
    setTimeout(normalizeGateText, 60);
  }

  var previousGateOpener = window.loopOpenGatePage;
  window.loopOpenGatePage = function(){ recoverGate(true); };
  window.loopForceGateReloadRecovery = function(){ recoverGate(true); };

  // Finite boot pass only: this replaces the old repeating guards without reintroducing intervals.
  function boot(){
    [0, 80, 220, 520, 1100, 1800].forEach(function(ms){ setTimeout(function(){ recoverGate(false); }, ms); });
  }
  if (document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', boot, { once: true });
  else boot();
  window.addEventListener('load', function(){ setTimeout(function(){ recoverGate(false); }, 120); setTimeout(function(){ recoverGate(false); }, 900); }, { once: true });
})();
</script>
